| | A LOVING MESSAGE FROM DOMDear incredible friend and neighbors, My spirit soars with boundless joy as I reach out to you today, for I carry an electrifying message straight from the depths of my heart. I am Dom Jones, and my spirit pulses with an unyielding passion as I run for Congress in the vibrant tapestry of Orange County. Now, more than ever, your support holds the power to create an awe-inspiring transformation. In this spirited race, where financial might and establishment backing loom large, I stand as a beacon of hope—a compassionate servant leader, a fierce advocate for social justice, and an unwavering champion of our cherished community. I stand before you, my dear friend, because I know that you hold the key to unlocking a brighter future. Together, hand in hand, let us etch our names indelibly into the annals of history. Picture this: future generations gathering around, captivated by the tale of how you, with a heart overflowing with love and determination, contributed to the election of Orange County's first African-American Congresswoman. Can you fathom the magnitude of the impact we can create? It is awe-inspiring! I request of you to donate anything you can for me to remain a fighter in this race, for I will fight hard for you and alongside you no matter what! Can you find it within yourself to rise to this challenge? Will you share our message with others, spreading the fervor of our genuine and progressive campaign for the people? I have unshakeable faith that your financial support will propel us towards victory. Together, let us weave an unbreakable bond, as you pour forth your abundance and assistance into my campaign, boldly investing in me as your next Congresswoman. Money, though significant in politics, is but a tool—an avenue to reach the very communities we yearn to serve with unwavering dedication. It affords us the ability to fashion vibrant shirts, captivating signs, and disseminate essential information to keep you informed. However, beyond the realm of financial transactions, I wholeheartedly believe in the power of love. It is love that impels us to discern authenticity, to recognize the genuine fire that burns within a servant leader, and to give from the deepest recesses of our hearts. I beseech you, my dear friend, to join me in this epoch-making moment. Let us seize this unprecedented opportunity to etch our names into the tapestry of history, starting with the majestic Orange County. Your support, in all its forms, is an irreplaceable beacon of hope guiding us towards a future steeped in progress. From the depths of my soul, I extend my deepest gratitude for your unwavering belief in our shared vision.With heartfelt appreciation, Sending you abundant love and support,Your Companion in the fight for justice Always,Dom Jones

clean_body: Dom is traversing SoCal on tour and sharing the news of Unity & MAKING HISTORY... | | Can't see this message? | | | | | dom jones is using love to take over socal in all the right ways!!! | | | | HELP ELECT THE 1ST AFRICAN-AMERICAN TO SERVE IN CONGRESS FOR ORANGE COUNTY IN HISTORY! CHANGE BEGINS IN THESE MOMENTS OF HISTORY! | | DOM JONES IS ENJOYING CONNECTING WITH CALIFORNIA VOTERS & PEOPLE OF ALL BACKGROUNDS THROUGHOUT SOCAL WHILE ON TOUR FOR CONGRESS! WE ARE LETTING ALL PEOPLE KNOW THAT WE ARE FIGHTING FOR EQUITY, CHANGE AND MAKING HISTORY IN ORANGE COUNTY! | | | | | | | | | | A LOVING MESSAGE FROM DOMDear incredible friend and neighbors, My spirit soars with boundless joy as I reach out to you today, for I carry an electrifying message straight from the depths of my heart. I am Dom Jones, and my spirit pulses with an unyielding passion as I run for Congress in the vibrant tapestry of Orange County. Now, more than ever, your support holds the power to create an awe-inspiring transformation. In this spirited race, where financial might and establishment backing loom large, I stand as a beacon of hope—a compassionate servant leader, a fierce advocate for social justice, and an unwavering champion of our cherished community. I stand before you, my dear friend, because I know that you hold the key to unlocking a brighter future. Together, hand in hand, let us etch our names indelibly into the annals of history. Picture this: future generations gathering around, captivated by the tale of how you, with a heart overflowing with love and determination, contributed to the election of Orange County's first African-American Congresswoman. Can you fathom the magnitude of the impact we can create? It is awe-inspiring! I request of you to donate anything you can for me to remain a fighter in this race, for I will fight hard for you and alongside you no matter what! Can you find it within yourself to rise to this challenge? Will you share our message with others, spreading the fervor of our genuine and progressive campaign for the people? I have unshakeable faith that your financial support will propel us towards victory. Together, let us weave an unbreakable bond, as you pour forth your abundance and assistance into my campaign, boldly investing in me as your next Congresswoman. Money, though significant in politics, is but a tool—an avenue to reach the very communities we yearn to serve with unwavering dedication. It affords us the ability to fashion vibrant shirts, captivating signs, and disseminate essential information to keep you informed. However, beyond the realm of financial transactions, I wholeheartedly believe in the power of love. It is love that impels us to discern authenticity, to recognize the genuine fire that burns within a servant leader, and to give from the deepest recesses of our hearts. I beseech you, my dear friend, to join me in this epoch-making moment. Let us seize this unprecedented opportunity to etch our names into the tapestry of history, starting with the majestic Orange County. Your support, in all its forms, is an irreplaceable beacon of hope guiding us towards a future steeped in progress. From the depths of my soul, I extend my deepest gratitude for your unwavering belief in our shared vision.With heartfelt appreciation, Sending you abundant love and support,Your Companion in the fight for justice Always,Dom Jones | | IF YOU ARE TEAM DOM JONES AND HAVEN'T DONATED YET. PLEASE. DONATE TODAY. WE ARE NOT SHY IN SAYING WE AREN'T KEEPING UP IN FUNDRASIING AND WE MUST RUN AT BREAK NECK SPEED TO MAKE THIS WIN POSSIBLE. Peter,

In a race as competitive as ours in CA-27, every month leading into Election Day matters.

Not only is this the race that could make-or-break the House majority, we're running against an entrenched Republican in Mike Garcia who has the backing of national Republicans and their network of super PACs.

Unfortunately, we’ve seen a bit of a fundraising slowdown over the last couple of weeks. It’s not unusual to see a bit of a slump in the summer months, but we’re going to have to pick up the pace in order to stay competitive.

There are _a lot_ of reasons to be excited about our campaign:

**Last week, George received an endorsement from Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren, chairwoman of California’s Congressional Delegation. We’re seeing an uptick in local support on the trail -- so we need our fundraising to match it.**

[**This is the best time to make your first contribution to George’s campaign. If you’re like me, your love of the beautiful California summer is tempered by anxiety about heat waves giving way to wildfire season.

Last year’s wildfire’s claimed nine lives and destroyed nearly 800 buildings across our state. According to the Accuweather forecast for this coming year, “a prolific winter of storms loaded with rain and snow” will lead to “fuel for fires that ignite later in the summer and into autumn.”

**These prolific storms and increasingly large wildfires are the result of climate change. Congress needs to take immediate action to supercharge America’s efforts to combat it.[Will you sign my petition calling on them to do so?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66995107/418274942/673979579?refcode=em-7.24.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGExZWJkMGItODUyYS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gNL6A0qdcKyDpJC57u05YNaiY2Yf_NWCHQzcTuoKbI4=&emci=d11ebd0b-852a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=da1ebd0b-852a-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=8447100)**

The climate provisions in the Inflation Reduction Act that President Biden signed into law last year were a great start; but a great start is not enough. The effects of climate change, like the wildfires Californians know all too well, are _happening now_ and are destroying lives.

**Congress has a responsibility to do everything in its power to combat climate change.** I wrote first-in-the-nation legislation to address the climate crisis while serving in the California Assembly, and if I’m fortunate enough to be elected to represent CA-30, I’ll work every day to bring that commitment to the national level.

And despite this historic heat wave, Greg Abbott recently signed a bill to eliminate water breaks for Texas workers. It’s blatantly cruel.

That’s why we need to take this fight to the federal level. **I just authored a letter, signed by more than 100 of my colleagues, to call on the Biden Administration to take action now. We need federal heat protections for every single worker across this country.

clean_body: Peter, the heat index in my district is nearly 110 degrees today. And despite this historic heat wave, Greg Abbott recently signed a bill to eliminate water breaks for Texas workers. It’s blatantly cruel. That’s why we need to take this fight to the federal level. I just authored a letter, signed by more than 100 of my colleagues, to call on the Biden Administration to take action now. We need federal heat protections for every single worker across this country. = = **= Peter, eliminating these rest breaks was a key priority of Greg Abbott’s corporate mega donors—so it was a key priority for Greg Abbott too. But I ran for Congress to make sure we hold extremist Republicans like Greg Abbott in check. While he sold out Texas workers, we’ve been fighting back. = Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!

* * *

Peter,

I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, **it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!** As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few.

I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so **I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff**.

From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. **I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now**.

Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because **[I’d like to text you](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae7ae7abe73d4b53991e72dedf2b06e3&_e=cxF6FsfizKY2CoLiMM09DgBXlQYXsml6vjgW_o9I_xxT7Ul_03IcOL8QhNPaPpcdM06Pze2iYO1Axglmwc9V6LhatkF1Pl_jsTp90Q5veIC1EAVYjlylgC4LLqX-6nbcIiGO5aCDG2WpBHZyj8I_VrLoLjmWa3_uH1-MsdAQ83iRCXtTQgNCg93nZ7SzSSHvGSpSbMK3LvE37Aq_DR781681YaqG5oRGv7Czu9fAgLsujmsWvPoOpxizYedbyRofQ-64SgNWBzkAAc5MjrJbgml-zEYzsFV0GJibNlCEImdV7UNs7jHETvMIMe0TrefFe6bxbUtWiNOJuKgbIn_-M1EjRiiLsKyq6ORNoUG9QOnHmt4H9FQBcTSUGrgsIAKQFJFG91v0GagGcyA5m5WAunWjPjCz2q8POq9E6Z70stT5vbpO_0xiRA7oigkBb6ih)** , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another.

[**ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO MY CONTACT CARDS LIST ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae7ae7abe73d4b53991e72dedf2b06e3&_e=cxF6FsfizKY2CoLiMM09DgBXlQYXsml6vjgW_o9I_xxT7Ul_03IcOL8QhNPaPpcdM06Pze2iYO1Axglmwc9V6LhatkF1Pl_jsTp90Q5veIC1EAVYjlylgC4LLqX-6nbcIiGO5aCDG2WpBHZyj8I_VrLoLjmWa3_uH1-MsdAQ83iRCXtTQgNCg93nZ7SzSSHvGSpSbMK3LvE37Aq_DR781681YaqG5oRGv7Czu9fAgLsujmsWvPoOpxizYedbyRofQ-64SgNWBzkAAc5MjrJbgml-zEYzsFV0GJibNlCEImdSTawNqsKB4tZIAKj7iJh0549EAEQN7egiNiJkbJhR7sfUwzD6yZREROHTNH8BieUhSsSCrpTHe0J6AHCUyoYGmfzUa7n9bWoLeqVkRbZUpk9SrRKMZuZGFVotI09PRSYxJBDx9PwkoFERJpBbLPo6)

One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat **the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies.** No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you.

As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. **My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat**.

Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success.

So please, before you go, **[make sure that I have your contact information](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae7ae7abe73d4b53991e72dedf2b06e3&_e=cxF6FsfizKY2CoLiMM09DgBXlQYXsml6vjgW_o9I_xxT7Ul_03IcOL8QhNPaPpcdM06Pze2iYO1Axglmwc9V6LhatkF1Pl_jsTp90Q5veIC1EAVYjlylgC4LLqX-6nbcIiGO5aCDG2WpBHZyj8I_VrLoLjmWa3_uH1-MsdAQ83iRCXtTQgNCg93nZ7SzSSHvGSpSbMK3LvE37Aq_DR781681YaqG5oRGv7Czu9fAgLsujmsWvPoOpxizYedbyRofQ-64SgNWBzkAAc5MjrJbgml-zEYzsFV0GJibNlCEImf8vCjDSzmcceHzf4LE6FX5pssJgvHppyfAM4ejnltJYTRgH50p5eaKV4awCas6nsyzpNlQaBdaALeuDY_LH3mfu6jwEvEpmoJs6sgT2WgXAckUXRsmHM1wLqz0R5ZAKnhRP39-j_pDd245k1bXqnBH)**. I want to - and will reach out if I have your number.

[****ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO MY CONTACT CARDS LIST ->****](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae7ae7abe73d4b53991e72dedf2b06e3&_e=cxF6FsfizKY2CoLiMM09DgBXlQYXsml6vjgW_o9I_xxT7Ul_03IcOL8QhNPaPpcdM06Pze2iYO1Axglmwc9V6LhatkF1Pl_jsTp90Q5veIC1EAVYjlylgC4LLqX-6nbcIiGO5aCDG2WpBHZyj8I_VrLoLjmWa3_uH1-MsdAQ83iRCXtTQgNCg93nZ7SzSSHvGSpSbMK3LvE37Aq_DR781681YaqG5oRGv7Czu9fAgLsujmsWvPoOpxizYedbyRofQ-64SgNWBzkAAc5MjrJbgml-zEYzsFV0GJibNlCEImdS41ZsOXqvQN7oRgTi5FaGNAuMpRonfkBBcl-VCN_PWfQquTDQ7-n9y31OKnX3o52SuWh4SJSX2PE0QUwFjVFe1r_Z1jMnha9JQnp_XxemgeGvT8XlJy0zrjHsPwQKukX8uQ07EolF-4aswV5DOlu6)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! | | Peter, I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few. I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff. From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now. Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another. One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies. No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you. As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat. Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success. So please, before you go, . I want to - and will reach out if I have your number. ***** BREAKING JUST NOW ***
MULTIPLE WHISTLEBLOWERS CRACK THE BIDEN CASE WIDE OPEN**
* * *
**[Here's what we know after the BOMBSHELL testimony:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1a4df464269b4e99b77bd8c0bce77bd4&_e=6yaql9__Ki5zdbB6uHAEJVmabz4wYVwTmVVtlAyLVnfQVGksUZ-OzvPpt3OLlDN0RB8vCJbs9fOxPgrTdHfI3nIkzK84y6UVnXKUDm64oc2P_4UDEBA-voJDs_TmR7VeDrN9qhOvvgTPpfBL7vdbOQT4gESEA5ZGlol71ohj8NrehcvtLIKe4bvQg1OxFf33Nkv4RqTIjyJG21q36vtqR8kv8sNyXJ2xt29xCQUti7cc8lgH-54724GyXurC2C4WWiLcpmsKIduk69x7GAu9ZCoGKiAFuPXCd19963Qmvl6KcXS5-C7rRi3aCUATm3UlrB8kCQ81hFvwwYSPtLyUaUv1pFtZXK76tXfCPVToQaYJTGu8DwqNkQAsZBowoT6PQyxI1Aa7xNBobLOZnkb4835ogMBLbPKqi2mgfLLyTSg%3D "Here’s what we know after the Whistleblowers' BOMBSHELL testimony:")**

Operatives in the Deep State did **NOT** follow normal procedures. They slow-walked investigations. They put up unusual roadblocks that derailed evidence collection. They covered up evidence. The Biden team was tipped off before speaking to Hunter Biden. And the Justice Department delayed search warrants and interviews.

And despite alleged international bribery schemes, falsified government documents, influence peddling, rampant drug use, tax evasion, and other alleged crimes... Hunter Biden was then handed a sweetheart deal that avoided any jail time at all.

**THIS ENTIRE CASE STINKS TO HIGH HEAVEN!!!**

Democrats know this scandal is sending shockwaves that could impact the next election, implicate the White House, and could even lead to the **IMPEACHMENT** of top Biden officials.

That's why Democrats are scrambling the jets...

The Liberal Media is coming out in **FULL** **FORCE** to attack the credibility of the whistleblowers, activists are trying to dig up dirt on them, and House Democrats are rushing to undermine our investigation - **ANYTHING** to distract from alleged Biden crimes and Deep State corruption.

_But no matter how much they attack us, our House Majority will never yield and will not back down. _

The Democrats know if they manage to defeat our slim House Majority, this entire case goes cold. The **ONLY** reason we know the truth is because House Republicans subpoenaed documents, combed through evidence, and chased down leads.

**[That's why we're urgently coming to you for help. The Democrats are turbocharging their smear campaign to defeat our House Majority AND run interference for Biden. We desperately need your help to save our fragile House Majority - so are you in?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1a4df464269b4e99b77bd8c0bce77bd4&_e=6yaql9__Ki5zdbB6uHAEJVmabz4wYVwTmVVtlAyLVnfQVGksUZ-OzvPpt3OLlDN0RB8vCJbs9fOxPgrTdHfI3nIkzK84y6UVnXKUDm64oc2P_4UDEBA-voJDs_TmR7VeDrN9qhOvvgTPpfBL7vdbOQT4gESEA5ZGlol71ohj8NrehcvtLIKe4bvQg1OxFf33Nkv4RqTIjyJG21q36vtqR8kv8sNyXJ2xt29xCQUti7cc8lgH-54724GyXurC2C4W-jeBLqZG3cZkc6RjlmYBxguyhsXiu000UVUYfHfx1f0aHqZCfpRDTTOOWYkg9z5iWuRaS998ZZhBaEjRRtigTBVuLbDP68FIFEKNhsmFE2AJ1jnnm9p08yRIeH5oj5eVOavIKLD0pJeTywh2XgdDgDDjzd7s8d6u8uiRjt4tK-Q%3D "That’s why we’re urgently coming to you for help. # KLAYMAN: LEFTIST SCUMBAG REPORTING

The Guardian

The former New York police commissioner Bernie Kerik, a leading Trump ally who worked with [Rudy Giuliani](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=95b7806fcc&e=8edd2b8f7d) on attempts to overturn the 2020 election, has given the special counsel Jack Smith thousands of documents, Kerik’s lawyer said on Monday.[Authorities excavating yard of suspect in New York’s Gilgo Beach killings](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=9b21f72552&e=8edd2b8f7d)[Read more](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=99067c26f4&e=8edd2b8f7d)“I have shared all of these documents, approximately 600MB, mostly pdfs, with the special counsel and look forward to sitting down with them in about two weeks to discuss,” Timothy Parlatore [told CNN](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=476c72ec16&e=8edd2b8f7d).The news was another blow to [Donald Trump](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=17f5b2004d&e=8edd2b8f7d), who last week caused a sensation when he said Smith had in a letter told him he was a target in the investigation, likely to face criminal charges. Smith and his team have been investigating the former president’s role in the events of the January 6 insurrection.
[Continue Reading...](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=f8ae4df99c&e=8edd2b8f7d)

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Why I’m a Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
I am so proud to now live in the land of the free, and the home of the brave.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z31ai3eeglnto4b0o0pkgi54u8ih2a5hc8qjcna8_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9ie0o34c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uoob6ddl6dor4ob2e6o61d9kc2ojad3mmeq66t3hclh68dpgctj64p9ke4r35c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphimspm2o3nc1j38p5jc5jr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf5e0at471h5pc4shne02vgpnq9p03q8e78gn988_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9ie0o34c9h2bs)
---
I've experienced socialism, and I won't let Biden & the radical Dems put America down that path.

My name is Hung Cao.

I'm a Vietnamese Immigrant, and according to Chuck Schumer, I should be a DEMOCRAT.

But NO, I'm a PROUD conservative and I'd NEVER let Schumer tell me how to think.

Allow me to share the deeply personal reason I'm a Republican and NOT a Democrat: Shortly before the fall of Saigon, my family immigrated from communist Vietnam to the US.

I am so proud to now live in the land of the free, and the home of the brave. I served our country as a Special Operations Officer for 25 years, with combat deployments in Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia.

Listen, fellow patriot, I didn't escape Communist Vietnam and defend Freedom with the Navy just for Chuck Schumer and his Radical Left Democrats to drive us to socialism once again.

**[So won't you pitch in now to help me FIRE Schumer? I am in desperate need of your help because the latest polls show Democrats WINNING in November:](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zufv4mepbf5aj7qghr9nhnjdoj2ngaq1ht4plo38_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9ie0o34c9h2bs)**
---
|
---
[**FIRE SCHUMER - PITCH IN NOW >>**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn13uh06uus3ionhhoddvdqt2ukqbjcnfh0ioic0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9ie0o34c9h2bs)
---

But listen, fellow patriot: I refuse to run from a fight. The radical left thought they could shut me up and send me away but guess what? I'm not going anywhere.

**[Stand with me NOW and make sure we FIRE SCHUMER and all his cronies next November:](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3v4411hh2p285m2hn8b6u9teg3ojo46462uu260_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9ie0o34c9h2bs)**

---
[**FIRE SCHUMER - PITCH IN NOW >>**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0hb773eobo86538te8tu0cjm51jh87sic0j1lt0_rp22sh2s8i66p70c9ie0o34c9h2bs)
---
In Liberty

name: The Flyover
subject: Taking Care of Biden, Taunting Harmon’s Stones, and Dylan’s Castle For Sale
body:
The Justice Department sued Tex. Gov Greg Abbott on Monday over a floating barrier on the Rio Grande designed to block migrants from crossing into the U.S. from Mexico.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFrwzAQhX-NvMUoJ8lWBg2F4C1dOnQ0snSKVSwp2Beb_vviNKVQutzB9949uPd-6S82TjFfX21CQ6H01lFcseftAdQBRA-VNwERUFRojs2JgxYAuhoN2BCAC9Eop6V1Tp0CR6lw0OCHIwxVNMBB8BYUP4lG6lp7lEEeB6_5oKwMTHL0kcpcf5SYacQwfZYV59qVVE1mJLotTLww6Bh027bVMa-40BZpnEuhZfcx6J5Xu010d0q9s-lm4zUzce5-tGYXlnKfHTJxxmTj9IQJfbynP9CVTJjpN-HAQAFv99mB-l7iwd4w-2o2_rbFaYpL0zLJr3vU4w36v9WvAAAA__9WKXjd)
| | |
# TUESday, JULY 25, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today in 1814, the first fully effective steam locomotive chugged a load of coal in England, ushering in the Rail Age. On July 25 just 18 years later, in 1832, the U.S. suffered its [first fatal railroad accident.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfY29E5wNje2D4lmz51o7WBY74UmwiQKn876t27vwOr_R83NYbSZLj8Z92di3mlXyTN68wKRwV6hX74CIzsu7ZDXYBnDXi3G-OjaeJ7h4XG4K2YIfBjkaDN4iwTNyLQ0ANE46waGvmyxzYRDPcwwz3kUzsDHCQlsvlmeVoG8d05jeXi897n9zW2qt2-l-H1w6vT0r5dcjnT-zw2japKtCp5FCb1JbLqWjnIp6qilJqU4UklUxBkfcS-GhqmM2kRwML9sWF15ekJNVOnYHHTpJ-v-1vhu8AAAD__9TmXqg)

In today's edition, we're discussing how White House aides protect President Biden from appearing frail, how a rude British heckler fired up Open Championship winner Brian Harmon, and a look inside Bob Dylan's Scottish castle, now up for sale.

Think we could improve something? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtliX44zxwFCp8pauHS0wR3wVDpFLY_Xvq2bO_J6e9D4v8yVIkdv1I2zsW65zWJo8eIbhhP0JzYw6-cyMbDT7sx0BnUF0evU5cooUlwXCyIPL1hprFwIEoBRz0uIR0MCAPYzGkutcYsp0jslB7ANlRcBJWt27ryq3tnIuv_XBe7fUTRe_tnZX5k3hpHA6juOF9c_M9NM2Zd4J9O7T_ZBS5NsOiuC6BSnPWHv99hcAAP__iqVQOQ) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS3W9eXHMDB0YUu6VOpogbnUtE6oHGSUt6-6ez860vd5na-hbOXxdQt3ci3XOSytHDSDuqC9oJiRJ5eJkAQnN2qjhEajRr46kzXKkAhj0piUjTGbOOUIi5VkreLFIaAAhXYEOYIeIE5GqCAkqQlkEEwCpdLqPnzX8mgr5e1VD9qHpd755tbWfp9MvDH0DH3vfchhoVjrz3_A0H-s5LfX-0H7jfqToee7S-EoiUk4ObZz4F8AAAD__8ycUlk). Enjoying _The Flyover_? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, [Roots](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFrwzAQhX-NvMUoJ8lWBg2F4C1dOnQ0snSKVSwp2Beb_vviNKVQutzB9949uPd-6S82TjFfX21CQ6H01lFcseftAdQBRA-VNwERUFRojs2JgxYAuhoN2BCAC9Eop6V1Tp0CR6lw0OCHIwxVNMBB8BYUP4lG6lp7lEEeB6_5oKwMTHL0kcpcf5SYacQwfZYV59qVVE1mJLotTLww6Bh027bVMa-40BZpnEuhZfcx6J5Xu010d0q9s-lm4zUzce5-tGYXlnKfHTJxxmTj9IQJfbynP9CVTJjpN-HAQAFv99mB-l7iwd4w-2o2_rbFaYpL0zLJr3vU4w36v9WvAAAA__9WKXjd).

_Note: In our last edition, we accidentally said that the Washington Commanders NFL team sold for $6 million. The team actually sold for $6 BILLION. _

|
---
## Justice Dept. Sues Texas Over Migrant Barrier
The Justice Department [sued Tex. Gov Greg Abbott](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAQQH-NvRHBgfkYGLpkS9eO1mHOyUXYRBgl7b-v0rnj01ue3tdlviAX3q-fuFHsa51x6fykWToBkwA9w5jjSgSkR4rKBgleA_jxFoHyBJiXRKgn9C644ECpyWFQxgc9cgQJWjqYZNDW-JPPZFajUvYyTWjWwUjK3Gs73Svv_UZr-alPaqelbmOJt94fx6A_BjgPcMbHTq_jrd7QOi-FBjh3-sZDpNoyNfHCTk0kbI2pHSLXu-Bt42vDznUXXqclaU9unTBZpZVyVpssF6NDtsmOLebHi0vhw7rByOuGXP5i-v9vfgMAAP__xshkyQ) on Monday over a floating barrier on the Rio Grande designed to block migrants from crossing into the U.S. from Mexico. The lawsuit seeks to force Texas to remove a roughly 1,000-foot line of bright orange wrecking-ball-sized buoys that the Biden administration calls dangerous both to people and the environment. Abbott has refused to back down and, in tweets leading up to the lawsuit, said Biden would ["face the consequences"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2SrCAQQOGn0QwLWvwLDG5iNjfd0AJpnJ5CsaBnmHn7rd1445Oc-r5u681QoHP_bw6c2cfVbEwvXOUgoBPQrlC72SMCtjXOqp8kjC3AWN9ni0OrTLc5pXpl7Cil15uedKfUpO3gappBQisH6OTU9npsRofaa2XdKG1ntK-0REccU_OIdPIdffjEF6Zmi0cd5jvzlav2XwVLBUsppfHxfWLJP72C5YqBmLZcwcL4Nlns8SWMtZFZ5EIXZmHJ4SmCYcwsikmixOSysDE5TCLj9kzEH0HHhaejcxcuPkQwJT-J6zS7q1AIlPuh0nI_DIXfNf5b6jsAAP___MlueA) if Texas were sued. The governor says the state's efforts have helped it seize nearly 400,000 illegal migrants and 422 million doses of fentanyl.
## Witness: Biden Joined Hunter on Money Calls
Hunter Biden's former best friend Devon Archer is expected to testify in Congress this week that he saw Hunter [put his father, then-VP Joe Biden, on speakerphone](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAUhZ8Gbzci13948NDFW7p2tMBcApENFtw4TZ--cudun86RjnS-r9t802EN8f6pNxrZpVkvHA6aZQ_YAtYzVnZ0REh1ReO1GySqGlFVflRd32lnFzR6sa7uWmPs0BrUblB26FQVRpRYyx5bOdRdoy7KUuOaq7FKmlY3TjSSbOCUL48UInty6zsdlC9L2qp19Mx7EfWHwEngFN97KnxWAqdzWOAk-5NP8s_IlMEESxH2JwN7inDsYLWFRyJI8Yxg9ykSvAJ7MM8SIpUCupS0BM1UQDOspAsDgk0_FIHDRgXoG3adOVIGS0eKoPPiKQMnYCoc3FvgVOXR7q-wrqF0vWjkfdNh_bvC_5v9DQAA__9PG306) in meetings with overseas business partners. President Biden has denied participating in business calls with his son. However, congressional investigators say Archer will testify he witnessed Joe Biden joining the calls as many as two dozen times. One such incident came in 2017 during a WhatsApp discussion with the CEO of a Chinese financial firm.

Asked if he was with Hunter during that session, Biden shouted "No!" to a reporter. But new reports [show a photo taken that day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAQQL9GOxxuEcWCIs11lzals8J6kKB7I0Ryf5-51OnezGvevI_bfMOY4n5_x41sWXlGV-JJsxwFaAFqhtbblQhItWQvwyTBKADTBrvQ5LQ2Tl2cHB1ILcdh8kCOjBlx0W20IEHJEbSc1NCbznjq1_6yeCMXjf3a9JJ8LHx0nxz3EmhNTz7p6BxvbbKhlEdu1FsD1wautdZu5Z-dan75Bq4PTrFEl18YuHAWOXAV4XsvdIgletqFR5-F4-OkUkh4SljxIBF4I5FxI-HxKXLAL_Jcd7FRznin9rD-UWNKMQ9j08v7hjH9VZX_J_0GAAD___4RbIM) of Hunter sitting with two women in the president's 1967 Corvette in front of Biden's house.
## US News Ranks Top Cities for Retirement
A new ranking of [Top 10 U.S. cities for retirees](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFvhSAUBeBfAxsGL6g4MHRxe107GoTL8zYoBukz_feNnd_2JSc5J-frMT8cJdqfn25DW2Oena_0wlkOAjoBagYebEQEVBxt248SjAIwfLWujYPyJkodRlgi9iqazqMJS-9Qd8jJggQlB-jkqHptGhNQR90uwcilczoyLTFQzaX5zrTXFWP6zS8sjc8bT3at9TiZ-mAwMZiu62r8vvg7ZDDd1QwmOdy-VfMhWil-TuGpEp4i5iIKViqIZ7PWLfFiw3FRSnT2A9PyuTlK_1v1_fW_AAAA__9HS1lf) by U.S. News & World Report leans heavily on towns in Pennsylvania and Florida. The ranking is part of a full analysis of 150 cities and how they meet retirees' needs.

The criteria used by the publication are mainly economic, weighing factors such as housing, healthcare, taxes, and the job market. The list is designed to quickly research a wide range of retirement options.

No. 1 on the U.S. News Top 10 list was Lancaster, PA. Florida first shows up with Pensacola at No. 3. [See the full list analyzing all 150 cities for their retirement potential. ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuMyEQBOCnge5OeOF8UFD8jTv_bcrTAotNgg8LNrby9pGTNt1I80mjeTtvZyy17Jf_eCPPuW0YuTxoU-sEywR6A5l8JgLSkvzh6BRYDWDl1SMGG_Ia7XJwimKM2pmclhhIoXPZyeJBgVYrLMrpo7GzTWSyOYRkVVjQZGEUpcKtz--t7HylXL_ag_oc201Wf2W-D6H_CTgJOHXCSoORaf4cOz3HSwk43StGGi-A-0fZL68YaPD0W0zcpk5cOsnu0_1Zai3juAqjLjcs9WeK_37-HQAA__9cWFyX)

Gov Greg Abbott on Monday over a floating barrier on the Rio Grande designed to block migrants from crossing into the U.S. from Mexico. | | | | | | TUESday, JULY 25, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today in 1814, the first fully effective steam locomotive chugged a load of coal in England, ushering in the Rail Age. On July 25 just 18 years later, in 1832, the U.S. suffered its In today's edition, we're discussing how White House aides protect President Biden from appearing frail, how a rude British heckler fired up Open Championship winner Brian Harmon, and a look inside Bob Dylan's Scottish castle, now up for sale. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . Note: In our last edition, we accidentally said that the Washington Commanders NFL team sold for $6 million. The team actually sold for $6 BILLION. | Justice Dept. Sues Texas Over Migrant Barrier The Justice Department on Monday over a floating barrier on the Rio Grande designed to block migrants from crossing into the U.S. from Mexico. The lawsuit seeks to force Texas to remove a roughly 1,000-foot line of bright orange wrecking-ball-sized buoys that the Biden administration calls dangerous both to people and the environment. Abbott has refused to back down and, in tweets leading up to the lawsuit, said Biden would if Texas were sued. The governor says the state's efforts have helped it seize nearly 400,000 illegal migrants and 422 million doses of fentanyl. Witness: Biden Joined Hunter on Money Calls Hunter Biden's former best friend Devon Archer is expected to testify in Congress this week that he saw Hunter in meetings with overseas business partners. President Biden has denied participating in business calls with his son. However, congressional investigators say Archer will testify he witnessed Joe Biden joining the calls as many as two dozen times. One such incident came in 2017 during a WhatsApp discussion with the CEO of a Chinese financial firm. Asked if he was with Hunter during that session, Biden shouted "No!" to a reporter. But new reports of Hunter sitting with two women in the president's 1967 Corvette in front of Biden's house. US News Ranks Top Cities for Retirement A new ranking of by U.S. News & World Report leans heavily on towns in Pennsylvania and Florida. The ranking is part of a full analysis of 150 cities and how they meet retirees' needs. The criteria used by the publication are mainly economic, weighing factors such as housing, healthcare, taxes, and the job market. The list is designed to quickly research a wide range of retirement options. No. 1 on the U.S. News Top 10 list was Lancaster, PA. Florida first shows up with Pensacola at No. 3. Florida has the highest number of January 6 defendants.
One would expect the Republican Governor of Florida to be in support of helping January 6 political prisoners, but in the case of Ron DeSantis, he hasn't lifted a finger to help a single J6er from Florida, and he is hoping to see Donald Trump jailed over his recent J6 indictment.

# **Ron Paul: What Retirement Savers Must Do Before The 2024 Election**
---
**Ron Paul: What Retirement Savers Must Do Before The 2024 Election**
### **... This could save your hard-earned money AND the country at the same time.**
**... This could save your hard-earned money AND the country at the same time.**
| | | Hi, Dr. Ron Paul here. What's the best way to **stop Biden 's agenda?** No, it's not voting Republican. Although that might help, there is something much better: __**It 's called voting with your wallet!**__ Here's what I mean... Democrats get easy votes by giving away newly printed money. But this cheapens our money supply. And it hurts Americans by forcing them to pay extra for food, rent, and gas. So what happens when the people start demanding REAL MONEY? I predict...
---
| | **Biden 's Inflationary Con-Job Will End**
---
| **Biden 's Inflationary Con-Job Will End**
---

We need to help this process along, and demanding real money protects the country from moral and financial corruption. _But that 's not all it does._ Gold and silver also **safeguard YOUR savings from inflation better than anything else available.** So it's a win-win for both you and America. It is to me. As a geriatric nurse practitioner, I know how vital Social Security and Medicare are to our seniors and their well-being. Now, I’m taking that level of care to Congress: I’ve proudly thrown my support behind legislation to protect Social Security and Medicare. No matter how many partisan rumors or claims are thrown around about these programs being cut, my stance will not change: I will always fight to protect and preserve Medicare and Social Security from being dismantled by Democrats. I want to know where you stand on this important issue. name: Greg Landsman via Blue Amp Action
subject: Asking for $1 ahead of our end-of-month deadline
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71812f89-9037-425c-b3df-821677a65fe6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hey, Peter, it's Greg. Last year, voters across OH-01 agreed that it was time for a new kind of leader in Washington. Someone who’d always place people over politics and fight relentlessly to deliver for children and families across the region. And thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we defied the odds and became the only House Democratic campaign to defeat a multiterm Republican incumbent in 2022. Since then, it’s been the honor of my life to champion Ohio’s children and families as a member of Congress. My team and I are fighting every day for the affordable healthcare, quality public education, good-paying union jobs, reproductive freedoms, and gun violence prevention that our communities deserve. But with Washington Republicans eager to use Southwest Ohio to expand their House Majority, I need your help to ensure the radical-right can’t flip this seat and reverse the progress we’ve made. [That’s why today I’m asking for $1. Yes, really just $1.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3853d27-4529-4499-8f91-68d889d44917/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’re still running a few thousand dollars short of our must-hit end-of-month fundraising goal. And if we fall short, we run the risk of not having the resources we need to stay competitive in this toss up election. [I know $1 may not seem like a lot, but if everyone reading this email chips in, we’ll be back on track in no time. So please, can I count on you to donate $1 or more to help us reach our goal and continue delivering for Ohio’s working families?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T436845dc-685e-4d9c-bc98-e8b65c6a55dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4538ccda-936d-4637-ab17-813b4e3b38b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65c811d0-c29b-4d54-adbe-ffa95d250814/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22732f12-83c8-4660-9716-759455520857/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37dac493-53be-4ccd-a756-405d27b9225d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | Appreciate you, Greg
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a42c0cf-e958-4752-b1e4-96f073400e01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_fr_90do_landsman_230724?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68a7fe36-ce75-4cb3-ab5c-53c0f93d8164/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=efe2ccf4-8e2e-4d84-b554-189bb14300cc&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=efe2ccf4-8e2e-4d84-b554-189bb14300cc&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Jim Himes Votes to Politicize 401k Investment Plan Decisions
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
July 25, 2023 Earlier in this session, Jim Himes voted against the [Prudence and Loyalty in Selecting Plan Investments](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aGrXfGvGqt2dJbogGd8DTuUFiKA-uJSjDjFtrMWq-aMqEcDFOnppum8GvGkQHXJE3YapxhS6IKnFSiBWonQJRGdZlOPxvwA_yhPeAMq6x3c6aWm6Z9ENx4qHbMA7Dld_QczmUM5mt1EjYz795fyKCKBwsz1-GtoCmSg0h1k_626ZIyDg3q-CFP-0FrZVKOgrZpfejb_ma84SaZg05RDZkbaGSzg5z2cNKP6AkfZ9yqKsvxTyN82Mz4Bao2GeSVX0npmE5Ckg9tXFZx35nEg-9F-PDvTGXrkMZIU5r5LZLzGIxLduC9C-hQumllBEL10K&c=gzwzDyYl896WcnZ0UErBatawH1fg7wd2O3BlwzNudoDwNZ5cuSkrzA==&ch=CT1xdrCe7b9GQfH4C5mIN1QJIuGoD9JjgFmGWjy2Gq6SlnxeFYlyMg==) act. The Bill was a Republican-led effort to reverse a Biden Labor Department rule facilitating and encouraging financial managers to incorporate Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) considerations when running a client's 401(k) or retirement account. Knowing a Republican House was coming in January, Biden's Labor Dept. team regulated in Dec.'22 what it knew it could not achieve through congressional legislation - an all too common gambit. Biden's rule/regulation, as things currently stand, drives the 'Woke' agenda into the investment management of the nation's retirement savings, as well as any other of our investment accounts! It doesn't force ESG into portfolio decisions - it just enables it while Leftist mouthpieces publicly berate and jaw-bone investment houses to "go green" and "go woke." This amounts to the politicization of investment decision-making, potentially impairing the investment returns retirees depend upon, as well as everyone's ability to preserve and increase our personal wealth! Retirement plans should be focused on producing the maximum return on investment, and NOT a political agenda. Is there no aspect of our lives Jim Himes and the 'progressive' Democrats can keep their meddling hands off? This action is all of a part of the Democrats' socialist agenda of 'Shrinking American Life,' which is constantly pressuring us: a) Economically, via inflation, debt, taxes/fees, and now ESG-driven investing; b) Impairing our Personal Mobility via green dream-driven high energy costs; c) Transforming our Culture, via persistent grievance agitation, and CRT and the sexualization of our children in schools; d) Increasing our personal Vulnerability via the insidious digitization of our transactions and medical records. Topmost of several critical aspects, my campaign is about reclaiming control of our lives, turning back these endless regulations, and re-establishing our individual liberties within a free America as founded, and as we have always known. These individual personal and economic liberties, as codified in our Constitution, are what made America the most successful nation ion history - and they must be reclaimed in the upcoming elections. I'd deeply appreciate your help in this effort - you can contribute here: [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aGrXfGvGqt2dJbogGd8DTuUFiKA-uJSjDjFtrMWq-aMqEcDFOnppus_qVNcWJ6k3u2_I4VefAMq3ljxnfqDaYF-lO3p_szkPmZavgC_oMhYEbd_23jn10nepb3VHEjBe57p5ik6oi-f5t-zyhMoDI2KKLsIypCH5iuLHbgrXdirAdqNtZQVwmo5nPZuaRDImGsHCVBICQ37vUhnHdfO50hobodfoF8JTKhdN-5JN0qo=&c=gzwzDyYl896WcnZ0UErBatawH1fg7wd2O3BlwzNudoDwNZ5cuSkrzA==&ch=CT1xdrCe7b9GQfH4C5mIN1QJIuGoD9JjgFmGWjy2Gq6SlnxeFYlyMg==) Upcoming Media Appearance: This Friday, July 28th, I will be a guest on Carl Higbie's 'FrontLine' program on NewsMax TV between 5-6pm, discussing parents' rights in deciding the appropriateness of materials and curricula in the public schools.
And remember.......
Jim Himes is NO Moderate
And he proves it every week!
Please re-circulate this message to any and all who are interested...or should be. Help is on the way,
Bob MacGuffie Candidate for Congress [www.BobMacforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aGrXfGvGqt2dJbogGd8DTuUFiKA-uJSjDjFtrMWq-aMqEcDFOnppuqeBazxY3P6Ug_j6bAmybkeD1K7EXJnAokgU_gBe_B4Z-QQc87-ihakced_9-Nw5aNy4WWOuEp7Stk67ypYMxYQtZh2rTZcOZ7CzdlIv6sDk&c=gzwzDyYl896WcnZ0UErBatawH1fg7wd2O3BlwzNudoDwNZ5cuSkrzA==&ch=CT1xdrCe7b9GQfH4C5mIN1QJIuGoD9JjgFmGWjy2Gq6SlnxeFYlyMg==)
---

name: R.M.
subject: The Freedom to Vote Act is BACK!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Help us make it a reality, again!
|
---

Team, we hope you're feeling as fired up as we are because we've got an urgent mission on our hands! Powerful forces threaten our democracy’s foundation, and we need your help to protect it!
The Freedom to Vote Act is our golden ticket to fortifying our democracy and safeguarding our democratic values against those who wish to undermine them.
Picture this: free and fair elections where every voice matters, where gerrymandering is history, and where power resides with the people -- that's what the Freedom to Vote Act is all about! name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs1CGz_DBN

THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of The
College Scam -- have you?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os1CGz_DBN

Fellow
Patriot,

THOUSANDS
of Americans have already gotten their copy of The College Scam
-- have you?

If not, I
want to send you your very own copy when you make a gift of ANY
AMOUNT to TPUSA today.

Yes --
ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $5 will help us cover the cost of
shipping.

Just
click here to get your copy!

The Left
is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities,
brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our
freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX
DOLLARS.

Turning
Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help.

That's
why I'm offering you this special thank-you gift when you make a
donation of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA.

We want
to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned
Americans as we can!

I've
spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most
impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student
activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen
firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people
with their toxic "woke" ideology.

But we're
not giving up. We're fighting back by exposing them in The
College Scam, and I want to send you a copy as a special
thank-you for your support.

Get Your
Copy

When you
read The College Scam, you'll learn:

- My
10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the
judge of whether or not it's a good investment for students OR
taxpayers

- The
real reasons that administrators and professors attack American
Greatness

- How the
government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation
into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

And
remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.
Instead, it combines frontline experience from my eleven years
criss-crossing America to speak with students, extensive research
into the dirty secrets of higher education, and a prosecutor's
intensity to present my case against the College Cartel.

This book
has a phenomenal 4.7 out of five stars on Amazon, with glowing
reviews like:

"Charlie
Kirk does a great job of exposing the craziness on contemporary
college campuses. Even for those reasonably well informed about
this, he adds more valuable information." -- Susan

"Charlie
absolutely nails the problems of the system... Thanks!! Keep
doing what you are doing!!" -- Michal

And there
are hundreds more just like these from grassroots Americans who
are ready to fight back against this rigged, bloated, and broken
college system.

Are you
one of them? Are you ready to arm yourself with the knowledge and
the strategy that will help us dismantle the College Cartel?

Then
please -- let me send you a copy of The College Scam right now.
All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just
a few dollars, to Turning Point USA.

Get Your
Copy

When you
claim your copy, you get the best of both worlds: You'll get a
copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point
USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the
radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

Join the
thousands of Americans who have already taken advantage of this
limited-time offer, and learn how you can join the fight against
the College Cartel today.

Claim
your copy of The College Scam and help us defend America's
future!

Thank you
for your support,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: will you be my spotter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4397?t=1009&amount=25&akid=292%2E52803%2E6GP0bO ][IMG]

Hey Peter, I don’t want to dwell on bad news, but I need to
share something with you.

I had to cut my workout short because I just got word from my finance team
that even though it’s only Tuesday, we’re already lagging behind on this
week’s fundraising goal.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4397?t=1010&amount=25&akid=292%2E52803%2E6GP0bO ]I’m counting on this grassroots team to flex its
muscles, Peter.
Would you be willing to pitch in a quick $25 to give our fundraising a
quick burst of momentum?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4397?t=1011&amount=25&akid=292%2E52803%2E6GP0bO ]Donate

We’ve got what it takes to win this race, Peter.

We’ve got a strong core thanks to our experience, endorsements from nearly
70 Maryland leaders, and the most dedicated grassroots team I could ever
ask for.

We’re punching above our financial weight class, so we can’t let our
multi-millionaire opponent’s financial edge be the difference in this
race.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4397?t=1012&amount=25&akid=292%2E52803%2E6GP0bO ]Can I count on you to be my spotter and chip in $25 to put us in a
strong position to clear this week’s fundraising goal?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4397?t=1013&amount=25&akid=292%2E52803%2E6GP0bO ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4397?t=1014&amount=50&akid=292%2E52803%2E6GP0bO ]Chip in $50

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4397?t=1008&amount=30&akid=292%2E52803%2E6GP0bO ]Other Amount

I know this is a heavy lift, but just know how much I appreciate you
having my back,
Peter!

—Angela

name: Ben Savage
subject: Quarter 3
body:
| | | |
---
Dear Friends,
I want to thank you for your support for our campaign. We were the top fundraiser during the last financial quarter. As of today we've raised nearly $1 million!
We have raised the 3rd most since the beginning of the campaign and have the 3rd highest cash on hand.
We're seeing a groundswell of support in the district and I just returned from a very productive trip to D.C., speaking with members of Congress and influential organizations.
I need your help to keep up this positive momentum. [Would you contribute $25, $50, $100, $250 or even more to help us push forward?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cZMkn9K38kZ6R-Js3dobLz0qY8DXmD5DiUMxKSBnLB2C5Md1sKzXTc7VTxxdtnCSKt1wdWvcm9VZkP_B_MLjkmyW893J-bXX9V7EEP39kcrV4WS3Y8_BjlR9i6BsqUKnFnzzxHwP2IfyDsvjMHQNeSDTIsvLaWcDbWg5dREia44Z_EteU7kbKA==&c=LSnRdNFqzBxQDC8QbJmpO6_HRcqUWJt4iPPAz5UfIY1s0m_nHz61cA==&ch=7cSOrcJRJOn3VN9F6I70JlcaB0vQLgLDeo6e3Aidk8jnb9mhV6c24A==)
The maximum allowable contribution is $3,300 per individual but any amount you can contribute will go a long way.
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cZMkn9K38kZ6R-Js3dobLz0qY8DXmD5DiUMxKSBnLB2C5Md1sKzXTc7VTxxdtnCSKt1wdWvcm9VZkP_B_MLjkmyW893J-bXX9V7EEP39kcrV4WS3Y8_BjlR9i6BsqUKnFnzzxHwP2IfyDsvjMHQNeSDTIsvLaWcDbWg5dREia44Z_EteU7kbKA==&c=LSnRdNFqzBxQDC8QbJmpO6_HRcqUWJt4iPPAz5UfIY1s0m_nHz61cA==&ch=7cSOrcJRJOn3VN9F6I70JlcaB0vQLgLDeo6e3Aidk8jnb9mhV6c24A==)

Thank you again for your support. I'm incredibly grateful. Please don't hesitate to reach out at any time.
Sincerely, Ben [www.SavageForCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cZMkn9K38kZ6R-Js3dobLz0qY8DXmD5DiUMxKSBnLB2C5Md1sKzXTdr3WnvIqdi1_TlVrYuYhekA8_RwKCknED0KxqiGVS0vtQtgpkiH2DcQoitLur2Nc8gwpbM63UWr8MZuhv6j4E_Mni8g6ba-9O3A6pHnv5oX&c=LSnRdNFqzBxQDC8QbJmpO6_HRcqUWJt4iPPAz5UfIY1s0m_nHz61cA==&ch=7cSOrcJRJOn3VN9F6I70JlcaB0vQLgLDeo6e3Aidk8jnb9mhV6c24A==)

subject: 🚫 Take Action: Say NO to the "Big Lie Bill"!
body:
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T972b6abe-77de-450f-8c64-e42d19137398/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| |
---
| | | Kevin McCarthy and his right-wing GOP are at it again. They are attempting to push through extremist legislation that prioritizes profit and corporations over the well-being of working people introducing the American Confidence in Elections Act (ACE) aka the "Big Lie Bill". This bill has been labeled as "the most conservative election integrity bill to be seriously considered" in decades. However, its true intentions are far from protecting election integrity. We cannot stand idly by while our democracy is under threat. We must unite and demand that Congress reject this dangerous and regressive bill. [Our elections should be fair, accessible, and secure for all Americans. Take a stand, add your name now → ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7572459e-1995-4d6b-9c19-1141943ab8ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6bed3f2-03ef-44a5-81ef-f0f0abd24237/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| The "Big Lie Bill" would increase the influence of billionaires, corporations, and secret money in our elections, while simultaneously creating barriers for eligible voters to exercise their right to vote. This move is nothing short of anti-voter, eroding the trust many Americans have in our elections and political process. [Sign the petition now and add your voice to the call for Congress to oppose the "Big Lie Bill."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f2f20a4-ffa4-416d-908e-b0508d1bb728/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6bba98a-7c41-4845-a204-c473aef27cc7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: BREAKING SENATE NEWS
subject: Member of ‘Tennessee Three’ set to challenge Marsha Blackburn for her Senate seat
body:
This is the most pressing update in your inbox.

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING SENATE NEWS:
Member of 'Tennessee Three' set to challenge Marsha Blackburn for her Senate seat**
This is the most pressing update in your inbox.

A radical Democrat is gearing up to flip Tennessee blue and defeat Senator Marsha Blackburn.

_**[If Republicans lose this Senate seat, we'll NEVER be able to recover or take back the Majority. So we're pleading with you to pitch in straight away and hold the line in Tennessee.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z86mgur6u5sqvvc2pgag8c4lbus0boeelfo4b48o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg60o74cph2bs "If Republicans lose this Senate seat, we’ll NEVER be able to recover or take back the Majority. So we’re pleading with you to pitch in straight away and hold the line in Tennessee.")**_

Liberal megadonors, pro-abortion activists, and woke warriors are already lining up to fund Marsha Blackburn's opponent with MILLIONS of dollars.

This opponent is as radical as they come and a key part of the "Tennessee Three." Barack Obama, AOC, Joe Biden, and Kamala Harris have pledged their support to her.

She's one of the radical Democrats who took bullhorns onto the Tennessee House Floor, disrupted regular order, called in all the Democrat bigwigs for reinforcements, and lined their pockets from scores of angry Liberal donors.

**Now she 's using her connections and liberal influence to destroy our Tennessee values and bring her woke ideology to the U.S. Senate.**

A tidal wave of liberal cash is already pouring into her campaign since her announcement was rumored. So, we're pleading with EVERYONE reading this to pitch in anything they can to help protect Senator Marsha Blackburn and hold this seat for Republicans.

---
| | [KEEP TENNESSEE REPUBLICAN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z30ivt6tj90ekjh7cq8796p1j4iq26sfd6jmaijg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg60o74cph2bs "KEEP TENNESSEE REPUBLICAN")
---

---

So here's where we stand:

One of the 'Tennessee Three' just set her eyes on the all-important Tennessee Senate seat. She has all the name ID and mega-donor backing needed to flip this seat. We have a chance to stop her, but we must respond right now.

_**[We need everyone- and we mean EVERYONE - to do their part before the end of the day today. Donate now. Save Tennessee. Save America.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zab0iokhc74hvndhpt4sn2v7350efqi4btsj02m0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg60o74cph2bs "We need everyone – and we mean EVERYONE – to do their part before the end of the day today. Donate now. Save Tennessee. Save America.")**_

To victory,

Team Marsha

So, we're pleading with EVERYONE reading this to pitch in anything they can to help protect Senator Marsha Blackburn and hold this seat for Republicans. | | "KEEP TENNESSEE REPUBLICAN" | | "HELP PROTECT MARSHA BLACKBURN" So here's where we stand: One of the 'Tennessee Three' just set her eyes on the all-important Tennessee Senate seat. She has all the name ID and mega-donor backing needed to flip this seat. We have a chance to stop her, but we must respond right now. "We need everyone – and we mean EVERYONE – to do their part before the end of the day today. Donate now. Save Tennessee. Save America." To victory, Team Marsha | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community. 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: From single mom to Congresswoman
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Beth Van Duyne for Congress
body:
Let me introduce myself: I'm a U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit.... | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=626692b5ff2f4fdca558b4ef5ad318a7&_t=hThWmMrmreDkqGa0YvT4ruw5-bZuPHkuY_1giyIOW05H14PmSZFqxZtlsTUE0s4il7LNFKjK3XnTBjpxwZyNJcVkDDXQ40MX6UH0wHq01iQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=626692b5ff2f4fdca558b4ef5ad318a7&_t=hThWmMrmreDkqGa0YvT4ruw5-bZuPHkuY_1giyIOW05H14PmSZFqxZtlsTUE0s4il7LNFKjK3XnTBjpxwZyNJcVkDDXQ40MX6UH0wHq01iQ%3D)

---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=626692b5ff2f4fdca558b4ef5ad318a7&_e=5u_rrx2mkGftpLRx6Y93gvnr6qkb35iWirskCACH_kFqeLVS_zNj8WFpHTNSnU2K_oYWoczOvuE9SVJeVgkAYNKHKAfdts9vTNW4c3Sn7AC4QN66U2GIqwgpTtVvZ3WZxqadFZTWkJqTaaM3E1ebW4NcuyBStn6fX3NkLCOByNZcusC6GABmRR3ct8do5TlHA5VaMTiM9WckcHLYvh3Sbxkkvv0wOl_PbpX3j2IsuGGi8HOs5gXNr2JahAD9Si-q8drmp0uFcO6D8Y-au3aOc6KLVX4hmi6yBi_CqLTmPQchJKzGs0AaC51Y_bLaxZroCelWvnCaFj2NljnGRj-EEx5XUNxmrDVI3fox95JI-KzmUO4jDDpL6AXfCywHxWcKoPEviZ5fWDt-L8ccv41EyGCaBRH_jBCzkrmHhuQoPU2RD1JEuCWr2xjhXIVOmKwC)

Fellow American,

Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today.

So let me introduce myself - **[my name is Beth Van Duyne:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=626692b5ff2f4fdca558b4ef5ad318a7&_e=5u_rrx2mkGftpLRx6Y93gvnr6qkb35iWirskCACH_kFqeLVS_zNj8WFpHTNSnU2K_oYWoczOvuE9SVJeVgkAYNKHKAfdts9vTNW4c3Sn7AC4QN66U2GIqwgpTtVvZ3WZxqadFZTWkJqTaaM3E1ebW4NcuyBStn6fX3NkLCOByNZcusC6GABmRR3ct8do5TlHA5VaMTiM9WckcHLYvh3Sbxkkvv0wOl_PbpX3j2IsuGGi8HOs5gXNr2JahAD9Si-q8drmp0uFcO6D8Y-au3aOc1UtyzP4oIUVkrqRe_XlZsgaeMSbOpRVs3HcPSA2MA5IzwbUvwxJi-XJs5L3jVwaQsTDus2PV3qxRq8aBPWoCUXJnaXBbfvIhJn0Az3lxFRtNBRTo0vBqaXZkhtJkSRLb2_H2kBL69D2nQfisz2ZkDDHfWqqRGmwfxc-pLh7VL0Q)**

I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a **U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=626692b5ff2f4fdca558b4ef5ad318a7&_e=5u_rrx2mkGftpLRx6Y93gvnr6qkb35iWirskCACH_kFqeLVS_zNj8WFpHTNSnU2K_oYWoczOvuE9SVJeVgkAYNKHKAfdts9vTNW4c3Sn7AC4QN66U2GIqwgpTtVvZ3WZxqadFZTWkJqTaaM3E1ebW4NcuyBStn6fX3NkLCOByNZcusC6GABmRR3ct8do5TlHA5VaMTiM9WckcHLYvh3Sbxkkvv0wOl_PbpX3j2IsuGGi8HOs5gXNr2JahAD9Si-q8drmp0uFcO6D8Y-au3aOc7OUxIWhow0st9o0ZtC2YKOIBo9iC1R02gAN-Xa3Yc1DG5zMszcI6g_cL3CxqqWEsN03TtMI2a7Kfu2mUIUnkbXsKJVPxwhcRFbJS-psM8L7beKCA4zw7h6hMvh6HrCmM22MOa8FapHeIuEqOC_0tbMnTN1FvIj23BlmlUiCprHd)
In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE.

I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. [**With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=626692b5ff2f4fdca558b4ef5ad318a7&_e=5u_rrx2mkGftpLRx6Y93gvnr6qkb35iWirskCACH_kFqeLVS_zNj8WFpHTNSnU2K_oYWoczOvuE9SVJeVgkAYNKHKAfdts9vTNW4c3Sn7AC4QN66U2GIqwgpTtVvZ3WZxqadFZTWkJqTaaM3E1ebW4NcuyBStn6fX3NkLCOByNZcusC6GABmRR3ct8do5TlHA5VaMTiM9WckcHLYvh3Sbxkkvv0wOl_PbpX3j2IsuGGi8HOs5gXNr2JahAD9Si-q8drmp0uFcO6D8Y-au3aOc7TYzy3lFsnHroBV1gClX2w8_xd16Vuq6p_6vl6t9zO91Hahk37tCm8NILCYcr0js6Gjso3Bq1EQM9lWJR8zv_JEb_VV3TtFTUJ2VdT8n_ncixPyPeLUZa9Xg7P2f8YQj982IptPsNFIIPIiubdLI8aoRgVc4qiEl5XwF2wLdtKG) And after a 24-year drought, **I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED.**

_**But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream.**_

At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. clean_body: Let me introduce myself: I'm a U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit.... | | Fellow American, Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today. So let me introduce myself - I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit. In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE. I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. In full transparency - But just like everything I have achieved in life, I am willing to work for your support. So, for now, I simply want you to get to know me: I am no stranger to beating the odds, Fellow American. I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream. For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University. It was a struggle, Fellow American. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back. But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream. At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. And that I did... In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas. Under my leadership, the City of Irving witnessed unprecedented economic growth and development. On my watch, we added 40,000 jobs and an estimated $3 billion in growth and new developments. During my time as mayor, Irving was named the fifth safest city in America. In 2017, I was appointed to serve our nation in a presidential administration, working under Secretary Ben Carson. I am proud to have worked on many of the Trump Administration’s greatest economic successes, such as opportunity zones and leading Housing and Urban Development’s disaster recovery efforts for southeast Texas in the aftermath of Hurricane Harvey. Today, the 17-year old girl that left home in pursuit of the American Dream is fighting for ALL Americans from the floor of the United States House of Representatives. I’ve been asked what prompted me to run for public office; the answer is simple - my children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorism to achieve their goals. When I think about my two children, I want them to have the same opportunities in life that I did; I want them to grow up safe and proud of our country. Now that you know more about me, I will leave you with this: As long as I am in Congress, I vow to fiercely champion the future of America, safeguarding our values and principles for generations to come. name: Team Tuberville
subject: FBI -> Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Read about Coach’s plans >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/77353fc2ee33e6c4/18422fa045f6c165c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Hi Peter, Did you happen to see Coach’s recent call to **relocate the FBI’s headquarters** to Huntsville’s Red Stone Arsenal? “The FBI has needed a new headquarters for years now, and the best place for it is Red Stone Arsenal’s state-of-the-art facility in Huntsville.” – Senator Tuberville ... [read more via News19 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/77353fc2ee33e6c4/2ee4db214bc1cb24c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Red Stone Arsenal currently houses approximately 1,800 FBI personnel that primarily focus on cybersecurity, forensics, research, and training. That number is expected to grow to over 3,000 personnel and a $3 billion investment that would dramatically benefit the local economy.

With our world becoming increasingly focused on staying one step ahead of our adversaries and their technologies, Congressman Jim Jordan weighed in and agreed with Coach: **they both firmly believe it’s vitally important that we advance America’s ability to keep our nation safe by relocating the FBI’s headquarters.**
---
[**READ THE ARTICLE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/77353fc2ee33e6c4/c9bf0ec4793fd2e8c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
– Team Tuberville
---

name: BREAKING SENATE NEWS
subject: Member of ‘Tennessee Three’ set to challenge Marsha Blackburn for her Senate seat
body:
This is the most pressing update in your inbox.

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING SENATE NEWS:
Member of 'Tennessee Three' set to challenge Marsha Blackburn for her Senate seat**
This is the most pressing update in your inbox.

A radical Democrat is gearing up to flip Tennessee blue and defeat Senator Marsha Blackburn.

_**[If Republicans lose this Senate seat, we'll NEVER be able to recover or take back the Majority. So we're pleading with you to pitch in straight away and hold the line in Tennessee.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpfkk5l46i9khjurg1q5tp18c5grcajmq9j32mlg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg64or4c9h2bs "If Republicans lose this Senate seat, we’ll NEVER be able to recover or take back the Majority. So we’re pleading with you to pitch in straight away and hold the line in Tennessee.")**_

Liberal megadonors, pro-abortion activists, and woke warriors are already lining up to fund Marsha Blackburn's opponent with MILLIONS of dollars.

This opponent is as radical as they come and a key part of the "Tennessee Three." Barack Obama, AOC, Joe Biden, and Kamala Harris have pledged their support to her.

She's one of the radical Democrats who took bullhorns onto the Tennessee House Floor, disrupted regular order, called in all the Democrat bigwigs for reinforcements, and lined their pockets from scores of angry Liberal donors.

**Now she 's using her connections and liberal influence to destroy our Tennessee values and bring her woke ideology to the U.S. Senate.**

A tidal wave of liberal cash is already pouring into her campaign since her announcement was rumored. So, we're pleading with EVERYONE reading this to pitch in anything they can to help protect Senator Marsha Blackburn and hold this seat for Republicans.

---
| | [KEEP TENNESSEE REPUBLICAN](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6h67m10vi5t3idstknvpu2807b1ns0cmk8gs898_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg64or4c9h2bs "KEEP TENNESSEE REPUBLICAN")
---
| | [HELP PROTECT MARSHA BLACKBURN](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7pq4v9fqt5pvfhrdvhasace0159qbdthbn105a0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg64or4c9h2bs "HELP PROTECT MARSHA BLACKBURN")
---

So here's where we stand:

One of the 'Tennessee Three' just set her eyes on the all-important Tennessee Senate seat. She has all the name ID and mega-donor backing needed to flip this seat. We have a chance to stop her, but we must respond right now.

_**[We need everyone- and we mean EVERYONE - to do their part before the end of the day today. Donate now. Save Tennessee. Save America.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjirprmjsq81sqou3crls8hpc13pcsn41jocmt4g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg64or4c9h2bs "We need everyone – and we mean EVERYONE – to do their part before the end of the day today. Donate now. Save Tennessee. Save America.")**_

To victory,

Team Marsha

name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?

JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%

This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive
race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have
the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will
have to fight like hell to make it happen.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19005?t=1001&akid=3431%2E346206%2EywLqSZ ]Will you step up today and split a contribution between Charles Booker
and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national
Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our end-of-month
fundraising goal.

Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that
early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.

And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark
money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts.
Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more
supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will
come.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19005?t=1002&akid=3431%2E346206%2EywLqSZ ]Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in -- split with
Charles Booker -- to help us build up as much small-dollar support as
possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national
Republicans throw our way.

CHIP IN →

It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.

—Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19005?t=1003&akid=3431%2E346206%2EywLqSZ ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230725-3431-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3431_346206_ywLqSZ&akid=3431%2E346206%2EywLqSZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3431%2E346206%2EywLqSZ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Gun News USA
subject: That was a weird choice,
body:
Grab your “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW, before someone else does.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/3979c6a4f4f7bcd071c088c1ffa4ad01d4a19915/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9) here at any time. July 25th, 2023 Please see the special promotion going on for Gun News USA subscribers from our sponsor below.
* * *
|
“That was a **weird choice** , .”

If you went out and **bought a fancy new Kydex holster...**

**_That’s what I’d say to you._**

Because instead of spending $99+ on a clunky holster that **only fits one kind of gun...and is uncomfortable as hell...**

You could’ve **[gotten this FREE one here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9)** that’s far more comfortable... fits 99% of all handguns... is **way easier** to conceal.

I’m talking about the best selling **“Invisible” Belly Holster** from my friends at _Tactical USA._

**For a short time,** they’re [handing them out at no cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9) as part of a No More Gun Control campaign.

The only catch here is that they don’t have many left ** _(382 last I checked)._**

And this email just went out to over 120,000 other subscribers who are reading this just like you...

So you’ll need to move fast if you want one.

[Grab your FREE “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9), before someone else does.

Thank You.

name: BPR Daily AM
