name: Monica Crowley
subject: The Sun puts the Times to shame
body:
The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvr1oicuh802p6unphjh98m111v059o2qf8jtfi8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5jjbdb6c6o66dticsr7ecdj6tjm9dthepj3asj668p6epj0copmcothelij9dtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0tr0coo7ecr2cup36phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5h3isl0jkctg8o4pcc62s0h2s30o013uofl449o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)
---
|
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8767i607rtk5ecd6pdssp04l0lq8e0ku7urptsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)
---
**FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY** Throughout my career, I’ve been on both sides of the media equation. ** ** I’ve been honored to serve two presidents and to have seen the inside of newsrooms from Fox News to MSNBC. ** ** Bad journalism is everywhere. Most newspapers have chosen a side, and it's not yours. Instead of holding the corrupt and powerful accountable, they are protecting them. They are a menace to our republic. ** ** But good journalism still exists - and it's thriving at The New York Sun! Founded in 1833, 18 years before the New York Times, the Sun puts that paper to shame. ** ** The Sun is committed to "safeguarding liberty" and "speaking out the sentiment" of the American people. Principled and relentless, it’s a paper that fights for us. Its editors are some of the smartest and fairest in the business, including famed editor-in-chief Seth Lipsky. ** ** The Sun is making waves, but it’s up against the biggest and best funded media giants in the industry. ** ** The Sun has a secret weapon though: readers like you and me who are committed to joining the effort to build a better press. That’s how we do it in America. ** ** Membership starts at just 1c a day. You can't beat that! So please join me in this groundbreaking effort. ** ** The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun.
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhtov66ts6nd5u948m2219fmi9e6loenkfn9jh8o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)
---
**Sign up today and make a real difference.** ** ** **See you on the other side!**
---
---
**Monica Crowley** Subscriber, The New York Sun
---
|
---

name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: I ended the 24-year drought in Texas
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Beth Van Duyne for Congress
body:
From single mom to Congresswoman >> I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_t=C_z2UxLpQQg2ICLsd5A6JNWLBW89xT5l3IK7YFwemjCIgo-WAj44aK8IOPBlVGMNhwSNWSBAczlkzhJa7Lehx6oHXBJj_VaB-yCFaBn8iSo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_t=C_z2UxLpQQg2ICLsd5A6JNWLBW89xT5l3IK7YFwemjCIgo-WAj44aK8IOPBlVGMNhwSNWSBAczlkzhJa7Lehx6oHXBJj_VaB-yCFaBn8iSo%3D)

---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaJ1anmresD-Cg0HEAY5ZX_hPOAtzWVraMKAtvckJ50you8fZV-xzxYx-MscDS-pFhL_vV1r_sHV0qx6EqAJ9oEokj_Lu8F5c5-X_p65MxUMrqZmZMokKZLKi9tIYRcPKH3bGeggBOn8zDqM_kFKm7JdcJ_TMcIr-Z5ipBFRHLuX9)

Fellow American,

Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today.

So let me introduce myself - **[my name is Beth Van Duyne:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaLOOBKfY2krwxod8D2Ft26SrnUtswa4D3WGkoUirBAU2hX0Fd0l0E_EL03QV1Z2RGhNHpuoKcCdfzaFhnGIuGeZBOcvvDeeldxgm1QNmLvL0vdqoi7_3mepJb_BNFW3bcIZXzB6jhBMNRQqqfGo4A2QEKm66C-q7LD9AKUDf-sEC)**

I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a **U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaGVZs8UI8wRrJsFD5O2bCt-vSqnQRkQd49rgA3NgA5UDcTstQGO5BigjmugZROQJXGqEJ1dsXgui2q-xkpS-EFutVYOxBZ_tIDH2nkBgBWe0rK4k4Y_oIByTOgS9gAL4OlkURiciI28dfCDpv_7X6iKe3DW7qI_VW64QC3QjtV-4)
In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE.

I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. [**With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaL7JZyfwp70kz9ykxMeZwjjK8RQrxVFOWOtAJgeK0pe-W1MBvEgd13TsyXmLgFxyb-baEI-opW6JbQpwNi5Drc9dPjtALXw7iGSubf7qc6wvBXK9-gmXG5g4AdKBCpPgJi0IJJNriCGNoJgBRYeNnisq3KabrloPXoqU071nQfAc) And after a 24-year drought, **I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED.**

In full transparency - [**I’m emailing to recruit conservatives like yourself to join my team before the 2024 Election.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaBuJe0HxfIeGe7yKpTiN3dsSAfXsxhKT1Ru30ivYEdSWTQm2qXtxy-FysjbaDzUUOjhRjhMvyvz6eLs5KiVDeRfhdPOSX1J5b8glyD-rGfo1f8xqmC9ytwX_l_E95QZXSOqzs4KPe9afVi7ws5uBmoMTy-y6nWMUDP8rT9il42m3) But just like everything I have achieved in life, I am willing to work for your support. _So, for now, I simply want you to get to know me:_

_**I am no stranger to beating the odds, Fellow American. **_

**I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream.** For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, **I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaBtNcdFRnO22lyqFLaofgZ7Z53fb2jlUMuSPcSux2NvJQiq8SxR9vrCPqPhfEywi5A0uVz5kAotTEBKjicMxhqETK6ByTFQeyWb4rhmpz72CKGYqeMc9drGbkZJ19CHf5ncY0f14Rwqc9vwHiv9DWA-r82yemO6AiNEC5on0c3mh)
It was a struggle, Fellow American. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back.

_**But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream.**_

At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. _And that I did..._ **In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaOpSbqJVtVAPY_ORfq62dtGiRrFmUizdu6aWRkTGDoVgAQjuXZ1pzXDDhOHbZm8aabRLq6riL4u6ry9QPATzaOfzKkXPDjblogVX0skNpy0Ym4uzEuA34ML42hmkwByavGMNcxF_-L4tBoAq5_ZGJKosoyV8FYNir1Ww45a99_KL)
[ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaEQMfnjFviVq9N3EiLoyJfTnzcXf6y4MR0UdgefNZjRr_3lMoW-jsDOaxEvx4c-OK_hdKc1qVGoRRvy41iLe4mDU7AeMXsXZs54ISgftxmWsYxk1Z_1ZJ9l3uWRaUMlsejIYgADT4EiUi4h58HRSh2u1LvtHb3vxAI_RxY_bRyLy)
Under my leadership, the City of Irving witnessed unprecedented economic growth and development. On my watch, we added 40,000 jobs and an estimated $3 billion in growth and new developments. During my time as mayor, Irving was named the fifth safest city in America.

**In 2017, I was appointed to serve our nation in a presidential administration, working under Secretary Ben Carson.** I am proud to have worked on many of the Trump Administration’s greatest economic successes, such as opportunity zones and leading Housing and Urban Development’s disaster recovery efforts for southeast Texas in the aftermath of Hurricane Harvey.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaAX7OhCWPAdBLUsPlICQk5qbQAvm-afDfD_GJlJqk1a7PZA8Q7nUpP-WzQ2Hmjh7VsLMbF3qdo9WYw3RvC88OHOmPZUzIWMnwNf4nHDgRi3cdmy8mzg4VPjGfI3mjWBWVQOuEoIcTlw7l8-IUeCauxL40NUnkzAKnGMadStG6Pj6)
**Today, the 17-year old girl that left home in pursuit of the American Dream is fighting for ALL Americans from the floor of the United States House of Representatives.**

[ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaFtUOGf5b1FQt9Mu9nofYGVp2zhTwoarwZSExR17wciwrHN76OIA2SUEZsQy_zRmMk7RWe5f1sTbLkjTqyWu98VwXjPQCnVJI-GmRZVqp4jETP7psPeqBMz9cbF5gQKLredmgEGGQX0_rqVdO84X_bf8KzUE-8QBdK-IoJ9JZgkP)
**I’ve been asked what prompted me to run for public office; the answer is simple - _my children._** We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaJdvc5zOskLavoM5V37nGBN_tcue-vL-wdbIeh4ebGciWVwNKynnMUnKcoFYabN0kAom-delKtqoCjQsnZdzEpjdiUcmCULcIug-9YzvfxkpeyFxvoptqSTbswwKH3BG5HzeguyrU3G3j8WjuFDGEZ0-Gr0d0bAVgrejHAIMJ1ek)
Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorism to achieve their goals. **When I think about my two children, I want them to have the same opportunities in life that I did; I want them to grow up safe and proud of our country.**

Now that you know more about me, I will leave you with this: As long as I am in Congress, I vow to fiercely champion the future of America, safeguarding our values and principles for generations to come. **[I promise to fight for the American Dream.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaBOU_CmdG4xuFH14Ho1Cq1yeW9Q7B5URry9AQMoHHeb1xLWcXI6w1KZDihoS-XXxSLtE3JfQlejwJlBT78w4JVdxQc6KaEdxFNfXfeyv-Iq6QE7FUYkFmWfkwe4P1a8WR4i4KTy19oWrHOq3oyFiSB_DbohpEUHodqbQSlukVtQz)**

**I’m Beth Van Duyne, and** [**I’m asking for your support. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaMLPYSHBAWzR_VmJDkGh7vih1P2-Y6hfL2Ao3hsFlESvgF8JORhp2Wd5TdM1RD2NwooMEsGjmyqhyC_krOcw80RyUeYSKZZOHPQBDD6nmoQknWv8BXz099qfxZngnRTq1cgOCGUzN-S3X--3umgSix1BLwozI3JBh87FN5M3vymc)

Beth Van Duyne
Congresswoman (TX-24)

Follow Beth On Social Media
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb0XINOs2NpZcmmk-7tA5d6hKxqoXiNJYWlteL7dbMZET8rW15G2q0wpzi4Aj1eeNUpCBf_FpuoyzjHTKu8p6MGhUOQsNzj7zOlP2wDunDl2Q5tdK6htYVX1g960tlTH2hRY0ZNacmHeDEan3OaRPk4Is8NNN1jCraBAcV7ycyglvkrodYv3uH0X55Ix6OjYhu2xwRtZuHI4InZSaYlQq_lU%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb3qkEDg-oV_0xyuuBj6lbCsF5rNos5ycI5VJ1xTfqq2RlphxzR_BPDxT7NA4anpSmM52fSLZIJmmPXTwLUkl_36HtGTOJAio26n_dESOh149EwRDYGJY6A-jRHqxrPLuLfbOr1HUEoaqajYu3FwwWR6iKvi7fwGAWfiEqjnPzly8RfklSVf8mqG10SmgSLEWBg%3D%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb3uDGEzqTndCRAYldcssWAcAD5-9kHEqfWfD6P2yJNGle1K-qiomCBSBzbNIAORzRH7e6sLOInOvZTN02Fp8eZfFEM35d0Y-Vt-IpM0tYXDfxdXt9tXUhVZpRITNg6ZdSuV-HhfFxwzZUHBvCSomdGwXrnw9qI_7LxVlG76n4DsdQwj8i0i-3_d0iCQWSVCnk8Guz4-IzOrLOj3Fnj8K46I%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb9yMSM-V6YsDz9KDhxXeUAYYBp8FuwEmcbtcOQleoenoj7TWcAGs10uTxyIceikxNPuU_oj6EyJF8nkIH_hV3SieA2lDuT0-aCfLAK75Df3VfeQAtss3FXD_5ci1n_2fxBQfqaawtvydi4j4LecmjlRQO7RyYCfzudhr6v9ZXpNbM5Z4QIViMvaE1FRNCCcp0Ft4Km_Vrg-J-5PCBOoifQQ%3D)

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7749c28913bc474092240431dd887020&_e=GMcT-i_jfsq6vjF-gu3tb6KEnSyFrgdEfB33ER4M6_KR0DVx4QV1AnZHyancn429v1uIO-jZ-t_rS6ArQlQLTDvSBca87KcmI6ER-mlW6AknMYC3jOMbzH9CcUYlYtY-mCXbl33bS0dbA2PFnq0h5PRYc7GtuVgUcroMizRZm_nEx3T-KwgMM9n9BChvk7-F1YNdr7dCB9ryJ5K2B9HuvgpEpWZ8knrsgm30Vp6uw4kXCW6KcLg1YIDkXRNUGxY5ps_-tORzuJwMll3aY9AoaNwtRqQ7gsyrbnlYbmitXpOI1Dg3VYYOThwPpTdn4GEpR7YC36wbw6h3XV642d4HgzYWEihkRy1lU1eASPwN4Pahfkdy4nQFpJ2S2KtP1jJXfAElzXLo9TI3dQ0ocgdl2Wg29FhTwaNzojOvuDNMy0QcivbbTOqxohXHTah_sNId)

body:
I’m Ruben’s Campaign Manager, and I wanted to formally introduce myself.
#

Hi, Peter. This is Nichole Johnson.
I’m Ruben’s Campaign Manager, and I wanted to formally introduce myself. I have some difficult news today.
This is important, so I hope you’ll listen.
July is always a tough month. A lot of people aren’t paying attention to politics, so we expect a slump in our fundraising. We factor that in.
But this is one of the worst Julys I have ever seen. No joke.
To be honest with you, it has us all pretty worried.
I know times are tough right now, and that there’s a ton of uncertainty in the air. But I also know we can’t afford to give the Senate over to the GOP. They’ll roll back everything we’ve accomplished over the last several years.
This race is too important. So I need to ask you to make your first donation today.
If everyone who has yet to give to this Senate campaign gave today — no matter the amount — we would CRUSH our fundraising goals and have enough resources to win this campaign with ease.
So, what do you say, Peter:
[**Can I count on you to make your first online donation to our campaign today? It will all add up if we all chip in. We'll win this race and keep Arizona's senate seats blue.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230725-1-f&t=1&akid=842%2E734936%2E0x7oYo)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

clean_body: I’m Ruben’s Campaign Manager, and I wanted to formally introduce myself. Hi, Peter. This is Nichole Johnson. I’m Ruben’s Campaign Manager, and I wanted to formally introduce myself. I have some difficult news today. This is important, so I hope you’ll listen. July is always a tough month. A lot of people aren’t paying attention to politics, so we expect a slump in our fundraising. We factor that in. But this is one of the worst Julys I have ever seen. No joke. To be honest with you, it has us all pretty worried. I know times are tough right now, and that there’s a ton of uncertainty in the air. But I also know we can’t afford to give the Senate over to the GOP. They’ll roll back everything we’ve accomplished over the last several years. This race is too important. So I need to ask you to make your first donation today. If everyone who has yet to give to this Senate campaign gave today — no matter the amount — we would CRUSH our fundraising goals and have enough resources to win this campaign with ease. So, what do you say, Peter: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** I can’t emphasize enough how important it is that you chip in today and help us catch up. Thank you in advance. Nichole Johnson Campaign Manager Ruben Gallego for Senate Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfg8j0dhviggm52lg0a66e0nn6s06ce4mreio78g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zojvoe29ihcntikahn9fap8m0g5aggf75qcek1ro_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkfgo7kfltai5asmu8idvl19f8bf9ne1gmr8lcro_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvttpb365pjr2cvlmobjnrct2ld82c9nbjsrukeo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zch1hjsl3k1dii422otf60p2psf55juussj8btmg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zek48fdkmrt517l3ae1cbqcd60lardmg7cqcqhd8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf74dffpr2vuvv6ro69huptk19f54dg6melqpa08_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg62ob6c9h2bs)

Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it for the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s been once week since our launch, and our momentum so far has been INCREDIBLE thanks to patriots like you. I’m so proud of all our team has done so far, but this is just the beginning of our mission. I know together, we can win this race, but I need us to keep up the steam. We’re SO CLOSE to the fundraising goal we set for the first week of this campaign, and we need your help to cross the finish line. Peter, America’s eyes are on Virginia, and if we’re going to win next November, we have to start out strong. And we can’t do that without every member of our grassroots team doing their part. Peter, you are the heart and soul of this campaign. I’m not fighting for myself - I’m fighting for you, and to defend the American Dream for our kids and grandkids. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it for the next generation. * * *

Fellow American,

I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, **it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!** As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few.

I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so **I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff**.

From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. **I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now**.

Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because **[I’d like to text you](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=62750c1ce76948b7980f44ac9550781f&_e=MzLNx0ZMXvW6I_oaQLezsNZlub8wHScqEICTMb1szLMl4xKE9ZX3pNgnd3tHEXBLLc0B7JuX2NiANpQC6JOjC1LOk3RQcXNaPHu2HOqHWOCCMxbRYw2dgJwYHBvpGAfsw30O5b2EYj9oiJjdaqWy-ICDspR761CB1v4zndP-DPlHp0CJ6AQD6W578zQ0UubLXaytOOUabxYxEphgw3RR81AnHVU82ztTrJyzrc3ILX2SqeTVKr6r0PcwXJk7zumA9UevWoZwYKRP92bqWmw6v3xQAqYhtTtiquzRE_J2ublpGudB4QCRmgCWx7CHmk1S2mIjlUJmoeuk5vd4su8EwZUNbXnvLhj5DIe1RN_hwOgj8c4OWUlnT18fO-u2KIuammhgXB2UtlGuiMOBxdO4FDFpVShz2mQ1BSCTh1x0n1LimnpH8QJP1Xnt7swYXknf)** , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another.

[**ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO MY CONTACT CARDS LIST ->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=62750c1ce76948b7980f44ac9550781f&_e=MzLNx0ZMXvW6I_oaQLezsNZlub8wHScqEICTMb1szLMl4xKE9ZX3pNgnd3tHEXBLLc0B7JuX2NiANpQC6JOjC1LOk3RQcXNaPHu2HOqHWOCCMxbRYw2dgJwYHBvpGAfsw30O5b2EYj9oiJjdaqWy-ICDspR761CB1v4zndP-DPlHp0CJ6AQD6W578zQ0UubLXaytOOUabxYxEphgw3RR81AnHVU82ztTrJyzrc3ILX2SqeTVKr6r0PcwXJk7zumA9UevWoZwYKRP92bqWmw6v3xQAqYhtTtiquzRE_J2ubnGs4kxFXigsBvGKIohO_rd6iZjP2J2YqrbkS6ZJ5G1Oub6zWn4DNTzdCrrAVc6H6cfTPG8RaVEJ9VRBP9P4pzUJvBK1_a87mXrbFOYFLEBS4PdHgj9sWe6ZYH_F653QnKiPFNNZ9PRdMy5OvK0Q9p_)

One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat **the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies.** No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you.

As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. **My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat**.

Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success.

So please, before you go, **[make sure that I have your contact information](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=62750c1ce76948b7980f44ac9550781f&_e=MzLNx0ZMXvW6I_oaQLezsNZlub8wHScqEICTMb1szLMl4xKE9ZX3pNgnd3tHEXBLLc0B7JuX2NiANpQC6JOjC1LOk3RQcXNaPHu2HOqHWOCCMxbRYw2dgJwYHBvpGAfsw30O5b2EYj9oiJjdaqWy-ICDspR761CB1v4zndP-DPlHp0CJ6AQD6W578zQ0UubLXaytOOUabxYxEphgw3RR81AnHVU82ztTrJyzrc3ILX2SqeTVKr6r0PcwXJk7zumA9UevWoZwYKRP92bqWmw6v3xQAqYhtTtiquzRE_J2ubnMUC18_f3Ph8Fnkpmy8cXBmFfYsb70L6Owd4XxjxH_ri_DhFAipwrsF3XNXiW_iqs0Nt34hk_BNq1tLuCzDzZ96-JQY_eQ4AKcWFh5g3T9fjJJ4-x7T4MDrr8nPqwUmOuWlJeclw7-HJ6J4OFqMEva)**. I want to - and will reach out if I have your number.

[****ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO MY CONTACT CARDS LIST ->****](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=62750c1ce76948b7980f44ac9550781f&_e=MzLNx0ZMXvW6I_oaQLezsNZlub8wHScqEICTMb1szLMl4xKE9ZX3pNgnd3tHEXBLLc0B7JuX2NiANpQC6JOjC1LOk3RQcXNaPHu2HOqHWOCCMxbRYw2dgJwYHBvpGAfsw30O5b2EYj9oiJjdaqWy-ICDspR761CB1v4zndP-DPlHp0CJ6AQD6W578zQ0UubLXaytOOUabxYxEphgw3RR81AnHVU82ztTrJyzrc3ILX2SqeTVKr6r0PcwXJk7zumA9UevWoZwYKRP92bqWmw6v3xQAqYhtTtiquzRE_J2ubk-XdjcPMw7rcru-RcPfxAgWECnCFgt8sJ0a_nWZeLyapirqYzPcWKHBqNTblTC0Hsqu19ii19V-6xgzQZTwUGbBXco4hohXHR9Z6CvvBWwKoORWfvA_-lUP7RYU6DqtaaXM6302sHrJsVcmQjYTAr3)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! | -- | Fellow American, I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few. I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff. From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now. Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another. One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies. No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you. As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat. Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success. So please, before you go, . I want to - and will reach out if I have your number. In Service, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Team Daniels
subject: A quick update
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
Dear Friend,
We hope you had a great weekend! All of us here at Daniels for Congress definitely did, and that’s thanks to donors like you!
On Thursday, we announced our July fundraising challenge. In case you missed it, our donors have challenged us to raise $15,000 online before July 31st, and have pledged to match donations made between now and then.
We are pleased to tell you that we’ve already raised over $4,200 since we announced the challenge, and we’re confident that with loyal supporters like you, we will reach our goal!
Are you ready to take the challenge? CLICK HERE to donate NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Thank you for your ongoing support!
The entire team at Daniels for Congress
P.S. If you missed Shamaine's message about Scott Parry's dangerous antics in Congress since the beginning of the year, check it out below and stay tuned for more updates about "the most dangerous member of Congress" in the week ahead!
_____________________________________________
As part of our July fundraising challenge (details at the bottom of this message), we're trying to make sure our supporters are better informed about the threat my opponent, Scott Perry, poses to our country. We believe that when you understand what Perry has been up to in 2023, you'll see why it is so important that you support our campaign and help me defeat Perry.
If you already understand the stakes, CLICK HERE to make a contribution to our campaign and help us reach our goal before July 31st. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
For two years, we’ve been telling everyone that Scott Perry is one of the most dangerous members of Congress. You don’t need to take our word for it. Ever since he tried to help Donald Trump steal the election in 2020, and became the chair of the House Freedom Caucus, Perry has demonstrated over and over again just how dangerous he is.
In fact, beginning with the debacle over the speakership, Perry and his extremist flunkies have set out to sabotage and undermine our institutions, our economy, our national security, and the social fabric of our country. Let’s take a look at Perry’s greatest hits just since the beginning of 2023:
*
Undermined
the
power
of
the
Speaker
to
conduct
the
business
of
the
House
of
Representatives
and
the
American
people
*
Threatened
U.S.
economic
security
and
held
the
country
hostage
during
the
debt
limit
debate
*
Compromised
U.S.
national
security
and
military
readiness
by
dragging
the
Defense
Authorization
Act
into
a
made-up
culture
war
controversy
Perry has no business serving in Congress. We can defeat him in 2024, but we can’t do it without your help.
Can you make a contribution today to help us defeat the most dangerous member of Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
We are currently in the middle of a fundraising challenge, and donations made before July 31st will be matched by the generous donors who have stepped up to issue this challenge. Your contribution today will have double the impact so ACT NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Not ready to make a contribution? stay tuned to your inbox for details on each of the ways Perry has been a threat to our country over the past seven months.
With Gratitude,
Shamaine
P.S. If you missed my announcement video, you can check it out below.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

Fellow Conservative, I spoke last weekend at the Turning Point Action Conference, and I didn’t pull any punches.

It's time to cut through the left’s nonsense excuses and deflection with the TRUTH. **Whistleblowers have revealed that Merrick Garland LIED to protect Joe Biden and Hunter Biden, obstructing justice for political purposes.** The evidence is overwhelming and the American people deserve accountability. **His claims of zero political interference are _LAUGHABLE!_** **[If you agree, rush critical support now to help us ramp up the pressure >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.-KAL8kuiQ)** Here’s what needs to happen:

1\. The Department of Justice needs to appoint a special counsel to investigate and prosecute Merrick Garland for lying under oath and obstruction of justice;

2\. The House of Representatives needs to IMPEACH Merrick Garland;
3\. And if the evidence confirms what these whistleblowers are saying, that President Joe Biden took BRIBES from foreign nationals, then the House of Representatives should IMPEACH Joe Biden too.

Enough is enough. We cannot allow this.

**The Department of Justice and the FBI have NEVER been more corrupt, and if we don’t get to the bottom of this mess and clean house things will only get WORSE!** Take a stand today. **[I’m counting on your help](http://trk.tedcruz.)**.

With the 2024 election right around the corner, now is the time to take _**ACTION**_ and restore public confidence in America’s elections.

---
**Americans know better than most that talk is cheap. Here is what our election integrity initiative is looking to accomplish:**
---
* **Require Voter ID **
* **Stop noncitizens from voting in American elections**
* **Remove deceased voters from voter rolls **
* **Expand resources for overseas military members to vote**

---
These are common sense principles that the vast majority of Americans can get behind. They would strengthen election integrity by making it _**easier to vote, but hard to cheat.**_
---
**With that being said, the Democrats are already unifying in OPPOSITION to our initiative.**
---
**But my Republican colleagues and I are not backing down, even though the Left is already coming for us.**
---
_We need your support to advance voter integrity and push through the Left’s opposition._
---

clean_body: But the Democrats are already plotting to stop our movement... | Friend, With the 2024 election right around the corner, now is the time to take ACTION and restore public confidence in America’s elections. Source: Fox News Americans know better than most that talk is cheap. Here is what our election integrity initiative is looking to accomplish: Require Voter ID Stop noncitizens from voting in American elections Remove deceased voters from voter rolls Expand resources for overseas military members to vote These are common sense principles that the vast majority of Americans can get behind. They would strengthen election integrity by making it easier to vote, but hard to cheat. With that being said, the Democrats are already unifying in OPPOSITION to our initiative. But my Republican colleagues and I are not backing down, even though the Left is already coming for us. We need your support to advance voter integrity and push through the Left’s opposition. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsebpif957spisds4horec98urn4r6di1pmnd380_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg61o32c9h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgbahj6c5s839t4h69oqjugb2folcnmv32obdn98_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg61o32c9h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo0uk655cmn5k7h3l5pd2anta7c0auge9phsp1i8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg61o32c9h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcegctk6in4hp31if8tnq4e0dh1ukse98bog96fg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg61o32c9h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqp4f54ljl9fi5qsbj2eo0mp576mvk5pjog47uso_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg61o32c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zume59ogc9thf97ouvfoqadah6qlski06m7i6ojg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg61o32c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z19q3rfq6lhguqv4u6ptqngh1qtvtvuj5bb6ktoo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpg61o32c9h2bs)

body:
---
| | | | | | [Donate Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fl6BCmbohEYu7KnL4q2cnncF1SLpJzCiMgmmknzwfgZLMA31FnPJx332oaGkM5wv-rGEv0xlxTxBsBFglwK0F75MxRAp0pn5NlZoEmXKuFm_EJVZHvCK6ynZ-yF5wbjRjSm7WK2twaoTBnCSRwd2zogCoUxO3Gqv05kCNWiH1z-6R2TS0kNpUb6pJ80N0S-SUh42XG46uXc=&c=WUnFSEr4qczDSMV2xe4Bs2yP8Dh7Pth2q5GTxWnWgrNhiN8Cf0F5mA==&ch=EjN6kjQX719FGyzjuG3cJ7arL2WvDqJJRZwHD4bMD_RfO_fahIMtFg==)

|

| Friends,
This has been a busy week that took me all over our district, Washington D.C., Virginia Beach, to Lynchburg, and more.
We are living in crazy times and I may have become "numb to the dumb". Now limousine liberals, the so called elites, want to cancel country music singer, Jason Aldean, over his pro-American song "Try That in a Small Town" and they want to cancel the movie," The Sound of Freedom", a movie that exposes the evil of child sex trafficking.
In addition to refocusing on my business SEAL Team PT, here is some of what I have been up to and what's on my mind:
---
| Song of the Day, Try That In A Small Town
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fl6BCmbohEYu7KnL4q2cnncF1SLpJzCiMgmmknzwfgZLMA31FnPJx1zGHIxYJgO6kmslJUTurkEAGyrpai8k2g3AfgD2k10HpjrOgmH1QbY6LwgvFdC_sNV1laGambJrmiqZg_nie1jnwHBMWyP5cBkhgB20P1c1-MxBGxyMQpk7N3Uw1V_Y-Q==&c=WUnFSEr4qczDSMV2xe4Bs2yP8Dh7Pth2q5GTxWnWgrNhiN8Cf0F5mA==&ch=EjN6kjQX719FGyzjuG3cJ7arL2WvDqJJRZwHD4bMD_RfO_fahIMtFg==)
---
| For a little motivation, listen to this patriotic song by Jason Aldean - "Try That In A Small Town". The radical left calls this song racist and pro lynching even though 100% of the video is actual news footage. [Click here to listen and watch the music video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fl6BCmbohEYu7KnL4q2cnncF1SLpJzCiMgmmknzwfgZLMA31FnPJx1zGHIxYJgO6kmslJUTurkEAGyrpai8k2g3AfgD2k10HpjrOgmH1QbY6LwgvFdC_sNV1laGambJrmiqZg_nie1jnwHBMWyP5cBkhgB20P1c1-MxBGxyMQpk7N3Uw1V_Y-Q==&c=WUnFSEr4qczDSMV2xe4Bs2yP8Dh7Pth2q5GTxWnWgrNhiN8Cf0F5mA==&ch=EjN6kjQX719FGyzjuG3cJ7arL2WvDqJJRZwHD4bMD_RfO_fahIMtFg==)

| President Trump Screens "The Sound of Freedom"
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fl6BCmbohEYu7KnL4q2cnncF1SLpJzCiMgmmknzwfgZLMA31FnPJx1mJBOybPKqdV1UVDglr4_Uu0lb4KufmHAnC0WAezaKKX-aRW6x0myzbmkeTGS9cqZqu0P8Gh3Ot3LHNR_iYxHfVeCAnQ84igg==&c=WUnFSEr4qczDSMV2xe4Bs2yP8Dh7Pth2q5GTxWnWgrNhiN8Cf0F5mA==&ch=EjN6kjQX719FGyzjuG3cJ7arL2WvDqJJRZwHD4bMD_RfO_fahIMtFg==)
---
| Have you seen the movie "The Sound of Freedom"? I'm happy to learn President Trump saw the movie, The Sound of Freedom. I watched this movie with my Senate Campaign Team. This movie exposes the evil multi-billion dollar child sex trafficking trade. Despite leftist Hollywood elites attempts to cancel this film, it has crossed the $100 million mark at the domestic box office in a little over two weeks. This film has made headlines since opening on the Fourth of July and beating Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny for the day with $14.2 million. As a Delegate, Democrats killed my bill to increase felony penalties for human traffickers. I will continue that fight to stop modern day slavery in the State Senate. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fl6BCmbohEYu7KnL4q2cnncF1SLpJzCiMgmmknzwfgZLMA31FnPJx1mJBOybPKqdV1UVDglr4_Uu0lb4KufmHAnC0WAezaKKX-aRW6x0myzbmkeTGS9cqZqu0P8Gh3Ot3LHNR_iYxHfVeCAnQ84igg==&c=WUnFSEr4qczDSMV2xe4Bs2yP8Dh7Pth2q5GTxWnWgrNhiN8Cf0F5mA==&ch=EjN6kjQX719FGyzjuG3cJ7arL2WvDqJJRZwHD4bMD_RfO_fahIMtFg==) to learn more about The Sound of Freedom
---

| 2024 Legislation
---
|
---
| I am excited about being your voice in the State Senate so we can continue to help fellow Virginians. For example, in Virginia, school nurses are now allowed to store and administer naloxone because of my bill [HB 2318](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fl6BCmbohEYu7KnL4q2cnncF1SLpJzCiMgmmknzwfgZLMA31FnPJx1zGHIxYJgO6JOUV9yULQtx51hS3sciyROm-RCrZ13EvBc7wGpc0jyMUrvPuKeaJyak2fSQMUoGGo7G5qGgqvvtaeMp79rA9NaWbKobBwJAbcComEIWFlA5TI3RJMNLbiGUFv9nqP1qr6fZBcna_cPM=&c=WUnFSEr4qczDSMV2xe4Bs2yP8Dh7Pth2q5GTxWnWgrNhiN8Cf0F5mA==&ch=EjN6kjQX719FGyzjuG3cJ7arL2WvDqJJRZwHD4bMD_RfO_fahIMtFg==). Sadly, we need a bill like this, but drug overdoses are up. The good news is allowing school nurses to administer naloxone or other opioid antagonist for drug overdoes has already saved lives.
While we are campaigning to win in November, we are also beginning to draft ideas for 2024. If you live in Senate District 10 and you have ideas on how we can improve Virginia, I would love to hear from you. Please email your legislative ideas to john@mcguireforvirginia.com

| Governor Youngkin would like you to help us fight fire with fire by voting early.
"We can't go into our elections down thousands of votes. I need you to Secure Your Vote early this year." -Governor Glenn Youngkin
Please ask family members and friends to go to [Secureyourvotevirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fl6BCmbohEYu7KnL4q2cnncF1SLpJzCiMgmmknzwfgZLMA31FnPJx0UWE1XBVkweXM-gN6rmpwunFXv__PjIx16WtWKylzKK-1hYKcIfCa9euElyUd1tT_ZmQmEpH1Gg0iq13ADAyz8S-ivKbB9xJKYwntXO92L7&c=WUnFSEr4qczDSMV2xe4Bs2yP8Dh7Pth2q5GTxWnWgrNhiN8Cf0F5mA==&ch=EjN6kjQX719FGyzjuG3cJ7arL2WvDqJJRZwHD4bMD_RfO_fahIMtFg==)

By GREGORY S. SCHNEIDER, Washington Post Virginia Democrats say they are mounting the largest and most coordinated early voting campaign they've ever undertaken for this year's legislative elections, countering a Republican operation that's geared up to help Gov. Glenn Youngkin (R) win control of the General Assembly to enact his conservative agenda. Dubbed "The Majority Project," the targeted early voting campaign is being rolled out publicly Thursday but has been in the works for months, party officials said. Democrats began hiring field staff in May and expect to continue through August, with more than 100 paid organizers already fanned out across the state, officials said.

---
|

| I had the honor of attending the Henrico County GOP meeting. The purpose of a GOP committee is to help grow our party, support candidates by helping them get elected, and then support Republican elected officials while in office.
It is difficult for legislators to make every GOP meeting, so if we somehow get an opening in our busy schedule and can make it to a meeting, it is standard practice across Virginia for GOP chairs to recognize and allow legislators to say hello and give an update.
Rooz Dadabhoy, founder of Rally Virginia, was the featured speaker. Thank you Rooz, and all the ladies, for the hard work you do to get Republicans around Virginia elected!
Thank you for giving me the opportunity to speak. Kudos to Henrico GOP Chair Brian Horn and your committee for working so hard to bring people together for the common cause of winning in November because that is all that matters!

| Central Virginia Planning District Commision
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It was an honor to attend the Central Virginia Planning District Commission in Lynchburg, Virginia. Congratulations to their new chair and my friend, Appomattox Mayor Richard Connor. The CVPDC is established under section 15.2-4200 of the Code of Virginia as one of 21 planning districts which serve the local governments of the Commonwealth. The CVPDC works to provide services for member localities and identify and develop opportunities for coordination among the region's local governments. Additionally, the CVPDC encourages and facilitates collaboration among local governments in addressing challenges and opportunities of greater-than-local significance.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | Friends, This has been a busy week that took me all over our district, Washington D.C., Virginia Beach, to Lynchburg, and more. We are living in crazy times and I may have become "numb to the dumb". Now limousine liberals, the so called elites, want to cancel country music singer, Jason Aldean, over his pro-American song "Try That in a Small Town" and they want to cancel the movie," The Sound of Freedom", a movie that exposes the evil of child sex trafficking. In addition to refocusing on my business SEAL Team PT, here is some of what I have been up to and what's on my mind: | Song of the Day, Try That In A Small Town | == | For a little motivation, listen to this patriotic song by Jason Aldean - "Try That In A Small Town". The radical left calls this song racist and pro lynching even though 100% of the video is actual news footage. == | President Trump Screens "The Sound of Freedom" | == | Have you seen the movie "The Sound of Freedom"? I'm happy to learn President Trump saw the movie, The Sound of Freedom. I watched this movie with my Senate Campaign Team. This movie exposes the evil multi-billion dollar child sex trafficking trade. Despite leftist Hollywood elites attempts to cancel this film, it has crossed the $100 million mark at the domestic box office in a little over two weeks. This film has made headlines since opening on the Fourth of July and beating Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny for the day with $14.2 million. As a Delegate, Democrats killed my bill to increase felony penalties for human traffickers. I will continue that fight to stop modern day slavery in the State Senate. == to learn more about The Sound of Freedom | Beatitudes | == | I took this photo when Tracy and I spent 10 days in Israel. If you get a chance to visit Israel, you should. It was a life-changing trip. Reading the Beatitudes helps me deal with some of the craziness I experience in politics. == | Governor Youngkin Sets Another Record | | Governor Glenn Youngkin is our quarterback heading into November and he is working tirelessly to ensure fellow Republicans win. He just set another record by raising $5.75 million in the second quarter of 2023. That is more than any previous governor of Virginia has ever raised over an entire year. We will need that and much more to win in November. Please consider chipping in so we can win and stop the nonsense. | 2024 Legislation | | I am excited about being your voice in the State Senate so we can continue to help fellow Virginians. For example, in Virginia, school nurses are now allowed to store and administer naloxone because of my bill ==. Sadly, we need a bill like this, but drug overdoses are up. The good news is allowing school nurses to administer naloxone or other opioid antagonist for drug overdoes has already saved lives. While we are campaigning to win in November, we are also beginning to draft ideas for 2024. If you live in Senate District 10 and you have ideas on how we can improve Virginia, I would love to hear from you. Please email your legislative ideas to john@mcguireforvirginia.com | More on the Push to Vote Early | == | Governor Youngkin would like you to help us fight fire with fire by voting early. "We can't go into our elections down thousands of votes. I need you to Secure Your Vote early this year." -Governor Glenn Youngkin Please ask family members and friends to go to == By GREGORY S. SCHNEIDER, Washington Post Virginia Democrats say they are mounting the largest and most coordinated early voting campaign they've ever undertaken for this year's legislative elections, countering a Republican operation that's geared up to help Gov. Glenn Youngkin (R) win control of the General Assembly to enact his conservative agenda. Dubbed "The Majority Project," the targeted early voting campaign is being rolled out publicly Thursday but has been in the works for months, party officials said. Democrats began hiring field staff in May and expect to continue through August, with more than 100 paid organizers already fanned out across the state, officials said. | Family | | Now that all five of our children are grown, it is rare for my wife Tracy and I to have all five home at the same time. Make sure you hug your children a lot for they grow way too fast and they are the best part about life! | Farmers Put Me To work | | | | Sometimes local farmers put me to work when I visit their farms in the district. I hope to visit your farm soon. Senate District 10 is the most impactful agricultural and forestry district in Virginia. In the State Senate, I'm looking forward to listening, learning, and working on legislation and ideas that help our local farmers. | "Pitbull" Award | | In 2018, the Virginia House of Delegates gave me this "Pitbull Award". It's kind of funny, but it is true, we need fighters in Richmond. I'm not scared in the least, I'm full of energy, and I am looking forward to continuing the fight for our conservative values in the State Senate. | Making Friends | | While campaigning, I've made many friends around the district. I look forward to meeting you and your family as well. If you see us around the district, make sure you say hello! | Football Season Is Around The Corner | | | | Football season is right around the corner. For six years I've been attending the rumble in the jungle at Louisa county High School football games. The family atmosphere is exciting and fun. It is always a blast shooting t-shirts in the air for the attendees. Over the next four years, I'm looking forward to attending multiple new high school games across ten counties in District Ten ! | A Few District Photos | | | | | Louisa County House Resolution 676 | | | | | I had the honor of presenting the general superintendent of public works, John J. Jones, of Louisa County, a Joint House Resolution recognizing his 50-plus years of service to the people of Louisa. Thank you, to the Louisa town Council and Louisa town mayor Garland Nuckols, for allowing me to make this presentation to Mr. Jones and his family. Thank you, John, for your life time of service to Louisa County. == | Henrico County GOP is United! | | | | | | | I had the honor of attending the Henrico County GOP meeting. The purpose of a GOP committee is to help grow our party, support candidates by helping them get elected, and then support Republican elected officials while in office. It is difficult for legislators to make every GOP meeting, so if we somehow get an opening in our busy schedule and can make it to a meeting, it is standard practice across Virginia for GOP chairs to recognize and allow legislators to say hello and give an update. Rooz Dadabhoy, founder of Rally Virginia, was the featured speaker. Thank you Rooz, and all the ladies, for the hard work you do to get Republicans around Virginia elected! Thank you for giving me the opportunity to speak. Kudos to Henrico GOP Chair Brian Horn and your committee for working so hard to bring people together for the common cause of winning in November because that is all that matters! | Colonel Mike Waltz Retirement in D.C. | == | | | This week I had the honor of attending a National Guard retirement ceremony in Washington D.C. for fellow special ops veteran Colonel Mike Waltz who attended VMI with my brother. North Central Florida, is a combat-decorated Green Beret, former White House and Pentagon policy advisor, a small business owner, an author, and a proud father. He is the first Green Beret to be elected to Congress. It was great to see fellow veteran Congresswoman Jen Kiggans in attendance as well. | My Teammate | == | Ran into an old Navy SEAL Teammate and Congressman, ==, of Wisconsin while in D.C. This fellow warrior is a force to be reckoned with and he has unlimited energy. -LLTB | Cyber Fortress 2023 | | | | | | | | | Fellow legislators and I attended the Joint Cyber Fortress Exercise in Virginia Beach. All levels of government, agencies, law enforcement, utilities companies, and more participated in this joint effort to develop ways to protect data and secure infrastructure. Our new National Guard General James Ring, State Coordinator of Emergency Management; Shawn Talmage, Finish Cyber Warriors, and many other Distinguished Visitors participated. I'm proud my brother, Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney and National Guard Colonel, Rusty McGuire, was there doing his part to keep fellow Virginians safe! | Central Virginia Planning District Commision | | | | | It was an honor to attend the Central Virginia Planning District Commission in Lynchburg, Virginia. Congratulations to their new chair and my friend, Appomattox Mayor Richard Connor. The CVPDC is established under section 15.2-4200 of the Code of Virginia as one of 21 planning districts which serve the local governments of the Commonwealth. The CVPDC works to provide services for member localities and identify and develop opportunities for coordination among the region's local governments. Additionally, the CVPDC encourages and facilitates collaboration among local governments in addressing challenges and opportunities of greater-than-local significance. | The Virginia Commonwealth Games | | | | | Fellow == and I attended the Virginia Commonwealth Games Donor reception in Lynchburg. Thank you, Virginia Amateur Sports, Inc.(VAS) President Dan Foutz, your staff, Chairman of the Board of Directors Leah Stiegler, volunteers, and others for all you do for amateur athletes, adaptive athletes, and our community. We met Miss Virginia Katie Scarlet Rose, of Loudon County as well. | Goochland Tea Party Tent | | Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent each Saturday 10am to 4pm at 30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, VA, 23103 next to the Food Lion in Centerville each Saturday from now to November 7. Stop by and learn about local politics, meet local candidates, get yard signs, Trump gear, McGuire gear, and more. Please bring a friend! | | | Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. God willing, I will win in November and continue to serve you in the State Senate. Our goal is to get as many fellow Republicans elected as possible so we can stop the nonsense. Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Republican Nominee for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior John 3:16 Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

Elections are so expensive, especially when we’re fighting against outside money... | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67006151/418326296/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcyYTQyOS1mNDJhLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmMRDucvt4ezLReQNMwcdxiCEu1HOHnnukx8l7Ts9Ro=&emci=ef9249bb-3e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4672a429-f42a-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Dear friends, **We need leaders who lead on improving our lives – not just talk about it.** With the _Pregnant Workers Fairness Act_ going into effect, Jahana Hayes’ unwavering commitment to women's rights and access to comprehensive healthcare has made a _significant_ impact on countless lives. Co-sponsored by Congresswoman Jahana Hayes, the act gives protections for pregnant, postpartum, and pumping workers. Including the right to extra breaks, flexible scheduling for medical appointments, time off to recover from birth, lighter workloads, and much more. _And in a time where families are struggling under an economy with skyrocketing prices, this matters more than ever._[**That’s why we need your help today to make sure that we re-elect a pro-healthcare leader like Jahana so we can continue seeing our access expanded.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67006159/418326301/974063209?refcode=E3434-20230721-Healthcare-SL-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcyYTQyOS1mNDJhLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmMRDucvt4ezLReQNMwcdxiCEu1HOHnnukx8l7Ts9Ro=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67006162/418326308/974063209?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3434-20230721-Healthcare-EG-HealthCare&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcyYTQyOS1mNDJhLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmMRDucvt4ezLReQNMwcdxiCEu1HOHnnukx8l7Ts9Ro=)

Jahana is dedicated to fighting for care for all, team. She has fought every step of the way to protect health care for working Connecticut families in Congress – and she’ll need our help to win re-election and keep up the fight.
[**Will you help participate in our grassroots movement today by giving a donation that will enable us to amplify her voice, advocate for policies that safeguard workers' rights, and access to lifesaving health care?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67006203/418326437/974063209?refcode=E3434-20230721-Healthcare-SL-HealthCare&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcyYTQyOS1mNDJhLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmMRDucvt4ezLReQNMwcdxiCEu1HOHnnukx8l7Ts9Ro=)
Thank you,
Team Hayes

clean_body: Elections are so expensive, especially when we’re fighting against outside money... | | Dear friends, We need leaders who lead on improving our lives – not just talk about it. With the Pregnant Workers Fairness Act going into effect, Jahana Hayes’ unwavering commitment to women's rights and access to comprehensive healthcare has made a significant impact on countless lives. Co-sponsored by Congresswoman Jahana Hayes, the act gives protections for pregnant, postpartum, and pumping workers. Including the right to extra breaks, flexible scheduling for medical appointments, time off to recover from birth, lighter workloads, and much more. And in a time where families are struggling under an economy with skyrocketing prices, this matters more than ever.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Jahana is dedicated to fighting for care for all, team. She has fought every step of the way to protect health care for working Connecticut families in Congress – and she’ll need our help to win re-election and keep up the fight. = Thank you, Team Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district.
