body:
From single mom to Congresswoman >> I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_t=dELEuAzybGptQytsW9eRHYhgyDeFTVTepVSQMjauouCXs9qVdqnAX74rmJb51XKr5tKf0LxAMiBi5tz4pLxy6HW8DXvUaYz3A6XOV6O172E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_t=dELEuAzybGptQytsW9eRHYhgyDeFTVTepVSQMjauouCXs9qVdqnAX74rmJb51XKr5tKf0LxAMiBi5tz4pLxy6HW8DXvUaYz3A6XOV6O172E%3D)

---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSPH8-n95uRAOpdb7VtF4_M8s1NFpRYFENH5N8sxXiJOKc1GnxGmwNUrDctl3tt7HlwUgfVA8D1_jQ6XIPYF_qS-3RodlWr04IN4RWdRLfwZpdaKYXCm4ike3MJlRe9FMUDEHutnQDl87WA3Nix-p-YxeyJcxgbmD_GPwPIEeM3md)

Peter,

Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today.

So let me introduce myself - **[my name is Beth Van Duyne:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSICfVEWlB1M9iDmjaoKogxXqhXNg3HncniUo5YCoF3E3RpaRGekn8C7OL0nscPofxxHawVfwR2bJF3SLIONdH9yR-g68k5LHpxzSNFyjtTco7Lz54M6zE-1FnWM_T0MBEdtTSnsSZh2fKxCofjhZFyGNhBy-cMK8gJBl13O5Zu-h)**

I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a **U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSH0kmuouQJSlR6IW593lc4AY3VYcVoXQOuA8TiH_Ke04edtlAk1AkSXzVr9gMXCFBbcaie7Cpl6OXQrL82A3r6-EnxD_QBoKa3re_65_VeDovSzayfOQT9nXu9YNnq5RpYRuIE0bTD4vvFPYEKfcHIeJbXr0VoKE9yvRiGsHiUcH)
In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE.

I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. [**With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSJVgixU-yMJfMEq5HKYwIPmI995Khxce1pBvE5eeUaj-2UqKVJ1aD9mtVOZOER8Te9xjK5ooxwQrwJiMqVkMUOeApVG2VST5YDeCC1_2MiFL4fpBXkgk0pA4jM7LtrKeoDEWnkc8YhaQRn2ZrrxPRU2EHTsugOEhwRUC1n35E30y) And after a 24-year drought, **I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED.**

In full transparency - [**I’m emailing to recruit conservatives like yourself to join my team before the 2024 Election.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSJ4fMC2swSD9FJrUel3SrMYfMFz7FNdtbPoilRITeRs9JyGiMnQAtO5TMe3aJUOEFr26DnU2HeoltqabyDeGwdPohW-aSSaCdF2UYMcheRovymp-9_GIJG0zJrCMu5r_gnjwucW1aLoHklxgrTg6m3smWoToMonDlGsDtA60nRxM) But just like everything I have achieved in life, I am willing to work for your support. _So, for now, I simply want you to get to know me:_

_**I am no stranger to beating the odds, Peter. **_

**I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream.** For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, **I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSKr4MX8DjRzsHIQGEkQvuxpnHqF1pHTYHbYcGs0R3Lm9_hrN5Xh4Y4ResezYsNm-xHt8rt6rP3rQuTkt84F0FwMowVRs3jjccczHmNq8C2hZ8xvREnZHOD7u5mwPB52ne_llBOF32WyRbaEKkm-4txyCmZ5hHz801gSsD_d9B1UZ)
It was a struggle, Peter. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back.

_**But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream.**_

At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. _And that I did..._ **In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSDLjt-v3MOO-k1MylWedKBgs7QDcq0DxyPGo_WZdVvJyaasVHFCFDoste5lUoQiGEuiD4ZFk9jrEum6DL4BCI1K7cA1TOZzhohdQzzLwiFzFxAdztxkW_tqnicudCYKfYYdlSt0WSlytaq5RVZiekd3ZLdmyi6bsKtdb9FI1hHdC)
[ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSELLtAXrS46L2y0XlVSrPRJj9oduYG1a_ONjZJUbYwWKdyGgD3LLI-W1xtagXSJlNdr39XWDcir8YYWW5LPJ6f3TXwnu2IBNTRR9vFXKRzM18XxjZYYwVJjIRrXeNdt8ve2PT90U9cUoK7vHKRDyNG8uZ55V-nIW-tTwrFq81R2X)
Under my leadership, the City of Irving witnessed unprecedented economic growth and development. On my watch, we added 40,000 jobs and an estimated $3 billion in growth and new developments. During my time as mayor, Irving was named the fifth safest city in America.

**In 2017, I was appointed to serve our nation in a presidential administration, working under Secretary Ben Carson.** I am proud to have worked on many of the Trump Administration’s greatest economic successes, such as opportunity zones and leading Housing and Urban Development’s disaster recovery efforts for southeast Texas in the aftermath of Hurricane Harvey.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSESdolyFP2EvizeWHUXzbcIFpG_0yXK85tbhcELLqMwGhq3T8IvW9hkxg934omU3zzT5v39iuGIYo5v3RHh6mKzT4wd3IRRfB_wimtcYts6fDwezajzO0bL2Y4YHTUgTv0dRLAxAPKu399x1aopt5C7P0LWI8m8wJNXWyZ9BkA-S)
**Today, the 17-year old girl that left home in pursuit of the American Dream is fighting for ALL Americans from the floor of the United States House of Representatives.**

[ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSJTAR5KD5w89J9-LkYP_2nfSioX1JMJPTFVBIMS0hd3P2ZafXP_7_6_OsGBq6sjAuazR5TMWEHSIv-r__qRZ86pNZIm3L7LXf_wlz7yb0RrrzUneka_sDm5dW9Pxy0cEzw4F0IuZGyK_uarWzZq2Nj58-5Xq0JgL5KRYc5ys-e2w)
**I’ve been asked what prompted me to run for public office; the answer is simple - _my children._** We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSPDZJCyy8YL7R1BL0c3O_f8jpgyIPaX3n0curmPJRd9VobKoV7562PVuBsUrIg2Bw-LCo8ytqMbt573Kv9QTcq7tsbLERLhAZhHK1H_n84SzKadxDtetFvNO7Tplpya5l_D9G96gi0Yx1rZ7BWk4VPrUiWGoxU3MEU-F7-SNRANQ)
Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorism to achieve their goals. **When I think about my two children, I want them to have the same opportunities in life that I did; I want them to grow up safe and proud of our country.**

Now that you know more about me, I will leave you with this: As long as I am in Congress, I vow to fiercely champion the future of America, safeguarding our values and principles for generations to come. **[I promise to fight for the American Dream.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c2e6ac3ec564b08b1093909572d61f5&_e=5FVy1rqJ7Jcr8TBHCQTIt6lhDLgKBWidZKFt_NGNEM4IhJOtind0MSmeB8W5gyJ4LrJw4CzGWXhmMH3baHlm1YMFcz2XATsLdc_wz15F-13Mw9Jl9fHBvqtv8R8OpMolLoJ20JulxOmCWTTHmM2FVBFpquj32WaPApR2yOCcCit9Kf_iQcgDlXfNjzaYRVSM8p0BNPMqn3gnbT9KgpjX7ViUcW4N2bueQgpyQ4fHfOEC6htqsr47Tc9xm3UGWWfGuwrDMV8iWweM9OkneR9zSNoX14K-G7JXHal66dQQQDi5B4IqyNJ0AAwii2Y24kdZm4uEHareMiId-ev4uIoE_95U-SLykeY7jDLF3kpPpsiN3eXQX6OWesu-xx3VVxPklpuz5s6LOlxhXhwCvWGQ0gURYghRwC6XL8dvsUAI6VbQN3CXPttkAmwQBx08Xe6Y)**

**I’m Beth Van Duyne, and** [**I’m asking for your support. **GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. clean_body: From single mom to Congresswoman >> I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. | | Peter, Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today. So let me introduce myself - I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit. In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE. I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. In full transparency - But just like everything I have achieved in life, I am willing to work for your support. So, for now, I simply want you to get to know me: I am no stranger to beating the odds, Peter. I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream. For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University. It was a struggle, Peter. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back. But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream. At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. And that I did... In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas. Under my leadership, the City of Irving witnessed unprecedented economic growth and development. On my watch, we added 40,000 jobs and an estimated $3 billion in growth and new developments. During my time as mayor, Irving was named the fifth safest city in America. In 2017, I was appointed to serve our nation in a presidential administration, working under Secretary Ben Carson. I am proud to have worked on many of the Trump Administration’s greatest economic successes, such as opportunity zones and leading Housing and Urban Development’s disaster recovery efforts for southeast Texas in the aftermath of Hurricane Harvey. Today, the 17-year old girl that left home in pursuit of the American Dream is fighting for ALL Americans from the floor of the United States House of Representatives. I’ve been asked what prompted me to run for public office; the answer is simple - my children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorism to achieve their goals. When I think about my two children, I want them to have the same opportunities in life that I did; I want them to grow up safe and proud of our country. Now that you know more about me, I will leave you with this: As long as I am in Congress, I vow to fiercely champion the future of America, safeguarding our values and principles for generations to come. **Meet Ron DeSantis**

| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=07a364e4124b4e0f85462857aab6047a&_e=txmLwDrUy_dGz-5sdw0kRAvITNdAWwoiXZRdmYp38OSf4c4gq8NbDk1o27lbn2X_uJO3Mz37_cgw1L0ZYa7sj9q55Y89XCuixDSwbFIIwAcwiDIZuzunOzF_Bei8e9uKbIX5vl3up_Hf4h9e7k10BvEe4pppJNxoFOAgi7VXJb1skItRtvS7848483NJIXAFz6gX4yDiFNYgN0eU-tlFqt9O3cws0jKHrwhdCbSjctLWM3Mp8riEWUDBHhmU0po5jA-LDcIwLsHGaOuU69b5gGMOVv35uFXrWvkQyKfE3cEjzboaONM5R7C_2ahkDnKyX-32YG3i164YLsyezQWjxEkwih4S01WHxU1Wk29rwRQSdCKPsqcSjQQKTMjYXFhKjjJHVMIBWGF6rjfhMcGPfPuGEqf0lzVSoS6NbasbxUMzbsNuqjJo7ag_Uqq9Nf-E)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

clean_body: Our team is a threat because we have the only candidate that can beat Joe Biden. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, We need you to know what's coming on this campaign. The Democrats will use every resource at their disposal to stop Ron DeSantis from becoming the GOP nominee. He is the ONLY candidate who will defeat Joe Biden next November; the Left knows that the numbers don't lie. If our recent fundraising haul proved one thing, it's that Ron DeSantis is the biggest threat to the radical Left in this race. Friend , we raised more --in just SIX weeks--than a former President and a SITTING President. They are afraid of us, and they have every reason to be. Our message is out. Our fundraising is up. Our candidate is second to none. Help us break more records in our next fundraising quarter: "" We're going to be hit from every angle from Democrats and the legacy media; it's already starting to happen. From here on out, it's only going to get worse as we build momentum and become an even bigger threat to the woke-mind virus. Gov. DeSantis is no stranger to getting attacked. Megacorporations like Disney have attacked him, politicians have tried pressuring him into "waiting his turn," and the legacy media has attempted to spin any story out of context to convince you that there's something wrong with our campaign. It's the same playbook we've seen run time and time again when they're afraid of a leader who will shake up the system. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. The stakes of this fight are far too high. To say this is one of the most important elections this nation has ever faced is an understatement. Our future is on the line. We will never back down. _. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Gov. DeSantis is just getting started. He is putting every resource toward fighting and WINNING. | Peter,

Hilary is committed to tackling Washington's challenges headfirst as our governor. Under Hilary's watch as commissioner of public lands, Washington is on the front lines of the climate change fight.

We've become a national leader in wildfire fighting and fire preparedness and secured historic investments in wildfire funding. Under Hilary’s leadership, Washington has reforested millions of acres, restored salmon habitats, leased out public land for the biggest solar projects to date, and expanded innovative sustainable industries. **And along the way we’ve created sustainable, good-paying jobs in communities across our state.**

Hilary is ready to continue her work fighting for Washington's future as our next governor, but to get there, she needs your help. [_**We're just one week out from our July deadline and still $1,500 behind our goal. clean_body: Hilary is ready to continue her work fighting for Washington's future as our next governor, but to get there, she needs your help. | = | Peter, Hilary is committed to tackling Washington's challenges headfirst as our governor. Under Hilary's watch as commissioner of public lands, Washington is on the front lines of the climate change fight. We've become a national leader in wildfire fighting and fire preparedness and secured historic investments in wildfire funding. Under Hilary’s leadership, Washington has reforested millions of acres, restored salmon habitats, leased out public land for the biggest solar projects to date, and expanded innovative sustainable industries. And along the way we’ve created sustainable, good-paying jobs in communities across our state. Hilary is ready to continue her work fighting for Washington's future as our next governor, but to get there, she needs your help. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. subject: 📲 Can I call you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=35ba9c5946884fd0bab7b53b2e465439&_t=VLoKjU5Li7ixmENKccyrBwj_-EcQ32APyhU4kTl3R_ruwRErfZ2Ckm5mLiyw2EMiHtw8TesA-yFB2nhGO1MQ-32x4saiiA2UBPBsWXlr2SI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=35ba9c5946884fd0bab7b53b2e465439&_t=VLoKjU5Li7ixmENKccyrBwj_-EcQ32APyhU4kTl3R_ruwRErfZ2Ckm5mLiyw2EMiHtw8TesA-yFB2nhGO1MQ-32x4saiiA2UBPBsWXlr2SI%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=35ba9c5946884fd0bab7b53b2e465439&_e=GT9d6568zBjaPirWl5D6c4z_g2DebpcTyvKAG33FYGkIWb-mXUXqbouVKUtanvmp3ARtVufK5hvVlKagV1KUIGR8kxR9hmAREIKuzD_GFJVnsNO1Aib2_gZBNWec6YlxtwFtEGGdO8z54GfFkxmsRjDYOWH_utkNcTXZbmfBZvyc3q8F_uF5YEpHubQZqUf15ssnYswqy_ZFQQtPAqPeeiMcNn3tF0GvKKMTJ_vW06uwA0k5jj-xLOTeY7FIGVprIo_ic8zQ0beQy1iOxjph0r_z0qYpe4k80dpOS2XNf3u1iq81qB1X5c_iDg_H10IkUjS5nNLm9QYdeKtiHmctP8qyoO4W1JU9aBfdt0jn27BC0dh4eIPUnUp5BK-ZeJXNcZ0ffeek_tA0ONtZHZAhPpQjUNTmFDlEtxJdTiuddYv6334Isd5m1fSmP_Y3ZFn2)
|

* * *

Fellow American,

I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, **it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!** As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few.

I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so **I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff**.

From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. **I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now**.

Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because **[I’d like to text you](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=35ba9c5946884fd0bab7b53b2e465439&_e=GT9d6568zBjaPirWl5D6c4z_g2DebpcTyvKAG33FYGkIWb-mXUXqbouVKUtanvmp3ARtVufK5hvVlKagV1KUIGR8kxR9hmAREIKuzD_GFJVnsNO1Aib2_gZBNWec6YlxtwFtEGGdO8z54GfFkxmsRjDYOWH_utkNcTXZbmfBZvyc3q8F_uF5YEpHubQZqUf15ssnYswqy_ZFQQtPAqPeeiMcNn3tF0GvKKMTJ_vW06uwA0k5jj-xLOTeY7FIGVprIo_ic8zQ0beQy1iOxjph0r_z0qYpe4k80dpOS2XNf3vS5WqvIlS-RhgUVTMipSANFsHZADuTjKRrK_L13jJbVZCAlRVwCBCRYGZbCHhVXM33soIh8kmz5hPCPzBFDRuKtkGzw6Quk_7SO0BSebXNMvQ9eA17S7X2nXzn3Egj9kQjVfSnlSb-tZIPysFMBZP_)** , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another.

[**ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO MY CONTACT CARDS LIST ->**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=35ba9c5946884fd0bab7b53b2e465439&_e=GT9d6568zBjaPirWl5D6c4z_g2DebpcTyvKAG33FYGkIWb-mXUXqbouVKUtanvmp3ARtVufK5hvVlKagV1KUIGR8kxR9hmAREIKuzD_GFJVnsNO1Aib2_gZBNWec6YlxtwFtEGGdO8z54GfFkxmsRjDYOWH_utkNcTXZbmfBZvyc3q8F_uF5YEpHubQZqUf15ssnYswqy_ZFQQtPAqPeeiMcNn3tF0GvKKMTJ_vW06uwA0k5jj-xLOTeY7FIGVprIo_ic8zQ0beQy1iOxjph0r_z0qYpe4k80dpOS2XNf3tloz-WEnts5Nh0wPluRHNPI7r74fUx3XANVVAx1ZGaOKHju1tTwfrMpwV4nkvmwS-97R5fjeVL1JALnTKslMwkNRf8t7zBJw7sjwrnkNxFNgPfItAWcXx2QyfSxHjtkCxYzsI77Q9e9LElWVRibR9b)

One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat **the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies.** No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you.

As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. **My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat**.

Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success.

So please, before you go, **[make sure that I have your contact information](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=35ba9c5946884fd0bab7b53b2e465439&_e=GT9d6568zBjaPirWl5D6c4z_g2DebpcTyvKAG33FYGkIWb-mXUXqbouVKUtanvmp3ARtVufK5hvVlKagV1KUIGR8kxR9hmAREIKuzD_GFJVnsNO1Aib2_gZBNWec6YlxtwFtEGGdO8z54GfFkxmsRjDYOWH_utkNcTXZbmfBZvyc3q8F_uF5YEpHubQZqUf15ssnYswqy_ZFQQtPAqPeeiMcNn3tF0GvKKMTJ_vW06uwA0k5jj-xLOTeY7FIGVprIo_ic8zQ0beQy1iOxjph0r_z0qYpe4k80dpOS2XNf3snvdT-fwzzeQOACWEJfj9-u_3K9wD-_T0N0j_j9aTmogin0mtyPt9HWNa1V_eBoR3pYDiFWdpkYXF6S8aPDiqNjkOO28Xut-HonVaXueOSxAs55Ylj07zB_gS7JkolpuGnep-uEsvW_nW3rnBp9Cvc)**. I want to - and will reach out if I have your number.

clean_body: It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! | | Fellow American, I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few. I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff. From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now. Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another. One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies. No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you. As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat. Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success. So please, before you go, . I want to - and will reach out if I have your number. In Service, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. body:
There's only one TRUTH. Not yours, not mine. PURE TRUTH.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=b072240f2e9441098b11af40b64f253c&_t=37j9Yr5hwderDH7lDssWHwSjozPL3wu6oPqAeou3gT6mFi8mnm5db9WkVxI3Es3UKMpQeQu5DHBxUXdyFDmwXdnOGkZfWU2ChgzM5K8SDaI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=b072240f2e9441098b11af40b64f253c&_t=37j9Yr5hwderDH7lDssWHwSjozPL3wu6oPqAeou3gT6mFi8mnm5db9WkVxI3Es3UKMpQeQu5DHBxUXdyFDmwXdnOGkZfWU2ChgzM5K8SDaI%3D)

|
Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b072240f2e9441098b11af40b64f253c&_e=v2vy0ETf0ScNf186-XxcH0yI0MwUF36SAypwzQHEq2NjtTEbGnjMtCe3nDBMRXVL2_-WMsH8PXBvZD3L30EvEPcRyLaiRQ-GfHCytljBpMbkFx8Tup_wzIIlPLB9ANTWmv_Uohkcj40LnRJTNRjj1spckhbPvA3SjBr-JRJe-008X4YbcxWF_O4dRDkj0lIZfcFIOshwmKDjymzmpZt9bIYTJQUMAQRsk5i5i7cUyxJoOVxwtwvZsR5KZo7GGYSfZWqCtoLHOg7NLSte6lYnWBqrgHAf6RMwY2PkTTyZL0vV0dPr3OHbnZrRV2BS-xB7CBuQzVC2qGdf-Z4hZXIftlLnpEVKzNnBpY8FDBOsNoPBfhhUr7MFXxTncCaEo_uBpjECJU-j5k1GRlzJGRISoQ%3D%3D)

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b072240f2e9441098b11af40b64f253c&_e=v2vy0ETf0ScNf186-XxcH0yI0MwUF36SAypwzQHEq2NjtTEbGnjMtCe3nDBMRXVL2_-WMsH8PXBvZD3L30EvEPcRyLaiRQ-GfHCytljBpMbkFx8Tup_wzIIlPLB9ANTWmv_Uohkcj40LnRJTNRjj1spckhbPvA3SjBr-JRJe-008X4YbcxWF_O4dRDkj0lIZfcFIOshwmKDjymzmpZt9bIYTJQUMAQRsk5i5i7cUyxJoOVxwtwvZsR5KZo7GGYSf9r_kykd26aL1iqUd4atsuexF8mR47xzANJTu1DvWaq2WEHKnAwrvkYyfgQs6k_6wi2S2qM4157WoQ39JbiqoIekFhE8KOvKkUocDtxdEx34_wX6Ic0sdPl7mEV-iEXDlMv8SBmAopHqdavvMBXBK1w%3D%3D)**_

This is about more than a campaign. Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b072240f2e9441098b11af40b64f253c&_e=v2vy0ETf0ScNf186-XxcH0yI0MwUF36SAypwzQHEq2NjtTEbGnjMtCe3nDBMRXVL2_-WMsH8PXBvZD3L30EvEPcRyLaiRQ-GfHCytljBpMbkFx8Tup_wzIIlPLB9ANTWmv_Uohkcj40LnRJTNRjj1spckhbPvA3SjBr-JRJe-008X4YbcxWF_O4dRDkj0lIZfcFIOshwmKDjymzmpZt9bIYTJQUMAQRsk5i5i7cUyxJoOVxwtwvZsR5KZo7GGYSfrA5VYBk1a0S7MfNX3c7hZlZ--1yrf7wEhNh1VxQIhMGD6qx30LOQeckgNn_XXs-YBaktuQXgWEJOme3o2SBo6U_xp9puvHncDCj_y3r5p-zFcSPE6i0wE44HV9i2GGZobKMPO3Nf5VdvGLY1peIB6A%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: There's only one TRUTH. Not yours, not mine. PURE TRUTH. | | Fellow American, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I need you to contribute to Josh Riley’s campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Friends,
Hey, it’s Adam Schiff. I’m reaching out to you personally because I want you to join me in supporting Democrat Josh Riley and Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
If you have been following my work, then you know that I am deeply concerned about the future of our Democracy and our country. We cannot allow right-wing extremists to hijack our Democracy, and undermine the values and ideals that make us who we are as Americans. We just can’t.
That’s why electing pro-Democracy, pro-Rule of Law candidates like Josh Riley to maintain our House Democratic Majority is so critical.
Friend, Josh’s race in Upstate New York is among the most competitive in the entire country. The Hill has named it one of seven races that could determine control of the House, and the Cook Political Report is naming it a TOSS-UP.
This is a monumental opportunity for Josh’s people-powered movement to prove its strength before the election. Can I count on you to split $25 between Josh’s campaign and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Thank you for stepping up at this critical moment,
Congressman Adam Schiff

Friend,
When right-wing special interests are working nonstop to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, and make us less safe, it’s my job as the People’s Lawyer to have your back.
Doing this work has been the honor of my life, but it doesn’t come without its challenges – especially when the same special interests we’re fighting against have endless sums of money to spend on attacks against me.
It’s ok. I’m used to it. I’ve been a top target of the far right for decades, and my belief that true strength lies with people-power has only grown stronger over time. They might have the money, but we have the many.
We cannot be successful without your support. It might not be the easiest way to fund a campaign, but I wouldn’t have it any other way.
The good news is that, according to our records, you’re still eligible to take advantage of your PCR. That means you can make a $50 contribution (or $100 for couples) and receive a full refund from Minnesota!
[**So, team, before our end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up next Monday, can I count on you to step up for the first time this year and activate your support with a refundable $50 contribution?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67009862/418340299/-2070113728?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjNlMzU2ZS1mYTJhLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0nUoGBEbiGphT_zfO5Xwd_LovdW69wvkhnOo0NFNmAA=)

| | Will Hurd is – and that's why his campaign is different from the other Republican candidates. Trump is a proven loser, and the rest of Will's opponents are regurgitating stale talking points. That's just not going to cut it anymore. The 2020 general election had record-high voter turnout, and the 2022 midterms were a disaster for Trump's chosen candidates. It's clear that we need to be done with Trump. If he wins the Republican nomination, Joe Biden will have a clear path to reelection... and America deserves better. We need a fresh take and ideas that will take our country into the 21st Century. name: Commander Ryan Zinke; Navy SEALS for Congress
subject: I want to introduce you to Tim Sheehy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=8ae908e48fad4ae4bd928094ae1d0fe8&_t=MyA_s_THAJ0jBeYmg0sOx_SYHhgY78oL_QmCSfRh4Gkes-b3H0pOiGedBfLMqUlF5SS9rpCvKje_cPajUNnk_FH-2fgmUx-hEISnf3wcTQI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=8ae908e48fad4ae4bd928094ae1d0fe8&_t=MyA_s_THAJ0jBeYmg0sOx_SYHhgY78oL_QmCSfRh4Gkes-b3H0pOiGedBfLMqUlF5SS9rpCvKje_cPajUNnk_FH-2fgmUx-hEISnf3wcTQI%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs.**

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana.**_

Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - **Tim Sheehy.**

In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ae908e48fad4ae4bd928094ae1d0fe8&_e=Ci5DpRpsrhvBT7_NXjwXtVvaNisSjf0-MW-wOoi-nXQAmmsscpuR0vpfFPm74XbLEsV5hDt-QYveBnkAfwKzeSnYARSyxIwObpQUvmnYqgOChocR6ApUrYBrpZQYkxbCM1jeH3q1wJMGzcwF_ZuUl2GagDaZYvTprqh1p4X0ToohbCsifrHllYnMTw-QGO1wQzDUeB8aIXFb2VmD8bdvisvhKEkQdZ54S87q3gHQv_0CtzZFdDki39sUxtuDcmi5lGKhisyAHtsHtSklf0nRAftvuUaInZ83B6Z7uOvVyqtZQo5pl5mAAgLi9nalPHwz-2qSOrLqsXQxZ6BqyhzWCvS2vL0B-cWT5tmQhw4VSytD2Ajz9MpJ0UpFkfVhwzyYM6vk0KjECLvyK-JF4lGBiT9xot-OeynYDttTRZtBFhE%3D)
Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor.

Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. **[Can you make a donation now?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ae908e48fad4ae4bd928094ae1d0fe8&_e=Ci5DpRpsrhvBT7_NXjwXtVvaNisSjf0-MW-wOoi-nXQAmmsscpuR0vpfFPm74XbLEsV5hDt-QYveBnkAfwKzeSnYARSyxIwObpQUvmnYqgOChocR6ApUrYBrpZQYkxbCM1jeH3q1wJMGzcwF_ZuUl2GagDaZYvTprqh1p4X0ToohbCsifrHllYnMTw-QGO1wQzDUeB8aIXFb2VmD8bdvisvhKEkQdZ54S87q3gHQv_0CtzZFdDki39sUxtuDcmi5x4YVYy6-STBcA8OWSGUM7sPOwkCM1jZGPrgKLpBSyf9EBRjoKXEjH2Vzi_cVQmPmTcgOd8HDuShpAPq5LmrgZQ7Sdkbrykcfn70x3a8W02Ct8dO9Vgxw8iwzQms4l9TjGOdofZ-wOwAqZHIIjDGhT6NJwzuiLMx6F8FcCiYR2xg%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ae908e48fad4ae4bd928094ae1d0fe8&_e=Ci5DpRpsrhvBT7_NXjwXtVvaNisSjf0-MW-wOoi-nXQAmmsscpuR0vpfFPm74XbLEsV5hDt-QYveBnkAfwKzeSnYARSyxIwObpQUvmnYqgOChocR6ApUrYBrpZQYkxbCM1jeH3q1wJMGzcwF_ZuUl2GagDaZYvTprqh1p4X0ToohbCsifrHllYnMTw-QGO1wQzDUeB8aIXFb2VmD8bdvisvhKEkQdZ54S87q3gHQv_0CtzZFdDki39sUxtuDcmi5pObGH-dKPxBaFKRefYB3SN4geGjsrkJAfnwqCXa2x5V-0zCtaenKTM_dfStmMC465PGKm7fgQe7IYwBc_o7aoTyEJVmv0_oTk_ZyXBWLOE2UeuyR80peHJKj2g6z98ZGsJ3VBtLDIwS9W-ighj2KruIhpZQgzD6M3tA6S7ArGH8%3D)

**I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6.**

I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. **[Will you help him get there?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8ae908e48fad4ae4bd928094ae1d0fe8&_e=Ci5DpRpsrhvBT7_NXjwXtVvaNisSjf0-MW-wOoi-nXQAmmsscpuR0vpfFPm74XbLEsV5hDt-QYveBnkAfwKzeSnYARSyxIwObpQUvmnYqgOChocR6ApUrYBrpZQYkxbCM1jeH3q1wJMGzcwF_ZuUl2GagDaZYvTprqh1p4X0ToohbCsifrHllYnMTw-QGO1wQzDUeB8aIXFb2VmD8bdvisvhKEkQdZ54S87q3gHQv_0CtzZFdDki39sUxtuDcmi5Y6DV9YPBdkr0IOTazlbMzMOnLI0Vudoco9VmnAa5JieRkYqx1ezixfxU-fUFD9zrkOSFC1y9m7lt3Io8CsBQvTUAzfNj-OM4xoIgLLB80EiqJFZ47wIMDLrKq8KjOBaCix528uPW4hOaavBppaf4uEz5cwseUBOUCkvMLFNAaZw%3D)**

clean_body: Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight | | Fellow Conservative, During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs. Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - Tim Sheehy. In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator. Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor. Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6. I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. The Montana Senate race is not just about Montana. This race will decide the fate of the U.S. Senate and the direction of our country for years to come. For God and country, Commander Ryan Zinke | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1jaegbpkkbrakiuk4t08do3un1tr880r5a3s5bg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi68or4c3h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zftmuores8eb86geu24cpqbnc27kj7vtphcsjd30_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi68or4c3h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp0b1u3arddn7melbhof5kiot1svdslrld18dvhg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi68or4c3h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z748emq691ls4481e8i26mkniev7a5poemulimog_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi68or4c3h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi1gbohcmbv8nk2c380qm7hqtb85qjdn6g6k10mo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi68or4c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhs32cf6n93fqllkl2jsi4a15ep8f8q46tmfpa28_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi68or4c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5n5lvvs6a447va8hea840mtv5cj2kanevoubtc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi68or4c3h2bs)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Kevin Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
The stakes are high in this election. |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Thank you for the overwhelming support you’ve already expressed for my 2024 congressional campaign. I’m working hard for the privilege of representing you in Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District, which includes all of Carbon, Lehigh, and Northampton counties, and parts of Monroe County.

I’ve lived in the Lehigh Valley almost all my life and am raising my family here. There’s no place I’d rather be. **I’m no career politician.** I want to go to Washington, cast tough votes to improve people’s lives, then come back home to Germansville and let someone else serve. **That’s how our country is supposed to work.**

**The stakes are high in this election.** We’ve already seen what happens when Joe Biden and Susan Wild have unchecked power: we get runaway inflation, open borders, increased crime, and cultural decline. This seat is one of a few competitive districts nationwide that will determine control of Congress.

**The right candidate can defeat Susan Wild and restore common sense to Pennsylvania’s 7th District. That’s why I’m running.**

I’ve supported safe communities for 28-years as a **U.S. military veteran** with four overseas deployments. I’ve created good jobs right here in Pennsylvania as a **small business owner **and technology company entrepreneur. And I’ve worked for strong families as a coach, mentor, **husband****and father.**

**I’ve got a record of success as a military veteran, small business owner, and family man. And I’ve got the courage to take a stand for our American way of life.**

My family and I are excited to be back on the campaign trail meeting our neighbors, listening to your ideas, and working together to improve our communities. I hope to see you soon.

**Keep America Free!**

---
|
---
| Kevin can't do this alone. Please help him Keep America Free.
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bd0ab88385&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")

---
| If you wish to contribute by check, please mail it to Kevin Dellicker for Congress, P.O. Box 86, Germansville, PA 18053. Please write your employer and profession on the check to comply with federal campaign finance laws.

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=292d88226a&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!
---
|
---
| **UPCOMING EVENTS**

Follow us on Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/KevinDellickerforCongress](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7e60a7e118&e=1090c5c412)
---
|

name: John Kennedy
subject: nervous as a cat in a room full of rockers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

I'll be honest with you. I'm getting as nervous as a cat in a room full of rockers.

My Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they're falling DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. **It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it.**

I'm not one to beat around the bush when I speak with you. _**[So with respect, I'm personally asking you to donate any amount before July is over and done with.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62999011:6MXwhIINQ:m:1:3299561967:453C5068822CE884A916E24040A08B53:r "So with respect, I’m personally asking you for just a few bucks before July is over and
done with.")**_

How dire is the situation? Well, I just took a scroll through the most recent FEC filings, and I saw that Hakeem Jeffries raised over $62.4 MILLION to defeat my Conservative buddies in the House.

_In other words... we'd have a REAL problem on our hands if we miss this goal and the stakes don't get any higher._

Liberals don't have the sense God gave a goose - they're busy destroying our economy, forcing propaganda into classrooms, and woke-ifying our military... but their America-hating donors are pitching in millions to see the downfall of our House Majority. If Conservatives don't meet their July goal, it could all be over for us.

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.

---
| | | [Contribute $25 Now >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62999012:6MXwhIINQ:m:1:3299561967:453C5068822CE884A916E24040A08B53:r "Contribute Ten Bucks Now
>>")
---
| | | [Contribute $50 (Most Folks Give This Much) >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62999013:6MXwhIINQ:m:1:3299561967:453C5068822CE884A916E24040A08B53:r "Contribute Thirty Bucks \(Most Folks Give This Much\) >>")
---

---
| | | [Contribute More Now >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62999011:6MXwhIINQ:m:1:3299561967:453C5068822CE884A916E24040A08B53:r "Contribute More Now >>")
---

I don't mean to be a bother but we don't have time to sit and wait - _not if we want to win!_

_**[I'm personally asking you to donate any amount by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62999011:6MXwhIINQ:m:1:3299561967:453C5068822CE884A916E24040A08B53:r "I’m
personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless,

John N. Kennedy

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. | | Peter, Ron DeSantis has been Governor of Florida for nearly 5 years — **_and he’s spent that entire time attacking Black history in public schools._**

His latest move? **_Claiming that slavery actually benefited some enslaved persons!!_** [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAaEmUMRNRCF5LT2oQ3P8BaSF6G-GMHCbV7C0BoTjEAMevvfOFCkPFyFgncedQZWC5YCBI0ej25XsfF7YXct4ukKWK6kC49PLZcO-NN3gAht8YrGkrH4WS4wkpt7QIZf3RK1k9g_7Zn3jEzYutPKwM2fXrQ132r38VKhkBY36zERHpn7dEq3QzIUTbWAUA7gfrQBgA1N12Zv22WQxDNNEKlBS3z7Q3SQXuz6CekxdRbLGj-vaG44LhSgLGM9vvePMioZQXY-Q3SnaE_k72PgaiOR-xHMAngEzTiLzn4CJMl5mhAIQ3AO6htpqFoh9aj_O82QE41Pp5rDuvtBNCxhnxcjn3S_zlkhYTqKWheJJ1gh7pmcvN7Jojuh-dnSi10uLY/3y6/e1aYErx0RjGCfyPt0DAOWQ/h1/idMRVYADSYKBAqrbO89g5mTu-W7vz_PBPRRfz5vOJWA) That’s right, Peter. DeSantis’ new curriculum teaches Florida middle schoolers that enslaved persons picked up skills that translated into profitable crafts after slavery ended.

**This is insanity. But that’s just Florida under Ron DeSantis — a state that refuses to teach children that slavery is bad.**

[That’s why here at The Collective PAC, we’re mounting a FULL-SCALE grassroots push to mobilize our top supporters to fight back against DeSantis and his blatant white supremacy. Will you chip in $10 to join the fight today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAaEmUMRNRCF5LT2oQ3P8BaSF6G-GMHCbV7C0BoTjEAMevvfOFCkPFyFgncedQZWC5C6swWg9-eHiUdQf03XKgo2uLaHbf3MFgxneIrYhHFq1kuNsdu9mHw2Pdd-CQEnooTlMz8lq2Omrjs7ZnbsqzbM5HRCr36B1U6yat5LvB8FayQm48EJQjUpgYvye8Zg9I0fPmEfUDRLcean4rItFv1L3FizBFDz0veRwJDwHhixOvpbBEX6c7YFTmxEJqcGcFHIhNJw3gkogEZ6cs5j9dm1Ut1HfGgVm1-xm7Yay76XpIFmEo8clIkJBjA9QmKUzp8Aai1pd05UzwsKtcqZ9vtrtuj4nDE3cfGV45L9yJC6qT6rtZOgxG5l7bgB-67VQ5oOoQzhnRWfHmfl7I3gb0Sd5obVUjpUlK5wdLEFB8m2svPpdfEwh4Sfg7uGbkb0_9CG9ZROFOx9iIWYXkk0fqLS1LeWYML4bkf6f7Y0nZ_bM/3y6/e1aYErx0RjGCfyPt0DAOWQ/h2/YtxN1D1a6WxCajwA-7mFu8H-l6KbstpigyZ0Y2Mue08) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. name: Bill Spadea
subject: Urgent Call: School Board Candidates
body:
Peter, Our children's education is at stake... If you've been repulsed by what's been going on in our NJ schools lately, it'
|
---
| Peter, **Our children's education is at stake...** If you've been repulsed by what's been going on in our NJ schools lately, **_it's time to do something about it._** We must protect the innocent children of our Garden State from things like inappropriate curriculum, and we should always involve parents in school decisions. **If you agree, I urge you to help us fight for for Parental Rights by running for School Board/BOE!!!!!! ***DEADLINE FOR FILING IS JULY 31ST*****
---
|
---
If you've lived in your town for more than a year, and are a US citizen who is registered to vote, you qualify to be a school board candidate. And you could play a major role in advocating for parental rights.
To learn more, [**click here to register for a free virtual webinar happening tonight (July 25th) at 7PM ET.**](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/2fc1af89a28d94aa5f3851a842f4479c/eJyNkEFrAjEQhf_LHHpaGjcqyIIUESvLqofaQm8Ss0Mb3GRDMmmrsv_d2Vo8tdDrmzffmzdnIHTKUVlDAV90knIIGQTUxht0NG8dKf09leNRPswzaIw7LEObPBTnX5dvhl7O5WSSAR09suX5aTavys1ytyo3FTu9CpzxP85gJG-cxXpWrqDr_gSjNbT4YHaEgkLCvlFtuBW9hIb970Q-FkI0_l63LhJn62tTr94wsmhFTOJxHLfr10p84t44FR4S2V1sU9A4jWnPa_pw12uW4clO0SrTcLryHl3987oKj9cbuguNLHpB) All you need to do is [reach out to your county clerk](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/1d946ac07da4068c623c3564e105383b/eJyNkMEKwkAMRP8l5-raVQ_2JiJSqh5Ez1LaoIvt7hJTa5X-u9GKJwUhp8nMG5I7MNrUcpxDBFe-aT2EAAgz4w1anjnLafba6vEoHIYBFMaeFuQqD9H9a_hjeMqhngwC4MajWLab6SyJ14v9Ml4n4vQpScd_nMFIfzjz1TReQtv-BGNpeH4R9hkipgqfF-VGruIdFeI_MvtzpFRd1_0SKZNxleWm7-igDu6CZEtJq07tZQXSSXUAR40UpN6jzd_fSbDpatoHZXNvvA==) to request the form that is used in your county, and then file it.
---
| You can also [click here for a Candidate Kit.](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/594b97a3e452a010a9003544af54c487/eJyNkEFvwjAMhf-Lzy1ZA0xTbwghVBU4TOM8pYm1ZmuTKHEpHep_J2wIbdKQdrOePz8_-wSERhgqFORwpE_Op5CAR6mdRkNLa0jIry6fz7JplkCjzcfa285Bfvpz-AZc5Iw_PSZAg8OIvDwvlmWxW79uil0ZSSd83PE_n4cZv_mstotiA-N41xhbTatD9A6Qk-_wcpHS8Sra-ybyNZELOWN930_Me6jExPo3JirbEWuxrdCHWrsfZRpkbW2TVlZ4lV519kuUwiithBxYDCCcQ6Ou3ytx-I4xngH203sS) On the fence?
1. Just by running, you'll meet like-minded individuals who feel the same way that you do and learn more about our schools.
2. If you win, you'll be one of nine who decide on what's taught, how it's taught, and who's doing the teaching at your public schools. Plus, you'll get the inside scoop.
3. Win or lose, you'll show those running the show that as parents were doing more than showing up at meetings. We’re not happy with how things are and we're organized to make serious changes.
4. Running for the board will give hope to others who are disgusted by our schools' current state and tired of the high taxes we're paying for it.

To support bringing Common Sense Solutions to our schools outside of running for school board, [**click here now.**](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/a2a241cd0450c5a6360fe0de9b0fe1ab/eJyNkMsOgjAQRf9l1iBScSE7QowhqAuja1PKJDRC27QD8RH-3fqIK03czpx7JnduQKi4oqKGFM50ZWwGAVgU0khUlGtFXDy3bJ7EsziAVqrTyureQHr7Gv4Aj3HMFkkAdDHokf0uy8tiuzqui23pScOtv_GfZ5qwj2e5yYo1jONPMXaSloN3O0jJ9vhoVEvfig629XxDZFwaRUJ3nVahQ-UwFG1fTSwOw0ToyIlG67bS3Nbex41BVb-fUeLlZR3vCjVoZw==) What we do (or don't do) today will echo into the lives of our kids and grandkids.
---
| | [SHOW YOUR SUPPORT HERE](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/35114787194cdd83a0beb118946f8a69/eJyNkMsOgjAQRf9l1ihSdSE7YgghqAuja1PKJDRC27QD8RH-3fqIbjRxO3Pumdy5AqHiivIKYjjRhbEpBGBRSCNR0VIr4uKxZfNZNI0CaKQ6ZlZ3BuLr1_AbuI8jtmAB0NmgR3bbZFnkm-ywyjeFJw23_sZ_nsns40nXSb6CYfgpxlZS2nu3g5hsh_dGlfStaG8bz9dExsVhKHTbajVyqByORNOVY4t9PxY6dKLWuik1t5X3cWNQVa9nFHh-WocbCIFoZQ==)
---
| This is your chance to step up and make a real difference.
Together, we can create positive change. Bill
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/11458112/c85e9c4e86c07c06) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

Join Representatives Sherrill, Houlahan, Slotkin, and Spanberger and support VoteVets in our fight to get hundreds of senior Military promotions moving.
#
* Mikie Sherrill
* Chrissy Houlahan
* Elissa Slotkin
* Abigail Spanberger

All these women have a few things in common.
* 1️⃣ They come from accomplished Military and National Security backgrounds.
* 2️⃣ They have been elected to represent their constituents in Congress.
* 3️⃣ And they are standing up to Tommy Tuberville.

**[Check out our new video with these Congresswomen: “Travel Ban”**](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-pac-em-july23-tb.Aco0fM&refcode=em230725-1-15&t=1&akid=13777%2E3013755%2EAKQ5NT)

It’s a special day for VoteVets when we can put out a video like this.
First, because this issue is so critically important. Because these women have been leading the fight to lift Tuberville’s blockade on these promotions, and to protect health care access for women in the Military.
But second, because we worked hard to get these women in Congress. They are the right leaders for the right moment. And that’s why we started VoteVets to begin with.
**To take the fight to the GOP on their own ground: The Military and National Security.**
And Derek, it’s working.

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: I'd like to give you a call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=1faac892445048abbb6a6c7e824413ae&_t=NVehK6AA9-dgqR-umanGE6F35P_KsbiAog_jc7HpZBnqhQHhwRszmT3stPvNvcJVITy6ypl2KuMpQlTZ5jZNvrH5YX6c92U2R9xWOQiVseg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=1faac892445048abbb6a6c7e824413ae&_t=NVehK6AA9-dgqR-umanGE6F35P_KsbiAog_jc7HpZBnqhQHhwRszmT3stPvNvcJVITy6ypl2KuMpQlTZ5jZNvrH5YX6c92U2R9xWOQiVseg%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1faac892445048abbb6a6c7e824413ae&_e=Jp_FJ8eoVhAreDpTKewHuoisMuAPLXKiyrT459N69hSstT-E4mrFQ849KjAxS-7U83fIt5ljscRqOmtjlI5x2AOSTReYVfXchuXxWP_RzMYldeT057nAafcxnPsHU8davTjlWQYuiPSaNw879wEQwMnTxFqDq7wlzMtis3_eCBEfcKUwXqGhTx_hNsx5ZC82M5WDlE9vnv7Nc6HOGNGb81mqVFFOsD1CMEU1bMewAvC3JseKRwJGLkucXsudiw4N-lR48Vf1NF0NP2eioUpPyNqAopb0NefDFguVl3BxD2PVxC93_JKxp6KW7mbLN3CPBtyEnuO2GfRsYcdorckdOg8vsw1HMNO-wroLImABZ7Y94NsX0xe182K5HqeV4uPz16qlqfXgCeGzLfDt4spNJRx8H-BlsM5UpRaIa4ArE6D824w82xQH6KBh3HpaKkVq)
|

* * *

Fellow American,

I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, **it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work!** As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few.

I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so **I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff**.

From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. **I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now**.

Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because **[I’d like to text you](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1faac892445048abbb6a6c7e824413ae&_e=Jp_FJ8eoVhAreDpTKewHuoisMuAPLXKiyrT459N69hSstT-E4mrFQ849KjAxS-7U83fIt5ljscRqOmtjlI5x2AOSTReYVfXchuXxWP_RzMYldeT057nAafcxnPsHU8davTjlWQYuiPSaNw879wEQwMnTxFqDq7wlzMtis3_eCBEfcKUwXqGhTx_hNsx5ZC82M5WDlE9vnv7Nc6HOGNGb81mqVFFOsD1CMEU1bMewAvC3JseKRwJGLkucXsudiw4N-lR48Vf1NF0NP2eioUpPyNqAopb0NefDFguVl3BxD2NMv08ntanAj7vVw3cySuW_HN0KSZFdNU4rTpfMob7W8RGXb0YPIdezAlh5yE5uW8ivR-rl3sCEe754bhj84dWxOw_ejwgWqgx68hiUgnce8dTH0iVlMOYs0_h819hlptiHp7t9yMOY5_BoD4LWq8f7)** , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another.

[**ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO MY CONTACT CARDS LIST ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1faac892445048abbb6a6c7e824413ae&_e=Jp_FJ8eoVhAreDpTKewHuoisMuAPLXKiyrT459N69hSstT-E4mrFQ849KjAxS-7U83fIt5ljscRqOmtjlI5x2AOSTReYVfXchuXxWP_RzMYldeT057nAafcxnPsHU8davTjlWQYuiPSaNw879wEQwMnTxFqDq7wlzMtis3_eCBEfcKUwXqGhTx_hNsx5ZC82M5WDlE9vnv7Nc6HOGNGb81mqVFFOsD1CMEU1bMewAvC3JseKRwJGLkucXsudiw4N-lR48Vf1NF0NP2eioUpPyNqAopb0NefDFguVl3BxD2NODGzwT4tscTqFt4DpkcttRunrw4w7nZCFNzKgbOLc7_FO9xBXdjunTqz-nuFeZ4jydRzENAbnLkIABkht65UODTbgbDcypQA9jYDc4RvxuwaDcSreguecR2bokPSDbFkqwFe0qr_YpYfUZ6V2vkPe)

One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat **the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies.** No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you.

As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. **My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat**.

Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success.

So please, before you go, **[make sure that I have your contact information](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1faac892445048abbb6a6c7e824413ae&_e=Jp_FJ8eoVhAreDpTKewHuoisMuAPLXKiyrT459N69hSstT-E4mrFQ849KjAxS-7U83fIt5ljscRqOmtjlI5x2AOSTReYVfXchuXxWP_RzMYldeT057nAafcxnPsHU8davTjlWQYuiPSaNw879wEQwMnTxFqDq7wlzMtis3_eCBEfcKUwXqGhTx_hNsx5ZC82M5WDlE9vnv7Nc6HOGNGb81mqVFFOsD1CMEU1bMewAvC3JseKRwJGLkucXsudiw4N-lR48Vf1NF0NP2eioUpPyNqAopb0NefDFguVl3BxD2PleDodgR3Y7-8zZ1s4yoG_IvjvcxvUc927go3Lg2KPPHsZvOZ3V6X06OrqvhPTZFVHkQyxQ4yLtX-m2l14N85agi-l-3CK9tn1BicPANYdH4VUrKaDTG_Vwoyp4feFcakp-kwuZZtkBDkH7Egw0pfL)**. I want to - and will reach out if I have your number.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: It’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! | | Fellow American, I hope you're having a great week. As I write this email, it’s 115 degrees here in Arizona, and you know what? When the heat is on, I do my best work! As I’m driving from one event to another, I take the time to reflect on the issues I’m fighting every day like human trafficking, drug trafficking, securing our border and protecting the rule of law to name a few. I want to understand what issues are troubling you, so I can take the same approach to solving the issues that concern you as I’ve successfully done over the last seven years as the Sheriff. From July through August, I find myself spending more time in my truck and in my office, meaning I have a little extra time on my hands. I don’t sit still much, as you might have caught onto by now. Why am I writing you to tell you this? Well, because , or maybe even call you, with periodic campaign updates while I’m making voter outreach calls or driving around Arizona from one event to another. One thing I know, in the heat of the battle, Arizona - and America - needs a proven conservative fighter to combat the dumpster fire set by Democrats and their liberal policies. No matter how hot it gets out there, I’m willing to take on the issues that matter the most to all of you. As you may know, Arizona is a key race to watch as Republicans strive to regain control of the Senate from progressive Democrats. My opponents are receiving substantial funding from liberal donors in blue states and mobilizing volunteers from across the country to secure this critical Senate seat. Together, we can work to keep Arizona on the right track and ensure a strong conservative representation in the Senate. Your support and engagement are crucial to our success. So please, before you go, . I want to - and will reach out if I have your number.
