name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: If you knew...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The best $3 you could ever contribute
#

Friends -
If you knew that your $3 could help get the next major gun safety law passed, [**wouldn’t you donate it right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230725-1-30&t=1&akid=6196%2E3935704%2EzIPbSb)
If you knew that your $3 went directly towards organizing, lobbying, education, advertising, research, and supporting gun safety candidates—all with a mission to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic—[**wouldn’t you chip in $3 right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230725-1-30&t=2&akid=6196%2E3935704%2EzIPbSb)
If you knew that your $3 had the power to save someone’s life, [**wouldn’t it be the best $3 you could ever spend?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230725-1-30&t=3&akid=6196%2E3935704%2EzIPbSb)
We know that may sound like an exaggeration, but it’s the truth. People are alive today because of the lifesaving laws that GIFFORDS has helped pass in states across the country.
But obviously, there’s still far more to be done. Over the weekend, our country surpassed 400 mass shootings so far this year. This is unacceptable and preventable, but we need you with us to keep moving forward in the fight to end gun violence.
[**So please, contribute $3 today. Your support directly fuels our work toward a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230725-1-30&t=4&akid=6196%2E3935704%2EzIPbSb)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july23.np0YAl&refcode=em230725-1-30&amount=3&t=5&akid=6196%2E3935704%2EzIPbSb)**
Thank you for all that you do,
The GIFFORDS Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=6196%2E3935704%2EzIPbSb) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carmen=20Goers?=
subject: King Co. Councilman & Vice Chair Reagan Dunn endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
“Commitment to public services runs deep within Carmen.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c3a44e2fdc29/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13562903?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=42664b2146&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I’m ecstatic to announce that King Co. Councilman & Vice Chair Reagan Dunn has endorsed my candidacy to serve the people of Washington in Congress!**

Councilman Dunn is a former federal prosecutor who has been leading the fight to re-fund the police and spearhead support for the criminal justice system.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=f6f0d00b48&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Councilman Dunn shared the following statement:**

_"Earlier this year Carmen approached me to ask what I thought about her running for Congress. I encouraged her to run and am proud to announce my endorsement of Carmen to be our next Congresswoman in the 8th Congressional District. Commitment to public service runs deep within Carmen. She has served on many private boards and public committees throughout South King County. Her commitment to the community is why in 2021 I awarded Carmen the King County Council MLK Medal of Distinguished Service. I look forward to Carmen serving as our next Congresswoman."_

**_I am deeply honored to receive Reagan’s endorsement_!** Reagan has been a tireless champion of respect for our criminal justice system while also being a devoted advocate of those who suffer from substance abuse and mental health disorders.

**I’m grateful for Reagan’s recognition of my history of public service.** _We all have a role to play in making our communities stronger in the face of adversity, tragedy and challenge_! Civic order hinges upon the commitment of those who will engage in the civic duty of identifying and acknowledging, and bringing people together to act on solutions.

As Washingtonians and Americans, we’re facing so many problems that require our thoughtful attention.

I’m confident that we have the moral fortitude and inner discipline to tackle them together!

[**Peter, can I count on you to join me in the mission of creating solutions to our most pressing issues by offering a contribution to my campaign for any amount today?**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=3d96f3050c&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| [ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c6990b8dd7&e=0e51d1e991 "ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS »")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=4d632697ce&e=0e51d1e991 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »")
---
| For Washington,
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=15fa31fb2c&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| Carmen Goers
Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-8
[CarmenForWashington.com](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=f9eb0ed476&e=0e51d1e991)
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: You'll want to see the latest numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b29198af410484a8e5ca675cdd5eb81&_e=RnLJED-agF4fF-aBxD6YW4zdBSIL6J4X9FsMCELciBTT9ym4D8ujYrByZtvpQapRSrOz7Ozkn5BAvbrptFIftJ0UGpMWgHFMKsPOXLUpvp3fIfO3mSP0cQqypIbw8Ix3JI6c24JqqytY1Gf7jFe4LCKAZe7o5g_rMuFKKzSDxxPmccHLePNNtBbnGdr2lpaEAnM2aQXBzCLFyQ-0eY9sIPxuQQzRPfULlz93QAgvQ77us0YygeJWi6HaZ2spNB7P0h2tcEW0mym4x6Sj5BCSLZBsayvB95hcOgY6hVcu_XIosb4SZUvawwoaVl35CgUhydNrVs6i1bVtcGmqv1puUSYcwZ1CUfELXA0mIUegtRXh57SBxkLihnrBxybEvV6DtTfSrkaQQAX9RLnOpDOg7Q%3D%3D)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b29198af410484a8e5ca675cdd5eb81&_e=RnLJED-agF4fF-aBxD6YW4zdBSIL6J4X9FsMCELciBTT9ym4D8ujYrByZtvpQapRSrOz7Ozkn5BAvbrptFIftJ0UGpMWgHFMKsPOXLUpvp3fIfO3mSP0cQqypIbw8Ix3JI6c24JqqytY1Gf7jFe4LCKAZe7o5g_rMuFKKzSDxxPmccHLePNNtBbnGdr2lpaEAnM2aQXBzCLFyQ-0eY9sIPxuQQzRPfULlz93QAgvQ77us0YygeJWi6HaZ2spNB7PJjk27CRO7z7YpwrGK5XECYyTNE7AI9u_BXyMLvlz-6bP4OAnwaGMc2O9ddV8egjTrzQQVtq4YJsvkmqCYmWZ917RQRIWzaFvrygxYNth6dEe9W6qavau7jQvzNyC1VPhEVSH6gIr2McWPD5kW_JEKA%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b29198af410484a8e5ca675cdd5eb81&_e=RnLJED-agF4fF-aBxD6YW4zdBSIL6J4X9FsMCELciBTT9ym4D8ujYrByZtvpQapRSrOz7Ozkn5BAvbrptFIftJ0UGpMWgHFMKsPOXLUpvp3fIfO3mSP0cQqypIbw8Ix3JI6c24JqqytY1Gf7jFe4LCKAZe7o5g_rMuFKKzSDxxPmccHLePNNtBbnGdr2lpaEAnM2aQXBzCLFyQ-0eY9sIPxuQQzRPfULlz93QAgvQ77us0YygeJWi6HaZ2spNB7PpDtsSqYGYbMrhPOsv295FkEQ8JXDi29zl-SV_lvWdEhvldrKtHE5aaFO4bHaydOrfOSrDUquegh_2UdfOsfmfmE3uiQBnGHbMeKVmWBeK7yjjYTU2isQccG88WOVAZmi7txvVUVXEoOkJHjs0wj28g%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b29198af410484a8e5ca675cdd5eb81&_e=RnLJED-agF4fF-aBxD6YW4zdBSIL6J4X9FsMCELciBTT9ym4D8ujYrByZtvpQapRSrOz7Ozkn5BAvbrptFIftJ0UGpMWgHFMKsPOXLUpvp3fIfO3mSP0cQqypIbw8Ix3JI6c24JqqytY1Gf7jFe4LCKAZe7o5g_rMuFKKzSDxxPmccHLePNNtBbnGdr2lpaEAnM2aQXBzCLFyQ-0eY9sIPxuQQzRPfULlz93QAgvQ77us0YygeJWi6HaZ2spNB7PyI3f6smREn9uXzrFr4USiloO1tTQ-LySiOESsQJhQ4SDbxef8EHrcwTz8suG1eVfzY-dLXmMMdRptaDjHSH9fKfmGWZaibPEW9kLq4gnVWj5eJGe8lxG5KU4qUzq5JeIt4PzhBB65e4syfMbl5qMPg%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b29198af410484a8e5ca675cdd5eb81&_e=RnLJED-agF4fF-aBxD6YW4zdBSIL6J4X9FsMCELciBTT9ym4D8ujYrByZtvpQapRSrOz7Ozkn5BAvbrptFIftJ0UGpMWgHFMKsPOXLUpvp3fIfO3mSP0cQqypIbw8Ix3JI6c24JqqytY1Gf7jFe4LCKAZe7o5g_rMuFKKzSDxxPmccHLePNNtBbnGdr2lpaEAnM2aQXBzCLFyQ-0eY9sIPxuQQzRPfULlz93QAgvQ77us0YygeJWi6HaZ2spNB7PF4Nv4AmTkkb2bEnei5UpURqghN_d53ga6NzsX7Ne_Pp1Duo9dqasLExUVSVELqngDgJ9gR9NdJuab58lJJcGlKOhgm7pXWJMS9OMUqR-R8AhY50CARPFJPx8njl7afZsFXTycd0kw95q8CSsp73nSg%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b29198af410484a8e5ca675cdd5eb81&_e=RnLJED-agF4fF-aBxD6YW4zdBSIL6J4X9FsMCELciBTT9ym4D8ujYrByZtvpQapRSrOz7Ozkn5BAvbrptFIftJ0UGpMWgHFMKsPOXLUpvp3fIfO3mSP0cQqypIbw8Ix3JI6c24JqqytY1Gf7jFe4LCKAZe7o5g_rMuFKKzSDxxPmccHLePNNtBbnGdr2lpaEAnM2aQXBzCLFyQ-0eY9sIPxuQQzRPfULlz93QAgvQ77us0YygeJWi6HaZ2spNB7PNIcCq3uoDzxUwbk__00NoypauSyQNqzb6AgliwzALUErVcOGtPQYIMq88oDcJ5cKzwajpdtvL6exrQLnJb_OcW2r17VBRgE84H7rl6QU334tcZPXmILy3kpM6rqJgfVrVOVinyTMQgUNfTsD3PXYWw%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b29198af410484a8e5ca675cdd5eb81&_e=RnLJED-agF4fF-aBxD6YW4zdBSIL6J4X9FsMCELciBTT9ym4D8ujYrByZtvpQapRSrOz7Ozkn5BAvbrptFIftJ0UGpMWgHFMKsPOXLUpvp3fIfO3mSP0cQqypIbw8Ix3JI6c24JqqytY1Gf7jFe4LCKAZe7o5g_rMuFKKzSDxxPmccHLePNNtBbnGdr2lpaEAnM2aQXBzCLFyQ-0eY9sIPxuQQzRPfULlz93QAgvQ77us0YygeJWi6HaZ2spNB7P42RlD1EPyzuloXlcwrm4wq_nxJeC6x2TMI5TMAsjk4RyWSftwS6JtEJ-KBmlPZl0GXIeuUkIMKaprBgRJFslNqekBQLieWyNPrmi3CIoArlKd3z3Sd0NQjXF-dXBmnRJJv5-C4OoJ2gdY_wdZOxRjA%3D%3D)

**ICYMI: Christie Invokes McCain On The Trail In New Hampshire: Trump Broke His Promises To Republicans**
In case you missed Governor Christie on the trail in New Hampshire last night, he excoriated Donald Trump’s broken promises to Republican primary voters, citing the lasting legacy of Senator John McCain. Specifically, the Governor noted that Trump [failed](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=0cb3a63df0&e=d0a9afa930) to repeal and replace Obamacare.
He was handed the keys to the car, with a Republican Congress and he still couldn’t get the job done.
This failure was another classic example of Donald Trump putting himself, his ego, and his pettiness first. Instead of delivering results and keeping his promise, he chose to insult John McCain and prisoners of war.
[_**DONALD TRUMP**_](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=fe30f23d59&e=d0a9afa930) _**: “He’s not a war hero. He’s a war hero because he was captured. I like people that weren’t captured.”**_
Donald Trump’s own self-centeredness cost us repealing and replacing Obamacare.
**“His Own Self-Centeredness Cost Us** ”
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=8682f7bf8e&e=d0a9afa930)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: I stand with striking screenwriters and actors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

We’re living in a new era for the entertainment industry. With the advent of streaming services and artificial intelligence, the writers and actors who have entertained and moved us are facing exploitation and the risk of being replaced by AI.

That’s why the Writers Guild of America (WGA) and the Screen Actors Guild–American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (SAG-AFTRA) are striking, demanding better terms from the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers (AMPTP). Writers and actors are standing up against corporate greed and demanding fair compensation for the value they bring to a fundamentally human industry.

Sign the petition: Support our screenwriters and actors. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-support-our-screenwriters-and-actors-2?source=2023SAGWGA_RKC&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-support-wga-sag-aftra-strike-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-support-our-screenwriters-and-actors-2?source=2023SAGWGA_RKC&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-support-wga-sag-aftra-strike-petition-swap]

Rather than negotiate with the unions in good faith, the AMPTP has chosen to decry the strikes as “unrealistic” and “damaging.” Yet major Hollywood CEOs have benefitted from massive paydays [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/14/2181162/-SAG-President-Fran-Drescher-s-speech-is-a-must-watch-for-workers-everywhere?detail=emailaction] while the majority of union members are struggling to make ends meet, and studios are prepared to just wait striking workers out until they can no longer afford to stop working.

I’m proud to stand with members of the WGA and SAG-AFTRA in their fight for better wages and job security. Join me in showing your support for our screenwriters and actors. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-support-our-screenwriters-and-actors-2?source=2023SAGWGA_RKC&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-support-wga-sag-aftra-strike-petition-swap]

In solidarity,
Ro

name: Commander Ryan Zinke; Navy SEALS for Congress
subject: I’m asking you to make Tim #6
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=9dd6418815b14f87890e48bee183df1f&_t=xPjdR_gOhfnf5OQtGs5rt4u74-fpzBwRdyfqeq_LlDb4Gde1WaPBORwSHxDWckkQOJ80rLdIiNVV8PvBb3WoShH4WThC65Lb_tVP5Q5UUVI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=9dd6418815b14f87890e48bee183df1f&_t=xPjdR_gOhfnf5OQtGs5rt4u74-fpzBwRdyfqeq_LlDb4Gde1WaPBORwSHxDWckkQOJ80rLdIiNVV8PvBb3WoShH4WThC65Lb_tVP5Q5UUVI%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs.**

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana.**_

Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - **Tim Sheehy.**

In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator.

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, will you help us win one of the most important races of 2024?
body:
We can take this House seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc29192ea-9c12-4cb2-ac53-55af7c80830a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72c48bc4-26a6-4b8f-88ca-0c78c7b10912/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. [I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c146d99-2423-4fad-82c6-51cfa4a17c22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. [Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T746204f7-7779-4f44-8887-2d78a5b78a8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1aeef6da-f611-4c2d-9672-f0616f03b834/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. [So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fc3c7ca-623f-40f4-b3c2-d246bf09e838/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al [P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! DONATE HERE.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td73fcb7e-839f-4925-8d05-fba9b2622092/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy

body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd0bdg3b6li1l32lgi0reqno8nr9a9lduli8m938_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1c1h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf7qe0au2ja61mtaf4mjfpo0bukpebpi3asgron8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1c1h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6jrf4cdu4i0q0lk0tnfk89r5matc74lu0or338o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1c1h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zle3alg455g0enqk240goav296kmjg4gmatupp58_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1c1h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaf6mec9jj13qm6ji6h0iacico2i1eqa81u840o0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmh7815k5u546ue6qdscbifahkl2ts74n5aafjtg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf04htkpgpdonu33vf06i6d3fha477hb4g7l7of8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1c1h2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Help us take Big Tech to the Supreme Court
body:
Do you trust the government to decide what information is true?

| |
---
| | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true?_I know I don’t._ But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that.That’s why we’re suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we’re asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government—collusion aimed to censor American citizens.But we need your help today. **[Which is why I’m asking you to add your name to the Center for American Liberty’s Open Letter standing shoulder-to-shoulder Rogan O’Handley as his landmark First Amendment lawsuit goes before the Supreme Court.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z69rg8g36u0f8guohk3anfb0ajoa4vqbgnt5iiq8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1chh2bs)** For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left.And these people think it’s up to them to decide what’s true.They think it’s up to them to decide what you are and aren’t allowed to say, to believe, and to share.And if you dare challenge what they’ve decided is true, they’ll label you an agent of “misinformation” and shut you up._That’s what happened to our client._ If you’re on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him.**His name is Rogan O’Handley, but you might know him as “@DC_Draino.”** And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020—he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit.That’s when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla’s office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan’s tweets.I’m writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. **[Will you add your name to the Center for American Liberty’s Open Letter of support for Rogan O’Handley and his First Amendment rights?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ji1h1maddo7e0j4ju7bac54tmpic68gipigrk0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1chh2bs)** This case is bigger than Rogan and it’s bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform.If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it.**And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU.** Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we’ve faced some devastating defeats.But we haven’t given up because we know what this case means to the American people.And we’re counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. **[So please add your name to our Open Letter in support of Rogan O’Handley and together let’s put a stop to Big Tech censorship.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ljs7vd6f89ljpuluv3ihos210pjniv83f2psbo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1chh2bs)** It’s really quite simple:
---
| | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what’s allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country\- Without free speech, we can’t have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment.
---
America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard.Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**SIGN THE LETTER NOW**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zous03744a53ncu3a2kiue1shp7hr0hulepj6b7g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk7962e6pcm0oos2nhousoaitl7cjndal3a5al8g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi6aoj1chh2bs)

Team,

If you’re like most Americans, odds are you’re worried about our democracy. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67016220/418364659/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230725_FR_7R_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYTIwNzY3LTA2MmItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DzeJTsvIFWgA1ypeNVSkqxJdIrot151Berqj_FAMHg0=)

**Unfortunately, these concerns for our democracy are well-founded.** With Republicans employing tactics like gerrymandering, voter suppression, and election denialism, there is clearly a faction of MAGA extremists who are willing to secure power at any cost.

**But the good news is that the American people still believe in our democracy – and together we have the power to defend it.** As A.G. Holder said, “In recent elections, the majority of the people have sent a clear message: they wholly reject anti-democratic election denialism and want their basic rights protected.”
[**_The NDRC is fighting to defend democracy, but the strength of our work depends on supporters like you. Will you donate now to help us keep going?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67016222/418364672/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230725_FR_7R_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYTIwNzY3LTA2MmItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DzeJTsvIFWgA1ypeNVSkqxJdIrot151Berqj_FAMHg0=)
**“Democracy is fragile. You have to tend to it, you have to fight for it.”
– President Barack Obama**
| [Help power our movement: Donate to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67016223/418364673/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230725_FR_7R_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYTIwNzY3LTA2MmItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DzeJTsvIFWgA1ypeNVSkqxJdIrot151Berqj_FAMHg0=)

**President Obama is right, team: If we want our democracy to thrive, it’s up to us to protect it from those who seek to weaken it. That’s why the NDRC is working across the country to prevent GOP gerrymandering, combat voter suppression, defeat election denialism, and so much more.

[_Can we count on you to donate today to support the NDRC’s democracy-saving work nationwide?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67016224/418364674/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230725_FR_7R_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYTIwNzY3LTA2MmItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DzeJTsvIFWgA1ypeNVSkqxJdIrot151Berqj_FAMHg0=)**

clean_body: | = In a town hall meeting after President Donald Trump says he received a letter naming him as a "target" of Special Counsel Jack Smith's investigation into the January 6th attack on the U.S. Capitol, he went out of his way to tell another election lie. He implied that there was widespread voter fraud in the 2020 election including “phony ballots” that could have tipped the balance. ****This is 100% false.** My job is to lead with the truth and defend our democracy, which is why I responded quickly and publicly to this latest effort to mislead. Silence would risk harm to our election system. I continue fighting back against disinformation but with front-running candidates spreading lies, I need your help to correct the record. End-of-month deadlines are a critical time to show our moment. We need to raise another $12,500 by then. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | ****=**** | ****=**** | ****=**** | ****=**** | ****=**** | ****=**** Ballots have a variety of security measures that make it nearly impossible for anyone to recreate them. Even if someone would be able to exactly recreate a ballot, there are many procedures in place to catch fraud or mistakes every step of the way. = Thanks for everything, Steve | = | = | = **** **** | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = ** Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. Over the past 8 years, I’ve worked hard to listen to the people of Louisiana, and to find solutions to public policy that benefit us all.

_Like improving access to quality education...
_
_Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our southern border...
_
_Like securing the resources Louisiana needs to aid disaster recovery efforts...
_
And most of all – protecting and defending your Constitutional Rights as set forth by our Founding Fathers.

I don’t find any of the above controversial – I just see it as putting YOU first, Friend.

If you feel the same, then I hope you’ll take me up on my offer and join my team of 2023 Sustaining Members – it sure would mean a lot to me.

clean_body: | | | | Intended Recipient Only: Please do not forward this message or otherwise share| Friend, Down here in Louisiana, we don’t always do what’s popular, trendy, or what everyone else wants us to do... But we always do what’s right. Which is why today, I would like to personally invite you to join my exclusive team of Sustaining Members – it will go a long way in helping me fight for Louisiana values in the Senate. | | | | | Over the past 8 years, I’ve worked hard to listen to the people of Louisiana, and to find solutions to public policy that benefit us all. Like improving access to quality education... Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our southern border... Like securing the resources Louisiana needs to aid disaster recovery efforts... And most of all – protecting and defending your Constitutional Rights as set forth by our Founding Fathers. I don’t find any of the above controversial – I just see it as putting YOU first, Friend. If you feel the same, then I hope you’ll take me up on my offer and join my team of 2023 Sustaining Members – it sure would mean a lot to me. Thank you, | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 == \-

clean_body: Help us keep the momentum so we can WIN again in 2024. | Peter, Not only did our campaign put up strong numbers in this second-quarter, but House Republicans as a whole OUTRAISED the Left these past few months: Democrats thought they were guaranteed to take back the House in 2024 after outraising Republicans 2:1 earlier this year –yet, thanks to your continued support, we have proven that the Left is no match for the conservative movement. Americans have shown their dissatisfaction with the Democrats' radical and disastrous agenda. But that won’t stop the Left from doubling down and launching relentless attacks to try to gain favor with voters once again. That’s why we need to continue reaching all our fundraising goals between now and Election Day to FIGHT BACK and WIN! Democrats have continuously left Americans behind in their quest for complete and total control as they focus on “woke” ideologies and their radical agenda. And through it all they’ve made the American Dream unreachable for so many. Last cycle voters spoke up and showed their support by electing a Republican House majority. Now, with this surge in fundraising, they are once again showing the will of the people and helping us defend our narrow majority for 2024. They know we won’t stop fighting for the American people and this country to ensure a brighter future for all generations. But we can’t afford to get complacent with the full force of the Left fighting against us. That’s why we are counting on your continued support to keep up this momentum to ensure we continue to DOMINATE fundraising and WIN once again in 2024. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender. Activists have been fighting for 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and we can't wait any longer.
**When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , they took away the right for half of the population to access the health care they need. **It's discrimination based on sex — plain and simple.
Thankfully, we're closer than ever before to certifying the ERA: 38 states have ratified it — now, it's just one signature away from being added to the Constitution. _But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!_
**That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a new joint resolution that would establish that this deadline should _not_ stop us from certifying the ERA. **With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this joint resolution and finally establish gender equality in our Constitution.
This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. “No more Schweikerts – and no more Sinemas”

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017153/418367848/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkZWE0MGYtMDkyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6SPLIAzjUJ2MsBPukQ13hv6S9FMNcUZANpJL0NhmLpw=) Team, did you see the recent article in _The New Republic_ about Andrei? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017154/418367849/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.25_b1_afa.com_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkZWE0MGYtMDkyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6SPLIAzjUJ2MsBPukQ13hv6S9FMNcUZANpJL0NhmLpw=) Out on the campaign trail, Andrei often says this election is not about replacing David Schweikert but replacing him with someone with the values and track record to be trusted to deliver the real change we need. Just putting someone in office with the label “Democrat” by their name isn’t enough.

Andrei speaks from personal experience. More than a decade ago, Kyrsten Sinema narrowly edged out Andrei in the Democratic primary for Congress. Back then, he called her out for who she was – someone Arizona Democrats couldn’t count on to deliver for them. As he said in the article:

_“She was someone who was the Republicans’ favorite Democratic legislator. Somebody who was cozy with the Republican lobbyists.”_

Andrei isn’t running to maintain the status quo, he’s running to change it. For Andrei, legislative priorities aren’t about winning the next election or getting cozy with Republicans and the Big Banks. It’s about doing the most good that you can for the people you represent. And that’s just what he’ll do in Congress.

He isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs – he’s counting on grassroots support to power his campaign.

**What matters in this race for Congress is not that we elect a Democrat – but that we elect a Democrat who will make a difference:** Someone who will fight for working people and the middle class against a Republican Party that has long been in the pocket of the wealthy and well-connected corporations. Someone who will stand up and defend our democracy and freedoms.

[**This will be an incredibly expensive race, and we need your help. Every donation, whether it's $3, $30, $330, or more, makes a difference and is crucial to our ability to wage this fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017155/418367850/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.25_b1_afa.com_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkZWE0MGYtMDkyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6SPLIAzjUJ2MsBPukQ13hv6S9FMNcUZANpJL0NhmLpw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$3 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017156/418367851/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.25_b1_afa.com_all&amount=3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkZWE0MGYtMDkyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6SPLIAzjUJ2MsBPukQ13hv6S9FMNcUZANpJL0NhmLpw=) | [$30 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017157/418367852/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.25_b1_afa.com_all&amount=30&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkZWE0MGYtMDkyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6SPLIAzjUJ2MsBPukQ13hv6S9FMNcUZANpJL0NhmLpw=)

clean_body: “No more Schweikerts – and no more Sinemas” = Team, did you see the recent article in The New Republic about Andrei? = Out on the campaign trail, Andrei often says this election is not about replacing David Schweikert but replacing him with someone with the values and track record to be trusted to deliver the real change we need. Just putting someone in office with the label “Democrat” by their name isn’t enough. Andrei speaks from personal experience. More than a decade ago, Kyrsten Sinema narrowly edged out Andrei in the Democratic primary for Congress. Back then, he called her out for who she was – someone Arizona Democrats couldn’t count on to deliver for them. As he said in the article: “She was someone who was the Republicans’ favorite Democratic legislator. Somebody who was cozy with the Republican lobbyists.” Andrei isn’t running to maintain the status quo, he’s running to change it. For Andrei, legislative priorities aren’t about winning the next election or getting cozy with Republicans and the Big Banks. It’s about doing the most good that you can for the people you represent. And that’s just what he’ll do in Congress. He isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs – he’s counting on grassroots support to power his campaign. What matters in this race for Congress is not that we elect a Democrat – but that we elect a Democrat who will make a difference: Someone who will fight for working people and the middle class against a Republican Party that has long been in the pocket of the wealthy and well-connected corporations. Someone who will stand up and defend our democracy and freedoms. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Yes, we need no more of David Schweikert. But we can’t afford any more Kyrsten Sinema’s either. We need new leadership that will stand up and make a positive difference in people’s lives. Thank you for your support, – Team Andrei To learn more about Andrei, visit | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States Emails are a really important way for our campaign to be in touch with our supporters. body:
Did you see this message from Madeleine and her colleagues? They take their roles on the House Judiciary Committee very seriously – working to defend the Constitution for all Americans. Did you see this message from Madeleine and her colleagues? They take their roles on the House Judiciary Committee very seriously – working to defend the Constitution for _all_ Americans.

Despite this dedication, we still see headline after headline about committee chairman Jim Jordan’s frantic, far-right agenda – weaponizing this important committee as a political tool for obstruction and partisan score-settling.

Mad has joined forces with other Democrats on the Judiciary Committee to hold Jim Jordan accountable at the ballot box and win back the majority in the House. If you’re able, we are asking you to take action now **[by splitting a donation between Democratic members of the Judiciary Committee.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017303/418368624/1259395924?amount=25&refcode=jud_split_dean_2&refcode2=72f890e6-092b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OTBlNi0wOTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7biUBmtJXoeElO_tzQw-QcDLMRoCSQbmB5bJeK7cq8=)** | | [ **SPLIT A DONATION** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017304/418368625/1259395924?amount=25&refcode=jud_split_dean_2&refcode2=72f890e6-092b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OTBlNi0wOTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7biUBmtJXoeElO_tzQw-QcDLMRoCSQbmB5bJeK7cq8=)

Below, hear directly from Mad on the importance of the Judiciary Committee and what’s on the line next year.

Take care,

Cole
**Begin forwarded message:**
> It’s an honor to serve on the House Judiciary Committee alongside many hardworking public servants in our Democratic Caucus.
>
> In the 116th and 117th Congresses, we passed serious, consequential legislation through the Committee. In the 118th Congress? Not so much. **[In a minute, I’m going to ask you to consider a contribution to help us flip the House next year and get back to this serious work – but first, some background.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017305/418368626/1259395924?amount=25&refcode=jud_split_dean_2&refcode2=72f890e6-092b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OTBlNi0wOTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7biUBmtJXoeElO_tzQw-QcDLMRoCSQbmB5bJeK7cq8=)**
>
> You see, Peter, in this current Congress, my Democratic colleagues and I on the Judiciary Committee have become the last line of defense as Chairman Jim Jordan lurches the Committee toward an agenda of obstruction, disinformation, and far-right, partisan investigations.
>
> **In fact, as Chairman, Jim Jordan used his power to create and fund a partisan Subcommittee on the Weaponization of Government – demanding over $18 million in funding with no accountability.**
>
> The Judiciary Committee plays a unique role in defending the Constitution and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. It should never be used as a political tool for obstruction and partisan grandstanding.
>
> Nevertheless, this is what we see on a daily basis from Jim Jordan and far-right GOP members – and it underscores just how much is on the line in 2024. It is critical that my Democratic Judiciary colleagues and I have the resources we’ll need to retake the majority next year, make Jim Jordan a one-term Chairman, and get back to the serious work of the Judiciary Committee.
>
> **[Help us do just that by splitting a donation between Democratic Members of the Judiciary Committee right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017306/418368627/1259395924?amount=25&refcode=jud_split_dean_2&refcode2=72f890e6-092b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OTBlNi0wOTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7biUBmtJXoeElO_tzQw-QcDLMRoCSQbmB5bJeK7cq8=)** | [ **SPLIT $20** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67017307/418368628/1259395924?amount=20&refcode=jud_split_dean_2&refcode2=72f890e6-092b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OTBlNi0wOTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7biUBmtJXoeElO_tzQw-QcDLMRoCSQbmB5bJeK7cq8=)

_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_

| | Friend,

---
A former FBI agent has come forward to confirm the brave whistleblower’s testimony that the FBI interfered with the IRS investigation of the Biden Crime Family.

---
**_This same Department of “Justice” – that is trying to cover up Crooked Joe’s crimes ahead of the 2024 election – is trying to put ME in JAIL for the rest of my life as an innocent man._**__
---
The current regime in Washington is the single most corrupt presidency in the history of the United States.

---
We are living in a two-tiered system of justice – one set of rules that protects the well-connected left-wing elites, and another set of rules for everybody else.

---
_We all know that change cannot and will not come from within this poisonous, corrupt justice system._

---
Rather, at this pivotal moment in our nation’s history – as America is teetering on the brink of tyranny – _our only hope of justice will come from**YOU**._

---
Millions of voters like _YOU_ will be our country’s final hope of restoring true justice in America as we vote on November 5, 2024 to FIRE the Crook in the White House and his Leftist henchmen who’ve hijacked the Department of Justice.

---
It was hardworking Americans who founded our country – and it will be hardworking Americans who SAVE our country in 2024.

subject: Sign: Join us in demanding Kevin McCarthy drop his impeachment threats NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Kevin McCarthy drop the ridiculous "impeach Biden" threats](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69161e6c-4ab4-4d53-b39c-70e5f8e6b38d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00b1dfd2-3971-4d79-a228-79cfb2fb96e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Kevin McCarthy is [threatening](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2355bd4-e91a-413d-869a-517494c14b37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to impeach President Biden, even though he can't give an actual reason why. This is because there is no reason, it's just a naked attempt to appease the extreme right wingers in the House who are still irked over the Trump impeachments, and want to use the impeachment for fundraising, and to get media coverage. [**Sign on, and join us in demanding that McCarthy drop his impeachment threats NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb173900-eb93-49f6-adf0-c0134981cc39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) These same extremists are also pushing the false equivalence narrative, saying that Biden should be impeached because Trump was. Let's be clear: 1) Trump sent an armed mob to the Capitol to overturn a democratic election and kill the sitting vice president. This is a reason for impeachment. 2) Biden has done a great job, passing historic and highly effective legislation. This is NOT a reason for impeachment. [**Enough is enough. Sign on, and join us in demanding that McCarthy drop his impeachment threats NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7c82fce-e4b6-4a48-bde4-93008197c299/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcac5116d-7763-4864-85e7-25b9e85430b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

body:
Claim your small town proud T-shirt before they turn your town into Chicago.

Friend, Jason Aldean recorded a song praising small-town values, and the Radical Left has canceled him for it.

**Why?**

Because they want every small town in America to look like the socialist disasters in California and New York.

**[That's why we're standing up for the forgotten American by giving away this T-shirt to anyone who donates just $35 to help help House Republicans stand up for small town values.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c523ed62634cd4ab79b645ac84dabb&_e=1Pu8l2GFKupYv_EPwmAKh9itR6e3Kc2vep4-MjOS9CIkwVAFv_rAKV6rerieH3X8JNZH6F6qq0RtJzucV7Q_h2eb_q_zosZvuanCMom_Xia9rucAC_vYUMeVhXhcRz2b7lwTn6-zFOdf6_NBzb7J8BGjPDqsEsuOIMeoRfND_cD3oP8VajjgaPqlflgoLAWqoMH4VkBZT6lW1EbHtkHPwE76enrpz526Ou2NpIY9reqGRi8GmtgK6s2ZOO0Ve5pl6UwdRBj-kBkDH9D95yeepI9kbvULMqEXMPhXRlLn5G7Ndxu6albWPS4DdyCVL7HoNkxO1_HdAp-UreGAMEsD31KUvqsiWQBJRvs1dNCcSEDw9g7bZLHkzhz9DiXfTYVG6s8hmku-JESRWCRl9b2ynPYeqLjcgQx1_eqkjlFqHEUU3VTs-hExmPHRL4Yk5v1Q-d5umZzZVgYm_JfGIozLjw%3D%3D "That’s why we’re standing up for the forgotten American by giving away this T-shirt to anyone who donates just $35 to help help House Republicans stand up for small town values.")**

name: Bob Lorinser for Congress
subject: Urgent support needed for Carbon Fee and Dividend policy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Urgent Support Needed for Bob Lorinser's Congressional Candidacy and a Carbon Fee and Dividend Policy!
Friend,
As I share with you a strong position on how to most effectively combat climate change, I must also ask for your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] I have a monthly fundraising goal to hit in five days, and to stay on pace, I'm humbly requesting a generous contribution to my campaign. If you're able, please consider a donation today.
Every dollar helps our cause.
Thank you!
-Dr. Bob
RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
As we face the challenges of climate change, it is vital for our elected representatives and candidates, like myself, to take proactive steps toward a greener and more environmentally responsible society. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I am committed to addressing climate change and strongly advocate for implementing a Carbon Fee and Dividend policy. This policy would reduce carbon emissions throughout the economy while ensuring the burden does not fall on consumers.
By holding polluters accountable, a carbon fee would help to significantly reduce America's carbon pollution by 50% by 2030 , setting us on a path towards achieving net-zero emissions by 2050.
Additionally, the proceeds from the carbon fee would be returned to U.S. households in the form of carbon cashback.
This approach helps low- and middle-income individuals afford higher prices while reducing air pollution and contributing to a healthier population.
How Does a Price on Carbon Work? [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cRCTPx3Zv7E]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cRCTPx3Zv7E [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cRCTPx3Zv7E]
It's critical we elect candidates who are committed to advancing this initiative. By supporting my campaign for Congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] and advocating for a Carbon Fee and Dividend policy, you will demonstrate your dedication to our environment, our community, and the well-being of future generations.
I sincerely appreciate your consideration.
v/r
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Proud Democrat

body:

_Have you missed our last five messages?_

We hate to keep asking, but Chuck Schumer just endorsed a NEW D.C. statehood bill. And to make matters worse, Republicans are running out of time and short of the support necessary to block it.

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: Kamala wants to ban assault weapons again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Let me tell you something: Chipping away at the Second Amendment does more damage to women than anyone else.

| | | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8979ec1be1384d7a8ed7838950a739bc&_e=pittzG7SJeFOuR9k7GAxO1QqQqSNDheBJ9VAt0K-DpG6zW_CwRrLfpz1XnsTXv2Mm-dc2RCxO85zmNp4WcoYOAtc4PEjYm28i2M9j-GWw0pECkel81pokbSWzyFV-gA9-0RvlVPUcR9g4PCorowx-9CsGQwPeTEJnemMu494JMrfNrswabXtjazy1crfILBIglpv-Q3tAYrCjxD1jgr6vi2PVJuE1b7F92eaPBx4ZXr0McLdT0DFNOqMuuhdtMD92r_KwIshI7bGKoLXS3CiAIF27FhlS95ISxlyzr4vu96IIlusXr_KmqP-rpn_Rixb)

| | | [PROTECT OUR 2A RIGHTS: DONATE NOW >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8979ec1be1384d7a8ed7838950a739bc&_e=pittzG7SJeFOuR9k7GAxO1QqQqSNDheBJ9VAt0K-DpG6zW_CwRrLfpz1XnsTXv2Mm-dc2RCxO85zmNp4WcoYOAtc4PEjYm28i2M9j-GWw0pECkel81pokbSWzyFV-gA9-0RvlVPUcR9g4PCorowx-9JyNwn4R7b38Ai6eyHt-X2_4PuAij_4imhGhYuP1BbU-5nn4FPXiQCNovzKKOblnB8XAOiF2g5jMB4IvNjeR_OQ5ZIq-z5jqAaCvcX2g1w8a3XRN0LsKRkBJUoIL7VxBDaclcbBKi1TmkK30k_gW77jIlaDoYRKL5W-cz157flY "PROTECT OUR 2A RIGHTS: DONATE NOW >>")
---
| Friend,

Our Second Amendment is **absolutely under attack** in this country.

Just last week, Kamala Harris renewed the Biden administration's push to**ban assault weapons.**
---
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8979ec1be1384d7a8ed7838950a739bc&_e=pittzG7SJeFOuR9k7GAxO1QqQqSNDheBJ9VAt0K-DpG6zW_CwRrLfpz1XnsTXv2Mm-dc2RCxO85zmNp4WcoYOAtc4PEjYm28i2M9j-GWw0pECkel81pokbSWzyFV-gA9-0RvlVPUcR9g4PCorowx-32OMYWnNG1pSESOeVZhZ8PKgBdCJl5PC_do1EOZ39RzT06fzrsxCbY55_KtxfK84QE2GHHzq3hYW0pTWUDSIt6cEj0tqKzDZRkUCUJU0sxFfJG1d-ZZsyFYcglHgU4rjgjFgxDeAqDnqyr5wfPkk42hqDharRGnC_JO84GqaBtV)
---
| Kamala has made her entire career off the notion that she "supports women" and our "right to choose."

Ironically, the Left doesn't think we should be able to **choose how we defend ourselves.**

Let me tell you something: Chipping away at the Second Amendment does **more damage to women** than anyone else.

As a five-foot-tall woman, **I am grateful for my freedom to carry**. You may recall, I told Beto O'Rourke **"Hell No, you're not taking my guns"** before I decided to run for Congress.
---
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8979ec1be1384d7a8ed7838950a739bc&_e=pittzG7SJeFOuR9k7GAxO1QqQqSNDheBJ9VAt0K-DpG6zW_CwRrLfpz1XnsTXv2Mm-dc2RCxO85zmNp4WcoYOAtc4PEjYm28i2M9j-GWw0pECkel81pokbSWzyFV-gA9-0RvlVPUcR9g4PCorowx-9xeQnZiSEhaYVoMP85TTNYjxPW2bwKQ9VxGYsvu_YAcPOsY5z4WrVnYshQaFRqYoCVx1XbZJf2no12g9pwY6sC4vc44MHGTvJunzPl5vAB9VVnPbHhp8H-1jnd1XMbn-d5RdxSkcBwl82T6q_zRnO-fdSOpVxl_d3gSM6j6pBx9)

| I haven't changed one bit. I'm doing everything in my power to fight for the Second Amendment, like introducing the **Shall Not Be Infringed** Act to repeal RINO gun control laws.

Help me **take a stand for our right to bear arms**. [Join our coalition of freedom-loving patriots who want to see their right to carry a gun protected by chipping in anything you can RIGHT NOW!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8979ec1be1384d7a8ed7838950a739bc&_e=pittzG7SJeFOuR9k7GAxO1QqQqSNDheBJ9VAt0K-DpG6zW_CwRrLfpz1XnsTXv2Mm-dc2RCxO85zmNp4WcoYOAtc4PEjYm28i2M9j-GWw0pECkel81pokbSWzyFV-gA9-0RvlVPUcR9g4PCorowx-zZoJQvBgPDlsyI76kCPuLxp4E1bgePqx6FNLCz0V37ipBo-tZhJJgBLR8F_YXKymgJkEU6WuNfKAx8PGj4t6XLWhzFyaTrhDo4mA8Jh2gYj3nw35d3OOsoxXU3Fw5PrlUMdCMQbmga55vHEmSZdE6EBb3ulANoz3k29JeL-ybL8)

| Kamala Harris's announcement comes on the heels of 20 armed IRS and ATF agents **carrying out a raid on a gun store** in Great Falls, Montana.

They seized **all records of everyone that has purchased a firearm** through that store.

But it doesn't stop there. Earlier this year, the **Discover card company announced that they'd be tracking all gun purchases made with their cards.**

The Supreme Court has made it **abundantly clear** that our constitutional rights are absolute. **Shall Not Be Infringed.**

Government does NOT get to tell me or my constituents how we are allowed to keep our families safe.

I can promise you this: **I will never, ever stop fighting to preserve our Second Amendment.**

Biden can keep trying to destroy it, but **I 'll fight him (and anyone else)** every step of the way!

[Join us in telling Biden to COME AND TAKE IT >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8979ec1be1384d7a8ed7838950a739bc&_e=pittzG7SJeFOuR9k7GAxO1QqQqSNDheBJ9VAt0K-DpG6zW_CwRrLfpz1XnsTXv2Mm-dc2RCxO85zmNp4WcoYOAtc4PEjYm28i2M9j-GWw0pECkel81pokbSWzyFV-gA9-0RvlVPUcR9g4PCorowx-8YE7bFjfHQshIFhTc21PHu65nRr7s9546SdGlKctRw_eU8JQlQ4bgplWgGIa0n_C_2E5-fMAyNXuf2b2ebhgtycPpVy4HZvBOaej6d7H-M4QIFD_Jsucu2W9JsuonT4F-CEh9ccHDmtmsBSVS4gpXU7dAEx8BWc1FBEzg2fDpV0)

For Freedom,
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8979ec1be1384d7a8ed7838950a739bc&_e=pittzG7SJeFOuR9k7GAxO1QqQqSNDheBJ9VAt0K-DpG6zW_CwRrLfpz1XnsTXv2Mm-dc2RCxO85zmNp4WcoYOAtc4PEjYm28i2M9j-GWw0pECkel81pokbSWzyFV-gA9-0RvlVPUcR9g4PCorowx-yJKIrfeh7GckIV6YH8WkcspObHljiIVYnpePkPg2-cGwHhFw7UT4NpE_hsyxgTG_NjQLUVqnSVSM0XpVKoQRhPP4T-R5w9od0zSXhtNZAVzW5l21jaotTypKRSDsIeh7slZS1wUaoJZ9H4-251fBiGQkHYcGxiPvZAxeR8wguTv)

Let’s keep it up.

| We just got some incredible news, and we wanted to fill you in, team.

The Department of State has reported voter registration numbers, and **Democrats currently hold a 480,000 voter registration advantage over Republicans in the Commonwealth** , while independents now make up about 11% of all voters in the state.

**Here’s the tea:** As reported by _PoliticsPA_ , “Democrats have outregistered Republicans in new or change applications.” In 2022, during our first full year of operations, we collected 20,000 voter registration forms, helped flip Pennsylvania's State House for the first time in over a decade, and helped expand our U.S. Senate majority in the tight races in Pennsylvania AND Georgia. We are out here doing the hard work to expand the electorate and ensure voters are engaged, mobilized, and ready to vote. **These numbers once again confirm that our hard work is paying off.**

[**But, with critical elections coming up in September _and_ November, we cannot afford to slow down. clean_body: Let’s keep it up. = | We just got some incredible news, and we wanted to fill you in, team. The Department of State has reported voter registration numbers, and Democrats currently hold a 480,000 voter registration advantage over Republicans in the Commonwealth , while independents now make up about 11% of all voters in the state. Here’s the tea: As reported by PoliticsPA , “Democrats have outregistered Republicans in new or change applications.” In 2022, during our first full year of operations, we collected 20,000 voter registration forms, helped flip Pennsylvania's State House for the first time in over a decade, and helped expand our U.S. Senate majority in the tight races in Pennsylvania AND Georgia. We are out here doing the hard work to expand the electorate and ensure voters are engaged, mobilized, and ready to vote. These numbers once again confirm that our hard work is paying off. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Let’s do this, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. body:
As we look ahead to the 2024 election, we’re ramping up our efforts to reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and we wanted you to be among the first to know... | | |
---
We have some exciting news, Peter. **As we look ahead to the 2024 election, we’re ramping up our efforts to reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.** You might’ve heard that we’re opening a brand new HQ in Wilmington, Delaware, but we’re also assembling a talented team to lead us through next November, getting ads up on the air to spotlight Joe and Kamala’s record in communities all over the country, and so much more. We wouldn’t be able to do all of this without grassroots supporters like you who have stood by Joe and Kamala since Day One. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ump3nh1d13obkuh9jpe5gcoh73h3ibofkvv3og_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi61o74cdh2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrc69h6svithsv0mtsl7u4debbtjfqgim6opcaog_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi61o74cdh2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z789bsm79gp9emfa9pkp6d37phoifilhak6vto3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi61o74cdh2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6j1ht72i3eolhtdigqm4rm910d91a3hfcs8sg4g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi61o74cdh2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcme8q8eufdh46ahuaardqff3m1152qo8uv41i1o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi61o74cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8tcc07ur7jdr7h8c4shm269spms6d5g1044jc38_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi61o74cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdaml0255n6qcfpdfm3juhmfda04m7i51ubcfbng_rp22sh2s8i66p70cpi61o74cdh2bs)

name: Lt. Gov Mark Robinson
subject: I don't want to be Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62999016:JC_biIIDN:m:1:3299561967:304A92959945C9D9D1A5E8A70D64AB1F:r) |
* * *
**Patriot,

We are leading in the polls right now. **

Someone asked me not too long ago- **" Why do you want to be the Governor?"** And later that day I thought to myself about it and I said "well why do I want to be Governor?" Then I thought about it real deep and I came to a conclusion. I don't __**WANT**__ to be the Governor. Then I thought about it even deeper and I said "you know I didn't even __**WANT**__ to be Lt. Governor."

Now I want you to think about what I just said. I said I don't __**WANT**__ to be Governor.

We have too many people who decide to run for office because they __**WANT**__ to be something. They want to be a Congressman or a Senator. They want to be a big shot that pops his collar and looks down on the people, tells them what to do and has doors opened for them. They want a title. They want armed guards. They want their name in the paper.

They __**WANT**__. They __**WANT**__. They __**WANT**__. When I say I don't __**WANT**__ to be Governor this is what I mean.

Go back in your mind to June 6, 1944, to the English Channel. Find one of those Higgins boats and in that boat you will find a young man that is about to attack Omaha beach. Some 70-80% of his friends will be killed that day. Go back in your mind and ask that young man " Why did you want to join the army and come here? Why do you want to watch your friends die? Why do you want to be shot at? Why do you want to leave your family & friends behind, to maybe never see them again?"

I would imagine that that young man would probably turn around and say something to the effect of __**" I didn't WANT any of this,**__ because this is not about want. This is about __**SERVICE.**__ Our nation was attacked. I cannot sit at home and watch this world burn and have my nation in trouble. It's time for me to stand up and serve- up to and including giving my life if necessary."

My campaign for Governor is not about want. __**IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE.**__

It's about service and the Washington establishment needs to hear it. They're not there to serve themselves and their own self interests. They're there to serve the people of this nation and the people who sent them there.

**Now I don 't want to ask you this today- I don't want to have to ask hardworking Americans to part with their hard earned money, but this is not about want. This is about service. So I'm asking- will you join me in the name of service today?**
| **[JOIN MARK ROBINSON TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62999016:JC_biIIDN:m:1:3299561967:304A92959945C9D9D1A5E8A70D64AB1F:r)**

clean_body: Please see my full statement | | | | | | | | | Patriot, We are leading in the polls right now. Someone asked me not too long ago- " Why do you want to be the Governor?" And later that day I thought to myself about it and I said "well why do I want to be Governor?" Then I thought about it real deep and I came to a conclusion. I don't WANT to be the Governor. Then I thought about it even deeper and I said "you know I didn't even WANT to be Lt. Governor." Now I want you to think about what I just said. I said I don't WANT to be Governor. We have too many people who decide to run for office because they WANT to be something. They want to be a Congressman or a Senator. They want to be a big shot that pops his collar and looks down on the people, tells them what to do and has doors opened for them. They want a title. They want armed guards. They want their name in the paper. They WANT. They WANT. They WANT. When I say I don't WANT to be Governor this is what I mean. Go back in your mind to June 6, 1944, to the English Channel. Find one of those Higgins boats and in that boat you will find a young man that is about to attack Omaha beach. Some 70-80% of his friends will be killed that day. Go back in your mind and ask that young man " Why did you want to join the army and come here? Why do you want to watch your friends die? Why do you want to be shot at? Why do you want to leave your family & friends behind, to maybe never see them again?" I would imagine that that young man would probably turn around and say something to the effect of " I didn't WANT any of this, because this is not about want. This is about SERVICE. Our nation was attacked. I cannot sit at home and watch this world burn and have my nation in trouble. It's time for me to stand up and serve- up to and including giving my life if necessary." My campaign for Governor is not about want. IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE. It's about service and the Washington establishment needs to hear it. They're not there to serve themselves and their own self interests. They're there to serve the people of this nation and the people who sent them there. Now I don 't want to ask you this today- I don't want to have to ask hardworking Americans to part with their hard earned money, but this is not about want. This is about service. So I'm asking- will you join me in the name of service today? | ** Thank you & God Bless, Mark | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson Business donations are not allowed.
