name: Greg Casar
subject: I’m not drinking water all day…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020182/418379442/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=&emci=6170eeab-0f2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=6470eeab-0f2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
BIG NEWS: I’m on a thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capitol today, Peter.

**_That means I’ll be on the U.S. Capitol steps ALL DAY – and I won’t drink any water or take breaks from standing on the steps, through sun and rain, in solidarity with our nation’s workers._**

Let me explain: Our nation is experiencing a historic heatwave this summer—exposing workers to _deadly_ temperatures that are getting them sick or even killed.

Currently there are NO federal protections for workers exposed to heat. And to make matters worse, in my home state of Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott recently signed a law *eliminating* workers’ rights to water or rest breaks—breaks I fought for in Austin and Dallas as a labor organizer more than a decade ago.

**That’s why in solidarity with workers across the country, I’m going on a _thirst strike_ to raise support for federal heat safety protections—urging the Biden Administration to take action to protect workers. Together, we’re building a movement of hope and progress, especially when it’s tough.

[If you support my thirst strike for federal heat safety protections for workers, can you chip in $5, $10, or $20 to help us get it done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020183/418379443/-1745368502?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=) **_My team will keep me updated throughout the day on the grassroots support for our thirst strike!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020184/418379444/-1770493794?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020185/418379445/2097596723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=&emci=6170eeab-0f2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=6470eeab-0f2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020186/418379446/2097596723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=&emci=6170eeab-0f2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=6470eeab-0f2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
****[Support Greg's Thirst Strike! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020187/418379447/-1745368502?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=)****
---
Peter, this isn’t my first thirst strike.

In fact, as a 21-year-old labor organizer in 2010, I organized a thirst strike to push the City of Austin to guarantee water breaks for workers—and we did the same in Dallas soon after.**These worker victories are exactly what Greg Abbott’s new law tries to eliminate.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020188/418379448/-1770493794?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=)
Instead of standing up for workers, Greg Abbott is doing the bidding of his corporate mega donors—and workers will lose their lives because of it. Enough is enough: we MUST go over Greg Abbott’s head.

**Because of decades of corporate lobbying, there are no federal protections for workers from the deadly heat. But we can change that. That’s why we’re urging the Biden Administration to finally guarantee worker safety. Together, we have the power to undo Greg Abbott’s reckless assault on everyday people.**
[**Join me by chipping in $5, $10, or $20 to support by thirst strike in solidarity with our nation’s workers.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67020189/418379449/-1745368502?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDcwZWVhYi0wZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndpFiAd7dbni77psWoQPeUWmk4rYW6shaswwBu-oky0=)

Thank you for fighting for working people,
-Greg
****
Greg Casar
Congressman
Texas Congressional District 35

clean_body: BIG NEWS: I’m on a thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capitol today, Peter. That means I’ll be on the U.S. Capitol steps ALL DAY – and I won’t drink any water or take breaks from standing on the steps, through sun and rain, in solidarity with our nation’s workers. Let me explain: Our nation is experiencing a historic heatwave this summer—exposing workers to deadly temperatures that are getting them sick or even killed. Currently there are NO federal protections for workers exposed to heat. And to make matters worse, in my home state of Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott recently signed a law eliminating workers’ rights to water or rest breaks—breaks I fought for in Austin and Dallas as a labor organizer more than a decade ago. That’s why in solidarity with workers across the country, I’m going on a thirst strike to raise support for federal heat safety protections—urging the Biden Administration to take action to protect workers. Together, we’re building a movement of hope and progress, especially when it’s tough. = My team will keep me updated throughout the day on the grassroots support for our thirst strike! = **= Peter, this isn’t my first thirst strike. In fact, as a 21-year-old labor organizer in 2010, I organized a thirst strike to push the City of Austin to guarantee water breaks for workers—and we did the same in Dallas soon after.These worker victories are exactly what Greg Abbott’s new law tries to eliminate. = Instead of standing up for workers, Greg Abbott is doing the bidding of his corporate mega donors—and workers will lose their lives because of it. Enough is enough: we MUST go over Greg Abbott’s head. Because of decades of corporate lobbying, there are no federal protections for workers from the deadly heat. But we can change that. That’s why we’re urging the Biden Administration to finally guarantee worker safety. Together, we have the power to undo Greg Abbott’s reckless assault on everyday people. = Thank you for fighting for working people, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjk8vife3mie0u8jvh82bi0khggopjs0i8bpbsr0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph60or2c9h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zat6umpdielqin56avgc719cu17t8k9i7fiiucl0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph60or2c9h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7goc257unvbumh6c22hfv9dn2agok2cm2lp0vhg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph60or2c9h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm8d4hlvkaqhcb0sc4q8fbfbi10ol8ur2lbursr8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph60or2c9h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zasn90ohbjc3e6asoh5rkcf46f0e3snspkdved68_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph60or2c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zufqereargd5i98dcvlbpuvdj9hsmhgm7ka335s8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph60or2c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Donald J. Trump July 24th, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ —** In a new Agenda47 video, President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to end Joe Biden’s pharmaceutical shortages and return the manufacture of life-saving drugs to the United States.
“This is not just a public health crisis, it's a national security crisis,” President Trump said. “As part of my plan to obtain total independence from China, we will phase in tariffs and import restrictions to bring back production of all essential medicines to the United States of America where they belong. I signed an executive order to begin this process in 2020 but Biden has shamefully failed to follow through.”
[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM9u4yAYxJ8G37DwZwPOwYfNRrlktdf2iuEjpuGfgCRKn75yVfU6v9HMaFTI3tnXQuSRAGzOVAJAxj8E4DId3_-Ly9vlRD_9vwc9CT49dwp_CUB7Zfy1_qT0GJTzuypPnVk42IF1uAziwEYm5Cy6bZGrMJzrFewwWybWmUsuBcxiAi2VhM4twGBkEvggx8M09FJb4DNoC_M8aq7IxAzWW7ImReXNRyv3kHudQueXrbVcvzedCZzLPawed0Tg_BhhKDek6orRqEnSgnVLxcUrzSWZu24uRZosxVoxNqc8DWicdhErbYliNHR1BmOleVMlKI391oLvymLy03nvqpBkYtf9g73zKwAA__8MVWvP)
[Watch President Trump’s Plan to Reshore Production of Essential Medicines](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM9u4yAYxJ8G37DwZwPOwYfNRrlktdf2iuEjpuGfgCRKn75yVfU6v9HMaFTI3tnXQuSRAGzOVAJAxj8E4DId3_-Ly9vlRD_9vwc9CT49dwp_CUB7Zfy1_qT0GJTzuypPnVk42IF1uAziwEYm5Cy6bZGrMJzrFewwWybWmUsuBcxiAi2VhM4twGBkEvggx8M09FJb4DNoC_M8aq7IxAzWW7ImReXNRyv3kHudQueXrbVcvzedCZzLPawed0Tg_BhhKDek6orRqEnSgnVLxcUrzSWZu24uRZosxVoxNqc8DWicdhErbYliNHR1BmOleVMlKI391oLvymLy03nvqpBkYtf9g73zKwAA__8MVWvP)
President Trump took historic action in 2020 to ensure essential medicines were produced in the United States but Joe Biden reversed the order in 2021. Now, there are severe shortages of over 295 medications—a record five-year high.
“This is a matter of tremendous urgency. American lives are on the line, and it will be one of my top priorities as President. It will also create countless new American jobs.”
_**PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP’S PLAN TO END JOE BIDEN’S SHORTAGE OF LIFE SAVING CANCER DRUGS AND OTHER ESSENTIAL PHARMACEUTICALS BY RETURNING THE MANUFACTURE OF CRITICAL MEDICINES TO THE UNITED STATES**_
**PRESIDENT TRUMP’S PLAN WILL ENSURE A SAFE AND RELIABLE SUPPLY OF LIFE SAVING CANCER DRUGS AND OTHER CRITICAL MEDICINES MADE IN AMERICA**

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump July 24th, 2023 Bedminster, NJ — In a new Agenda47 video, President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to end Joe Biden’s pharmaceutical shortages and return the manufacture of life-saving drugs to the United States. “This is not just a public health crisis, it's a national security crisis,” President Trump said. “As part of my plan to obtain total independence from China, we will phase in tariffs and import restrictions to bring back production of all essential medicines to the United States of America where they belong. I signed an executive order to begin this process in 2020 but Biden has shamefully failed to follow through.” President Trump took historic action in 2020 to ensure essential medicines were produced in the United States but Joe Biden reversed the order in 2021. Now, there are severe shortages of over 295 medications—a record five-year high. “This is a matter of tremendous urgency. American lives are on the line, and it will be one of my top priorities as President. It will also create countless new American jobs.” PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP’S PLAN TO END JOE BIDEN’S SHORTAGE OF LIFE SAVING CANCER DRUGS AND OTHER ESSENTIAL PHARMACEUTICALS BY RETURNING THE MANUFACTURE OF CRITICAL MEDICINES TO THE UNITED STATES PRESIDENT TRUMP’S PLAN WILL ENSURE A SAFE AND RELIABLE SUPPLY OF LIFE SAVING CANCER DRUGS AND OTHER CRITICAL MEDICINES MADE IN AMERICA \- President Trump will restore his , dated August 6, 2020, on Ensuring Essential Medicines, Medical Countermeasures, and Critical Inputs Are Made in the United States. \- This Essential Medicines EO sought to ensure sufficient and reliable, long-term domestic production of essential medications, minimizing potential shortages by reducing our dependence on foreign manufacturers. \- The EO required federal agencies to “Buy American” by facilitating the domestic production of medicines and medical devices that the FDA determined “essential” to public health. It did so by requiring federal agencies to buy medicines and medical devices that are entirely “produced in the United States.” \- The EO also required the U.S. Trade Representative to modify our international trade agreements so that drugs deemed “essential” to public health by the FDA can no longer be purchased by federal agencies from any of the that has a trade agreement with the U.S. that authorizes the manufacture of such “essential” drugs for the U.S. market. \- President Trump’s August 2020 Essential Medicines EO reflected critical lessons learned from the national response to the COVID19 pandemic, including the extreme national vulnerability caused by the lack of an adequate domestic manufacturing capability for critical pharmaceuticals. This vulnerability was compounded by the severely and Strategic National Stockpile (SNS) left by the Obama-Biden administration. As a result, between March 2020 and January 2021, President Trump invoked the Defense Production Act over to rapidly replenish the SNS with medicines and medical equipment to fight the pandemic. As a part of this effort, large-scale and long-term government contracts were awarded to American manufacturers to produce life-saving essential medicines and medical equipment for public health emergencies. For example, in Richmond, Virginia, was awarded a $354 million contract—with an additional $458 million available for long-term stockpiling purposes—to manufacture over a dozen kinds of USA-made medicines and their precursor ingredients to treat patients hospitalized with the COVID19 virus. \- Restoring President Trump’s August 2020 Essential Medicines EO will kickstart the domestic production of lifesaving drugs. \- American doctors should never have to give a patient a drug from an unapproved facility in China or India. We can and must produce these essential medicines at home. \- A recent conducted by Washington University in St. Louis found that 30 percent of U.S. pharmaceutical companies utilize 50 percent or less of their facility capacity, meaning U.S. companies could already produce millions more doses of medication every year. JOE BIDEN GUTTED PRESIDENT TRUMP’S ESSENTIAL MEDICINES EXECUTIVE ORDER TO “BUY AMERICAN”, ALLOWING FEDERAL AGENCIES TO BUY ESSENTIAL MEDICINES FROM UNSAFE FOREIGN COUNTRIES \- On April 20, 2021, Biden a proposal to put President Trump’s EO into effect by removing essential drugs and medical devices from coverage under the World Trade Organization Government Procurement Agreement (WTO GPA). \- By ripping up the proposal, the U.S. government can continue to buy foreign-made medicines and medical devices. \- With federal agencies still permitted under current law to purchase medicines “essential” to public health from any of America’s 120 trading partners, there is no incentive for federal agencies to buy from domestic companies. As a result, the United States will continue to be dependent on foreign countries for its most critical medical needs. JOE BIDEN’S DRUG SHORTAGE CONSTITUTES AN URGENT PUBLIC HEALTH CRISIS \- Under Biden, shortages of essential medications have grown astronomically. \- Between 2021 and 2022, new drug shortages by 30 percent, with a record five-year high of 295 active drug shortages at the end of 2022. \- The U.S. is at a in drug shortages. \- There is currently a of at least 14 cancer drugs in the U.S. \- A June 2023 by the National Comprehensive Cancer Network (NCCN) found that 93 percent of U.S. cancer centers have shortages of carboplatin and 70 percent have shortages of cisplatin, essential medicines that treat a wide array of cancers. \- A found that every month delayed in cancer treatment can raise the risk of death by around 10%. JOE BIDEN’S DRUG SHORTAGE IS FUELED BY OVERRELIANCE ON FOREIGN-MADE MEDICINES AND, IN SOME CASE, POTENTIALLY UNSAFE MANUFACTURERS \- Instead of building a domestic manufacturing capability, Biden’s FDA is building up foreign manufacturing of pharmaceuticals and putting American lives at risk. \- India accounts for the majority of FDA-approved active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) facilities sending drugs into the United States as of 2021. \- China accounts for 445 FDA-approved API manufacturers. \- In 2021, China was the of pharmaceutical to the U.S. measured by weight, accounting for 190 million kilograms (418 million lbs.) or 23% of total pharma imports. \- Chinese imports to the U.S. now for 95 percent of ibuprofen, 91 percent of hydrocortisone, 70 percent of acetaminophen, and 40 to 45 percent of penicillin. \- China and India account for of all prescriptions written in the U.S. \- Chinese and Indian drug companies present a substantial risk to the health of Americans. \- In June 2023, the Biden FDA temporarily importing cancer drugs, cisplatin and carboplatin, from unapproved foreign companies because of domestic shortages. \- The shortages were exacerbated by , an Indian drug companies that shut down production after it shredded documents and dowsed trashcans in acid when the FDA began to investigate them. \- The Biden FDA Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, an Indian drug company, to export into the U.S. even though it was under an import ban because of significant violations of current good manufacturing practices at its facility in Baddi. TRANSCRIPT Under crooked Joe Biden there has been a catastrophic increase in shortages of essential medicines. Last year, new drug shortages were up by 30% with 295 active drug shortages, just by the end of 2022 alone. It's a mess. There's currently a shortage of at least 14 critical cancer drugs in the United States. They just can't get it. And every month of delay, cancer treatment increases the risk of death by at least 10%. It's unthinkable that this could be happening in the United States of America in 2023. It is truly unbelievable. We are becoming a third world country very rapidly between our open borders and our bad elections. We are third world. But even more dangerously, the top producer of critical medicines that we rely on in the United States is a place called China. China produces 95% of all ibuprofen, 91% of hydrocortisone, 70% of all Tylenol, and nearly half of all penicillin. Can you imagine that? This is not just a public health crisis, it's a national security crisis. As part of my plan to obtain total independence from China, we will phase in tariffs and import restrictions to bring back production of all essential medicines to the United States of America where they belong. I signed an executive order to begin this process in 2020 but Biden has shamefully failed to follow through. He wants it ended. He wants to take care of China. This is a matter of tremendous urgency. American lives are on the line, and it will be one of my top priorities as President. It will also create countless new American jobs. Thank you. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America PAC. donaldjtrump.com |

Fellow Conservative, As one of my top supporters, I'm sure you know that MILLIONS of illegal immigrants have crossed our southern border since Biden took office last year. And as you read this email, the border crisis is reaching a fever pitch. Temperatures are hitting near-record highs across the border region, and the results have been DEVASTATING. On July 10, Border Patrol Chief Jason Owens tweeted that his agents had discovered the remains of 10 individuals who succumbed to the heat – and newsletter _Center Square_ reported that Border Patrol found the bodies of 70 migrants last month. _Illegal immigration isn't just a DISASTER for our country – it's a humanitarian tragedy._ Biden's decision to drop Title 42 restrictions has led to a massive influx of illegal immigrants during the year's hottest months, and the human cost is staggering. **ENOUGH is ENOUGH, Fellow Conservative. We desperately need to defeat Joe Biden and his leftist cronies in the U.S. Senate next year, so we can finally get the border crisis under control. ** **[I'm personally asking you to please pitch in $5, $10, $25, $50, or more to secure our southern border.](http://trk.tedcruz.-ZXfVwqgi75Jw)**

| | There is a war being fought for the soul of America, a war being fought in the physical and spiritual realms. Jesus’s death and resurrection WON THE WAR. Now all we must do is faithfully fight our battle. It’s time to reject the hopeless picture of America the left continues to paint. They trivialize God’s providence in our past and refuse His blessings in our future. Throughout America’s history, we’ve seen God’s hand of favor. I refuse to watch America continue down the path of Godlessness and hopelessness. In talking with my friend Charlie Kirk, we brainstormed a way to bring about the change we wanted to see in America—REVIVAL in all 50 states. From that, the Kingdom to the Capitol Tour was born! Over the past four months, we’ve seen... I refuse to watch America continue down the path of Godlessness and hopelessness. name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Here’s what happened in Republican-led states after we repealed Michigan’s extreme 1931 abortion ban…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, other states rushed to pass extreme abortion bans, but in Michigan we took a different approach. On April 5, 2023 — Governor Gretchen Whitmer signed legislation repealing Michigan’s extreme 1931 abortion ban, which had no exceptions for rape, incest, or to protect the health of the mother. This was a long overdue step and proves that we’ll keep fighting to protect everyone’s ability to make their own decisions about their bodies. **Meanwhile... ** On April 13, 2023 — Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a bill that banned abortion at just six weeks, before many women even know they’re pregnant. On April 24, 2023 — North Dakota Governor Doug Burgum signed _“one of the strictest anti-abortion laws in the country.”_ On May 3, 2023 — Montana Governor Greg Gianforte signed legislation clarifying that access to abortion is not a part of the right to privacy, contradicting a 1999 state court ruling. On July 11, 2023 — Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds signed a bill into law criminalizing abortion after six weeks into pregnancy, making Iowa the latest Republican-led state to enact a near-total abortion ban. **And today, we are still fighting like hell until reproductive freedom is no longer under attack across the nation, and Governor Whitmer is using every tool in her toolbox to do it because women deserve to make their own decisions about their bodies.** **[Will you make a donation to Fight Like Hell PAC today to support our efforts to elect abortion access champions like Governor Whitmer across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67021528/418384547/2140481003?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230725_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzljYjVmMTUtMTUyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1nB0CWBV9YV7xZaVPelJKngo-plsRQePwz_Mka3AD2Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67021536/418384559/2140481003?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230725_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzljYjVmMTUtMTUyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1nB0CWBV9YV7xZaVPelJKngo-plsRQePwz_Mka3AD2Y=)**

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: Bad news — we’re being outraised, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
We need grassroots support to stay competitive — can you help?

I’ll cut straight to the chase, Peter – **We’re being outraised by the leading Republican in the governor’s race. So I have to ask:_[Will you rush a donation to help hit our campaign’s $42,000 end-of-month fundraising goal so we can build more momentum?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67021712/418384844/368366008?refcode=ea.d9cb5f15-152b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d9cb5f15-152b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljYjVmMTUtMTUyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=B_nTIoCH1-Uc80-F_ShBEiDLSq6NXDXQHYvbofQgoHc=)_** Ever since our opponent received Donald Trump’s endorsement, the MAGA money machine has poured resources into his campaign and propelled him to the front of the fundraising pack. And while it won’t be easy, I KNOW we can gain ground, too. Look, we don’t need to match him dollar-for-dollar to win. All we need is continued support from folks like you — true grassroots support — to keep the momentum going until Election Day. That’s why I’m reaching out today: Our campaign is built for — and built by — everyday, hardworking Louisianans. **And right now, we need that grassroots strength to hit our critical end-of-month online fundraising target.** **_[So please, chip in any amount that works for you to help hit our $42,000 end-of-month fundraising target before next week’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67021714/418384846/368366008?refcode=ea.d9cb5f15-152b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.d9cb5f15-152b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljYjVmMTUtMTUyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=B_nTIoCH1-Uc80-F_ShBEiDLSq6NXDXQHYvbofQgoHc=)_** clean_body: We need grassroots support to stay competitive — can you help? I’ll cut straight to the chase, Peter – We’re being outraised by the leading Republican in the governor’s race. So I have to ask:= Ever since our opponent received Donald Trump’s endorsement, the MAGA money machine has poured resources into his campaign and propelled him to the front of the fundraising pack. And while it won’t be easy, I KNOW we can gain ground, too. Look, we don’t need to match him dollar-for-dollar to win. All we need is continued support from folks like you — true grassroots support — to keep the momentum going until Election Day. That’s why I’m reaching out today: Our campaign is built for — and built by — everyday, hardworking Louisianans. And right now, we need that grassroots strength to hit our critical end-of-month online fundraising target. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I can’t thank you enough for your support, Peter. \- Shawn Wilson = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: RFK Jr. is the new Marjorie Taylor Greene
body:
In the name of “free speech” they’re creating a platform for right-wing bad actors to divide us and spread misinformation.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)
Hoo boy Peter, did you catch last week’s Republican-run House hearing featuring Robert F. Kennedy Jr.?
Republican leadership ***said*** the purpose of the hearing was “censorship.” But in the end, it was just another chance for RFK Jr. to advance his embarrassing presidential campaign and lie about his history of pushing racist, homophobic and just plain dangerous, anti-vaccine conspiracy theories.
In an Orwellian lie reminiscent of Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump, RFK Jr. told lawmakers he’s “never been anti-vaccine” and, the only reason why anyone would think that, is because of some shadowy conspiracy against him.
**Peter, w e live in a time where bad actors brazenly use positions of power to further divide our country and spread dangerous misinformation.** [**Courier Newsroom was founded to fight back, but we can only do that with your support. Can you donate $5 today and help fund fact-based journalism so we can stop the spread of right-wing disinformation in our communities?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230725?refcode=em20230725&amount=5&refcode2=1283_120351_v7C1Yv&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230725?refcode=em20230725&amount=5&refcode2=1283_120351_v7C1Yv&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)**
In a not-so-shocking twist that will surprise no one, Fox News hosts like Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino gleefully bragged about being the only cable network to air the hearing live.
Rather than fact-checking RFK Jr. like other cable networks, Fox gave him the same unfiltered access to their millions of viewers they usually reserve for Donald Trump or MTG.
**Peter, w e know what they’re doing. In the name of “free speech” they’re creating a platform for right-wing bad actors to divide us and spread misinformation.**
At Courier we fight back by doing the exact opposite. At eight local newsrooms, our journalists are dedicated to getting the facts about real stories that matter, in addition to **providing readers with the context** to fully understand what’s happening.
**That means making it clear when conspiracy theorists are peddling verifiably false claims.**
But our talented team can’t do any of that work without your financial support. None of our stories are locked behind paywalls or subscription fees, which means our journalists depend on contributions from people like you to help fund their work.
[**That’s why we’re reaching out today**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230725?refcode=em20230725&amount=5&refcode2=1283_120351_v7C1Yv&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)[**, Peter. If you want to see Fox News and right-wing bad actors held accountable, pitch in $5 or anything you can today to help Courier Newsroom keep up our important work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230725?refcode=em20230725&amount=5&refcode2=1283_120351_v7C1Yv&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230725?refcode=em20230725&amount=5&refcode2=1283_120351_v7C1Yv&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1283_120351_v7C1Yv&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1283%2E120351%2Ev7C1Yv)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

subject: I need you to help me put Jon out to pasture

body:
Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=bd92ad3b7a3c4c10b5b64edd8501735b&_t=LkkJLzBlRrktiqb7CSxLDtabOX-bTddU53zuZCqvLqGpL47senJKEZsDaptdJAm1OhvP3cz-38XuvSMADhclczoggZXF4m5Ne7L_5dMM9L0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=bd92ad3b7a3c4c10b5b64edd8501735b&_t=LkkJLzBlRrktiqb7CSxLDtabOX-bTddU53zuZCqvLqGpL47senJKEZsDaptdJAm1OhvP3cz-38XuvSMADhclczoggZXF4m5Ne7L_5dMM9L0%3D)

Peter,

During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs.**

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana.**_

Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - **Tim Sheehy.**

In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bd92ad3b7a3c4c10b5b64edd8501735b&_e=U6vBjcZg8ISibH9EXTByAQM3rHBg--Ze1ZfIY3MgkyzTIeL3lhMTp_n6FAxz9cG5rLn9xjztjK6qNbmLLPic4fgSeMSwWTSrgLHNk2xIypUth2YOULeZ2AV8NWtI3EWG_A-5AftYyjR6yXqNVYpgz27ixa90YqElQSNpegTl7X3jBoJ1hPOVmNgHKLcasjE53CjvCRj1njHQZHDcGxb-HKgOc9bUGbwJyloTkM8iA0aMTJ6wJUwqFzyALsDoOpqrchSPOafQui7AqCnAezn-nfbTkFRtkr__MK7pUO4kCbBqLMCXg1qY7oMILHOPua_PfpQf6qZiftYbeLeGdOEIAy4HpxBZqAFtRCbRAjmhVYPAhXJCH0sD4p7RIj_ua8XZH_LU01TtdQjyiEZxrI3I2qze1BhOFP2g6KwtYi75NO8%3D)
Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor.

Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. **[Can you make a donation now?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bd92ad3b7a3c4c10b5b64edd8501735b&_e=U6vBjcZg8ISibH9EXTByAQM3rHBg--Ze1ZfIY3MgkyzTIeL3lhMTp_n6FAxz9cG5rLn9xjztjK6qNbmLLPic4fgSeMSwWTSrgLHNk2xIypUth2YOULeZ2AV8NWtI3EWG_A-5AftYyjR6yXqNVYpgz27ixa90YqElQSNpegTl7X3jBoJ1hPOVmNgHKLcasjE53CjvCRj1njHQZHDcGxb-HKgOc9bUGbwJyloTkM8iA0aMTJ6wJUwqFzyALsDoOpqre0TVfmti5F6geGrcXA7qZcjZbmx2KaSLcGRSpchoXRshjynFZVULZSwg6Ap-yeCrwcpvHbeAa8evlXRgW_bp4pVXVsNgAGgNqoRKwNmqT9EGuC3ic-03CYgm42ClO929lTqsNwWqJDTJCgUzMQiTgPcvsTzfZpys4NTs6wC7kBI%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bd92ad3b7a3c4c10b5b64edd8501735b&_e=U6vBjcZg8ISibH9EXTByAQM3rHBg--Ze1ZfIY3MgkyzTIeL3lhMTp_n6FAxz9cG5rLn9xjztjK6qNbmLLPic4fgSeMSwWTSrgLHNk2xIypUth2YOULeZ2AV8NWtI3EWG_A-5AftYyjR6yXqNVYpgz27ixa90YqElQSNpegTl7X3jBoJ1hPOVmNgHKLcasjE53CjvCRj1njHQZHDcGxb-HKgOc9bUGbwJyloTkM8iA0aMTJ6wJUwqFzyALsDoOpqrDmTZM9V13g_OpzdvcwFHdUg2QXxxFj_xoulxbdxp8b7Hp6INRZAb2N9rcWIOQQmyLMj_pBkJ4qnu46L_l6cWm3DBVBD7jnE5-yKLOEjgo8-vFqrizPbHs1TLqkr21sIHTAhoRWAo2ALU2Ah4SCTLC9XSQgcFofyekuM15bHSffE%3D)

**I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6.**

I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. **[Will you help him get there?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bd92ad3b7a3c4c10b5b64edd8501735b&_e=U6vBjcZg8ISibH9EXTByAQM3rHBg--Ze1ZfIY3MgkyzTIeL3lhMTp_n6FAxz9cG5rLn9xjztjK6qNbmLLPic4fgSeMSwWTSrgLHNk2xIypUth2YOULeZ2AV8NWtI3EWG_A-5AftYyjR6yXqNVYpgz27ixa90YqElQSNpegTl7X3jBoJ1hPOVmNgHKLcasjE53CjvCRj1njHQZHDcGxb-HKgOc9bUGbwJyloTkM8iA0aMTJ6wJUwqFzyALsDoOpqrvavYN3EqfU6N1SpCUFMoxkJzsMfy4s9lqs5YN6UP6CjL0rz-vCyb1ipHz9-A_hjnpRaB8IRH5jxnldmepqnxIM05INTZ8yiVaF_683G0tBOVXIDDWjIZCLAucbZ78Na8QuVyqHe2ygwmcJXp2YwP19n8gBwIv58DREQ6RCQ25lI%3D)**

clean_body: Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight | | Peter, During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs. Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. We landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - Tim Sheehy. In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator. Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor. Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6. I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. The Montana Senate race is not just about Montana. This race will decide the fate of the U.S. Senate and the direction of our country for years to come. For God and country, Commander Ryan Zinke | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6um9a2top628houakachfvjjgko0ts6iboat12g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zps48594ovckjm3pf3muepcj912rbvrkbce7h00g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3qhuk4l5pvgpv26rc3ho8d0sddgc6gobb6u3j9o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmgf2ncrfaagal3a38pi5sc81e4uejo5h1g4j6lg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zaqcdoo1j53gj91kus2c7cut0u1uhn7bmgksptao_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0dhnl7sibqn17p85v9eqq2k0o4g1vrjge4js5e0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgm9659rqm2a4u2l8ku573o6ksatrhk5nk667sao_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs)

Deroy Murdock

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: I have been on the frontlines of the border fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_t=cWYNZMtWphUpuUF5A3IAIcPcQJfvUzKGzP8DIkDn68l4xXtsbXrfMVWqRIoM8XWQBl8bXCsWjh6bXOgSXq1PFxYtyaTmJWp2HD6dKSalieg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_t=cWYNZMtWphUpuUF5A3IAIcPcQJfvUzKGzP8DIkDn68l4xXtsbXrfMVWqRIoM8XWQBl8bXCsWjh6bXOgSXq1PFxYtyaTmJWp2HD6dKSalieg%3D)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdATSODcduxV6_Hi5Byoyh_BsArvhF1V8alG-KK4ghBhr3hIJJn8uAEHoes_2qhZ7wDyxQL5rOLGKWHqX61Uf30kdAs0KmCT4Oq_ltbdRT0ud48s4wCTLbjKmBPaOuo3CnOqzXujfYqWozwDhWAAIDAw%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why on April 11th I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign’s first official supporters.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdfn1iY5nOZz-6Lm2Squtkpni9g8rfuYP2wqZqB5Bt2dnoIOwsyKjbsED44KlHOHHz5qqTeKKg7-EJJRZwY0EPwYqGJ4UdP0ycxA9qXFZtzI7ljrpO8XcFQqXnMH6sv6gipomcMSDysv6gEpFDa60rVA%3D%3D)**

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdQX_T6I4UTDU1AtgmO_qh3BnBukUjL_ORq05YAw1b_ZcBnC3oYrhOORe53Ls8MoufGKLrccdNCDyqTGaRl4OeKme97a7ycvk3NcYNxYgnl37QknT93Q4ynPnDkwX24afyH9q5xjv41Aa4yZdbulgjmg%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdtA9svLWab7n50XJ5F9oVbUd_w24f9HU37odQ680VSP79ARAeOQnTde_e-b4lw2vN1beAN2RU0Pftq-Awcfdcz7_u4UsNzCbqmr08VE_LFZscRHQRF8j5sl97UiEmeiNVgNshjbejO_B1_a9ouf8xMg%3D%3D)

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why on April 11th I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjd3OadCsQshY_kq4uhYmzc8sWzxhm9SeRIBjnyk-qm84CClqRTR9QyyfWvZ_RNuuemP_-4YTinUzONe7cKjdcaclx-C4iGWOpX8NLXeDtJvfQ-FQTObyZNOEny0A-Lft2fWy27Yx1e3Ej5FNmHI2VR2A%3D%3D)**

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdCPKnxNh0RWVAmBJ9mKR8BheUk0ueg0LW-bGb6ciwiK7QSqASzDj2IzTB1m0lylfLxIkWDzn1244pqTdRn2N5gizQKC0d50eWJtypXZ_79l8X5ldKfk3RxrS9BjLAcnhz-eu2ZWq9MUdSH4_ChNjWLw%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdeKnwePBW0vmLgVMCiXKZu-xAyi4AwrJ-zDDoglWK1nmkGqfOnHAvkI2z7nFW2PiAMDnN9jx403b9jkegJmSbIYlrWix2tIVovE30QaU4-heh7vxo1DhgS1QwWtLvgSQg8_VZTBQC7CbhDdbVb8-8QA%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdz0coJhr9etiZvcSW2mXxpIQG768sWP24IqA_JwhBbIwGFuumu5dJfQEdQQY2FOWIAo0y_vCJtz-tiClV1gg3ZMbXDAKV622UfzVB3CqbMVkXjYIP7O8QBqKiSrsr5lkPPQyQM7eSmLz5G4zHYVspFQ%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b665fdd50ed242bf8b85c4ec88934e98&_e=a6olHKp1qpzh9tCxzyD6N8FkP3fd3J_2vHW6s0smS1JGWJj62RYbp7Hys1nc0_i9lxnOgyjGM5eARs2E0mZkGmy0F6XvZxQWP9jWrQzRb0fUOUuFkWhe2yhN_xg5XZMZdtewH4uNvoc4TUUZEh848rXhwaLZA2Z9SExtbrUJ_44D4eAk4UdUm87W3ddISuEzqDmAPP56guror6gPi9xcS9iKd_-NYl1PBtJZASAzyxL4vua-elrgTVZlPz9smbjdbpenD4PWQTPS23Y4ydM_vfA_W0GMpQWrpUxJ26-sDDw-IlQu36FQKDtDAFMbecbEJpCZi76-mm27OM6PnsaRob3Erd1Nfg4vz9-iKN7H12Vf2Ze-sT-FQWBTMFnXZjrLqAm_TcvI3sFImvxrFzBpng%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

clean_body: I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. | | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why on April 11th I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate and Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that’s why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. To find out more about my candidacy, In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That’s where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Thanks for your time,

Team Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

subject: Member of 'Tennessee Three' set to challenge Marsha Blackburn for her Senate seat
body:

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING SENATE NEWS:
Member of 'Tennessee Three' set to challenge Marsha Blackburn for her Senate seat**
This is the most pressing update in your inbox.

A radical Democrat is gearing up to flip Tennessee blue and defeat Senator Marsha Blackburn.

_**[If Republicans lose this Senate seat, we'll NEVER be able to recover or take back the Majority. So we're pleading with you to pitch in straight away and hold the line in Tennessee.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5nessu88g4atjpcou6inhhqidp112d0oio2m31g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cph64ob4c3h2bs "If Republicans lose this Senate seat, we’ll NEVER be able to recover or take back the Majority. So we’re pleading with you to pitch in straight away and hold the line in Tennessee.")**_

Liberal megadonors, pro-abortion activists, and woke warriors are already lining up to fund Marsha Blackburn's opponent with MILLIONS of dollars.

This opponent is as radical as they come and a key part of the "Tennessee Three." Barack Obama, AOC, Joe Biden, and Kamala Harris have pledged their support to her.

She's one of the radical Democrats who took bullhorns onto the Tennessee House Floor, disrupted regular order, called in all the Democrat bigwigs for reinforcements, and lined their pockets from scores of angry Liberal donors.

**Now she 's using her connections and liberal influence to destroy our Tennessee values and bring her woke ideology to the U.S. Senate.**

A tidal wave of liberal cash is already pouring into her campaign since her announcement was rumored. So, we're pleading with EVERYONE reading this to pitch in anything they can to help protect Senator Marsha Blackburn and hold this seat for Republicans.

One of the 'Tennessee Three' just set her eyes on the all-important Tennessee Senate seat. She has all the name ID and mega-donor backing needed to flip this seat. We have a chance to stop her, but we must respond right now.

_**[We need everyone- and we mean EVERYONE - to do their part before the end of the day today. Donate now. Save Tennessee. Team Marsha

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I ran for office in the first place to make a difference.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=691%2E35263%2EscmzYA)
Peter, When I ran for the Senate, I knew what it would mean to become the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history. I understood that this would be an extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives — and that’s what I’ve been hard at work doing every day since. **But, despite all of the hard fought progress my Democratic colleagues and I have made, attacks on LGBTQ+ rights are rampant across the country.** Extreme Republicans are working overtime to institute a wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. The 2023 legislative session has seen _hundreds of bills_ designed to roll back LGBTQ+ rights, particularly targeting transgender youth. Even amidst unrelenting attacks, **I refuse to be discouraged.** I ran for office in the first place to make a difference, and I won’t let anti-LGTBQ+ Republicans turn back the clock — but I can’t do this without you. **[Will you help me keep up the fight in the Senate by pitching in any amount you can spare to defend our Democratic majority? We can’t let extreme Republicans take back the Senate and continue their crusade to roll back our rights and freedoms.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230725_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=691%2E35263%2EscmzYA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jul23.67wLy_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230725_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=691%2E35263%2EscmzYA)

body:
ICYMI: Chris Christie Brings A “Whole Lotta Jersey” To Town Halls | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/47cc1d5793a7/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559820?e=d0a9afa930)

---
**ICYMI: Chris Christie Brings A “Whole Lotta Jersey” To Town Halls**
Over the last few days Governor Chris Christie has taken his campaign to South Carolina and New Hampshire where he has hosted town hall meetings.
Conservative commentator Byron York [attended](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=e9ff5d6da3&e=d0a9afa930) Governor Christie’s town hall in South Carolina and lauded him: _**“[Christie’s] answers were direct, detailed, knowledgeable, and well-argued. He's one of the most substantial candidates in the race.”**_
Last night, Governor Christie was in Concord, NH where he engaged with primary voters. True to form, and as York observed, the governor once again brought “a whole lotta Jersey.” He confronted the tough questions head on and was telling it like it is.
Watch a few of the highlights:

**“That’s Why I’m In This Race”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=457fde79fd&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Joe Biden Is Past His Sell By Date”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d09fd0ae95&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Why In The Hell Would You Hire Him? He’s Already Proven He Can’t Do It”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=7d1775dde1&e=d0a9afa930)
**“If We Nominate Him, He’ll Be Out On Bail In A Criminal Courtroom”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=ff3608301d&e=d0a9afa930)
Last night, Governor Christie did exactly what he has been doing every single day since he’s been in the race – he spoke his mind and was unafraid.
In one month from now, he will make his case on the GOP debate stage and hold Donald Trump accountable for his failures.
Consider making a donation to ensure that Governor Christie is guaranteed his place on stage for all of the future debates. Donate here: [https://bit.ly/42rUEku](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=836998b74a&e=d0a9afa930)

| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=f8381562f9&e=d0a9afa930)

name: Tina Smith
subject: You can protect the Senate majority with a $3 donation. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We cannot afford to fall short this month. |
#
| | **We’re less than a week away from our first end-of-month deadline of the new quarter. I’ve got to ask: Will you chip in $3 to help us support vulnerable Democratic incumbents?** | [DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67022760/418388637/-1701231322?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=3&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230725_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZiN2Q1MC0xNzJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNbeXwZIoNZuge-vSPL0HtaHuRo_Qr5CCmjwywlGeF0=)
---
Folks —
With a few days left until our July fundraising deadline, here are 3 reasons why I’m counting on your $3 donation today:
1. Democrats are defending 23 seats this election cycle — including in states like Montana where Donald Trump won by almost **17 points.**

2. _CNN_ is predicting that “opportunity is ripe for Republicans to win back the Senate next year.”

3. National Republicans are _already_ spending money to attack vulnerable Democrats in Ohio and Wisconsin.

**There’s no question that our Senate majority — and the progress that comes with it — is going to come down to who can turn out more voters through grassroots organizing.**
That’s why we cannot afford to fall behind on our first monthly fundraising goal of the new quarter.
Your donations fuel the people-powered organizing infrastructure that we need to stand up against MAGA Republicans. **We need to catch up ASAP to help my Democratic colleagues stand up to the flood of GOP spending.**

clean_body: We cannot afford to fall short this month. | | | We’re less than a week away from our first end-of-month deadline of the new quarter. I’ve got to ask: Will you chip in $3 to help us support vulnerable Democratic incumbents? | = Folks — With a few days left until our July fundraising deadline, here are 3 reasons why I’m counting on your $3 donation today: 1. Democrats are defending 23 seats this election cycle — including in states like Montana where Donald Trump won by almost 17 points. 2. CNN is predicting that “opportunity is ripe for Republicans to win back the Senate next year.” 3. National Republicans are already spending money to attack vulnerable Democrats in Ohio and Wisconsin. There’s no question that our Senate majority — and the progress that comes with it — is going to come down to who can turn out more voters through grassroots organizing. That’s why we cannot afford to fall behind on our first monthly fundraising goal of the new quarter. Your donations fuel the people-powered organizing infrastructure that we need to stand up against MAGA Republicans. We need to catch up ASAP to help my Democratic colleagues stand up to the flood of GOP spending. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I’m so grateful for your support. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Hey team,
I learned as an army captain that when your motto is "leave no one behind", then you have to check in regularly.
It's been a moment since we did that as a team.
[**So I've got a simple question: What's on your mind? I'm really proud of what we've accomplished in the first 6 months since Aruna and I took office. We:
* Passed (with bipartisan support) all 10 of the bills I introduced to the legislature, including a first-in-the-nation program for a paid year of service for high school graduates
* Made Maryland a leader in what it looks like to be an abortion care safe haven
* Signed the Trans Health Equality Law
* Passed critical gun safety legislation... and then got sued by the NRA (something our administration will take as a badge of honor)

But we've also had hard times. Last month's mass shootings in Annapolis, Baltimore, and Salisbury are a painful reminder there's a lot more work to do to address gun violence and safety in communities all across our state. Supreme Court rulings have upended decades of work to reduce discrimination in our country. Now more than ever it’s crucial that we speak up.
[**I could go on, but as the saying goes: God gave us 2 ears and 1 mouth for a reason. So that's why I want to know what you're thinking about right now, team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67022835/418388870/-1399264069?ms=EM_FL_WES_20230725_su_survey2_team_mf_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDY0MGI3Yi0xNzJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NfWe6emSxLoa36x3qqKqfKrXtWUJroS7wqzv7XbxQu8=&emci=2ec958c4-0b2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=04640b7b-172b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

We're going to send all your notes to him tomorrow, so it's your last chance to make sure he sees what's on your mind. Really, whatever is on your mind right now – how to fill the time during summer break, the impact of climate change, the O's performance – Wes wants to hear it all. Thanks for sharing, Wes Moore HQ \------------ Forwarded Message ------------ From: Wes Moore Subject: Hey Hey team, I learned as an army captain that when your motto is "leave no one behind", then you have to check in regularly. It's been a moment since we did that as a team. I'm really proud of what we've accomplished in the first 6 months since Aruna and I took office. We: Passed (with bipartisan support) all 10 of the bills I introduced to the legislature, including a first-in-the-nation program for a paid year of service for high school graduates Made Maryland a leader in what it looks like to be an abortion care safe haven Signed the Trans Health Equality Law Passed critical gun safety legislation... and then got sued by the NRA (something our administration will take as a badge of honor) But we've also had hard times. Last month's mass shootings in Annapolis, Baltimore, and Salisbury are a painful reminder there's a lot more work to do to address gun violence and safety in communities all across our state. Supreme Court rulings have upended decades of work to reduce discrimination in our country. Now more than ever it’s crucial that we speak up. Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner, and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: We can tackle climate change (here's how I know)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
We know what we need to do—and we're pushing for it
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)
---
| | Friend, Extreme heat. Flooding. Wildfires. Climate change-fueled disasters are happening more often, hitting communities across America this summer. **But I'm writing to tell you that we**** _can_****build a safer climate future—we know what we need to do, and we're already hard at work.**
---
[HELP BUILD A SAFER FUTURE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4691?t=4&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)
---
Nearly every week, the climate policy experts at Evergreen meet directly with policy makers to push for **strong, actionable policies that create millions of jobs while cutting climate pollution.** Take, for example, our work on EPA's proposed new rule for carbon pollution from power plants.

First, we met with officials and told them how they could craft a rule that requires a 90 percent cut in climate pollution—and that's what they did.

The same day the proposed rule was announced, we hosted briefings for Congress and the press, to make sure they know how the rule can go further and faster to tackle the climate crisis and protect our communities.

**Since then, we've continued to meet directly with members of Congress, the EPA, reporters, and leaders in the climate movement.** We're throwing everything we can into fighting the fossil fuel industry's lobbyists and making sure the strongest possible rule is passed, because we know that our families and communities can't wait.
And this is just one example. Our meetings with policy makers have meant—and will continue to mean—**a safer climate, better jobs, and lower energy costs for all of us.** We can't do this work alone. **[Your donation today—no matter how small—will support all of this and so much more.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4691?t=5&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)**
---
[DONATE NOW AT ANY LEVEL](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4691?t=7&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)
---
It's going to take all of us to win the bold policies we know we need to tackle the climate crisis and deliver a thriving clean energy future. Thank you for being with us. Lena MoffittExecutive Director, Evergreen Collaborative
---
| | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=8&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/338?t=9&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/336?t=10&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4575?t=11&akid=13558%2E53494%2ELkD8xn)

This means after more than a decade of having our State’s judiciary controlled by the far right, we’ll finally have a balanced, fair Supreme Court. This is huge news for everyday Wisconsinites who are living with less rights and freedoms than their parents and grandparents.
