name: Ben Wikler
subject: We’ll think back to this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
This map shows Wisconsin could very well be the tipping point state.
#
[**I’m about to ask you to split a $5 donation between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and The Long Run today. Monthly donors give our organization the consistent resources we need to get ahead of fire drills and far-right extremism.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=1&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
**But let me explain the stakes with a hypothetical:** In 2024, the Republican presidential candidate has an early lead in Wisconsin but thousands of absentee ballots have yet to be counted. The rest of the nation watches, waiting for Wisconsin to determine the outcome of another presidential race.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=2&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
Then, for whatever reason, the nation is waiting on the electoral votes in Wisconsin to call the entire presidential election. There could be a scenario where GOP officials and far-right pundits alike push to call the election for the Republican candidate as extreme as Ron DeSantis or Donald Trump.
**Our entire team would be on high alert.**
Our organizing and analytics teams would be hard at work crunching the numbers and determining whose votes could be jeopardized.
Our political and voter protection teams would build the case to reject hasty rulings and make sure every single vote is counted before hastily calling an election.
Our communications team would spread the message far and wide, brief me on how to best message this moment, and help Democrats best advocate to count all votes.
Our digital team would amplify all of this important work and send messages directly to the Wisconsin voters affected.
**If we fail, folks nationwide would watch in despair.** _You and I would think back to 2023 where we had a chance to prepare for every obstacle the far-right would throw our way._
_We can’t risk a scenario like this playing out._ The bottom line is election-winning operations are not built in one single moment before an election. They’re enduring movements that need continued resources and investment. **To be honest, we’re short of our monthly donor goals and we’ll only hit them with the help of dedicated Democrats like you reading this scenario.**
[**You have an opportunity to make sure the worst case scenario doesn’t happen on election night in Wisconsin. Can you split a $5 donation between WisDems and The Long Run? Your support helps us keep the White House blue and elect Democrats up and down the ballot >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=3&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically evenly split between The Democratic Party of Wisconsin and The Long Run PAC_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.swMvtB&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=22&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.DT_zdK&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=23&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.zkrtZA&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=24&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.B1zxC_&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=25&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.jgEQ-M&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=26&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230725-1-nor-t23&t=27&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst)
Thank you.
Ben Wikler
Chair, WisDems

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4678%2E196590%2E_qVPst). name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: re: Indy City-County Council
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Friend, I've had the honor of serving on the Indy City-County Council since 2020.
And if you asked me about my favorite part of the job, I'd say how amazing it is to see our local government delivering on our issues and bringing positive change to the community.
Before I tell you more about the Council and what it's taught me as I run for US Senate, I'm grateful to have people like you standing in my corner. But I need your help to get my message to as many Hoosiers as possible – will you chip in toward our resident outreach budget for the rest of the summer? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
SUPPORT OUR TEAM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Friend, here's my biggest take-away from working on the Council: no matter the issue, our number one priority should be the people in our community.
But as I look around and see a multitude of freedoms at risk, it's clear that the Republicans in Washington and I don't see eye-to-eye.
Because while I'm committed to investing in our communities, my GOP opponent Jim Banks is committed to cutting off Social Security.
Because while I'm concerned about the future of our nation's safety, Jim Banks called the investigation into the January 6 attack on the Capitol "a political witch hunt".
Friend, it's clear I've got my priorities in the right order, and I can't wait to share my vision with our friends and neighbors. But I need your help to get my message out – will you donate $15, $35, or $50 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260
SUPPORT KEITH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230725_em_fr_b1_KP_react]

I’m working hard in Washington to make bipartisan progress where I can, and I’m proud of the legislation I’m sponsoring with Republican colleagues to improve access to mental health care, tackle our opioid epidemic, and help communities better prepare for natural disasters.
But that doesn’t mean I’m not going to fight back however I can when extremists come after our democracy and our fundamental freedoms. **And building a powerful grassroots movement to defend this seat and retake control of the House is one of the most important ways we can fight for our values.**
[_**Any amount you can give will go a long way toward taking control of Congress away from far-right extremists — and it will power our movement to help out the regular families whose needs so often go overlooked.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67023944/418392441/600297262?refcode=email_072523_Democracy&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjI3ZWMzNS0xZDJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0reX2eRX3aCOOMoJ4bA6qaob2ppLjADxnid7G1uVwyc=)

Brittany Pettersen

She has collected signatures and sent hand written postcards to protect abortion access. ✅ Tamie has deep roots in this district and in her community, from being active with organizations like the NAACP, Kiwanis Club, Delaware Citizens Police Academy, League of Women Voters, Eagles, and the Unity Community Center. She is the only Democratic candidate to call Ohio’s Fourth District home, and has significant name recognition from growing up here, her business, and as the Democratic Party’s nominee in 2022. Most importantly, Tamie’s presents a fresh, positive, unifying message that appeals to all people, a contrast to her opponents’ messages. With your help, we’ll defeat Jim Jordan. But we have no time to waste: we need to continue to build this campaign from the ground up and continue the hard work Tamie has been doing to flip this district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = = | = = | | Donate= Thank you for supporting Tamie and working to kick Jim Jordan out of Congress! -Team Tamie Wilson for Congress | = To contribute via check, please address to: 273 SARATOGA ST. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: what happens when far-right extremists hijack legislation:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Last week, we saw the passage of the annual defense bill, generally a bipartisan bill to set the policy agenda and authorize funding for the Department of Defense.

But like many things of late, this normal, annual bill passage was anything but. Far-right extremists instead hijacked the legislation to make further attacks on women’s access to healthcare and personal privacy.

With nearly half of our servicewomen stationed in states that have greatly reduced their right to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions, this extreme provision would prevent them from being able to access critical abortion care, even in cases of rape or risk to the life of the mother.

I ran for Congress against an anti-choice extremist with the promise that I would fight to defend the right to choose. As your Congressman, I have fought to ensure that every individual can make their own decisions about their health, and I won’t stop now.

[I will not stop fighting until we guarantee a woman’s right to choose and restore their right to privacy. If you’re with me will you chip in $10 or more to keep me fighting in Congress? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67024346/418393841/-1721077281?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230725_FR_DefenseBill_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_Abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWI4YTQ5MC0xZDJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zp_oWKwuPeHPMMg_sDy-En1TfplkxyefoePtMlrNdPw=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | Last week, we saw the passage of the annual defense bill, generally a bipartisan bill to set the policy agenda and authorize funding for the Department of Defense. But like many things of late, this normal, annual bill passage was anything but. Far-right extremists instead hijacked the legislation to make further attacks on women’s access to healthcare and personal privacy. With nearly half of our servicewomen stationed in states that have greatly reduced their right to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions, this extreme provision would prevent them from being able to access critical abortion care, even in cases of rape or risk to the life of the mother. I ran for Congress against an anti-choice extremist with the promise that I would fight to defend the right to choose. As your Congressman, I have fought to ensure that every individual can make their own decisions about their health, and I won’t stop now. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. In just a few days, Sarah’s campaign made headlines across The First State – and the country. Reporters highlighted **her deep experience passing legislation** in the General Assembly, **working for Gov. Markell and Attorney General Beau Biden** , and her leadership **passing a groundbreaking paid family and medical leave bill**.
**Here are a few more highlights:**
* More than two dozen elected officials in Delaware endorsed her campaign in the first 24 hours. Since then, **Sarah has been endorsed by Delaware’s largest private sector union** , UFCW Local 27.
* Last week, we announced our **first three organizing events** in North Wilmington, Milton, and Dover.
* Last, but not least, thanks to supporters like you, we **raised a record-breaking $414,000** in the first 5 days of the campaign. Yes, you read that right!
* **More than 700 Delawareans** have already invested in this campaign – Delawareans from every corner of the state and the overwhelming majority of our towns and cities.

[**This campaign is powered by supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25. Can we count on you to make your first contribution of the campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67024524/418394409/279091928?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230725_fr_highlight_team_nc_nd_c_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTE0MmYwNC0xZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfAMG3yu2KfVpvdcTfR7oJKyWWSSUPvDwn1MI_Xh2OE=)

name: Ralph Northam
subject: The Democratic Party of Virginia needs our help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
It is with great urgency that I’m reaching out to you today. I know you remember the joy Virginia Democrats shared in 2019 when we won back the General Assembly for the first time in over twenty years.

|
---
Derek, It is with great urgency that I’m reaching out to you today. I know you remember the joy Virginia Democrats shared in 2019 when we won back the General Assembly for the first time in over twenty years. I also know you shared in my despair when the Virginia GOP managed to win back control of the House of Delegates and the Executive Mansion two years ago. Once again, all 140 seats in the General Assembly are on the ballot. And, once again, we must come together as Virginia Democrats to take back the House of Delegates and strengthen our majority in the State Senate. We’ve proven time and again that, when we elect Democrats, good things happen. Look at all we did during my time as Governor: we passed Medicaid Expansion, made historic investments in rural broadband and improving Interstate 81, expanded voting rights, protected the rights of our LGBTQ+ citizens, abolished the death penalty, legalized marijuana, and raised the minimum wage – all while making Virginia the best place to do business for two years straight. But our work isn’t done. All of our progress is on the line this November. That’s why I need you to stand with me in supporting the Democratic Party of Virginia’s efforts to protect everything we accomplished together. [Will you please consider splitting a donation of $25 or whatever you can do between the Democratic Party of Virginia and The Way Ahead today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67025144/418396685/-1814715859?refcode=dpva-em-072523&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2E3MjQ2OS0xZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwnVI-tH0t-dYdQbvWf5W1J5dorK1Ix7obfDosgwOb0=) We’re pooling all of our resources together to take back the General Assembly, and right now I can think of no effort more deserving of our support. Together, we will win back our Commonwealth. Sincerely, Dr. Ralph S. body:
We NEED your help, Friend!!

|

| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ad1191338db4ddfa2ceb4259b2fab1d&_e=t3tr3SglgIOpfw0KzJIj4memIDJi9UlMoxHVhjb46dtMiCy2-A_T71tpjhnIGkYhkZcGr19OXaycTAFbN7HyrwQk-ub1vQ7I3Ms9T4CuG0gnVmSxhlL8YL-8S2ga430qhGus4MSHMfOCxfPE1rMLwIYJiNA4nUQEPVAEenS0SgZ1A2LTFPd-9dStqt0hA4LhbXIyshTl_p9Rc1p18U1RTLUS0CoYbhOWcKtZxIlhyzcaxY6kkTWYtGuRAA7QPIHzVOuJ4-WHJAOY3B1YYY8EiGyJL1Oci1tdtW2Uhabqnz7-X8p53e1OVD_GXavflVh_jCL866_6fbh5nOGx0jkolvn-l1t6fOxAF-aCpstTSr5idIWgaMccwjp7WzWFx5BfBEuY6Lxn4rZKTwlGY3pON9xK-hjjcsiQazH30cU8t6N2cj-_ZHUeBs-A78Y0fXc6)

Friend,

Alejandro Mayorkas has been in charge of the border since February 2, 2021, and the damage is **BAD.**

Mayorkas has:
* Ended Title 42, which allowed **millions of people to surge across the border**
* Abolished catch and release, which allowed **millions of illegal immigrants to flee and avoid their court hearings**
* Allowed over 20,000 pounds of fentanyl to cross the border this year ALONE - **enough to kill over 4.6 billion people.**

The bottom line is **_Alejandro Mayorkas is failing America._**

body:
Senator Tommy Tuberville’s latest stunt is putting service members, their families, and our national security in jeopardy. Please let me explain:
#
Peter — Senator Tommy Tuberville’s latest stunt isn’t just wrong. It’s stupid.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35267?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76)
This email is longer than usual, but I wanted to take a moment today to tell you what’s exactly going on and how it impacts service members, military families, and our national security. **Will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35267?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76)**
**For the first time in over a century, the United States Marine Corps is without a Commandant — the highest-ranking officer in the Corps.** We're in this situation because Senator Tommy Tuberville has blocked hundreds of military promotions, including the Commandant's.
He claims he’s doing this because government funds have been made available to cover travel for some service members getting abortions. But because I spent 13 years as an active duty Marine and I'm still Lieutenant Colonel in the Reserves, I've been in a lot of conversations about what this means and thought I'd take some time today to lay it out for you.
_As a note, these are my personal observations and may or may not be the same as the Department of Defense._
So first, for a lot of us Marines, this just sucks. Going to the Commandant's house and meeting the Commandant during our initial six-month officer training called The Basic School is one of the highlights of that school.
The same can be said for Marines across the world and at every stage of their training or careers. The Commandant is a big deal for us — someone we look up to, aspire to, and who gives us guidance. So not having a Commandant because some politician in D.C. wants to play games is a morale killer.
But the problem is much bigger than us not having a Commandant. Hundreds of other promotions are backed up with it. **And that doesn't just suck — that has a real impact on our troops and on national security.**
Military life is hard. You move all the time, there's no certainty, there are lots of deployments, you work very long hours, but you do it because you believe in the mission and you believe in the country and taking care of the people who live here.
**And now, because promotions aren't going through, people who've given decades of their lives to this country are being asked or forced to change their plans or not retire.** The one thing they thought they had control over.
People are being frozen in place. They’re not getting the promotion they worked so hard for. Their kids don't know what school they're going to go to next year when the summer ends. Their spouses can't figure out their employment. The list goes on and on, and the impact of that is felt throughout the Corps.
This is wrong. Service members are being used for political leverage, the same way that these politicians recently used us veterans for political leverage by holding up the PACT Act — which takes care of us for burn pit exposure we received in Iraq and Afghanistan. **It's absolutely demoralizing to see them use us like this over and over and over again.**
Senator Tuberville is quite literally punishing military families for things that other people have done that he doesn't like. It's shameful, it's selfish, and I'll be frank, it's stupid because it also damages our national security.
He goes out there and has the nerve to say that promotions and positions don't matter, an acting commander can do just as good a job, and be just as capable with or without the actual nomination going through.
Trust me though, rank and position do matter or they wouldn't exist.
**I learned that myself when I was representing the US in arms control negotiations with NATO allies and Russia from 2016 to 2019.** When you've got American officers with lower ranks going up against generals and admirals in critical meetings and negotiations, that matters.
Our allies, our partners, other countries, and our adversaries notice. Russia and China, they notice.
And now dozens, if not hundreds, of military officers are going to have to explain why the US is sending significantly lower ranks than their counterparts to critical meetings and negotiations around the globe.
When China sends a high-ranking general to meet with a third country and we send a one-star acting commander, that undermines our country, our position, and our national security. It's going to look like we don't care, it's going to look like we aren't serious, and people are going to question our country's resolve.
**Weakening the position of our representatives overseas weakens our national security. Period. And that's exactly what Senator Tuberville is doing.**
We need more folks right now in the media, in Congress, and especially in the Republican Party, to step up and say something — and Senator Tuberville needs to stop putting his personal politics ahead of our troops and ahead of our national security.
These service members, veterans, and their families deserve to have someone looking out for them in the U.S. Senate — and that’s just part of why I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat. But I need your help to do it:
**[So Peter, will you add a donation of whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or defense contractors — so you know I’ll always be a voice for real, everyday people in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35267?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35268?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35268?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35268?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35268?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35268?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35268?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35267?refcode=em20230725-3449&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76)
---
Thanks for hearing me out,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230725-3449-footer&t=11&refcode2=3449_614464__Nyi76&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76)**
---

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3449%2E614464%2E_Nyi76). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

From delivering $16 million to Decatur, Illinois through the U.S. Department of Transportation’s Railroad Crossing Elimination Grant Program to introducing the bipartisan _Increasing Land Access, Security and Opportunities Act_ to support young and beginning farmers — Nikki is working hard in Washington for you and your neighbors.
While she's focused on delivering tangible results for our communities, our reelection campaign team is building a people-powered movement to protect this seat and keep her fighting in Congress.
**[That's why we're hoping with less than one week before our end-of-month deadline expires, we can count on you to chip in $1 (or more!) to Nikki’s reelection campaign:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67025623/418398558/2096641691?amount=1&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_NO_20230725_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2NlMWVhNy0yMTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-CK4zrf2CDpTTmp4N8GOmzCrZguJOW8BMqvT5D8j7o=)**

clean_body: | | Peter, I’m about to reveal what’s going on behind the scenes, so listen up: = Extreme MAGA Republicans used their massive campaign war chest to attack = swing-seat Democrats. = The latest polls show Team Extreme has taken the lead by a staggering = points. I know Republicans and their special interest donors think they can attack Democrats with vicious lies and turn voters against us. = = | = = = I’m done watching extreme MAGA Republicans spread their dishonest smears without consequence, Peter. But what we do – or fail to do – right now could decide the course of this entire election. We can either sit back and allow Republicans to build a massive war chest and lie their way into power again... = = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67026341/418400451/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkxYjhiZC0yMzJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_UZTEETU0KO-pvqxuvhRuJsIOe_m4SCYXCVyM8BfVhY=&emci=0d5e67d2-1a2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d991b8bd-232b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Just days ago, Brad Raffensperger announced he was moving to purge 200,000 voters from the voter rolls. Now, news is out that yet more voting locations are being shut down ahead of 2024.

Over the past few years, the Georgia GOP has kicked _hundreds of thousands_ of Georgians off the voter rolls and overseen the closure of 214 of Georgia’s polling locations. The GOP is following their voter suppression playbook – kick voters off the rolls and shut down polling places to make it harder for low-income and middle class Georgians to get to the few remaining precincts.

**We know their playbook. We’ve been fighting their tricks for decades now, and we know that the only way to fight back is to build the strongest voter protection team in the entire country.**

[**_Peter, we’re up against rampant GOP voter suppression in Georgia, and we need your support. We’ve had the top voter protection team in the country, and we need your help to fund our team again in the 2024 cycle. clean_body: | | | Just days ago, Brad Raffensperger announced he was moving to purge 200,000 voters from the voter rolls. Now, news is out that yet more voting locations are being shut down ahead of 2024. Over the past few years, the Georgia GOP has kicked hundreds of thousands of Georgians off the voter rolls and overseen the closure of 214 of Georgia’s polling locations. The GOP is following their voter suppression playbook – kick voters off the rolls and shut down polling places to make it harder for low-income and middle class Georgians to get to the few remaining precincts. We know their playbook. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67026429/418400567/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDIxZjc5MWYtMjQyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vY8I37Fd5Us1w3vsAD-flU8X_UJZwg0NncW1fXJv1YY=)
Friend,

Now that our opponent David Schweikert’s campaign finances are public, we thought it was important to share a few of the more interesting takeaways.

Here’s what we know:
| **⇒ Republican Speaker Kevin McCarthy is doubling down on his support for Schweikert.** McCarthy gave our opponent a direct donation and thousands more from his PAC.

**⇒ Schweikert has spent well over 25% of his cash on legal fees.** He’s currently facing lawsuits after he was sued for homophobic attacks in his last election. Not to mention being found guilty of campaign finance and ethics violations.

**⇒ Since January, less than half of his contributions have come from individuals.** The majority of his support is from PACs and special interests.
---

Schweikert’s fundraising really tells a story about the chaotic campaign he’s running. It’s shrouded in controversy, funded by special interests, and dependent on support from the national Republican Party.

**In contrast, we’re proud to have raised $300,000 in just six weeks on the trail, and we did without any corporate PAC money. Nearly 90% of our donations came from right here in Arizona, sending a clear message that this is an Arizona-first campaign.**

**[The bad news is that Schweikert still has more cash on hand than we do, so we have some catching up to do. Friend, will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help Marlene fight for Arizona families in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67026430/418400568/-898110066?refcode=em-7.25.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDIxZjc5MWYtMjQyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vY8I37Fd5Us1w3vsAD-flU8X_UJZwg0NncW1fXJv1YY=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, Now that our opponent David Schweikert’s campaign finances are public, we thought it was important to share a few of the more interesting takeaways. Here’s what we know: | ⇒ Republican Speaker Kevin McCarthy is doubling down on his support for Schweikert. McCarthy gave our opponent a direct donation and thousands more from his PAC. ⇒ Schweikert has spent well over 25% of his cash on legal fees. He’s currently facing lawsuits after he was sued for homophobic attacks in his last election. Not to mention being found guilty of campaign finance and ethics violations. ⇒ Since January, less than half of his contributions have come from individuals. The majority of his support is from PACs and special interests. Schweikert’s fundraising really tells a story about the chaotic campaign he’s running. It’s shrouded in controversy, funded by special interests, and dependent on support from the national Republican Party. In contrast, we’re proud to have raised $300,000 in just six weeks on the trail, and we did without any corporate PAC money. Nearly 90% of our donations came from right here in Arizona, sending a clear message that this is an Arizona-first campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your support. Team Marlene =** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: This is a direct attack on our democratic values.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friend,
Ohio stands at a critical juncture, and the very essence of our democracy is on the line. On August 8, less than a month away, Ohioans will confront a momentous decision at the ballot box: Ohio Issue 1. Issue 1, a deceptive measure being cunningly pushed by anti-democratic and arrogant conservative lawmakers, seeks to impose minority rule by demanding an unprecedented 60 percent threshold to amend the state constitution, instead of requiring the usual 50 percent threshold.
Make no mistake -- this is a direct attack on our democratic values, an assault on our sacred right to vote, and a perilous attempt to silence the voices of Ohioans.
**[In this pivotal moment, I am calling on you to join hands with All On The Line and bolster our efforts in Ohio and anywhere else democracy faces threats. clean_body: | Friend, Ohio stands at a critical juncture, and the very essence of our democracy is on the line. On August 8, less than a month away, Ohioans will confront a momentous decision at the ballot box: Ohio Issue 1. Issue 1, a deceptive measure being cunningly pushed by anti-democratic and arrogant conservative lawmakers, seeks to impose minority rule by demanding an unprecedented 60 percent threshold to amend the state constitution, instead of requiring the usual 50 percent threshold. Make no mistake -- this is a direct attack on our democratic values, an assault on our sacred right to vote, and a perilous attempt to silence the voices of Ohioans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The fight against Issue 1 transcends Ohio's borders; it resonates as a national concern. Across the country, we are witnessing similar anti-democratic maneuvers, where gerrymandering grants unbridled power to the legislature. From Arkansas to Florida, from Missouri to Ohio, we are witnessing a troubling pattern -- the stifling of democratic participation and the imposition of unjust policies. But my friends, let me be clear: Our collective power can alter the course of history. With the unwavering support from folks like you, we can stand as a bulwark for democracy and vanquish those who seek to undermine it. The time has come to rise above partisan divisions and unite behind the bedrock principles that define us as Americans -- fairness, representation, and justice for all. = Let us remind the world that it is the people who wield ultimate power in our great nation. It falls upon us, you and me, to safeguard the very foundation of our democracy. = = I firmly believe we will create a brighter future for democracy and justice in America. Thank you for standing with us and for the values that bind us together. \-- Eric H. ---
Friend,
---
Last cycle my campaign was censored by Big Tech when Facebook shut off our fundraising.
---
Then reports showed that Google’s Gmail censorship cost Republican candidates like me around $2 billion in contributions.
---
And in the 2020 election, social media companies suppressed and censored information regarding Hunter Biden’s found laptop and the contents within it.
---
**Now, as Big Tech is under the microscope for the Weaponization Committee’s investigation, Democrats attempted to CENSOR a witness’ testimony at a CENSORSHIP HEARING.**
---
These relentless attacks on Americans First Amendment rights from the Left and Big Tech know no bounds and we can’t allow it to continue.
---
_I won’t EVER stop fighting to defend your constitutional rights from the Left’s attacks and with your help, I know we can only succeed._

clean_body: We have to protect FREE SPEECH at all costs. | Friend, Last cycle my campaign was censored by Big Tech when Facebook shut off our fundraising. Then reports showed that Google’s Gmail censorship cost Republican candidates like me around $2 billion in contributions. And in the 2020 election, social media companies suppressed and censored information regarding Hunter Biden’s found laptop and the contents within it. Now, as Big Tech is under the microscope for the Weaponization Committee’s investigation, Democrats attempted to CENSOR a witness’ testimony at a CENSORSHIP HEARING. These relentless attacks on Americans First Amendment rights from the Left and Big Tech know no bounds and we can’t allow it to continue. I won’t EVER stop fighting to defend your constitutional rights from the Left’s attacks and with your help, I know we can only succeed. The American people deserve the truth. They deserve to have all the facts presented to them and to engage in debates and discussions with others, even hearing opposing viewpoints. Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=460a1f2e53234e58bd7c859a495e5c3d&_e=q-BGsoWlZRarWn-ySGh39XaKwYNEgzCpHa1ffPi1Aykbk4AAmJSR5dNeBANOLsIBF5KSrivk_Kut8g-nv1i47uPJ-BWk7LATNl6IacLsOLvZSi5DV5dUbVUkaW0hzO4xbgw2KIw4_2YSVE5R3ZfuE7wc-yq9_gpiDmflgWo-ZdEuD2wCyzoKetq6Ryj1wS9riNKc3eHjEGlwu3tougmx-3WeIloyCuq-daUQIZswokizT3HsstGC9OQV32jnWpoygYB4UvZlZzSIo6Y381cOgNcp8hGgQfVNKt9EOX_xLiv_s-8VWPZXkKoIE1ji1mnv2k3mTiyxntfVhfecWdtp6WyFlK1Vf6XsKso_FG4jOW4SPAX-O142133B3fyWw0p80f5SAF8FOCLDb_VUYT2Z6w%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=460a1f2e53234e58bd7c859a495e5c3d&_e=q-BGsoWlZRarWn-ySGh39XaKwYNEgzCpHa1ffPi1Aykbk4AAmJSR5dNeBANOLsIBF5KSrivk_Kut8g-nv1i47uPJ-BWk7LATNl6IacLsOLvZSi5DV5dUbVUkaW0hzO4xbgw2KIw4_2YSVE5R3ZfuE7wc-yq9_gpiDmflgWo-ZdEuD2wCyzoKetq6Ryj1wS9riNKc3eHjEGlwu3tougmx-3WeIloyCuq-daUQIZswokizT3HsstGC9OQV32jnWpoyMouUFH6LA1ClTHMQJ-iG9OCBD23TeI1KIx57L81V78fSLfrbK7cku0Ew5gCXPd9v3-xZ8OMghg65B6B4RIN4z-bn0Wd2fWAgxOdWFzPeUgxGewKOS-beD-wzHW3rzW-8En0JffR-HlKSatCd6M1N_Q%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

It's been 14 years since the federal minimum wage was last increased Did you know that it's been 14 years since the federal minimum wage was last increased, Peter? In the years since, profits for wealthy corporations have soared while wages for hard-working families have remained stagnant, leading to unprecedented inequality. In 2018, Missouri's voters chose to change that by passing a historic victory for labor — Proposition B: The $12 Minimum Wage Initiative. But a $12 minimum wage isn't enough to raise a family, settle down, or buy a home. And currently, 20 states still abide by the federal minimum of $7.25 an hour. **This isn't right, and it isn't fair.** Wesley is committed to strengthening our economy by focusing on workers, creating jobs, and reinvesting in our rural communities. That's why he'll fight to pass the Raise the Wage Act, raising the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour. Wesley believes that working families can’t wait any longer — now we want to hear from you. **[Do you support raising the federal minimum wage? _**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a45e4bba74b040429cde320f4a8ab5de&_e=TpWvyUKeI4dw9XhV0cdKpBampLVj-xR6oxloCzWja-XOuJFla5oTjptuXoUmEBWeKDOA8ZUnS7sjDqTbFJ3a0-dRr8WRR32uzobnqZkocKKwN5r-4bR7DBOUj_VRFlMDa4lgG7sgsWqAKw_aBXIEj4OoV_a8aafr3pC1nvbLsiomQD3dMlaF4WC5CeUHTzDw1Kz-1lbJUxPttqc9u2Mw6m-msS_YNpErZ8KwjNPAQ-vOIsy9zZHmiryZDz8SkQTExlS9AjwMFyZr6JGb5X1mIkKmR3SB-An9-4GfZLJ0lUGBVOibkPds5hRlvZOVjGuC-68gPG3QqHY-vqP1SJ4ORwoLMd25mxoY_OPg-mF3-jtIAZl3rgGDxP93ME-zfoDLBUjmeB7vkfLBoDkJaBpN-Q%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a45e4bba74b040429cde320f4a8ab5de&_e=TpWvyUKeI4dw9XhV0cdKpBampLVj-xR6oxloCzWja-XOuJFla5oTjptuXoUmEBWeKDOA8ZUnS7sjDqTbFJ3a0-dRr8WRR32uzobnqZkocKKwN5r-4bR7DBOUj_VRFlMDa4lgG7sgsWqAKw_aBXIEj4OoV_a8aafr3pC1nvbLsiomQD3dMlaF4WC5CeUHTzDw1Kz-1lbJUxPttqc9u2Mw6m-msS_YNpErZ8KwjNPAQ-vOIsy9zZHmiryZDz8SkQTEK3f9-eAUikG9qLmVPsey1m-2YysSr9bYBtQiVpGArPTeb-gDRcepPGry1sfjHE3m6EDdHx9X4Fcv3b8eX6G-z5AGSQZPs0ckQKyqP1keSv0UXubnxGVIg91gKeE1rnQM_o-s7oqKumJulmVHpxrpaw%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a45e4bba74b040429cde320f4a8ab5de&_e=TpWvyUKeI4dw9XhV0cdKpBampLVj-xR6oxloCzWja-XOuJFla5oTjptuXoUmEBWeKDOA8ZUnS7sjDqTbFJ3a0-dRr8WRR32uzobnqZkocKKwN5r-4bR7DBOUj_VRFlMDa4lgG7sgsWqAKw_aBXIEj4OoV_a8aafr3pC1nvbLsiomQD3dMlaF4WC5CeUHTzDw1Kz-1lbJUxPttqc9u2Mw6m-msS_YNpErZ8KwjNPAQ-vOIsy9zZHmiryZDz8SkQTESmi_ONdMGhQ1B5udWgIwmoIlTZhaUSZSJsuzzFjgxhKiuvDruYU-Hlp--oNUwVwOMmIypd_LGybTHG_MG0pjsnjwgXxok8hWYF0ZTbxW2ekPVFCVkJGlCa7_CSai_OUbgMbzcbrP1xEDs7KAl-RDpg%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a45e4bba74b040429cde320f4a8ab5de&_e=TpWvyUKeI4dw9XhV0cdKpBampLVj-xR6oxloCzWja-XOuJFla5oTjptuXoUmEBWeKDOA8ZUnS7sjDqTbFJ3a0-dRr8WRR32uzobnqZkocKKwN5r-4bR7DBOUj_VRFlMDa4lgG7sgsWqAKw_aBXIEj4OoV_a8aafr3pC1nvbLsiomQD3dMlaF4WC5CeUHTzDw1Kz-1lbJUxPttqc9u2Mw6m-msS_YNpErZ8KwjNPAQ-vOIsy9zZHmiryZDz8SkQTEVPci4VqE_dOe9-kpGaLdMd3HVVusARrC6myqzdUeGFGzu_gWm_itkNyXpCKwc4kwRoa_E1Qt9e4zLPQDqiV0043JMEPS2x1BnrkG1t1_pJIjH8qJS6JmJ3iE57Y67Dw42HWJ1h6r0NbcoYzTVxoS0g%3D%3D)

name: Katie Hill

body:
Money shouldn’t be the reason our candidates win or lose — but it almost always is. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67028687/418410448/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230725_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI3NWFmZTctMmIyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=94ocrg5vkUjSj_Tv59twX2Q51h_yYXIEpmzIDpYPWac=)
---
Peter, Studies have shown that, on average, male candidates raise about one-third more than women running for the same seats. This fundraising gap is even larger for Black, brown, and other women of color. In over 90% of House of Representatives elections, the candidate who spends more wins. It’s that simple. Money shouldn’t be the reason our candidates win or lose — **but it almost always is. ** So when we say our candidates are underfunded, and rely on groups like HER Time to make up the difference, it’s not just empty words. And when we say we’re behind on our July fundraising goal, and we may have to scale back our support for our frontline candidates, **that may mean the difference between winning or losing on Election Day.** [_**That’s why I’m coming to you today to ask: Can I count on your support today to contribute any amount to help level the playing field for our women candidates?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67028688/418410449/-605873117?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230725_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI3NWFmZTctMmIyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=94ocrg5vkUjSj_Tv59twX2Q51h_yYXIEpmzIDpYPWac=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67028689/418410450/-605873117?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230725_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI3NWFmZTctMmIyYi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=94ocrg5vkUjSj_Tv59twX2Q51h_yYXIEpmzIDpYPWac=)

clean_body: Money shouldn’t be the reason our candidates win or lose — but it almost always is. | = Peter, Studies have shown that, on average, male candidates raise about one-third more than women running for the same seats. This fundraising gap is even larger for Black, brown, and other women of color. In over 90% of House of Representatives elections, the candidate who spends more wins. It’s that simple. Money shouldn’t be the reason our candidates win or lose — but it almost always is. So when we say our candidates are underfunded, and rely on groups like HER Time to make up the difference, it’s not just empty words. And when we say we’re behind on our July fundraising goal, and we may have to scale back our support for our frontline candidates, that may mean the difference between winning or losing on Election Day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = As much as I would love to get money out of politics, the truth of the matter is that until that happens, we have to play ball and compete with Republicans’ deep pockets. That’s why I’m so grateful for whatever you’re able to contribute. — Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Rapid Response Needed
body:
| | | My friend, I’ve fought America’s enemies on battlefields across the globe as a combat-decorated Special Forces Green Beret.

The bracelet I wear on my arm is for one of my teammates who paid the ultimate price to defend the United States from our enemies. It reminds me every day of the true cost of freedom.

So, I’m sure you can understand my outrage at the recent revelations by federal government whistleblower Gary Shapley.

A WhatsApp message Shapely unearthed revealed that Joe Biden’s wastrel son, Hunter, leveraged his father’s name and clout to secure a FIVE MILLION DOLLAR wire from a Chinese Communist Party (CCP) official!

Make no mistake, the CCP is America’s #1 global adversary.

In fact, Communist China’s dictator Xi Jinping has made no secret of his determination to supplant the U.S. as the world’s dominant superpower.

Yet, Hunter Biden saw no issue with getting rich off CCP cash.

It makes my blood boil.

That’s my perspective. Now, I’d like to hear yours.

Please, take a few minutes to complete the _Communist China Threat Assessment Survey_ I’ve enclosed for you and let me know your opinion. I eagerly await your response.[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=17697a8cf33e4bedb6bfc1642d3bfb9a&_e=IATCFRLqI6K90R8xPoHzzCPqJyrshoNbRHvhTVxqE4U_kJxow9dfT2iiqAaYPcJezkPjNnqsWaHRTAVOcmIO7NogQk8Q9i8LdPr9LNNnFm93ixfYEWxERHVGD0K7IegMb5OpX0wcBsoDAlsxVkrMPudkt5T5kI720kFrhyaCBiN2g15e6QhLXAylNFF7Wf1QvDc5PeigiDyjxdsNPGg-Y8DwNUWNY9UzYelx_xFd7sRGTWccOmrZieqc03I2xYjl5EvOI3sg8BvQase6JNZEn3v6NdhDn9D3Bty5rzkIm-8zuu7Ot4FthhW_SYxPCh5UqFYM5jgOBena3iSC6a_dMdCWT7OJ36vB0geNKEN7bAnDtvEgW95XHL2DIrYXLeIU)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

The House Oversight Committee awaits, and he's determined to get to the bottom of it. Here's a sneak peek of what he had to say: | | Friend, you've been a steadfast supporter, standing by Tim every step of the way on the UAP issue. Well, the moment we've all been waiting for is finally here. In less than 24 hours, we invite you to tune in for a historic experience as Tim delves into the mysteries flying in our skies. With testimonies from Air Force veteran David Grusch and former Navy commander David Fravor among others, this hearing promises to be groundbreaking. Sincerely, Team Burchett | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress** | | ---|---

| **Fact: Dan will always stand up for the benefits Americans work hard for and earn—whether it be pensions, or Social Security and Medicare.**

**_[Will you sign Dan’s petition supporting workers and protecting pensions?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029304/418412333/-1869228846?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230725_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Delphi&refcode2=f58a5338-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNThhNTMzOC0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRKTGL3yUay_chknTgObd1wiLnAXyTGyB8WOgGrdpYQ=&emci=c48a5bc3-2c2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f58a5338-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
* * *

Hi,

Dan believes if you work hard and play by the rules, you deserve to retire with dignity. And he’ll work with anyone to make sure Michigan workers get the benefits they’ve earned.

Thousands of Michigan workers at Delphi lost their pensions through no fault of their own, and have waited over a decade for their benefits to be restored. These workers played by the rules and deserve to have their pensions restored.

Last Congress, Dan introduced and passed his bipartisan bill to help these workers in the House. Dan’s bill was just introduced in the Senate.

**_[Do you agree that all retirees deserve the benefits they worked for? Click here by midnight to become one of the 3,000 activists we need to sign on to support Dan’s fight for Michigan workers and seniors.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029306/418412335/-1869228846?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230725_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Delphi&refcode2=f58a5338-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNThhNTMzOC0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRKTGL3yUay_chknTgObd1wiLnAXyTGyB8WOgGrdpYQ=&emci=c48a5bc3-2c2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f58a5338-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

We can’t let hardworking families be constantly taken advantage of by big corporations who only care about the bottom line. Dan remains committed to protect your retirement security and fight for workers’ rights.

In Congress, he announced a bill to expand labor rights for public safety officers. He stood up to those who want to cut or privatize Social Security and Medicare. And Dan is helping to create good-paying manufacturing jobs by passing new laws like the _CHIPS and Science Act_ and _Inflation Reduction Act._

For years, Dan has been going to bat for all hard working Americans to receive the benefits they earned. Join Dan in standing this battle and add your name below:

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/delphi](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029309/418412338/-1869228846?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230725_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_Delphi&refcode2=f58a5338-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNThhNTMzOC0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRKTGL3yUay_chknTgObd1wiLnAXyTGyB8WOgGrdpYQ=&emci=c48a5bc3-2c2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f58a5338-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

The difference is clear -- just take a look at the Biden-Harris administration’s economic record compared to Donald Trump’s: Ready to keep making progress, Peter? Then pitch in $25 now to help reelect Joe and Kamala: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks to the Biden-Harris administration’s leadership, our economy has recovered faster and stronger from the global pandemic than any other major economy in the world, and the unemployment rate is near record lows. Meanwhile, instead of helping more people get jobs or access key services like Medicare and Social Security, Republicans like Trump have built their agenda around ripping rights away from millions of Americans. They believe that for them to succeed, everyone else has to fail. Thanks, Team Biden-Harris

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

One week from today is already the end of July, and I’m remiss to tell you that we’re WAY behind on our fundraising for the month...

With just seven days to play catch up before the end of month deadline, we’re writing to you in hopes that you’ll be able to **[come to our assistance](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41fe87b6999f49679148d4eab7a09de1&_e=s2lJEEYnaogP0S--v0x0L0EBtbQmjvtHNWyD44nRlrh9LXBl1pWZYC-adJUwBa4fXBwb6nc4D7fRS95u-bYdSMXy5phtb-8lRRCPkOUsLTm1EzrBW72vwEGWZMhaHlAJtzer_LG04RKShbS4jZALGDU_ngchlPdkrWHxwNdl3muhEvJZEq3oHP7TnZZvT3PDCPbSpe2LrnKbbYF3x9lNECjKChGMmvEOiB997ra7LfvzT8eMh61Nw1O2U3wBJrEf8TxOfC4lkvZvH4A7fzILK2cA_1F94yqBIxI3X6l-lFH-wrAFSDk0MEjNLTpN8pduTKVoQBGwEpC99TBb5dehnI5DNAzxtRmo87qo8r-VtE_Yw1ySOj5kZqx1rI0j2X4U)**.

How behind are we, you ask? Well, yesterday the email we sent raised just $542 – when we were counting on raising more than $5,000 from it. So, suffice to say, **[we need this email to do perform substantially better.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41fe87b6999f49679148d4eab7a09de1&_e=s2lJEEYnaogP0S--v0x0L0EBtbQmjvtHNWyD44nRlrh9LXBl1pWZYC-adJUwBa4fXBwb6nc4D7fRS95u-bYdSMXy5phtb-8lRRCPkOUsLTm1EzrBW72vwEGWZMhaHlAJtzer_LG04RKShbS4jZALGDU_ngchlPdkrWHxwNdl3muhEvJZEq3oHP7TnZZvT3PDCPbSpe2LrnKbbYF3x9lNECjKChGMmvEOiB997ra7LfuX-2v6NdTjvuHccgIiRcKcHo7VLt2t5ZuKZ9oSxcc74OHhjeWRxtftvWB7-ezTZSRJ7vofxj1D8H4ZcoyGSc1rQpVCGgN-4P0ka7VuigmX7d1dLFLGvLsAg3upPOcAxPfJgRBVWBC-2wrhSPrm6arr)**

Can I lean on you to **[donate $1 today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41fe87b6999f49679148d4eab7a09de1&_e=s2lJEEYnaogP0S--v0x0L0EBtbQmjvtHNWyD44nRlrh9LXBl1pWZYC-adJUwBa4fXBwb6nc4D7fRS95u-bYdSMXy5phtb-8lRRCPkOUsLTm1EzrBW72vwEGWZMhaHlAJtzer_LG04RKShbS4jZALGDU_ngchlPdkrWHxwNdl3muhEvJZEq3oHP7TnZZvT3PDCPbSpe2LrnKbbYF3x9lNECjKChGMmvEOiB997ra7LftMBRvC2ppyWxDYCof1BHdRnDi7mp8AAV-pcZU9YXch9A7NpG7WgzYe9iTtlkAqfOEfp-TZSvSeHFboswhDm68CCQurwpZJI9sKK6DEu8PXP-7llore9cqW7C1Rk5GNRqzG1w2_c7KDRkEziJUOmTxE)** given the that we’re a mere 7 days from our critical July end of month fundraising deadline?

Republicans like me – **who are the targets of the Left-wing mob every single day** - need all of the support we can get in order to continue our fight on YOUR behalf.

Our freedom, liberty, security, and prosperity hang in the balance. **[Will you answer the call today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41fe87b6999f49679148d4eab7a09de1&_e=s2lJEEYnaogP0S--v0x0L0EBtbQmjvtHNWyD44nRlrh9LXBl1pWZYC-adJUwBa4fXBwb6nc4D7fRS95u-bYdSMXy5phtb-8lRRCPkOUsLTm1EzrBW72vwEGWZMhaHlAJtzer_LG04RKShbS4jZALGDU_ngchlPdkrWHxwNdl3muhEvJZEq3oHP7TnZZvT3PDCPbSpe2LrnKbbYF3x9lNECjKChGMmvEOiB997ra7LfsaM3wM0xnVK2syke6rgPQCvuyDCgGusx9okU0APpZUSh4YZ2OF7jWa8msGjpa3x0WRV7Xc_nnIoxgdJHQKzMbHzp5K-Qr9MTgYVOCT9rJjjjcEH-sCT_NBeJS9tFh2cvOybM772oYnfk6w2qAtrEPW)**

**[Your $1 contribution](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41fe87b6999f49679148d4eab7a09de1&_e=s2lJEEYnaogP0S--v0x0L0EBtbQmjvtHNWyD44nRlrh9LXBl1pWZYC-adJUwBa4fXBwb6nc4D7fRS95u-bYdSMXy5phtb-8lRRCPkOUsLTm1EzrBW72vwEGWZMhaHlAJtzer_LG04RKShbS4jZALGDU_ngchlPdkrWHxwNdl3muhEvJZEq3oHP7TnZZvT3PDCPbSpe2LrnKbbYF3x9lNECjKChGMmvEOiB997ra7LfsW87weC-um1BYgUcV3hV9rYjMZllZ6R38pzRlx73AkFswEzErBYJ7BAg6EDW0UXmSh25JOyNy61Y9VCnp0TQzF3mJQ0-KWQQwTd4fATj12HHlQFjYk3cwtYF8NJ2mIqsYbTCtWTydqMUtMM2WSBI5o)** will certainly go a long way in helping me and my team make sure that we hit our fundraising goal this month. **[I promise you that your donation will not be used for any other purpose than to help us defend our four-seat majority](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41fe87b6999f49679148d4eab7a09de1&_e=s2lJEEYnaogP0S--v0x0L0EBtbQmjvtHNWyD44nRlrh9LXBl1pWZYC-adJUwBa4fXBwb6nc4D7fRS95u-bYdSMXy5phtb-8lRRCPkOUsLTm1EzrBW72vwEGWZMhaHlAJtzer_LG04RKShbS4jZALGDU_ngchlPdkrWHxwNdl3muhEvJZEq3oHP7TnZZvT3PDCPbSpe2LrnKbbYF3x9lNECjKChGMmvEOiB997ra7LfvIfBy9dfA9kUjTuGYDRdCHwx3Ly3Ppyh71u1s9pXQCjOmxKxzwBW2UwHxeMw93yURATXirybCmuNYDQovVd0nATyqt-CClgddDahMXUjXpb1oM8-YZP41GhYI0oGTYceAMKotZ_DS3RK9tJBcvycGd)** ; your gift will help put us into the position of being able to lend other Republicans a helping hand as we work to keep our House majority heading into next year’s presidential election.

For liberty,

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41fe87b6999f49679148d4eab7a09de1&_e=s2lJEEYnaogP0S--v0x0L0EBtbQmjvtHNWyD44nRlrh9LXBl1pWZYC-adJUwBa4fXBwb6nc4D7fRS95u-bYdSMXy5phtb-8lRRCPkOUsLTm1EzrBW72vwEGWZMhaHlAJtzer_LG04RKShbS4jZALGDU_ngchlPdkrWHxwNdl3muhEvJZEq3oHP7TnZZvT3PDCPbSpe2LrnKbbYF3x9lNECjKChGMmvEOiB997ra7LfvVZtlazBD142doZQ40QPOmOYTxp37_TFQfwRK773CvX66ZruSxgV8cP8p_ewM6Q28fK5K7OvsdIYBgqI8lfx2oK5LYBLTSxcl5lXYe6BosgHqBkPnhSXxoZkeyQy8Rx4Jv28We-mFzXoP_Jf2b_zmv)

name: Team Engel
subject: Fighting the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
This summer has brought the climate crisis to our front doors — in the form of searing, relentless heat. While we all love Arizona's warmth, it's clear that this is not sustainable.
More than ever, we need leaders in Congress who will invest in clean energy jobs, protect Arizona's water security, and defend our public lands.
Kirsten is that leader — which is why she's been endorsed by the Sierra Club, the largest grassroots environmental organization in the country.
You can join the Sierra Club in supporting Kirsten before our monthly fundraising deadline by chipping in now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072523_EOM_A_SC_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072523_EOM_A_SC_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072523_EOM_A_SC_act]
Kirsten spent years taking on big polluters and standing up for disadvantaged communities as an environmental lawyer. In the Arizona legislature, she was a crucial voice in the fight to protect our water supply.
In Congress, she'll help us build a sustainable future that lifts all boats.
We need Kirsten in Congress — but first, we have to hit our fundraising goal before our deadline in six days. Can we count on you to donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072523_EOM_A_SC_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
