Hey Peter, Michelle got into this race because it’s time that we take back the House and bring real change to South Texas. For the past few months, it has been an honor to receive endorsements from Democratic leaders across the state and the nation who believe in Michelle and in the movement she’s fighting for. **It shows that our vision is shared by many, not just across Texas but across the country — people who have dedicated their lives and careers to community service, people who were democratically elected, and working families who want to see a better future for ALL of us.[If you're with us, will you make a contribution right now to support this movement? →](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_TEvslZgyjxH-KUGzyvYZTMAj2iHPZbueWmJ5x0W2zjxPnN17sxQL1aUwUBF4Gf5thcZMx3UKVH53_ibyrs6yBeIl_nJAaLfn7DCW_hm1zJp8-GCb6p8bBv17EnRZOc0scg5JSkhwFa_uwzywlZScErJLG_kfektodSW3zD0amAAqjNWED8biZFhAnGoO63AMbrjmU0DoWbjO5wmC2hjlDtWomU0S6xZemkGbg1k3jJBXsIEyhN44fvvH6ZxkOE-AkoAGnDNZU7cB5xQspTyMJkKj6bn6pcRPmf9nigwVRdJjgygd0PX88jWtCdT_viCh0RetuH-6GlsXIa3ZjQvT-NnLCSxXq6jm3O8GrxTAKd0/3y6/QlkDRzHdReG_gWyD-OQcLQ/h1/HmLEtu2TDt3044GG40ix5PEAoFGY-Uf6Yw8ZithLhjY)** Here’s what a few have to say: _As a lifelong advocate for Texas families, I’m proud to endorse Michelle Vallejo for Congress. The pathway to taking back the house in 2024 runs through South Texas, and Michelle Vallejo is the leader we need to flip Texas’ 15th Congressional District. - Wendy Davis_ _We need Michelle Vallejo in Congress because she is a tireless fighter for working families, small businesses, and seniors. - Rep. Sylvia Garcia_ _As someone who once happily represented many of the families that are now in TX-15, I am confident Michelle is the champion we need in Congress to protect Social Security and Medicare, stand up for our veterans and bring down health care costs. - Rep. Lloyd Doggett_ _I am proud to endorse Michelle Vallejo because I know she is fighting to make sure our families have access to affordable health care, protect Social Security and Medicare for our seniors, defend a woman’s right to choose, and drive forward solutions for our border. - Rep Veronica Escobar_ Here is a full list of our endorsements so far: Wendy Davis
Rep. Veronica Escobar, TX-16

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3505173fbb81434ba1d00a49af557991&_e=Zk3xylxofWYh_Bdhdr5J8U9iDe03CjYeJMd6a0U6LcUMEITCiW_GP5ZPf2-8UWPTIWzTCtPt-sH6fRPAeOiWEHeuUPX6EQg-7UXYPc51mrNwfB2NHGCTHIkVYB0fglAagtUS_8T25D813Sq9wMrs1sTqXqOInK12dn0OPbgwwaXOULYbk58Zr90tPZpfqW3Z1fEAU3FKfRJ5HmkdnVMFkmeaAgot69YWWAKHvi81n2KUhVly3msoGVNBEl9kE9LPgRAwhW5DrEgIcDYMzeWkf-NbDmJNclhEqZfbtWyOuws9XGThqyCcXYghiSzMJHONw68gW4xG4ytNNw-H37HAafH-_3_vkkgYiydSt9c-Kp_cAN5nVqULY-emjGF6TxAxgSdhvv3Kai6zsqItKef-PQ%3D%3D)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3505173fbb81434ba1d00a49af557991&_e=Zk3xylxofWYh_Bdhdr5J8U9iDe03CjYeJMd6a0U6LcUMEITCiW_GP5ZPf2-8UWPTIWzTCtPt-sH6fRPAeOiWEHeuUPX6EQg-7UXYPc51mrNwfB2NHGCTHIkVYB0fglAagtUS_8T25D813Sq9wMrs1sTqXqOInK12dn0OPbgwwaXOULYbk58Zr90tPZpfqW3Z1fEAU3FKfRJ5HmkdnVMFkmeaAgot69YWWAKHvi81n2KUhVly3msoGVNBEl9kE9LPwRnMYR945ExLtU6L-KW2OMp_QAMmkaWjzjMCOTqqAO-IwyEJK5ucjuyAUJ8dEPEZHMv-m61jOSiv-Zw5RPEBXeVbMJQK3WOYHfkeNfIZjMTghL_K9LjuwhSGXj-rguNlY6w8hDK1pbQJ_xIfP5DhqA%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3505173fbb81434ba1d00a49af557991&_e=Zk3xylxofWYh_Bdhdr5J8U9iDe03CjYeJMd6a0U6LcUMEITCiW_GP5ZPf2-8UWPTIWzTCtPt-sH6fRPAeOiWEHeuUPX6EQg-7UXYPc51mrNwfB2NHGCTHIkVYB0fglAagtUS_8T25D813Sq9wMrs1sTqXqOInK12dn0OPbgwwaXOULYbk58Zr90tPZpfqW3Z1fEAU3FKfRJ5HmkdnVMFkmeaAgot69YWWAKHvi81n2KUhVly3msoGVNBEl9kE9LP2FIn_YvhxUD7sA6UcKY0BoBP_uJZH8UU5tL3Cm1VX24D-4o6ZUL4HpQtjLbzjLCumQa-QPl7jyIfPf_4x8BCDcPnkLhqmg8NTBKOrNDPl4DQ38rMVVKh7qPr5BpjB7lgV3L2bJZ1gaLoqUeRUV-hHA%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3505173fbb81434ba1d00a49af557991&_e=Zk3xylxofWYh_Bdhdr5J8U9iDe03CjYeJMd6a0U6LcUMEITCiW_GP5ZPf2-8UWPTIWzTCtPt-sH6fRPAeOiWEHeuUPX6EQg-7UXYPc51mrNwfB2NHGCTHIkVYB0fglAagtUS_8T25D813Sq9wMrs1sTqXqOInK12dn0OPbgwwaXOULYbk58Zr90tPZpfqW3Z1fEAU3FKfRJ5HmkdnVMFkmeaAgot69YWWAKHvi81n2KUhVly3msoGVNBEl9kE9LPp9Nr0OWReYTb9H212yGUk203sFc_4KErKu3x3YFazPuItz5VMNQEJNrCDagJJoxHgrvuXqLn_Db3NggJJggZ0sb6vnjL0CWoR6kuBT2dleuAzZzYqFpivik9iDCHz1WzNdAg5CBu7wedtfZxURk1Jw%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3505173fbb81434ba1d00a49af557991&_e=Zk3xylxofWYh_Bdhdr5J8U9iDe03CjYeJMd6a0U6LcUMEITCiW_GP5ZPf2-8UWPTIWzTCtPt-sH6fRPAeOiWEHeuUPX6EQg-7UXYPc51mrNwfB2NHGCTHIkVYB0fglAagtUS_8T25D813Sq9wMrs1sTqXqOInK12dn0OPbgwwaXOULYbk58Zr90tPZpfqW3Z1fEAU3FKfRJ5HmkdnVMFkmeaAgot69YWWAKHvi81n2KUhVly3msoGVNBEl9kE9LPUaBGGUNNhNsp1eEyFIQrj6ENe1-d-Z5g-5mjgbj6uIkastZTpNnUG7ImmPoD1eUXSXV2aOYJb1_76WyPJfUHOfzkceH-_57ENCfWdbt3rUBC5yPVXIOdIxh164y1-QrgMkX9Gh-AgxCk0jbTrVpLag%3D%3D)

Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | ---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Supreme Court made access to college a lot less equitable [Add your name]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029982/418414452/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlOTBlYy0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKD5T_iJ6zKNSgZdiM39e902kGevZyuZl2Spb4_NsIM=&emci=cab8afd3-2a2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=eaee90ec-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | **Education is supposed to be the great equalizer – a chance for our kids to learn the skills to follow their dreams.** But let's be honest, education can't be an equalizer if there are biases in the system that favor already advantaged students. I saw these biases firsthand as a blue-collar kid who, by virtue of talent in math, was miraculously admitted to a rigorous school: Stanford. Upon arriving at Stanford's campus, I realized that my dormmates came from a different world. They came from affluent families whose parents had gone to college. They had been raised in a culture that discussed college options from the time they could talk. Many had attended private schools or benefited from summer academic enrichment programs, SAT preparation classes, and tutors who assisted with their college essays. And in many college admission offices across the country, students from similarly privileged backgrounds had another big advantage – a large chunk of the positions were reserved for the children of alumni and major donors. **[That's unacceptable. Sign my petition to end inequitable "legacy admission" practices.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029983/418414453/366003421?contactdata=wNSi9rRQtggsV2Zl7fK3S1+V1XyAJS4hIo5GCOfX055MIjRgE33z8uo4iMPK71CocmCAlNzE7NlSkftq1hrr6gvtF8kg8WrN7feFZD41/jh5l2KG08EVg+euV9Ejn+em31yFua4QPvUx99w4xvKXXg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlOTBlYy0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKD5T_iJ6zKNSgZdiM39e902kGevZyuZl2Spb4_NsIM=&emci=cab8afd3-2a2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=eaee90ec-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)** Having seen all of these advantages available to students from affluent, mostly white families, I have always thought that it was a stride toward equity when colleges made an effort to admit students who came from less advantaged backgrounds, including students who came from dismal financial circumstances or from minority communities subject to systemic racism – let's stir the pot a little.**In addition to a stride toward equity, I thought that all members of the incoming student class would benefit from diversity that brings broader set of backgrounds and perspectives into the classroom and into the dorms.** But the Supreme Court, dominated by rich white guys, sees it differently. They ruled against the right of colleges to stir the pot and admit students with more diverse backgrounds. The conservative majority on the court prohibited race-based affirmative action in college admission decisions, despite our nation's long history of racial discrimination and continuing racial disparities. But what about the more significant discrimination in admissions? The large number of positions that colleges reserve for wealthy, mostly white students because their parents are alumni or major donors? **The court didn't breathe a word about that.** Thus, so-called "legacy applicants" – children of alumni or donors – still get a leg up in the admission process at most selective colleges. This is completely backwards: the Court's decision not only prevents colleges from addressing past injustices, but actually approves of _perpetuating_ those injustices. That's why Representative Jamaal Bowman of New York and I have introduced the Fair College Admission for Students Act to counter donor and legacy favoritism in college admissions. **[Today I'm asking you to sign your name to show your support for ending legacy admission.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029985/418414454/366003421?contactdata=wNSi9rRQtggsV2Zl7fK3S1+V1XyAJS4hIo5GCOfX055MIjRgE33z8uo4iMPK71CocmCAlNzE7NlSkftq1hrr6gvtF8kg8WrN7feFZD41/jh5l2KG08EVg+euV9Ejn+em31yFua4QPvUx99w4xvKXXg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlOTBlYy0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKD5T_iJ6zKNSgZdiM39e902kGevZyuZl2Spb4_NsIM=&emci=cab8afd3-2a2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=eaee90ec-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029986/418414455/366003421?contactdata=wNSi9rRQtggsV2Zl7fK3S1+V1XyAJS4hIo5GCOfX055MIjRgE33z8uo4iMPK71CocmCAlNzE7NlSkftq1hrr6gvtF8kg8WrN7feFZD41/jh5l2KG08EVg+euV9Ejn+em31yFua4QPvUx99w4xvKXXg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlOTBlYy0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKD5T_iJ6zKNSgZdiM39e902kGevZyuZl2Spb4_NsIM=&emci=cab8afd3-2a2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=eaee90ec-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215) **We know that diversity on campuses enriches education for everyone and helps our country counter the injustices that flow from systemic racial discrimination.** But instead of championing diversity, the Supreme Court took a system that was already stacked against poorer and underprivileged students – and made it even worse. **We have to fix it.** The Fair College Admission for Students Act will prohibit admission offices from giving preferential treatment to applicants just because their parents are alumni or big donors. **[Can I count on you to sign your name in support of making higher education more equitable for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029987/418414456/366003421?contactdata=wNSi9rRQtggsV2Zl7fK3S1+V1XyAJS4hIo5GCOfX055MIjRgE33z8uo4iMPK71CocmCAlNzE7NlSkftq1hrr6gvtF8kg8WrN7feFZD41/jh5l2KG08EVg+euV9Ejn+em31yFua4QPvUx99w4xvKXXg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlOTBlYy0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKD5T_iJ6zKNSgZdiM39e902kGevZyuZl2Spb4_NsIM=&emci=cab8afd3-2a2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=eaee90ec-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029988/418414457/366003421?contactdata=wNSi9rRQtggsV2Zl7fK3S1+V1XyAJS4hIo5GCOfX055MIjRgE33z8uo4iMPK71CocmCAlNzE7NlSkftq1hrr6gvtF8kg8WrN7feFZD41/jh5l2KG08EVg+euV9Ejn+em31yFua4QPvUx99w4xvKXXg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlOTBlYy0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKD5T_iJ6zKNSgZdiM39e902kGevZyuZl2Spb4_NsIM=&emci=cab8afd3-2a2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=eaee90ec-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215) Education is a source of opportunity, and here in the United States – the land of opportunity – access to education has never been equal or fair. But now, with SCOTUS placing a thumb on the scale to favor the wealthy and connected, I am fighting back. Together, we can make education more accessible and equitable. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67029989/418414458/-2122444374?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=pet-2023-07-affirmative-action-email&refcode2=eaee90ec-2e2b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlOTBlYy0yZTJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKD5T_iJ6zKNSgZdiM39e902kGevZyuZl2Spb4_NsIM=) clean_body: | | | | Education is supposed to be the great equalizer – a chance for our kids to learn the skills to follow their dreams. But let's be honest, education can't be an equalizer if there are biases in the system that favor already advantaged students. I saw these biases firsthand as a blue-collar kid who, by virtue of talent in math, was miraculously admitted to a rigorous school: Stanford. Upon arriving at Stanford's campus, I realized that my dormmates came from a different world. They came from affluent families whose parents had gone to college. They had been raised in a culture that discussed college options from the time they could talk. Many had attended private schools or benefited from summer academic enrichment programs, SAT preparation classes, and tutors who assisted with their college essays. And in many college admission offices across the country, students from similarly privileged backgrounds had another big advantage – a large chunk of the positions were reserved for the children of alumni and major donors. Having seen all of these advantages available to students from affluent, mostly white families, I have always thought that it was a stride toward equity when colleges made an effort to admit students who came from less advantaged backgrounds, including students who came from dismal financial circumstances or from minority communities subject to systemic racism – let's stir the pot a little.In addition to a stride toward equity, I thought that all members of the incoming student class would benefit from diversity that brings broader set of backgrounds and perspectives into the classroom and into the dorms. But the Supreme Court, dominated by rich white guys, sees it differently. They ruled against the right of colleges to stir the pot and admit students with more diverse backgrounds. The conservative majority on the court prohibited race-based affirmative action in college admission decisions, despite our nation's long history of racial discrimination and continuing racial disparities. But what about the more significant discrimination in admissions? The large number of positions that colleges reserve for wealthy, mostly white students because their parents are alumni or major donors? The court didn't breathe a word about that. Thus, so-called "legacy applicants" – children of alumni or donors – still get a leg up in the admission process at most selective colleges. This is completely backwards: the Court's decision not only prevents colleges from addressing past injustices, but actually approves of perpetuating those injustices. That's why Representative Jamaal Bowman of New York and I have introduced the Fair College Admission for Students Act to counter donor and legacy favoritism in college admissions. We know that diversity on campuses enriches education for everyone and helps our country counter the injustices that flow from systemic racial discrimination. But instead of championing diversity, the Supreme Court took a system that was already stacked against poorer and underprivileged students – and made it even worse. We have to fix it. The Fair College Admission for Students Act will prohibit admission offices from giving preferential treatment to applicants just because their parents are alumni or big donors. Education is a source of opportunity, and here in the United States – the land of opportunity – access to education has never been equal or fair. But now, with SCOTUS placing a thumb on the scale to favor the wealthy and connected, I am fighting back. Together, we can make education more accessible and equitable. Onward, Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | | Folks, I can't believe this has to be said because it's 2023... Nothing about slavery was ok. The Florida public school system has a curriculum in place that now teaches children that slavery was actually a good thing because it helped African Americans develop beneficial skills to be used later in life... And Governor DeSantis doubled down on this on the campaign trail. **Excuse me, Governor? Slavery wasn't a jobs program that taught beneficial skills. It was literally dehumanizing and subjugated people as property because they lacked any rights or freedoms.** This ugly rhetoric does not represent America or the Republican Party, and it doesn’t help unite our country. We need to be working to make inroads in black and brown communities, not further divide our country. If you agree, send my campaign $1 to help me qualify for the first GOP debate so I can take this abhorrent ideology head-on. It’s time to lay out a unifying agenda that looks toward a better future — and that’s my plan. **[I need 40,000 individual donors by August 21. body:
Derek – it’s no secret that anti-choice activists, here in Pennsylvania and across the country, are trying every trick in the book to restrict a woman’s right to choose. But make no mistake: **As long as I’m your Governor, I’m going to protect the fundamental rights of _every_ Pennsylvanian.** We know that the vast majority of Pennsylvanians believe a woman should have the freedom to choose, and are working to defend everyone’s fundamental freedoms. But that isn’t stopping far-right extremists Republicans here and in Washington, D.C. from doing whatever they can to restrict access to abortion. _That means it’s up to all of us to continue the fight._ [_**That’s why I have to ask, Derek: Will you chip in $10 or more to power our work to protect abortion rights here in Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67030074/418414607/1587739246?refcode=email_072523_protect-choice&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2RkZWFlMy0yZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtx8A1zdN_wtQzClLuM_v_eDjBoAgTKsp11wrdXFzlk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67030075/418414608/1445489830?refcode=email_072523_protect-choice&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2RkZWFlMy0yZjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtx8A1zdN_wtQzClLuM_v_eDjBoAgTKsp11wrdXFzlk=)

subject: Monarch butterflies could kiss their future goodbye
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Monarchs down 22% in just one year. Bayer-Monsanto must stop glyphosate production NOW. Make your $27 gift today for monarchs and the planet.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This isn’t what I wanted to share. We thought some monarch populations were starting to recover last year. But we have some alarming numbers:
**The presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds DROPPED 22% in just the last year! **
The monarch butterfly is officially endangered, according to the International Union for Conservation of Nature. Monarch butterflies are at risk of dying off; some estimates show population declines of up to 95% since the 1990s.
What’s worse is that this didn’t have to happen. You see, **a key factor in their decline is toxic pesticides like Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup.** [**Stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and help save the monarchs before it's too late! We need at least 8 people from your area to make a $27 contribution before midnight tonight if we are going to make a difference for monarchs and our planet -- take a stand and make your gift today! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895978?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Monarchs' migration patterns are uniquely impressive. They travel around 3,000 miles every year, providing invaluable pollination along the way. But in the last few decades, the use of herbicides like Roundup has grown dramatically. Roundup is killing off the only food monarch caterpillars depend on -- milkweed. **Without milkweed, it is nearly impossible for monarch young to hatch and survive.** But Bayer-Monsanto continues to mercilessly put its profits from Roundup over pollinators, people, and the planet.
Friends of the Earth is putting everything we have into protecting our ecosystems from toxic pesticides and protect our planet, but we need your support to make an impact.
**Don't let monarchs be driven to extinction: Donate $27 today to fight for their future and the planet. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The monarch butterfly's incredible migration can span hundreds to thousands of miles over five generations. Yet each generation knows its destination thanks to an internal "compass" the monarchs follow.
But pesticide companies like Bayer-Monsanto seem to lack a moral compass -- continuing to sell glyphosate, the key ingredient in Roundup, no matter the cost to our planet and these incredible creatures.
**The use of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup increased by over 2,600%** from 1987 to 2016. This toxic weedkiller has virtually wiped out milkweed -- the only food source for young monarchs -- across the U.S.
And to make matters worse, a recent study highlighted a frightening fact: every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides -- **one-third with levels deadly to monarchs.** Young monarchs are hatching on toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed; their first meal may be their last.
The dangers don't end there, Friend. Glyphosate is a probable carcinogen. It is also associated with reproductive harm in humans, along with disruption of the gut microbiome, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease. _**Farmers and homeowners are suing Bayer-Monsanto due to high rates of non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma linked to the Roundup**_ they've used on their farms and lawns. Roundup is causing extensive harm that must be stopped before it's too late.
**Help us stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and protect our planet by making your $27 gift today. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895974?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895975?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895976?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1895977?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When the greed of companies like Bayer-Monsanto comes at the expense of our health and our planet, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action. Young monarchs are hatching on pesticide-riddled milkweed, eating these plants, and dying off. Meanwhile, monarchs are running out of places to lay their eggs in the first place. **Monarch populations are in freefall -- the time to act is now, while there are still monarchs left to save.**
At Friends of the Earth, we are fighting on every front to save these pollinators. Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet.
With each passing day, and as toxic pesticide use grows, we may only get the rarest glimpses of these beautiful butterflies. Future generations may never experience the beauty of seeing a monarch on a sunny day. Will you be one of the 8 people in your area today that will help us fight to protect them and our planet from toxic pesticides with your membership gift of $27 or more?
**Help us fight back against corporate greed and the toxic pesticides driving monarchs toward extinction and wreaking havoc on our planet. Rush your $27 gift today. **

**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dear Friend, | Monarchs down 22% in just one year. Bayer-Monsanto must stop glyphosate production NOW. Make your $27 gift today for monarchs and the planet. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == This isn’t what I wanted to share. We thought some monarch populations were starting to recover last year. But we have some alarming numbers: The presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds DROPPED 22% in just the last year! The monarch butterfly is officially endangered, according to the International Union for Conservation of Nature. Monarch butterflies are at risk of dying off; some estimates show population declines of up to 95% since the 1990s. What’s worse is that this didn’t have to happen. You see, a key factor in their decline is toxic pesticides like Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup. == Monarchs' migration patterns are uniquely impressive. They travel around 3,000 miles every year, providing invaluable pollination along the way. But in the last few decades, the use of herbicides like Roundup has grown dramatically. Roundup is killing off the only food monarch caterpillars depend on -- milkweed. Without milkweed, it is nearly impossible for monarch young to hatch and survive. But Bayer-Monsanto continues to mercilessly put its profits from Roundup over pollinators, people, and the planet. Friends of the Earth is putting everything we have into protecting our ecosystems from toxic pesticides and protect our planet, but we need your support to make an impact. Don't let monarchs be driven to extinction: Donate $27 today to fight for their future and the planet. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == The monarch butterfly's incredible migration can span hundreds to thousands of miles over five generations. Yet each generation knows its destination thanks to an internal "compass" the monarchs follow. But pesticide companies like Bayer-Monsanto seem to lack a moral compass -- continuing to sell glyphosate, the key ingredient in Roundup, no matter the cost to our planet and these incredible creatures. The use of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup increased by over 2,600% from 1987 to 2016. This toxic weedkiller has virtually wiped out milkweed -- the only food source for young monarchs -- across the U.S. And to make matters worse, a recent study highlighted a frightening fact: every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides -- one-third with levels deadly to monarchs. Young monarchs are hatching on toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed; their first meal may be their last. The dangers don't end there, Friend. Glyphosate is a probable carcinogen. It is also associated with reproductive harm in humans, along with disruption of the gut microbiome, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease. Farmers and homeowners are suing Bayer-Monsanto due to high rates of non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma linked to the Roundup they've used on their farms and lawns. Roundup is causing extensive harm that must be stopped before it's too late. Help us stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and protect our planet by making your $27 gift today. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == When the greed of companies like Bayer-Monsanto comes at the expense of our health and our planet, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action. Young monarchs are hatching on pesticide-riddled milkweed, eating these plants, and dying off. Meanwhile, monarchs are running out of places to lay their eggs in the first place. Monarch populations are in freefall -- the time to act is now, while there are still monarchs left to save. At Friends of the Earth, we are fighting on every front to save these pollinators. Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet. With each passing day, and as toxic pesticide use grows, we may only get the rarest glimpses of these beautiful butterflies. Future generations may never experience the beauty of seeing a monarch on a sunny day. Will you be one of the 8 people in your area today that will help us fight to protect them and our planet from toxic pesticides with your membership gift of $27 or more? Help us fight back against corporate greed and the toxic pesticides driving monarchs toward extinction and wreaking havoc on our planet. Rush your $27 gift today. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy director of science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

| Friend, I have a signed copy of my book, As Goes California for YOU!I have spent my entire career examining how public policy affects real Americans, and as a native Californian, I’ve spent my entire life seeing how so-called good intentions just end up making things much worse.**I want to send a signed copy to you TODAY!**[](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=6a5dd100ed&e=0be619cbaa)[**Please consider donating $47 or more – the next President will be our 47th – so I can ensure the disastrous politics of California doesn’t spread through the rest of this country.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=26fae27b3b&e=0be619cbaa) With your generous donation, I will send you a signed copy of As Goes California for being a dedicated supporter.On September 5, 2023, As Goes California, hits newsstands. In it, I detail how Democratic politicians dominating California have made life so difficult for those who call it home – a place now plagued with widespread crime, mass illegal immigration, rampant addiction, failing public schools, an unmanageable cost of living, and so much more.This will be the book everyone is talking about. But you don’t have to wait three months to reserve your copy. [**_In honor of the 47th president of the United States, with any donation of $47 or more, you’ll receive a SIGNED copy of my book._**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=6126d60e2a&e=0be619cbaa)

Don't wait. Reserve your copy today!Thank you,Larry[**P.S. The criteria for earning a spot on the GOP presidential primary debate stage is extremely tough this year. As we focus on reaching voters across CA-47, we’re checking in with supporters like you. = | July Fundraising Deadline Online Fundraising Goal: $25,000 Left to Raise: $9,500 Deadline: 7/31 @ 11:59 PM Supporter Record: dpwillis67@gmail.com Suggested Donation: $3 | **= CA-47 is shaping up to become one of the most closely-watched races in the country, by Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. This is a critical open seat, and it’s important we keep it blue. With everything from abortion rights, to protecting our environment, to advocating for our communities on the line, we refuse to let National Republicans walk all over our rights. We’re at a turning point in our campaign. With the summer months moving quickly, it won’t be long until we turn our focus to our on-the-ground organizing efforts. That’s why we need your help now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Joanna Weiss HQ | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS Joanna Weiss for Congress 1787 Tribute Road, Suite K Sacramento, CA 95815 United States

body:

If your browser is set to 'strict mode' you may need to allow Caucusroom.com to load content._**
## **Happy Tuesday! There is just one problem with[ _Biden's plans to mess with our water heaters_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-y/).**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-t/) **Harassing Law-Abiding Gun Owners** St Louis and D.C. show [**gun control isn't about public safety**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-i/) **Biden State Dept in the Hot Seat** The**[millions of dollars Biden's State Department has put toward "pet projects"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-d/) **is coming under a microscope as delays plague areas of the department. **Will Trump Attend?** Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, Vivek Ramaswamy, Chris Christie, and Tim Scott**[have all met the Republican National Committee's polling and fundraising thresholds](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-h/) **to earn invitations to the first primary debate next month. Poll: **[Do you think Trump will attend](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-k/)?** **IRS Changes Course** The IRS announced**[it will "end most" unannounced visits by agency revenue officers to taxpayers' homes](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-u/) **as part of an effort to address "public confusion and enhance overall safety measures for taxpayers and employees."

**Kamala's Fairy Tales** A **[CNN political commentator called Kamala](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-o/)** out for making stuff up after reading misinformation on Twitter (now called **[X](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-x/)**). **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* How to **[dress your kids](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-c/)**.

* **[Trolls](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-afukkd-trhiujldw-f/), **for the win**!**

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f853b09c7314af8a28d2e1a1bdbecfb&_e=PjZSHc0GwDTcYPJ_F0x4DXqGqKtoSjKp4iTy43UcupkES5V7aF2Ke-iFQial_HeqgK96JReO8Ut9D4K5TxX8t3Q72BMu4nmNgtYCax_YV85Lkb455PcY4wS1aE9id51G29ZRP_mLDwCDQSmGqkkPU20lCtqHp-zVNXrRtuzTGwURmeLKv-jg5-_s5roEscjzEsnwVQH-BdkmgjCUffHiNyjGoCzsGXevJeIrMsOBhvZoIOy-fflo5qxTYi3ZeAAzviRb37Rgm4oBN_VUzVi_Uw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f853b09c7314af8a28d2e1a1bdbecfb&_e=PjZSHc0GwDTcYPJ_F0x4DXqGqKtoSjKp4iTy43UcupkES5V7aF2Ke-iFQial_HeqgK96JReO8Ut9D4K5TxX8t3Q72BMu4nmNgtYCax_YV85Lkb455PcY4wS1aE9id51GBCJgP4GerAmWBpM63imcP7TxsvPI02YKPQ4gZoTw-R1RUKfFd-MmQmU_p1aBe25BOlrS02B-lKEvXmsi7lgM8IrqqoDJ_fOTRBLkcAvf93G-MW4BcFXCiKWUfxPRlLtWSX2a8X38iiuJDn-QrahFUA%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f853b09c7314af8a28d2e1a1bdbecfb&_e=PjZSHc0GwDTcYPJ_F0x4DXqGqKtoSjKp4iTy43UcupkES5V7aF2Ke-iFQial_HeqgK96JReO8Ut9D4K5TxX8t3Q72BMu4nmNgtYCax_YV85Lkb455PcY4wS1aE9id51Gw3_oMgAytKlbseeqAEfTZp21ozWrBErcN6rQ8bwPc5f78vqqBEbZEQO_VPp8uDhoOsVt33994appoFugeq0k8om_c5WLvl-8OXWBCatwe_4jdgn2hi5PprHB9uoE0042gJUzFZBN36ftowDA_tUXKA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
We are just a few weeks away from a special election in the Pennsylvania House that will determine whether we maintain our Democratic majority. | | |
---
| | We are _just a few weeks away_ from a special election in the Pennsylvania House that will determine whether we maintain our Democratic majority. **Before Election Day, here’s what you need to know:** ❌ **If we LOSE:** Republicans will seize control, pushing their extreme agenda through the legislature. Our hard-won majority will vanish, and abortion, LGBTQ+ rights, and our democracy could be under severe threat. ✅**If we WIN:** We can continue to keep our momentum strong in key states like yours, setting the stage for the 2024 presidential elections. [We’re asking you to step up for the first time this year. body:
Outside groups are spending big to defeat Andy. We wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter.

The race for Kentucky governor will be the most competitive in the entire country this year. Outside groups have already spent over **$2 MILLION** to run TV ads attacking Andy, and we know their spending will only ramp up in these final months.

**[That's why we need your help, Peter. Will you chip in now to help ensure Andy has the resources to compete with the outside groups spending millions to buy this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67030741/418416722/950424521?refcode=em23_230725_ads2_fnd_gq_act___abft_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230725_ads2_fnd_gq_act___abft_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f628326c-322b-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjI4MzI2Yy0zMjJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T9NJngPkBfVeMTZK-G6qhyyRusAthDYPcMFJrnpUqhA=)**

Through grassroots activism, voter engagement, and legislative advocacy, Freedom Virginia is pushing our elected officials and candidates to take action to build a better, more economically secure Virginia.

| Peter,

When I started my political action committee, Better Way, the goal was to do everything we could to fight for a Virginia future that works for ALL Virginians. One of the ways we do that is by working with and supporting other like-minded candidates and organizations. Today I’m reaching out asking for you to split a donation between Better Way and Freedom Virginia, and here’s why.

Through grassroots activism, voter engagement, and legislative advocacy, Freedom Virginia is pushing our elected officials and candidates to take action to build a better, more economically secure Virginia. Freedom Virginia wants to make our commonwealth a place where hardworking families can thrive with an economy that works for them, not just big corporations and the rich.

At the end of the day, people that live here need to be able to AFFORD to live here. This matters when it comes to housing, jobs, education, healthcare, equity and much more. This is what fighting for progress looks like, and I’m really hoping you’ll join us.

name: Zak Malamed
subject: George Santos is exactly what Republicans signed up for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
With someone like Santos representing my home district, I knew I had to do something.
#
George Santos is not an anomaly.
He is a con-man, a serial liar, a fraud, and a federally indicted criminal — in other words, **he is exactly what the Republican Party signed up for** when they embraced Donald Trump and the MAGA movement.
[**I am running to defeat George Santos and bring real Democratic leadership back to NY-03, but I need your help to do it. Republicans will spend big to defend this seat, so can I count on you to pitch in $5 today to help fight back?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230725?refcode=em20230725&amount=5&refcode2=341_8507_LN41Qm&akid=341%2E8507%2ELN41Qm)
**[Donate $5 now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230725?amount=5&refcode=em20230725&refcode2=341_8507_LN41Qm&akid=341%2E8507%2ELN41Qm)**
Back in 2019, I knew that MAGA Madness and the candidates who were promoting it were a threat that needed to be taken on directly. That is why I launched The Next 50, an organization supporting a new generation of leaders in the Democratic Party who were taking on extreme MAGA candidates across the country — candidates like George Santos.
Santos and his MAGA friends are not just an embarrassment to our district, **they are a threat to one of our most basic values** : that our leaders should conduct themselves honestly and with integrity, acting always in the public’s interest rather than their own.
With someone like Santos representing my home district, I knew I had to do something. So, I jumped in the race — and together, we are off to a strong start.
**But Election Day 2024 will be here before we know it****.** We need to keep building our movement so that we can fight back against all the money Republicans will be pouring into this district to try to hold on to this seat (and their House majority).
[**That is why I’m asking you to donate $5 — or any amount you can — to my campaign today. clean_body: With someone like Santos representing my home district, I knew I had to do something. George Santos is not an anomaly. He is a con-man, a serial liar, a fraud, and a federally indicted criminal — in other words, he is exactly what the Republican Party signed up for when they embraced Donald Trump and the MAGA movement. Back in 2019, I knew that MAGA Madness and the candidates who were promoting it were a threat that needed to be taken on directly. That is why I launched The Next 50, an organization supporting a new generation of leaders in the Democratic Party who were taking on extreme MAGA candidates across the country — candidates like George Santos. Santos and his MAGA friends are not just an embarrassment to our district, they are a threat to one of our most basic values : that our leaders should conduct themselves honestly and with integrity, acting always in the public’s interest rather than their own. With someone like Santos representing my home district, I knew I had to do something. So, I jumped in the race — and together, we are off to a strong start. But Election Day 2024 will be here before we know it. We need to keep building our movement so that we can fight back against all the money Republicans will be pouring into this district to try to hold on to this seat (and their House majority). Thank you, Zak Malamed

_Francis Chung/Politico/AP_

**Greg has spent all day on the U.S. Capitol steps on a thirst strike, not drinking any water or taking any breaks from the 90+ degree weather in Washington, D.C._Why?_**

Because as a historic heat wave currently sweeps the nation, U.S. workers don’t have any federal protections for heat safety. On top of that, Texas Governor Greg Abbott recently signed legislation eliminating workers’ rights to basic protections like water breaks.

**In solidarity with workers in Texas and across the nation, Greg has refused water and stayed outside on the Capitol steps ALL DAY to push for federal heat safety protections.

With the thirst strike coming to an end in just a few hours, I’m keeping Greg updated on the grassroots support he has for this bold action on behalf of workers. **Can you chip in to help show you have Greg’s back?

clean_body: In solidarity with workers, Greg is on a thirst strike today. UPDATE: Greg has gone 7 hours without water, Peter. = Francis Chung/Politico/AP Greg has spent all day on the U.S. Capitol steps on a thirst strike, not drinking any water or taking any breaks from the 90+ degree weather in Washington, D.C.Why? Because as a historic heat wave currently sweeps the nation, U.S. workers don’t have any federal protections for heat safety. On top of that, Texas Governor Greg Abbott recently signed legislation eliminating workers’ rights to basic protections like water breaks. In solidarity with workers in Texas and across the nation, Greg has refused water and stayed outside on the Capitol steps ALL DAY to push for federal heat safety protections. With the thirst strike coming to an end in just a few hours, I’m keeping Greg updated on the grassroots support he has for this bold action on behalf of workers. Can you chip in to help show you have Greg’s back? = **= Thank you for having workers' backs, -Tara Tara Pohlmeyer Communications Director Greg Casar for Congress ****=** | ****** ---|---

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=354%2E552475%2Ecw6qSi)
**URGENT NEWS:**
A mega-millionaire hedge fund executive in Pennsylvania who sold out PA workers to enrich himself and his Wall Street friends is **“the key to the GOP's 2024 senate plan.”** [HuffPost] [**We need to respond and fight back NOW. Will you rush a donation to defend PA’s Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230725-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230725-1&refcode2=354_552475_cw6qSi&akid=354%2E552475%2Ecw6qSi) **[Rush a Donation ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230725-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230725-1&refcode2=354_552475_cw6qSi&akid=354%2E552475%2Ecw6qSi)**
---
Peter,
HuffPost confirmed that top Republicans are “aggressively recruiting” a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — which could decide control of the Senate.
**This would-be GOP opponent could easily self-fund his campaign and outspend us.** Not only that, Mitch McConnell named PA as one of his top targets for 2024 — so we’ll be up against immense super PAC and national Republican establishment support.

clean_body: | = Peter, It’s official: Eric’s GOP opponent is self-funding his campaign. We suspected this might be the case, but now we have the receipts: a new FEC filing shows our opponent has loaned himself over $40,000. = | = This news is concerning because there is no legal limit on the amount our opponent can loan himself. Remember: we already know national GOP groups will funnel huge amounts of dark money into attack ads against Eric. Now, we have to contend with our opponent’s deep pockets. His loan to the campaign is twice as much as what he collected from donors – showing an absolute lack of grassroots support! name: Deya at United We Dream Action
subject: Preparing for another anti-DACA decision
body:
Ever since we first won DACA 11 years ago, we’ve had to fight to defend it. | | | Peter — Ever since we first won DACA 11 years ago, we’ve had to fight to defend it — one court case after another. This year is no different: with anti-immigrant Judge Hanen preparing to rule on the future of DACA. So in preparation for yet another anti-DACA decision, our team is looking out for immigrant communities by: ✊ Planning community gatherings so our members can come together in a moment's notice around the country after the decision is announced 📲 Holding a mass community call to share the facts and cut through alarmist headlines and misinformation about DACA 📋 Assembling informational resources so that DACA recipients and undocumented people know their rights and how the decision impacts them Through it all, we have not forgotten that DACA was never meant to be more than a temporary solution. The truth is, **DACA was never enough ❌ — and we need permanent protections now! ✅** UWDA is leading the charge to secure an inclusive, expansive pathway to citizenship by taking our demands to elected officials in Congress and the Biden administration. But we need even more grassroots support by our side to realize our goals for citizenship. **That’s where you come in: Will you add a donation before Judge Hanen’s decision to help UWDA support DACA recipients and secure a pathway to citizenship for all undocumented people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8woUN_Ab65s2rQh9LDLPy4yw2kbh0G90EmZCal6ZYZjm0hxZnleIQt6eK2e-iNA0iwvyBxEoGiwYRZhamBzkO3EUGv-hR5VVUtmRfx8a6nlxNRTayxER4UrIwVVuEC22N54nQA7ZX5bwfn5mwzk5LwF2VrTnrnOToYKORYoP9RBO2m9HUoAYvns09Zk-s0ORnXzus8ia33z763RKrbiz0-Phd2drQtciE_oXaNboJTkmOR8-8o4i0c1a9_40GYuOqMft0kmVV2FmqgxC5hvqlYngLIuOCmA5CEov8o9aFVP3i2Ka-IzHmPtr6uyqB3-zOf1-c8qXHuaJs0tR7W2qZAarBVzfFSkUJOtGpvVYgbgbxfA4ovbohGqU87pc3KHI56FVcJ5qcXG6BSNqpecvqPw/3y6/ebg27zuQQTuyKU34FRpUXw/h0/dtEfE4f3xD9MeBaqNoRpGEpdL5beI9cnXTw43DTGx_8)

body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=376811ed31504e9a972f1e312c9484bf&_e=T94Tkr4KYKd6cXGzJyvEM0khV0_Kke0FYpYPnE1tozNgYqUqvmtWhgkuBd-7bOejw8F4vgHU68lBs-Ft_7-sxzP2ZJF-D8lefHbMpWnKDtzIIZ0agxtABehhMSTy6KfzII1LYHzrFDBD6L-B7uuwrACpj5kHESNfufUn6uXNM87D654TbZ2pTXB7-_MX7vnw1c_igQ_9ppYK1mOiy3gwgmdFG6lU9B1jS9uIZA-ka5nLbg3vnukiRRmagCHRWblz-b-YgAPjs5uS1m4v7ZKTk9NTk3_HX9pPwQytRhV1NiJZp4Aze44V5o5yU9zg0n_xBzUCr6-vQQUoqOZAue9gofJ9damVn7xeIROBXswWXlYnKBSwu17-jLVQV7zcFLby)

| | Peter, It’s April Cao.

When my husband Hung decided to run for the U.S. Senate, it wasn’t a solo decision. It was something we prayed about as a family, because we knew whatever came our way, we’d have to work as a team.

Now, I’m so excited for what’s to come in the next year, and I’m so excited to be working with patriots like you to send my husband to the U.S. Senate.

But if we’re going to win, we have to get down to business.

We’ve set an ambitious **$10K Donor Drive Goal** for **midnight tonight** , and right now, we’re about halfway there.

[**Please, will you pitch in now to send this American hero to the U.S. Senate and help us meet our goal?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=376811ed31504e9a972f1e312c9484bf&_e=T94Tkr4KYKd6cXGzJyvEM0khV0_Kke0FYpYPnE1tozNgYqUqvmtWhgkuBd-7bOejw8F4vgHU68lBs-Ft_7-sxzP2ZJF-D8lefHbMpWnKDtzIIZ0agxtABehhMSTy6KfzII1LYHzrFDBD6L-B7uuwrACpj5kHESNfufUn6uXNM87D654TbZ2pTXB7-_MX7vnw1c_igQ_9ppYK1mOiy3gwgmdFG6lU9B1jS9uIZA-ka5mqiQ6pLNc76pRwrvxuCVEx_JQWcgVLWG6xy-l-LbI_epSAm1xoLIC2QrF_OithkiSHc4LP68alRR7wmX2F0UPRjgVEfDpMbubZhxPnvNVOXC2Yuj1Bc34EE7EyQjb30i8sOkQMVS1SfAumDCtUxMER)

Hung shows up in every aspect of his life, whether it’s for me, our children, or this campaign.

I married him because I knew he was kind, hardworking, loyal, and shared the same values that I do.

Standing by him at every phase in his life, from his 25-year Naval career to the campaign, has been an honor.

Now, I hope that you’ll stand with us, but time is running out to meet this critical goal.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, It’s April Cao. When my husband Hung decided to run for the U.S. Senate, it wasn’t a solo decision. It was something we prayed about as a family, because we knew whatever came our way, we’d have to work as a team. Now, I’m so excited for what’s to come in the next year, and I’m so excited to be working with patriots like you to send my husband to the U.S. Senate. But if we’re going to win, we have to get down to business. We’ve set an ambitious $10K Donor Drive Goal for midnight tonight , and right now, we’re about halfway there. Hung shows up in every aspect of his life, whether it’s for me, our children, or this campaign. I married him because I knew he was kind, hardworking, loyal, and shared the same values that I do. Standing by him at every phase in his life, from his 25-year Naval career to the campaign, has been an honor. name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: FWD: One year ago
body:
Derek, I wanted to make sure you caught my last message on reproductive rights.
---
For over a year, women haven’t had the choice to decide what happens to their bodies. Since then, I’ve worked with my colleagues in Congress to:
* Pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify the right to an abortion
* Help ensure women in the military can access reproductive care without having to travel out of state
* Reintroduce legislation to fund the UNFPA, which would invest in health and education services for women and girls worldwide

In addition to these initiatives, I’m continuing to hold Republicans accountable as they fight for policies that a majority of Americans oppose. **I’m committed to doing this difficult work, but I need to know you stand with me:**
_[**Derek, can you chip in $5 to power my fight for reproductive rights? Republicans are working every day to chip away at our autonomy, and it’s so critical we stand against them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67031565/418418185/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk852-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlhNzE3Zi0zNDJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDN701sv5-HEJNm29UF_D3cSJbJ1qWvYeJ1kFenfH9s=)_
Supporters like you empower me to do this difficult work, and I’m so grateful for your continued support.
–Chrissy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Chrissy Houlahan**
Date: Tue, Jul 25, 2023
Subject: One year ago
| | |
---
Derek, it’s been just over a year since Dobbs.

Like so many of us, I was devastated and furious on that horrible day, when decades of work by far-right activists resulted in the shocking reversal of our right as women to make decisions about our own health.
In the year since, we’ve seen Republican legislatures across the country curtail abortion access, and we’re seeing the same thing in Congress (more on that in an upcoming email). I believe this setback is temporary. **We can restore women’s reproductive health by doing what our opponents did – fighting tactically today and taking strategic actions in the years to come.**
In the short-term, we fight back at every step and hold Republicans accountable for pursuing policies that an overwhelming majority of Americans oppose. We call out Senator Tommy Tuberville and hold his colleagues accountable for his actions which risk – don’t just listen to me, listen to our nation’s military leaders – undermining our national security.
And we do the hard work of registering voters and improving our targeting so the right messages are reaching the right people. We restore Democratic majorities a few seats at a time – only five to retake the U.S. House! – and we outwork the other side so we’re better prepared for the next round of redistricting, which will be here before you know it.

Will you join me in this fight and in doing this hard but critical work?
_[**Derek, could you chip in $5 right now to continue powering this important work? With far-right Republicans working daily to strip us of our reproductive rights, it’s more important than ever.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67031566/418418187/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk852-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlhNzE3Zi0zNDJiLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDN701sv5-HEJNm29UF_D3cSJbJ1qWvYeJ1kFenfH9s=)_
I’m so grateful for the support of this team. There is work to be done.

– Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. name: CRITICAL ELECTION UPDATE
subject: Everything is about to change, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaRose for Senate
body:
CRITICAL update for you, Friend >> Today, Frank LaRose officially announced his candidacy for this MUST-WIN Senate seat. Will you join the team today & help send this Army Green Beret to the Senate?

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Frank LaRose.

You may have heard of me. But if not, let me tell you a little more:

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d240355005384a738a87fbd272e08fe0&_e=f5vD3YcRsAYcwxSy09v4nm24O9iMDDofex2b-3FEC0tHk4GQWzqbODcOuYbiVyYTKW7R6ASVqMjQsrQ6FIElwqWrRvuGT2z_74R_TA8tPyhnaCXQ3Gmktq8Ldn5mnANhPrwyGoz_iuxoOX5oKYimwJHa_4I8m5LKWD82j5lYbnJEsHgNVe-YEpWb9qWUKybJ_YjA2BaW6bVYGLXw88fD9iJRBDi2uDtbhHhVAK5Iw7mFuUI0gZ5n04R1HsEq_NQZMNYYPZiDgNM96ZhN-Dyh_mpYZiUF7bqvpnaLZoodIKOqb5MHGiDtWWhVNlnBBM8yZqyWhMu8pwegN5eYD-6MIM30P-wffXMcU5rcqbsq7PKqpGL-bf8djpwn7ngJrl5uKlPrio-vq-mcmypp-14ko2tSZDORMSZpHPmEfsfiNoCjF1LO9xKO1yAMtD52xIMabMFoFQnX0HsgNQRlJNSN1w%3D%3D)
---

I grew up working on a small, family-owned farm in Northeast Ohio.

After high school, I decided to serve my country by joining the Army. At the age of 20, I became the youngest ever Sergeant in the 101st Airborne. I completed Special Forces training & was eventually awarded the Green Beret.

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d240355005384a738a87fbd272e08fe0&_e=f5vD3YcRsAYcwxSy09v4nm24O9iMDDofex2b-3FEC0tHk4GQWzqbODcOuYbiVyYTKW7R6ASVqMjQsrQ6FIElwqWrRvuGT2z_74R_TA8tPyhnaCXQ3Gmktq8Ldn5mnANhPrwyGoz_iuxoOX5oKYimwJHa_4I8m5LKWD82j5lYbnJEsHgNVe-YEpWb9qWUKybJ_YjA2BaW6bVYGLXw88fD9iJRBDi2uDtbhHhVAK5Iw7mFuUI0gZ5n04R1HsEq_NQZMNYYPZiDgNM96ZhN-Dyh_mpYZiUF7bqvpnaLZoodIKOqb5MHGiDtWWhVNlnBBM8yQEPSrKYikjrA6KTYHb4h38OKWd42vRvVFFBy_DYOTHajUGv6fYs9KwIE4gYqToO44M0gyKRVPBB4TwL6DNbSuh3e2gLTJGePZxxVva2gv8rHXfEGU8D7x91A7XtJ_TEY7eeQwCutYgDR1mpggUYnYw%3D%3D)
---

During my decade in uniform around the globe in places like Iraq & Kosovo, I saw first-hand the horrific lengths that corrupt regimes would go to in order to hold onto power.

When I finished my deployment, I promised myself that I'd never allow our country to sink to that level of corruption.

_**So when I see the DC "elite" use the overwhelming power of the state to silence conservatives & imprison their political opponents, it makes me sick to my stomach.**_

**That 's why today I'm announcing my candidacy for the most important Senate race in the country.**

I'm not a career politician or DC swamp creature. I'm a husband, father, Christian, & strong conservative who's tired of the lies & corruption.

I'm reaching out because I'm running against a Far-Left Liberal Senator who votes with Biden 98% of the time & has Hollywood donors lining his pockets with millions to crush me - he raised $3.4 million in the last three months alone!

So if we're going to take back our country, it's going to be because of the support from Patriots like you.

**[I'm humbly asking, Friend, will you chip in just $9 today to help this Green Beret & strong conservative win?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d240355005384a738a87fbd272e08fe0&_e=f5vD3YcRsAYcwxSy09v4nm24O9iMDDofex2b-3FEC0tHk4GQWzqbODcOuYbiVyYTKW7R6ASVqMjQsrQ6FIElwqWrRvuGT2z_74R_TA8tPyhnaCXQ3Gmktq8Ldn5mnANhPrwyGoz_iuxoOX5oKYimwJHa_4I8m5LKWD82j5lYbnJEsHgNVe-YEpWb9qWUKybJ_YjA2BaW6bVYGLXw88fD9iJRBDi2uDtbhHhVAK5Iw7mFuUI0gZ5n04R1HsEq_NQZMNYYPZiDgNM96ZhN-Dyh_mpYZiUF7bqvpnaLZoodIKOc2qCTjUdUevaTFvg9JBVOcvkTIC-Ur5dKxKeHUXJ7P1QLtCD4cIcTrxbLZV5uLANc6c29hwIJjkBkaYCCD1Nnknw5tT0Lanx_ceQ9mJ_aLJ-hOB3WbrOQmZEQS5kxGcLqspLOno8TelaqonBo8lgdd1gzEXPc9CIwrEUyB70vNw9Ut9D_-5kanB_8SZt8-cE%3D "I’m humbly asking, Friend, will you chip in just $9 today to help this Green Beret & strong conservative win?")**

---
| | [CHIP IN TODAY](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d240355005384a738a87fbd272e08fe0&_e=f5vD3YcRsAYcwxSy09v4nm24O9iMDDofex2b-3FEC0tHk4GQWzqbODcOuYbiVyYTKW7R6ASVqMjQsrQ6FIElwqWrRvuGT2z_74R_TA8tPyhnaCXQ3Gmktq8Ldn5mnANhPrwyGoz_iuxoOX5oKYimwJHa_4I8m5LKWD82j5lYbnJEsHgNVe-YEpWb9qWUKybJ_YjA2BaW6bVYGLXw88fD9iJRBDi2uDtbhHhVAK5Iw7mFuUI0gZ5n04R1HsEq_NQZMNYYPZiDgNM96ZhN-Dyh_mpYZiUF7bqvpnaLZoodIKOqb5MHGiDtWWhVNlnBBM8yn_wqWiiLOSJsN5ConXxxyxGuzRN8pNJYCvIpxtA1nJG2bbZNpIee3WuHVfSPN9rpcd344KQkiTYCHD7Mm-_Eauh0i3raL0rthm5a98-ySrF-uxcUW0DiuhgPNvipOlaZOp7nA9EOHW_R2GmGqxebHw%3D%3D)
---

We can't take back our country without you.

Please, help me start my campaign strong & I promise I will make you proud.

Yours in service,
Frank LaRose

---

clean_body: CRITICAL update for you, Friend >> Today, Frank LaRose officially announced his candidacy for this MUST-WIN Senate seat. Will you join the team today & help send this Army Green Beret to the Senate? | | | | | Friend, this is Frank LaRose. You may have heard of me. But if not, let me tell you a little more: | I grew up working on a small, family-owned farm in Northeast Ohio. After high school, I decided to serve my country by joining the Army. At the age of 20, I became the youngest ever Sergeant in the 101st Airborne. I completed Special Forces training & was eventually awarded the Green Beret. | During my decade in uniform around the globe in places like Iraq & Kosovo, I saw first-hand the horrific lengths that corrupt regimes would go to in order to hold onto power. When I finished my deployment, I promised myself that I'd never allow our country to sink to that level of corruption. So when I see the DC "elite" use the overwhelming power of the state to silence conservatives & imprison their political opponents, it makes me sick to my stomach. That 's why today I'm announcing my candidacy for the most important Senate race in the country. I'm not a career politician or DC swamp creature. I'm a husband, father, Christian, & strong conservative who's tired of the lies & corruption. I'm reaching out because I'm running against a Far-Left Liberal Senator who votes with Biden 98% of the time & has Hollywood donors lining his pockets with millions to crush me - he raised $3.4 million in the last three months alone! So if we're going to take back our country, it's going to be because of the support from Patriots like you. "I’m humbly asking, Friend, will you chip in just $9 today to help this Green Beret & strong conservative win?" | | We can't take back our country without you. Please, help me start my campaign strong & I promise I will make you proud. Yours in service, Frank LaRose | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend >> BEFORE YOU GO! "Can you chip in a monthly recurring $5 donation and become a founding member of Frank’s campaign?" If we're going to take back the Senate from extreme liberal politicians like Sherrod Brown, it starts with WINNING THIS RACE. But in order to do that, we need a HUGE coalition of grassroots patriots like YOU to step up. Sherrod Brown has already raised over $8 MILLION in 2023, and we need to catch up FAST. So please, please, please: Can we count on you to step up today? | | | LaRose is a member of the U.S. Army Reserve. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by LaRose for Senate 228 S Washington St Ste 115 Alexandria, VA 22314 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

In the 22 midterm elections prior to 2022 (that's 1934 - 2018), the President's party lost an average of **28 House seats** and**four Senate seats**.

In 2022, Democrats lost **only 10 House seats** — and we **_gained_ a Senate seat**. That wouldn't have been possible if Democratic pro-choice women hadn't held their seats in some of the _toughest races of the cycle_.

We beat the odds last year, Peter, thanks in large part to the strength and support of this community. And that's a good thing, because the House and Senate are back on the line — **so we've got to do even better this cycle**. **Donate now to help elect the women who can take back the House and hold the Senate majority in 2024:**

clean_body: | | | We'll make this quick, Peter: We'll make this quick, Peter: In the 22 midterm elections prior to 2022 (that's 1934 - 2018), the President's party lost an average of 28 House seats andfour Senate seats. In 2022, Democrats lost only 10 House seats — and we gained a Senate seat. That wouldn't have been possible if Democratic pro-choice women hadn't held their seats in some of the toughest races of the cycle. We beat the odds last year, Peter, thanks in large part to the strength and support of this community. And that's a good thing, because the House and Senate are back on the line — so we've got to do even better this cycle. name: Dave Pinto
subject: Help us help Minnesota Families
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2023?refcode=072423 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2023?refcode=072423]
Friend,
Minnesota has been getting a lot of national attention for our progress this past legislative session. Last week I was excited to join in... at the White House! Several colleagues and I were invited there to share the important work we did for children and families - in particular, making early learning and child care more available to young kids, more affordable for families, and paying livable wages to those providing this critical service. Every child deserves a great start to life, and our state is finally making that a reality.
Our House DFL team fought hard for Minnesota families this year and we will continue to do so. I know how important these issues are to Minnesotans, but extreme MAGA Republicans have worked tirelessly to curb our efforts and we know that they’re going to work harder than ever to flip the Minnesota House and undo our good work. That’s why we need you, friend.
We need to be able to reach as many Minnesotans as possible in order to protect our House DFL Majority in 2024, but that takes money. Our grassroots donors play a big role in our program, and you can be a part of that. Here in Minnesota we have the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program which allows you to contribute $50 (or $100 per couple) to a participating campaign and have your donation refunded to you by the state. That’s right, you can support the House DFL and get your donation refunded! Can I count on you to make your refundable donation today and support the work we are doing to help Minnesota Families?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2023?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=072423]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2023?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=072423]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2023?express_lane_other=true&refcode=072423]
Thank you, friend. Support from Minnesotans like you is what keeps our whole team going. #EverybodyIn.
State Representative Dave Pinto
Treasurer, Minnesota House DFL
P.S. If you’ve already made your PCR contribution to another campaign, please ignore this message.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99254/images/Pinto%20at%20white%20house.jpeg]
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-july2023?refcode=072423]
Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session. DFL House Caucus

Saint Paul, MN 55105
