clean_body: [] Friend, Minnesota has been getting a lot of national attention for our progress this past legislative session. Last week I was excited to join in... at the White House! Several colleagues and I were invited there to share the important work we did for children and families - in particular, making early learning and child care more available to young kids, more affordable for families, and paying livable wages to those providing this critical service. Every child deserves a great start to life, and our state is finally making that a reality. Our House DFL team fought hard for Minnesota families this year and we will continue to do so. I know how important these issues are to Minnesotans, but extreme MAGA Republicans have worked tirelessly to curb our efforts and we know that they’re going to work harder than ever to flip the Minnesota House and undo our good work. That’s why we need you, friend. We need to be able to reach as many Minnesotans as possible in order to protect our House DFL Majority in 2024, but that takes money. Our grassroots donors play a big role in our program, and you can be a part of that. Here in Minnesota we have the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program which allows you to contribute $50 (or $100 per couple) to a participating campaign and have your donation refunded to you by the state. That’s right, you can support the House DFL and get your donation refunded! Can I count on you to make your refundable donation today and support the work we are doing to help Minnesota Families? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate $50 [] Donate $100 [] Or, another amount [] Thank you, friend. Support from Minnesotans like you is what keeps our whole team going. #EverybodyIn. State Representative Dave Pinto Treasurer, Minnesota House DFL P.S. If you’ve already made your PCR contribution to another campaign, please ignore this message. [] Contribute [] Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session. DFL House Caucus 255 Plato Blvd E Saint Paul, MN 55105 United States [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=66e5fd55101a40bba117e775d1e250f9&_e=eBmBpoLYUwDFgbHv3tFziQQuwkGkCsFZB025Kt6sPkVqsE-p760-W0d-LiiumkH8SRTAXKxK0QNtV6kk8iW3ZTA9iXRGOxZ8roBEoRjZb37ZHhSrP3LP84IvECR5L1iOGSaynSqEIYygg6TIAtsRZ1UjCuLgT9Y4bFiMJQqGNReNKfxOztB9UwtFkRpMb-uDygUetWmj3yyXIzb1J74LRpzfowr0X_nqn0KIDHi-HF4sKfDU_pWMnfD2k5jCdkA9-iBKFZf68EHjfD6y-wzL9A%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=66e5fd55101a40bba117e775d1e250f9&_e=eBmBpoLYUwDFgbHv3tFziQQuwkGkCsFZB025Kt6sPkVqsE-p760-W0d-LiiumkH8SRTAXKxK0QNtV6kk8iW3ZTA9iXRGOxZ8roBEoRjZb37ZHhSrP3LP84IvECR5L1iOMJqPufrFoulur7aJ_SEdb6OauHUnieyslqgZi-G8pIE4Qw2-6SuCo4PnRllv0LJqUAxnvr-6Db3kRSJQbApXy1tc3Zc5zV2_1Hm8-b_qG1XRoMjHu6uiNbiI_1etLOMZ_aUFv1szUNTKP-TALIdBNg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=66e5fd55101a40bba117e775d1e250f9&_e=eBmBpoLYUwDFgbHv3tFziQQuwkGkCsFZB025Kt6sPkVqsE-p760-W0d-LiiumkH8SRTAXKxK0QNtV6kk8iW3ZTA9iXRGOxZ8roBEoRjZb37ZHhSrP3LP84IvECR5L1iOblIgdLwWTxJNWKm0mLqG-r-yLQRa676nhXqmz5X6WqF14GUSzmVEkc1jHdqmaLuYdsV69WV1wg0q-FZ90OAM-m4MtHxXoETg0FBgFeumnkc3Jd8Bndw5a6xNBA4yk68Fhj1iKMEKbsInOpJr0_OTIw%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

name: Wisconsin Republicans
subject: “Bank Your Vote” and help us win in 2024!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Republicans newest winning campaign strategy starts in WI.
| [](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=0050315565b6402c9a2e5d28d3c27e76&_e=g6a555TXDLfxUSIFA8BGCLKdDmyETQsvmV6Fr_vajX7IaCqinmed1fHcNUFYbjgeyeN0DeSPeSkOMOlTEy523Y6mY7IhiqO354_JlGqPDfxQLCZs3bCp4jlIMjYGXvmLIulW2MDYUpT4RBvmSr4MrvsZkOaJ_Vl2UJNKKPVtr83-xfg0yxgbM51zX48hM_zqKldYnC_Spz2WWU9d3NcZjiYl3YwFO9VTOuRHxwXCg0Cbi4SqAPyTyycNB1t2hlSPt4Gni3SOuf-LY6H1Ge2UAjl5MIN1trzfrZMvke2fJdhynWQr38PpKCfi97EmyXjCF-NudmsTyz-hzFVm4eoWN22yMl9BuRrcawBhd-zE2Fk%3D)
---
Friend,
---
The fate of the White House and Senate in 2024 runs through Wisconsin as the top battleground state.
---
**That’s why we are the FIRST launch state for the RNC’s “Bank Your Vote” initiative which encourages voters to vote before Election Day.**
---
This winning game plan will ensure we bank as many votes as possible _BEFORE_ Election Day to beat the Democrats at their own game.
---

subject: My story.

body:
Please read.

|
---
[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=48d721bebf794779a1bbf8c6672f8f32&_e=uf5G20eb3zPXLKneH0W6RDDplC8y_Ll31ksZTufBfdUjlw0-X-ZG1YTWY5FbUYKt3ygyFrERZjw_Z5hjyT0TqNSAEj3HTOnHC-V4g1AD_S3HJBUYYWYolYk4qzqBfweqF0nGae7VgnzqeY4mnCZILpT7Jma5bgPE2RMU97SPv7YENSXPBJyBorT2Gibpj4zk5oNqtCAPSo_L70XVjAdPKV5NRIi5CnpfdZ3Hx-T7d5tyg7IQtRaHhBahxt3YlY8hNkrMnjxyCnzNadAdicEEckGOLm_vYpBzQ1kkBIJLnvcjDgDd--BfZ_Pg7SWDWvwJMUViYkhBdNW4118pnfgUHuv0gKjjZxWTTj33wKwcMpo%3D)

Friend,

I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what's never going to change.

**__My Upbringing__**
I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=48d721bebf794779a1bbf8c6672f8f32&_e=uf5G20eb3zPXLKneH0W6RDDplC8y_Ll31ksZTufBfdUjlw0-X-ZG1YTWY5FbUYKt3ygyFrERZjw_Z5hjyT0TqNSAEj3HTOnHC-V4g1AD_S3HJBUYYWYolYk4qzqBfweqF0nGae7VgnzqeY4mnCZILpT7Jma5bgPE2RMU97SPv7YENSXPBJyBorT2Gibpj4zk5oNqtCAPSo_L70XVjAdPKay8OcqV0VFkD49u1FgPnMGVV5xth1TwiGfXTZpY1uiEnSStoMijcHAPiZYWKyIfCnIGoA37OuivVRuUQd1kKJEOVu_znVNh64QtqehDtc2XMu215OBt0dNdIaVf8uv6K3f5gRbYq6INq9lKufQIW2U%3D)
After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe.

**__So, what 'd I do after college?__**
I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state's $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer's Cabinet.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=48d721bebf794779a1bbf8c6672f8f32&_e=uf5G20eb3zPXLKneH0W6RDDplC8y_Ll31ksZTufBfdUjlw0-X-ZG1YTWY5FbUYKt3ygyFrERZjw_Z5hjyT0TqNSAEj3HTOnHC-V4g1AD_S3HJBUYYWYolYk4qzqBfweqF0nGae7VgnzqeY4mnCZILpT7Jma5bgPE2RMU97SPv7YENSXPBJyBorT2Gibpj4zk5oNqtCAPSo_L70XVjAdPKaUFo722SNmSKhUI8D7SDAeFacr6p8vFSqKnHlvxxjGeeXFyEj-HlV7NR1x4U076spJabCAqkoK-hr9cxVsf8Hpa5T9loDeDOXlVx8fRP1bnkpUSm5jQCWWLN-aJ9ix55uoZ0j-Igtchds6xCAcPeR4%3D)
Then, I got my biggest call. **The call to help the people of Louisiana and America.**

**_Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana_**
I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=48d721bebf794779a1bbf8c6672f8f32&_e=uf5G20eb3zPXLKneH0W6RDDplC8y_Ll31ksZTufBfdUjlw0-X-ZG1YTWY5FbUYKt3ygyFrERZjw_Z5hjyT0TqNSAEj3HTOnHC-V4g1AD_S3HJBUYYWYolYk4qzqBfweqF0nGae7VgnzqeY4mnCZILpT7Jma5bgPE2RMU97SPv7YENSXPBJyBorT2Gibpj4zk5oNqtCAPSo_L70XVjAdPKT7pbvaQyL1yItZnpw60NHdMmGzd9voG3OWy33VMTGKy4ZxiGiWZRVv34-b40QWJJGSTKihL-g4jSZxE-FkS8uskVGUa46rW7FFnNYfE4HrL2Z5nVZXqI--DB1X9kN91of7RgMEWzL4TXr2_GBAl9p8%3D)
Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I'm always going to be **100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN****,** and **PRO-FREEDOM**. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama.

**I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. **

That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much.

**[So, now that I've given you my story in a nutshell, I'm going to humbly ask for your support. I need you to rush whatever you're able below to make sure I have the resources necessary to fight for you and defend our nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=48d721bebf794779a1bbf8c6672f8f32&_e=uf5G20eb3zPXLKneH0W6RDDplC8y_Ll31ksZTufBfdUjlw0-X-ZG1YTWY5FbUYKt3ygyFrERZjw_Z5hjyT0TqNSAEj3HTOnHC-V4g1AD_S3HJBUYYWYolYk4qzqBfweqF0nGae7VgnzqeY4mnCZILpT7Jma5bgPE2RMU97SPv7YENSXPBJyBorT2Gibpj4zk5oNqtCAPSo_L70XVjAdPKWFgI3gI0LQinFS842QNKbDEZjZa7wis1boUknFIwzMAd_xixdev-NC3JyA7QJAW959vC0LqqUDN3N7U83NHAp3aXK0MoIWnisJYFCvOQi5YBLQIBm7HR37v0KxFYk1WkRnFF_I-5edZm55FT_oEuXo%3D)** | [**DONATE $500**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=48d721bebf794779a1bbf8c6672f8f32&_e=uf5G20eb3zPXLKneH0W6RDDplC8y_Ll31ksZTufBfdUjlw0-X-ZG1YTWY5FbUYKt3ygyFrERZjw_Z5hjyT0TqNSAEj3HTOnHC-V4g1AD_S3HJBUYYWYolYk4qzqBfweqF0nGae7VgnzqeY4mnCZILpT7Jma5bgPE2RMU97SPv7YENSXPBJyBorT2Gibpj4zkUyDyHyxqqz7gvX9tG7dEZDV3004TSZsuPbwMdp3813f082K0mitlG6vGqfunIvxXlV27cAuybS2xg7549luPO8Lrhoip9xMLl1M0MrNgtIuQ-tZ37XlNsLGdwLehvrG1DZT7vZyG8qwhph3zVXguu4wid2V73guq123BT0cZ9zo%3D)

clean_body: Please read. | Friend, I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what's never going to change. My Upbringing I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything. After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe. So, what 'd I do after college? I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state's $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer's Cabinet. Then, I got my biggest call. The call to help the people of Louisiana and America. Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee. Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I'm always going to be 100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN, and PRO-FREEDOM. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama. I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much. | God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail,

subject: Add your name to thank President Biden!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters »
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50196?t=6&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50196?t=7&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50196?t=8&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50196?t=9&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50196?t=10&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9418%2E878179%2E7Yawu7)

name: Team Pramila
subject: Healthcare is a human right for all, NOT a privilege
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We all know the problem. The United States’ healthcare system is the worst of any advanced economy in the world.
#
Peter,
We all know the problem. The United States' healthcare system is the worst of any advanced economy in the world. Nearly 30 million Americans are uninsured. Those who are insured face skyrocketing premiums, deductibles, and out-of-pocket costs. Millions cannot afford their prescriptions. **It's a cruel system and we must take action.**
**We all know how to fix it. The United States can and must join every other major country on earth in guaranteeing health care as a right. Every person should be able to go to the doctor if they are sick. Every person should be able to go to the hospital without going bankrupt after.**
**We all know we need Medicare for All.**[**If you stand with Pramila and our movement to elect candidates who support universal health care for everyone no matter their race, ethnicity, zip code, or ability to pay, please add your name and amplify our petition today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon/?source=em20230725-2735&t=1&akid=2735%2E420207%2EMsaJJO)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon/?source=em20230725-2735&t=2&akid=2735%2E420207%2EMsaJJO)**
Americans shouldn't have to worry about taking on mountains of medical debt just because they got sick — and with The Medicare for All Act of 2023, no one would be put in this position ever again.
**By passing the Medicare for All Act of 2023, we will ensure that:**
* Everyone will have health care coverage, including dental, vision, hearing, and long term care.
* Expensive premiums, deductibles, co-pays, and other out of pocket costs will be eliminated completely.
* Roughly 95% of all U.S. households would save money on health care costs.
* The U.S. would save over $450 billion on health expenses annually.

[**Please add your name today and join our fight to finally put an end to corporate greed in our healthcare system and cement universal health care in our democracy for generations to come.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon/?source=em20230725-2735&t=3&akid=2735%2E420207%2EMsaJJO)
Thank you,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230725-2735-footer&t=4&refcode2=2735_420207_MsaJJO&akid=2735%2E420207%2EMsaJJO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2735%2E420207%2EMsaJJO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2735%2E420207%2EMsaJJO)

body:

Throughout history, authoritarians have never risen to power alone. They have always had enablers who help them carry out their agenda of abusing citizens.

There are patriotic individuals within the FBI, DHS, and Michigan AG's office who have been compartmentalized while corrupt individuals carry out their oppressive plans. It is crucial that these patriotic members of our government agencies speak out against these actions.

Whistleblowers are the heroes that make it possible to expose authoritarians, such as AG Nessel, to the general public. Only a small number of people in Michigan fully understand the fight for our freedom. However, the Michigan Republican Party, under new leadership, is working to restore our party to its constitutional principles and is committed to winning this battle. We need your help to achieve this goal.

Whistleblowers must be encouraged to come forward and expose any aspiring tyrants within our government. They should not be afraid to step out of the shadows.

The public needs to know the truth so that our children and grandchildren can inherit the blessings of freedom.

Email us: [whistleblower@migop.org](mailto:whistleblower@migop.org)

body:

Fellow conservative, – I’d like you to meet Ohio’s future conservative Senator: **Bernie Moreno.**

Bernie is living proof of the American Dream. He immigrated to America with his family from Colombia at age five, without knowing a lick of English. At age ten, he learned the value of hard work when he became a newspaper delivery boy. At age eighteen, he legally became an American citizen and went on to build a business worth more than $100 million.

But now, in Democrat-run America, the American dream is under attack and **Bernie is on a mission to save it.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cfb37e8f38543ed908aac07aebd4db3&_e=eN1YlX2tS54DEHRAW4rcGfx78SwaE4DEMZ-HTCO_DCGzqgaF1mUbqfirXwPi4qE_d0k6jyEnRG1ViRcnyNd3yaey-H5i1wVZlnT4uA4Mfg_-UCkM_nXptvUuP5PcrS4ar3pkxIu4g3dlXGMalgnH8TwP--08jL2jHiyNS6vc2vJy3O12SZfqy7sFDyvh34iqlzIlaQWIOt_pKmmBizNf6XFcbqX5zANMaH1rLlj7d3KPEjzoAeWCxwqQ3jBEnAVH5tLgvBtBQMeHPJuV6UzgkiMI2tq_MjfvHaajimyyEegeWH-pdkXki9GRCxIQ84uMIcnAohnICxbcEwAo_-uKdI5xjm_g2ZJePndojr3u1zu6xcF6dF5DBc4tN_iPYhAHw-CfqoKcwbsJrUR-l9IMtw%3D%3D) [ ** SEND BERNIE MORENO TO THE SENATE ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cfb37e8f38543ed908aac07aebd4db3&_e=eN1YlX2tS54DEHRAW4rcGfx78SwaE4DEMZ-HTCO_DCGzqgaF1mUbqfirXwPi4qE_d0k6jyEnRG1ViRcnyNd3yaey-H5i1wVZlnT4uA4Mfg_-UCkM_nXptvUuP5PcrS4ar3pkxIu4g3dlXGMalgnH8TwP--08jL2jHiyNS6vc2vJy3O12SZfqy7sFDyvh34iqlzIlaQWIOt_pKmmBizNf6XFcbqX5zANMaH1rLlj7d3KPEjzoAeWCxwqQ3jBEnAVH1s-7RD4obWS7Gj6CHRVPXKoz2bRW--9jsi5e0OOuA3rIzUCV4cGz_vWeyDWd91kBMfwmnQp2dv6OW9FdSp84xYs4QmMpf9iy9xqv9UloGGLtPHDH6ATw6pBR2PZ9QN6UK1qQuh5isgea1nSlGrBh_Q%3D%3D)
The last thing Washington needs is another failed, career-politician who is easily swayed by the insider, elitists in DC. _There’s already one of those in the White House._

**Bernie is a father, husband, businessman, outsider, conservative, and most of all a proud American._He’s not a politician._**

[**The Senate is in desperate need of someone like Bernie Moreno**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cfb37e8f38543ed908aac07aebd4db3&_e=eN1YlX2tS54DEHRAW4rcGfx78SwaE4DEMZ-HTCO_DCGzqgaF1mUbqfirXwPi4qE_d0k6jyEnRG1ViRcnyNd3yaey-H5i1wVZlnT4uA4Mfg_-UCkM_nXptvUuP5PcrS4ar3pkxIu4g3dlXGMalgnH8TwP--08jL2jHiyNS6vc2vJy3O12SZfqy7sFDyvh34iqlzIlaQWIOt_pKmmBizNf6XFcbqX5zANMaH1rLlj7d3KPEjzoAeWCxwqQ3jBEnAVHlAiCM5zXUdcaI1Hi2KidbKo5il0HTPJwVA40E5VC55MLXvSu7u09jeWIn44m6u2cXDl_yUItoQ_L4PC-QpiS4gHKp4IRzdTMK3mhIoHifpdDh843iOaKuoWZM68GLxqgVCm-aP2KKaE9noxWZUS4Zg%3D%3D) – a political outsider who has faced adversity and experienced the grit of building something from the ground up.

[ ** SUPPORT BERNIE ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9cfb37e8f38543ed908aac07aebd4db3&_e=eN1YlX2tS54DEHRAW4rcGfx78SwaE4DEMZ-HTCO_DCGzqgaF1mUbqfirXwPi4qE_d0k6jyEnRG1ViRcnyNd3yaey-H5i1wVZlnT4uA4Mfg_-UCkM_nXptvUuP5PcrS4ar3pkxIu4g3dlXGMalgnH8TwP--08jL2jHiyNS6vc2vJy3O12SZfqy7sFDyvh34iqlzIlaQWIOt_pKmmBizNf6XFcbqX5zANMaH1rLlj7d3KPEjzoAeWCxwqQ3jBEnAVHrSWwnVejnzw-PQPQ7R8hb01iQHkghKVYecc5OaV_oxXin2j8YwFJrISvyi5jQOVmcdtZlPt_4fA4g8xi9I-JTI7jWMQzxGaU4iZFlS3j9Xmm-T89mCaYCCQw9G6_EUzbZ305BZoCqVvu98lZpMPPXg%3D%3D)
Winning this race is critical to putting an end to the Democrat's razor-thin majority in the Senate. I’m confident that as Ohio’s next conservative Senator, he will be on the front lines fighting against the radical Left’s woke agenda.

In service,

Rep. Lee Zeldin

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

A BETTER HOME FOR ALL! TICKETS ARE FREE!HIT THE BUTTON BELOW AND YOU WILL RECIEVE THE LOCATION AFTER YOU RSVP! IF YOU HAVE ISSUES OR QUESTIONS CONTACT TEAM DOM JONES AT:CONTACT@DOMJONES.ORG | | | | | | | | | Hit the images below and get to know Dom Jones and how you can stay informed, support Dom, volunteer, and donate so that our team can create amazing signs, shirts, and SWAG for you to sport as you support the only ethical, and rightful nominee for California's 47th Congressional District in Orange County, CA! Dom has lived in our district for years and deserves for us all to lift her up and stand for us in her fight for justice. name: Will Hurd
subject: 85 Million Jobs
body:
The 3 things that need more attention.
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _Welcome to The Brief!: Common sense takes on current events, national security, and technology and the latest campaign info. It’s designed to make you smarter in less than 5 minutes! If you were forwarded this message, you can get_[ _The Brief here_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmdGabNMJjpJXgTcmHf9Lo/rdFxXMgtSWLv) _._
---
| Dear Friends,
Thanks for all the support as we enter the second month of the campaign. One of the campaign stops I made last week was at Dartmouth College in Hanover, New Hampshire where I unveiled a plan on how to harness Artificial Intelligence.
Other campaigns had a rough week. For instance, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is seeing his numbers plummet. One reason, his failure to understand slavery.
Inhumanity at the border was in the news. As long as Joe Biden is President, border security will stay in the news because he is so bad at it. However, we need to be outraged by all the inhumane actions happening at our border.
Here are 3 perspectives that haven’t gotten proper attention since we last talked.
---
| | [](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmdivJZmi5vEhwXSA6dt3s/6OSIWRM-AwSN)
---
---
| | | | |
### 1\. A TUTOR IN YOUR POCKET
---

| [ ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmeBG1mD6S19sCbHXvcclw/CMnA4WtkWvLn)
---
| **Big Picture:** Eighty-five million jobs worldwide could be threatened by AI. **Why This Matters:** Like any tool, it can be used for good or evil. **Solutions:** AI can create millions of new jobs rather than unemployment, and we have income inequality because we have education inequality. Here's one way to solve this problem:
* A national program that gives every student an AI tutor.

**Bottom-line:** Imagine every child or worker, who needs one, gets to have a tutor in their pocket whether he or she is learning coding, farming or plumbing.
* Instead of getting rid of the Department of Education, why not have it work for our future. Watch clips from my speech at Dartmouth to learn more about [how we take advantage of technology before it takes advantage of us.](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmedajydUo752Sf6vkbMU0/Yttrwb5qie0o)

---

| | | | |
### 2\. SLAVERY WASN’T A JOBS PROGRAM
---

|
---
| **Big Picture:** The Florida Department of Education (DOE) provided an [update to its standards for teaching African-American studies ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmf5vSB3tAD0CiiwJZa6C4/zIDoh6k1LDnO)that was met with resistance because of how they planned to teach about slavery.
**The State of Play:** Florida issued a benchmark clarification explaining that when it came to slavery, Florida would have "Instruction including how slaves developed skills which, in some instances, could be applied for their personal benefit."

* In response to press inquiries about this matter, the Florida DOE doubled down: "The intent of this particular benchmark clarification is to show that some slaves developed highly specialized trades from which they benefited."

**Go Deeper:** Both of these statements imply that there was an upside to slavery. Slavery wasn't a jobs program that taught beneficial skills. it was literally dehumanizing and subjugating people as property because they lacked any rights or freedoms.
* This isn’t about Critical Race Theory. This isn’t about being Woke or Anti-Woke. This is about teaching our kids that there were absolutely no positive aspects of slavery.

**Why This Matters:** If the goal was to highlight how black history is more than tragedy, sadness and brutality, then that is great. If they want to talk about the insurmountable odds our ancestors overcame to make an impact on our country, then great. But the above statements from the Florida educational entities fail to reflect that sentiment.
* Failures of leadership like this by Governor Ron Desantis tarnish the Republican brand and prevent the GOP from growing in black and brown communities. This is one of the reasons Republicans haven't won a national popular election in 20 years.

**Bottom-line:** If you want perspectives like this on the Republican Presidential debate stage, help me get 40,000 individual donors by Aug 23. The maximum a person can give me for the entire primary campaign is $3,300, but any amount matters.
* [Click here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmfYGANUHWIvMymlhOYpu8/mzOhO_P793CY) to help us talk to more people and qualify for the debate stage. Even donating $1 helps!

---

| | | | |
### 3\. INHUMANITY AT THE BORDER
---

|
---
| Photo: State law enforcement officers stand guard as workers deploy a string of buoys to prevent migrants from swimming across the Rio Grande in Eagle Pass on July 14 - Jordan Vonderhaar, The Texas Tribune.
**What Happened:** An email from a Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS) trooper alleges [inhumane treatment of migrants,](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmg0asZufsOqXEqb5DXZcC/9rBFSuE3XEI_) including orders to push children back into the Rio Grande and withhold water from asylum seekers.
* Amid escalating tensions over the state's aggressive border security measures, the state's DPS denies these allegations while calling for an audit.

**Go Deeper:** I cannot imagine a Texas law enforcement official giving such an order, but if someone did, then heads need to roll over the alleged inhumanity.
* We should also be outraged by the people that have caused most of the deaths and injuries of migrants over the last few years – the cartels and human smugglers who are lying to migrants and illegally pushing them across our border in between our ports of entry.

**Bottom-line:** Joe Biden's inability to control the border has caused this humanitarian crisis. This has gone on for too long under Biden and Trump. America needs a border reset. We can secure the border, treat migrants humanely, and put an end to this humanitarian crisis. Here’s how:
* Appoint a DHS Secretary who knows border security.
* Meet with border governors, sheriffs, county judges, and mayors. Listen to their needs and collaborate on solutions to fix the crisis in each community.
* Pressure the President of Mexico for cooperation and meaningful action to help us dismantle cartels and human smugglers.
* Achieve operational control of the border with technology that already exists and more manpower.
* Enlist other countries to establish welcome centers and handle the deportation of their citizens more efficiently.

---

| Thanks for subscribing and reading all the way to the end - I really appreciate you.
If you have 30 seconds, I need your help to double the number of our subscribers to The Brief. Please forward this to two friends that you think would enjoy or benefit from it.
Thank you! God bless America and don’t forget to [donate today!](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmgSvamL4EUlhUuQT2WJKG/ikGlYo4nFZxc) Will Hurd
---

| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---

_Was this message forwarded to you?_[_**Sign up**_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqhNOPmgvGIylSaagrkyFqrV32K/7u3WBKKaJ0nc) _now to get The Brief in your email._
---

---

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Greg Casar is on thirst strike today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
To fight back, we’re supporting Congressman Greg Casar at a thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capitol.

| Hi team,

Workers are getting sick and even dying in this historic heat wave— and there is NO federal law that protects workers from the heat.

Instead of helping everyday people, extremists like Texas Gov. Greg Abbott are passing laws to eliminate workers’ limited rights to things like water breaks.

To fight back, we’re supporting Congressman Greg Casar at a thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capitol. That means Congressman Casar isn’t drinking water or taking breaks from standing on the Capitol steps *all day* in solidarity with workers.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67040468/418425759/110367194?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230725-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3YjY5ZDBiLTNkMmItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LDwUDlVSRMnH9v-QHrhMSAGJLz9sXqpaILA5sOnOZC0=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67040472/418425760/110367194?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230725-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3YjY5ZDBiLTNkMmItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LDwUDlVSRMnH9v-QHrhMSAGJLz9sXqpaILA5sOnOZC0=)

We at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC know that together, we can make real change in the toughest of circumstances. **While we continue to tackle the root cause of these extreme heat waves – burning fossil fuels – we will do everything we can to protect workers everywhere from the harm they cause. **We can push back against corporate special interests that take away workers’ rights, while the Biden Administration can take action to guarantee heat safety protections for all workers.

That means Congressman Casar isn’t drinking water or taking breaks from standing on the Capitol steps all day in solidarity with workers. = | = We at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC know that together, we can make real change in the toughest of circumstances. name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: I almost lost died defending the Capitol on January 6th...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Mark Lamb declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230725-1-nor&t=1&akid=844%2E734936%2EkTrxm8)
---
Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired by far-right leaders like Sheriff Mark Lamb.
Mark Lamb recently declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
I am writing because inciting, cheering, and making excuses for an attack on our democracy should not be a prerequisite or credential to be in Congress or any position of trusted authority.
But that is part of Mark Lamb’s claim to fame. It’s why he can credibly run for U.S. Senate against Ruben.
So I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help elect Ruben. To help send a message that we cannot allow insurrectionist-cheerleaders to get into the United States Senate.
So please:
[**Can you make today the day you make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230725-1-nor&t=2&akid=844%2E734936%2EkTrxm8)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230725-1-nor&t=3&akid=844%2E734936%2EkTrxm8)
Mark Lamb says the insurrections were “very loving, Christian people.”
I can assure you they were not spreading the word of God as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how Christian and loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed.
I wonder how Christian and loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield.
But Mark Lamb doesn’t even have the courage to stand up for law enforcement officers injured or killed on duty that day. When asked about us, he said he wasn’t there and couldn’t say what was true or not.
I am going to do everything I can to help elect my friend Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking:
[**Can you contribute to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today? Use this link to give whatever you can afford to make sure he defeats Mark Lamb and anyone who runs against him in this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230725-1-nor&t=4&akid=844%2E734936%2EkTrxm8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: don't cry because it's over, smile because it happened
body:
😄😁😅 |
---
| | Hey, hey👋🏻👋🏻👋🏻,

As you probably know, the Idaho 2023 legislative session wrapped up about four months ago.

It was a time of intense battle, defending the rights and interests of the good people of Idaho and I had a hell of a good time doing it (but even disagreeable guys like me appreciate a moment's rest)!

Since the session ended, I've seamlessly transitioned back into my "regular job," relishing in quality time with my kids, and embracing the thrill of catching every bass I can.

All the while, I'm forging resilient bonds with fellow patriots both inside and outside of The Idaho Freedom Caucus. And together, we're tactfully strategizing and devising our battle plan for 2024.

_**Because The LEFT has their eyes on The Gem State.**_

And not in a good way!

They're like Smeagol, possessed and obsessed, lusting after Idaho as if it were the precious ring itself.

Remember how that ended though?

The good guys won!

So with the same spirit, I'm confident that Idaho will persist as a shining beacon of freedom in the United States for decades to come. But let's not be naive; this won't happen without a resolute FIGHT.

Are you willing to stand with us? If the answer is yes, then let's join forces (if you need help getting involved, LMK).

Because Idaho's worth every ounce of our effort, and we need all the freedom-loving warriors we can muster.

Stand strong,

Brian

**P.S.** I had a fun conversation with Wayne Hoffman yesterday. You can [**check it out here**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=22ea726f4d&e=dea908e0fe "Check it out"), along with the "District 13" spotlight they put together.

**P.P.S.** From what I gather, the powers that be aren't thrilled about people like me holding the Senate seat in District 13. If I'm correct, I could be heading into a fierce fight next year, and it's time to prepare NOW. If you believe in the cause and want to keep me in this fight, **[please consider contributing here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=c597c8c6a3&e=dea908e0fe "contribute now")** , and let's safeguard our future together.

**P.P.S.** Look at this monster I caught recently... I love this state!

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

clean_body: 😄😁😅 | | | Hey, hey👋🏻👋🏻👋🏻, As you probably know, the Idaho 2023 legislative session wrapped up about four months ago. It was a time of intense battle, defending the rights and interests of the good people of Idaho and I had a hell of a good time doing it (but even disagreeable guys like me appreciate a moment's rest)! Since the session ended, I've seamlessly transitioned back into my "regular job," relishing in quality time with my kids, and embracing the thrill of catching every bass I can. All the while, I'm forging resilient bonds with fellow patriots both inside and outside of The Idaho Freedom Caucus. And together, we're tactfully strategizing and devising our battle plan for 2024. Because The LEFT has their eyes on The Gem State. And not in a good way! They're like Smeagol, possessed and obsessed, lusting after Idaho as if it were the precious ring itself. Remember how that ended though? The good guys won! So with the same spirit, I'm confident that Idaho will persist as a shining beacon of freedom in the United States for decades to come. But let's not be naive; this won't happen without a resolute FIGHT. Are you willing to stand with us? If the answer is yes, then let's join forces (if you need help getting involved, LMK). Because Idaho's worth every ounce of our effort, and we need all the freedom-loving warriors we can muster. Stand strong, Brian P.S. I had a fun conversation with Wayne Hoffman yesterday. You can "Check it out", along with the "District 13" spotlight they put together. P.P.S. From what I gather, the powers that be aren't thrilled about people like me holding the Senate seat in District 13. If I'm correct, I could be heading into a fierce fight next year, and it's time to prepare NOW. If you believe in the cause and want to keep me in this fight, "contribute now" , and let's safeguard our future together. P.P.S. Look at this monster I caught recently... I love this state! \--- 1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com to your address book or whitelist me. 2) Want to get off this list? . 3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753 4) Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> "get in the fight" | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Copyright © 2023 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: It costs our team $8-$10 to put together one backpack filled with school supplies.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Will you help us get the school year started off right for kids in our community?
#
On Friday we emailed you about our back-to-school backpack drive, and our goal of giving out 2,000 backpacks to kids in our community who don’t have one as they head back to school.
Thanks to the generosity of this community, after just four days we’re already halfway to our goal!
[So what do you say? Will you make a $8 contribution today to help us reach our goal of giving away 2,000 backpacks with school supplies to children across New York City?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230725-backpacks.n6pGcm&refcode=em20230725-4692-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=1&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)
**[Contribute🎒✏️📗](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230725-backpacks.n6pGcm&refcode=em20230725-4692-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=2&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)**
We’ve run the numbers and it costs our team $8-$10 to put together one backpack filled with school supplies.
Last year, we gave out 1,015 backpacks to kids in our community who didn’t have one as they head back to school. This year, we want to double that number.
[Will you pitch in $8 right now to help us reach our 2,000 backpack goal? We’re already halfway to our goal, so your support will help us cross the finish line.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230725-backpacks.n6pGcm&refcode=em20230725-4692-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=3&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)
We’re so thankful for any amount that you can contribute today to help us reach our goal.
Yours in community,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $8](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230725-backpacks.n6pGcm&refcode=em20230725-4692-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=4&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230725-backpacks?refcode=em20230725-4692-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=5&refcode2=4692_2526796_GlP5OJ&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230725-4692-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=6&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=4692%2E2526796%2EGlP5OJ)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Kevin Lincoln
subject: From Marine One to Mayor
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track? | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_t=GdZFVLkrZpRKMfoTVQ27ap4wRli0fCGO_TjSE2tU6nl_q0XS-mLrQoGhjOWwPquvVZPrY6413vldUKOXA-FzwA9hRo6WmOSF6_hDpjGSDKI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_t=GdZFVLkrZpRKMfoTVQ27ap4wRli0fCGO_TjSE2tU6nl_q0XS-mLrQoGhjOWwPquvVZPrY6413vldUKOXA-FzwA9hRo6WmOSF6_hDpjGSDKI%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_e=5130QD0Vj5n7dMbtA01ciIimO87-OLHSKmQCTZGWj1JTx4ToJHhW7LybKvf0htf3len4yqfIBn5J5L3-l0a7UgV_ZsD1IwP-cfrPvZ-qrXviCn7NQTO9bKq9tHN-aoUdQ8KlF2b0iXlEiCtoft2GiFc5Cr6dlbsm5NlZlE4Q9gMsUwiFYFxSV8AkDZUl20nXQY9rPxjYPmei9tTtkz5r7lyUXrIKJ4ETzgKSGPfsnmlUGA3bLUGINcoN6HhUldeZu7kNSHhJ_m0AQJbTNbFE0AmP_29M5G_yXSoFMgpns_It6EzTv8xjIuB7HPHky_jHQcBuioJSStfaUq3PUHvQf-dXWzmR4qJ9tg9oB6Co90ZLDsyzzTAhbeontZoAVRUxS73l4zH5CbketHfKTayDDQ%3D%3D)
Peter,

I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – _one of the most competitive House races in the country._

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics.**

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_e=5130QD0Vj5n7dMbtA01ciIimO87-OLHSKmQCTZGWj1JTx4ToJHhW7LybKvf0htf3len4yqfIBn5J5L3-l0a7UgV_ZsD1IwP-cfrPvZ-qrXviCn7NQTO9bKq9tHN-aoUdQ8KlF2b0iXlEiCtoft2GiFc5Cr6dlbsm5NlZlE4Q9gMsUwiFYFxSV8AkDZUl20nXQY9rPxjYPmei9tTtkz5r7lyUXrIKJ4ETzgKSGPfsnmnqKmpvUr9PXjJvy6k4Kvp5iTaZVrgiotAXZIU_kKhwadv52-sRSDlkKEU6wzv85m8-GeBgy_C185yJVMdimpaVLGkxh6WFlFrEW5KPSsMjBAcTQBycC7eIWx0Yo-OAH_ssCXYBeStUIk38rVYoCGpstAH5prFNJuVgMftumBMaow%3D%3D)
Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer.

After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader.

**Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California.**

As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime.

America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them.

**I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve.**

[**Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track by supporting my campaign with a $5, $10 or $15 contribution today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_e=5130QD0Vj5n7dMbtA01ciIimO87-OLHSKmQCTZGWj1JTx4ToJHhW7LybKvf0htf3len4yqfIBn5J5L3-l0a7UgV_ZsD1IwP-cfrPvZ-qrXviCn7NQTO9bKq9tHN-aoUdQ8KlF2b0iXlEiCtoft2GiFc5Cr6dlbsm5NlZlE4Q9gMsUwiFYFxSV8AkDZUl20nXQY9rPxjYPmei9tTtkz5r7lyUXrIKJ4ETzgKSGPfsnmkPAvWn3HiAhVveGejuH-JUqPDaRCQMJoGNqbWe4JnWyguINayy5QiytfgsWVWWIuN8MVAL_jZiSn_HgPPj2JIJ8RUGado02nxi0sUy3k4enFlZqpsAEmwjV31DPpVV96efn330LtllQNdxB6uaTOqGPrMGna7YAcWHIpd66zIK4A%3D%3D)

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_e=5130QD0Vj5n7dMbtA01ciIimO87-OLHSKmQCTZGWj1JTx4ToJHhW7LybKvf0htf3len4yqfIBn5J5L3-l0a7UgV_ZsD1IwP-cfrPvZ-qrXviCn7NQTO9bKq9tHN-aoUdQ8KlF2b0iXlEiCtoft2GiFc5Cr6dlbsm5NlZlE4Q9gMsUwiFYFxSV8AkDZUl20nXQY9rPxjYPmei9tTtkz5r7lyUXrIKJ4ETzgKSGPfsnmnlBlqGet4fOxqn6FcGrU7c5xwuFlTHpgp3lTSbxyfLW1I7xeEXnDwXCHNjtXN4k9lt3UBNlQ55VIvVrFIcf2salx0jp5D-opYujJbhz3N1jJEW3x3NL_j20xXpDixsfyTkMv-R0GZx6SY9PHwLSJ4SFyd2RfiSkLKhXep2zJTYsA%3D%3D)
Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it?

We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again.

**California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation.**

[**But I need your help to win the fight so I can make it to Congress and get to work. Will you send in a Marine and mayor? Please join me today with a contribution of just $5, $10, $15 or more.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_e=5130QD0Vj5n7dMbtA01ciIimO87-OLHSKmQCTZGWj1JTx4ToJHhW7LybKvf0htf3len4yqfIBn5J5L3-l0a7UgV_ZsD1IwP-cfrPvZ-qrXviCn7NQTO9bKq9tHN-aoUdQ8KlF2b0iXlEiCtoft2GiFc5Cr6dlbsm5NlZlE4Q9gMsUwiFYFxSV8AkDZUl20nXQY9rPxjYPmei9tTtkz5r7lyUXrIKJ4ETzgKSGPfsnmmWfkVLs1nW0I-CULDuCU0VmcNFZIZ1Y0rsBlrjER6jrO46XXgzFNeMYF2VeYtdQVj88OpHcFoIJ3BCnqB-EA8vEYbl30PxAVMGAWYR7AHOSoF6CJZES8sD37d1svDWdoUCu3Hljfo1pGLv8fCuaIypV1_wnuIM-Eu_eKhP0mL9Uw%3D%3D)

For America,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_e=5130QD0Vj5n7dMbtA01ciIimO87-OLHSKmQCTZGWj1JTx4ToJHhW7LybKvf0htf3len4yqfIBn5J5L3-l0a7UgV_ZsD1IwP-cfrPvZ-qrXviCn7NQTO9bKq9tHN-aoUdQ8KlF2b0iXlEiCtoft2GiFc5Cr6dlbsm5NlZlE4Q9gMsUwiFYFxSV8AkDZUl20nXQY9rPxjYPmei9tTtkz5r7lyUXrIKJ4ETzgKSGPfsnmmxQcwkmB8JPgJneLDxBLYI6MKb3tqmTYQH2CaLcdaN1FAd4wrnzUpFzwdPWxrXCCOyMtfoevsK4t7_swwTCXmRqSeNqCdgNEUjRinFz3mtlgU3-nQf5oxrSYzJoH-MLX4KFc5WOIhYgN98afIBphClUPPV-izzv3EuMQIJl5mkGQ%3D%3D)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.
[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8a7a068749041b5a1f3f7a283704f9d&_e=5130QD0Vj5n7dMbtA01ciIimO87-OLHSKmQCTZGWj1JTx4ToJHhW7LybKvf0htf3len4yqfIBn5J5L3-l0a7UgV_ZsD1IwP-cfrPvZ-qrXviCn7NQTO9bKq9tHN-aoUdQ8KlF2b0iXlEiCtoft2GiFc5Cr6dlbsm5NlZlE4Q9gMsUwiFYFxSV8AkDZUl20nXQY9rPxjYPmei9tTtkz5r7lyUXrIKJ4ETzgKSGPfsnmmxUz7Km90MpncOQuPKNz19ZCEhbrGnsRP_mdeWcc4l1_zk3xkRCfT0aEKLAP9M77gVelcYU_W1rhuGMxvRYSL87MbgLdr1L211dipqp0wWsXzcFE4SYP1afJuJbrHICH5Fz1At_Zb-XyrHIijr0KRGQZybID8lG6z6VX8QnmJNfA%3D%3D)
---

name: Alex Padilla
subject: The Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal and Transparency Act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
since the Supreme Court has demonstrated that they’re unwilling to hold themselves accountable, it’s up to Congress to do it for them.
#

Friend,
Earlier this week, my colleagues and I on the Senate Judiciary Committee voted to bring the _Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal and Transparency Act_ to the Senate Floor.
Our legislation would bring much-needed changes to the Supreme Court.
It would establish new rules around conflicts of interest, create a publicly available code of conduct, require gift, travel, and income disclosures, and more.
**Friend, I don’t think it’s radical to say that the Supreme Court — the highest court in the nation — should have enforceable ethics standards on par with almost every other government employee.**
And since the Supreme Court has demonstrated that they’re unwilling to hold themselves to a high ethical standard, it’s up to Congress to do it for them. **
And even though the bill passed through the Judiciary Committee, _every single Republican voted against it._ **
So today I’m asking you to lend me your support and help me show to my Republican colleagues that the American people _overwhelmingly_ support holding the Supreme Court accountable for their corruption.
**
[**Will you please sign on and say you support the _Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act_? It’s important to know I’ve got your support on this. ](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scert_survey_230725/?source=em230725-1-30&refcode2=1439.159979.sRem1l&akid=1439%2E159979%2EsRem1l)**
**[SIGN ON](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scert_survey_230725/?source=em230725-1-30&refcode2=1439.159979.sRem1l&akid=1439%2E159979%2EsRem1l)**
Thanks for your support, friend. More soon.
\- Alex Padilla
**[SIGN ON](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scert_survey_230725/?source=em230725-1-30&refcode2=1439.159979.sRem1l&akid=1439%2E159979%2EsRem1l)**

[](https://consultmilk.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2644a174ae3f4612d98d05cc&id=9d8a7a1786&e=c5b02c41f0)
# Unveiled: Gen Z's Secret Strategies of Ballot Harvesting & Early Voting to Revitalize the Republican Party!
Friend,
As we inch closer to the 2024 electoral season, it seems the Republican Party is beginning to perceive ballot harvesting as an essential element of successful election campaigning. Nevertheless, the decision to capitulate and engage in ballot harvesting is a source of mixed feelings.
Even though the campaign engines are already humming, the much-anticipated 2024 presidential race won't officially kick off until the Iowa caucuses scheduled for Jan. 22, 2024.
Despite the fact that Super Tuesday is only tentatively scheduled for March 5 of the following year, debates on the merits and demerits of ballot harvesting and mail-in ballots are already in motion.
Republicans, for many years, have voiced their opposition to the practices of mail-in voting and ballot harvesting. However, they are now acknowledging that to emerge victoriously, they must adapt.
Ballot harvesting refers to the practice where third-parties collect filled-out mail-in ballots from voters and deliver them in bulk to a drop box or local elections office.
While every state permits absentee voting, the rules and procedures significantly differ from state to state.
As reported by the National Conference of State Legislatures, 31 states allow voters to delegate someone else to return their ballot.
Out of these, nine limit the number of ballots that an authorized person can return, and four limit the duration those ballots can remain in the authorized person's possession before being returned.
Alabama has a standing law that prohibits anyone other than the voter from returning their ballot. In Mississippi, a slew of civil rights organizations have filed a lawsuit over a recent state law that would outlaw ballot harvesting.
In data gathered by USA Facts in 2021, it was found that three states—Florida, Georgia, and Iowa—reduced the number of allowed ballot drop boxes per county and enacted regulations necessitating constant monitoring of drop boxes by county election officials. On the other hand, Illinois, Kentucky, and Virginia enacted laws that augmented the number of drop box locations.
Twelve states restrict the number of ballots a third party can return on behalf of other voters.
In 2022, Dinesh D’Souza premiered a documentary titled “2000 Mules,” claiming that 2,000 individuals were hired by unidentified nonprofits to collect ballots unlawfully and deliver them to drop boxes in crucial swing states before the 2020 presidential election.
To truly grasp the power of ballot harvesting and mail-in ballots in an election, a dive into the numbers is imperative.
A study conducted by Pew Research in November 2020 revealed that 54 percent of voters cast their ballots in person during the November 2020 presidential election, compared to 46 percent who voted via mail-in or absentee ballot. Only 27 percent reported voting in person on Election Day, while an equal percentage voted through in-person early voting.
While 37 percent of former President Donald Trump's supporters cast their votes in person on Election Day, a mere 17 percent of Biden supporters did the same.
Where 30 percent of Trump supporters voted early, only 24 percent of Biden's supporters cast their ballots in person before Election Day.
Notably, while 32 percent of Trump supporters voted through mail-in or absentee ballots, over half of Biden's supporters, 58 percent, voted using the mail-in method.
The U.S. Census Bureau released polling data in April 2021 showing that 69 percent of voters in the 2020 presidential election voted by mail or early voting, marking it the “highest rate of nontraditional voting for a presidential election” recorded.
In comparison, during the 2016 presidential election, 40 percent of Americans voted through mail-in ballots.
'An Enormous Misstep'
After years of disparaging ballot harvesting and the shift towards mail-in voting, some Republicans are beginning to reconsider their party's unyielding resistance to both practices.
2 Months Ago, in a fundraising email sent in February, Trump asked supporters to contribute to his “ballot harvesting fund,” stating:
“Either we ballot harvest where we can, or you can say goodbye to America!”
On May 6, 2021, Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis of Florida ratified SB 90 into law, effectively outlawing ballot harvesting in the state.
However, as a contender for the Republican nomination for the 2024 electoral cycle, DeSantis reassured a voter at a campaign stop in Iowa on June 1:
"We're going to do ballot harvesting.”
He added:
“I'm doing it. Yes. I'm not going to fight with one hand tied behind my back.”
During a September 2020 interview with C-SPAN, Republican National Committee Chair Ronna McDaniel criticized the rapid expansion of mail-in voting and ballot harvesting in the name of public safety during the COVID-19 pandemic, without first establishing a system to ensure the process's integrity.
Two years later, in an interview with Fox News, McDaniel stated that Republican voters need to start voting early.
In June, McDaniel launched the GOP’s new “Bank Your Vote” initiative.
In a video promoting the project, McDaniel emphasized that the GOP is going to partake in the ballot harvesting practice solely as a means to “protect the vote,” and because it’s necessary for Republicans to adopt similar strategies since Democrats have already established a successful edge.
On June 20, Mike Lindell discussed the topic of ballot harvesting with McDaniel. Lindell described the plan as:
“The dumbest I’ve ever heard.” According to Lindell, McDaniel responded that the RNC has to “do everything we can to win.”
Lindell expressed to the sources that he didn’t want to debate with McDaniel, but he believes the RNC has committed a grave error.
Lindell criticized the approach of suddenly changing tune and hoping states will legalize ballot harvesting. He described it as a desperate move.
'It’s a Bad Plan'
Michael Thompson, chairman of the Lee County Republican Executive Committee and Election Integrity Committee member of the Republican Party of Florida, noted that the term “ballot harvesting” instills fear in many Republicans.
Thompson voiced his belief that Republicans are now accepting ballot harvesting and mail-in voting simply “because Democrats have been so successful at it.”
However, he's concerned that the Democrats will keep a close eye on Republicans to ensure they're doing it right and if they aren’t, they’re going to accuse Republicans of trying to rig the elections.
[**Secure the future of American democracy today - Click here to donate and support the Rethink! GOP initiative!**](https://consultmilk.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2644a174ae3f4612d98d05cc&id=3b8893ff75&e=c5b02c41f0)
[](https://consultmilk.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2644a174ae3f4612d98d05cc&id=3f3784f635&e=c5b02c41f0)
[**Secure the future of American democracy today - Click here to donate and support the Rethink! GOP initiative!**](https://consultmilk.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2644a174ae3f4612d98d05cc&id=c831535a4b&e=c5b02c41f0)
'It’s Crucial We Compete'
Corey Gibson expressed enthusiasm about the prospect of leveling the playing field in terms of ballot harvesting. As the national executive director of development for Rethink! GOP, he will play a crucial role in devising what he promises will be a winning strategy.
Gibson also said, the organization has assembled a skilled “army of social media influencers.”
“We’re the first national ballot harvesting project,” Gibson said.
“We’ve been able to unite Gen Z leadership with ‘established,’ rather than ‘establishment,’ leaders and champions for voter integrity. Now, like with everything else in life, it’s a matter of fundraising.”
While some are concerned about the optics of Republicans’ embracing a practice they were condemning not long ago, Gibson said he has come in contact with many who are relieved that the party is finally competing with Democrats in this way.
“By and large, everybody hates ballot harvesting,” he said. “But they also hate the fact that it’s legal and we’re not doing it and we’re continuing to lose. It’s here. We have to compete to win elections.”
Robert Duran IV, President of Rethink! GOP, vehemently denounces any negativity surrounding the topic of ballot harvesting. In an exclusive interview, Duran asserted:"Ballot harvesting, much like any other tool, is neither inherently good nor evil. It depends on how we utilize it. It's imperative to understand that this could be our secret weapon for the 2024 election."
Speaking to the potential potency of this weapon, Duran stated:
"The Democrats have effectively used ballot harvesting for years. Instead of dismissing it outright, we should embrace it and use it to level the playing field. This does not mean we endorse fraudulent practices, rather we insist on an open and fair process that ensures the representation of every voter."
Robert Duran IV, a member of Gen Z himself, is emphasizing the importance of this generation's role in the upcoming elections.
Gen Z is not only one of the most diverse generations in American history, but by 2024, they will also make up nearly 30% of the electorate.
"Gen Z is a powerful, driving force that can't be overlooked. As the first digitally native generation, they have a unique perspective on the world, especially politics," Duran said. "They are highly engaged, well-informed, and not afraid to challenge the status quo. They crave authentic representation, and that is what we are offering."
Duran further explained why the GOP is working so closely with Gen Z, stating:
"In essence, Gen Z is our future. They are not just passive spectators; they are active participants eager to shape the world. By engaging with them and involving them in the electoral process, we can harness their energy, innovation, and vision to bring about meaningful changes. This is not about pandering to a specific demographic; it is about integrating their voices into the larger political conversation."
As we approach the 2024 election, the Republican party seems to be broadening its strategies.
By recognizing the potential in ballot harvesting and prioritizing the engagement with Gen Z, the GOP appears to be repositioning itself for a strong electoral fight. The results, however, will depend on how effectively these strategies are implemented and how receptive voters are to these changes. The 2024 election, thus, promises to be a test of both the adaptability and resilience of the Republican party.
As Robert Duran IV, himself a representative of Gen Z and a leading voice in the GOP, said, "We are not just preparing to compete, we are preparing to win."
Best,
**Robert Duran IV** PresidentRethink! GOP

Nevertheless, the decision to capitulate and engage in ballot harvesting is a source of mixed feelings. Even though the campaign engines are already humming, the much-anticipated 2024 presidential race won't officially kick off until the Iowa caucuses scheduled for Jan. 22, 2024. Despite the fact that Super Tuesday is only tentatively scheduled for March 5 of the following year, debates on the merits and demerits of ballot harvesting and mail-in ballots are already in motion. Republicans, for many years, have voiced their opposition to the practices of mail-in voting and ballot harvesting. However, they are now acknowledging that to emerge victoriously, they must adapt. Ballot harvesting refers to the practice where third-parties collect filled-out mail-in ballots from voters and deliver them in bulk to a drop box or local elections office. While every state permits absentee voting, the rules and procedures significantly differ from state to state. As reported by the National Conference of State Legislatures, 31 states allow voters to delegate someone else to return their ballot. Out of these, nine limit the number of ballots that an authorized person can return, and four limit the duration those ballots can remain in the authorized person's possession before being returned. Alabama has a standing law that prohibits anyone other than the voter from returning their ballot. In Mississippi, a slew of civil rights organizations have filed a lawsuit over a recent state law that would outlaw ballot harvesting. In data gathered by USA Facts in 2021, it was found that three states—Florida, Georgia, and Iowa—reduced the number of allowed ballot drop boxes per county and enacted regulations necessitating constant monitoring of drop boxes by county election officials. On the other hand, Illinois, Kentucky, and Virginia enacted laws that augmented the number of drop box locations. Twelve states restrict the number of ballots a third party can return on behalf of other voters. In 2022, Dinesh D’Souza premiered a documentary titled “2000 Mules,” claiming that 2,000 individuals were hired by unidentified nonprofits to collect ballots unlawfully and deliver them to drop boxes in crucial swing states before the 2020 presidential election. To truly grasp the power of ballot harvesting and mail-in ballots in an election, a dive into the numbers is imperative. A study conducted by Pew Research in November 2020 revealed that 54 percent of voters cast their ballots in person during the November 2020 presidential election, compared to 46 percent who voted via mail-in or absentee ballot. Only 27 percent reported voting in person on Election Day, while an equal percentage voted through in-person early voting. While 37 percent of former President Donald Trump's supporters cast their votes in person on Election Day, a mere 17 percent of Biden supporters did the same. Where 30 percent of Trump supporters voted early, only 24 percent of Biden's supporters cast their ballots in person before Election Day. Notably, while 32 percent of Trump supporters voted through mail-in or absentee ballots, over half of Biden's supporters, 58 percent, voted using the mail-in method. The U.S. Census Bureau released polling data in April 2021 showing that 69 percent of voters in the 2020 presidential election voted by mail or early voting, marking it the “highest rate of nontraditional voting for a presidential election” recorded. In comparison, during the 2016 presidential election, 40 percent of Americans voted through mail-in ballots. 'An Enormous Misstep' After years of disparaging ballot harvesting and the shift towards mail-in voting, some Republicans are beginning to reconsider their party's unyielding resistance to both practices. 2 Months Ago, in a fundraising email sent in February, Trump asked supporters to contribute to his “ballot harvesting fund,” stating: “Either we ballot harvest where we can, or you can say goodbye to America!” On May 6, 2021, Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis of Florida ratified SB 90 into law, effectively outlawing ballot harvesting in the state. However, as a contender for the Republican nomination for the 2024 electoral cycle, DeSantis reassured a voter at a campaign stop in Iowa on June 1: "We're going to do ballot harvesting.” He added: “I'm doing it. Yes. I'm not going to fight with one hand tied behind my back.” During a September 2020 interview with C-SPAN, Republican National Committee Chair Ronna McDaniel criticized the rapid expansion of mail-in voting and ballot harvesting in the name of public safety during the COVID-19 pandemic, without first establishing a system to ensure the process's integrity. Two years later, in an interview with Fox News, McDaniel stated that Republican voters need to start voting early. In June, McDaniel launched the GOP’s new “Bank Your Vote” initiative. In a video promoting the project, McDaniel emphasized that the GOP is going to partake in the ballot harvesting practice solely as a means to “protect the vote,” and because it’s necessary for Republicans to adopt similar strategies since Democrats have already established a successful edge. On June 20, Mike Lindell discussed the topic of ballot harvesting with McDaniel. Lindell described the plan as: “The dumbest I’ve ever heard.” According to Lindell, McDaniel responded that the RNC has to “do everything we can to win.” Lindell expressed to the sources that he didn’t want to debate with McDaniel, but he believes the RNC has committed a grave error. Lindell criticized the approach of suddenly changing tune and hoping states will legalize ballot harvesting. He described it as a desperate move. 'It’s a Bad Plan' Michael Thompson, chairman of the Lee County Republican Executive Committee and Election Integrity Committee member of the Republican Party of Florida, noted that the term “ballot harvesting” instills fear in many Republicans. Thompson voiced his belief that Republicans are now accepting ballot harvesting and mail-in voting simply “because Democrats have been so successful at it.” However, he's concerned that the Democrats will keep a close eye on Republicans to ensure they're doing it right and if they aren’t, they’re going to accuse Republicans of trying to rig the elections. 'It’s Crucial We Compete' Corey Gibson expressed enthusiasm about the prospect of leveling the playing field in terms of ballot harvesting. As the national executive director of development for Rethink! GOP, he will play a crucial role in devising what he promises will be a winning strategy. Gibson also said, the organization has assembled a skilled “army of social media influencers.” “We’re the first national ballot harvesting project,” Gibson said. “We’ve been able to unite Gen Z leadership with ‘established,’ rather than ‘establishment,’ leaders and champions for voter integrity. Now, like with everything else in life, it’s a matter of fundraising.” While some are concerned about the optics of Republicans’ embracing a practice they were condemning not long ago, Gibson said he has come in contact with many who are relieved that the party is finally competing with Democrats in this way. “By and large, everybody hates ballot harvesting,” he said. “But they also hate the fact that it’s legal and we’re not doing it and we’re continuing to lose. It’s here. We have to compete to win elections.” Robert Duran IV, President of Rethink! GOP, vehemently denounces any negativity surrounding the topic of ballot harvesting. In an exclusive interview, Duran asserted:"Ballot harvesting, much like any other tool, is neither inherently good nor evil. It depends on how we utilize it. It's imperative to understand that this could be our secret weapon for the 2024 election." Speaking to the potential potency of this weapon, Duran stated: "The Democrats have effectively used ballot harvesting for years. Instead of dismissing it outright, we should embrace it and use it to level the playing field. This does not mean we endorse fraudulent practices, rather we insist on an open and fair process that ensures the representation of every voter." Robert Duran IV, a member of Gen Z himself, is emphasizing the importance of this generation's role in the upcoming elections. Gen Z is not only one of the most diverse generations in American history, but by 2024, they will also make up nearly 30% of the electorate. "Gen Z is a powerful, driving force that can't be overlooked. As the first digitally native generation, they have a unique perspective on the world, especially politics," Duran said. "They are highly engaged, well-informed, and not afraid to challenge the status quo. They crave authentic representation, and that is what we are offering." Duran further explained why the GOP is working so closely with Gen Z, stating: "In essence, Gen Z is our future. They are not just passive spectators; they are active participants eager to shape the world. By engaging with them and involving them in the electoral process, we can harness their energy, innovation, and vision to bring about meaningful changes. This is not about pandering to a specific demographic; it is about integrating their voices into the larger political conversation." As we approach the 2024 election, the Republican party seems to be broadening its strategies. By recognizing the potential in ballot harvesting and prioritizing the engagement with Gen Z, the GOP appears to be repositioning itself for a strong electoral fight. The results, however, will depend on how effectively these strategies are implemented and how receptive voters are to these changes. The 2024 election, thus, promises to be a test of both the adaptability and resilience of the Republican party. As Robert Duran IV, himself a representative of Gen Z and a leading voice in the GOP, said, "We are not just preparing to compete, we are preparing to win." Best, Robert Duran IV PresidentRethink! I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).
