I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation. After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, and I had to concede my race. | Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control. Everyone expected me to just walk away - but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up. I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again. The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up. My stomach is in knots - the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do). That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?" I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work. The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me. The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. Forever. I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out: | | | God bless you, and God bless America. Mayra Flores America First Candidate Texas Congressional District 34 | | Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress PO BOX 341027 Austin, TX 78734 Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: I’ll be honest with you

body:

name: Katie Porter
subject: Big movie profits & union power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Across industries, CEOs and those at the very top are seeing skyrocketing, record profits.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)
**Technology can’t be an excuse to bust unions and leave workers behind.** But that’s exactly what TV and movie studio executives are doing.
The Progressive Change Campaign Committee and I are proud to stand with the writers and actors currently on strike. [**Can you join us and sign our petition in support of workers today?**](https://actionnetwork.org/forms/support-striking-workers/?source=EMAJ25_1_STR_20230725_V1_F&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)
Across industries, CEOs and those at the very top are seeing skyrocketing, record profits. **The Barbie and Oppenheimer movies just brought in a combined $235.5 million in a single weekend!** Workers deserve their fair share.
[](https://actionnetwork.org/forms/support-striking-workers/?source=EMAJ25_1_STR_20230725_V1_F&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)
Earlier this year I joined striking writers in Culver City and heard firsthand about their fight for a more fair contract.
But this isn’t just about Hollywood or getting our favorite TV shows back. **We need strong unions to stand against corporate greed in every industry.** As a consumer protection attorney, I’ve seen how healthy unions benefit consumers—they often push for things that keep all of us safer, like better safety guidelines on airplanes or in hospitals.
The strikes are fundamentally about standing up to corporate power. [**I hope you'll sign on in support.**](https://actionnetwork.org/forms/support-striking-workers/?source=EMAJ25_1_STR_20230725_V1_F&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)
**[Sign the Petition ›››](https://actionnetwork.org/forms/support-striking-workers/?source=EMAJ25_1_STR_20230725_V1_F&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)**
Onward!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ25_1_STR_20230725_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27099_3422442_urUfZS&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=27099%2E3422442%2EurUfZS)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Could a Republican Race in Deep-Red Mississippi depend on Democrat turnout?
body:
That was the latest headline in an American Family News article and there is a lot of truth to it. Delbert appointed 13 of 16 Democrats to powerful committee chairmanships and bragged, "You'll see Democrats and Republicans heading committees here... I see no difference in whether it's a man or woman, Republican or Democrat, minority or whatever. We all got elected."

---|---|---
Delbert can't hide behind a mask anymore
That was the latest headline in an [American Family News](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/67e6552f-ce04-47eb-b1f4-5b324d18903c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) article and there is a lot of truth to it.
Delbert appointed 13 of 16 Democrats to powerful committee chairmanships and bragged, "You'll see Democrats and Republicans heading committees here... I see no difference in whether it's a man or woman, Republican or Democrat, minority or whatever. We all got elected."
Delbert can't even see a difference between Republicans and Democrats; why would we as conservatives ever put power into this man's hands? And his policies that he's pushed in the last 4 years certainly show that he's not beholden to our own Republican Party platform.
Jameson Taylor, Director of Policy and Legislative Affairs at American Family Action, was quoted in the article:
Delbert's strategy is to try to turn out Democrats to vote in the Republican primary. Delbert even has a poll that shows that he will win if Democrats are able to hijack the Republican primary. If conservatives show up, Chris McDaniel will win. If Democrats show up, the moderate Delbert Hosemann will win.
I encourage you to not only support Chris McDaniel by showing up to the polls two weeks from today, on August 8th, but to do like I have and personally give to McDaniel's election campaign to help push him across the finish line in these last two weeks.
You can go online to the [Committee to Elect Chris McDaniel (winred.com)](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bfc39e57-822f-4343-a64b-f3c3d3aefee9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to give directly to the Chris McDaniel campaign and help take back our state.
[](https://substack.com/profile/135347872-steven-utroska)| A guest post by| [Steven Utroska](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/450a34ec-bd4f-4b65-9e98-99926abcb143?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)MS Director State Freedom Caucus Network. Mississippi Native. Engineer. Platform purist. Partisan Hack Job. Laissez-faire. ₿. name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Did you happen to catch my announcement video?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
In April, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in the United States Senate.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_t=JpoLXYllr530Os-wGP50r2KLK0A4ZfCEx5cnhf9_D18jJrvxLzIIPdkxlisbja0yc1SPDLipwoYHYUZM48PZtnu3MZ63n7h5x0BFyjbRx4U%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_t=JpoLXYllr530Os-wGP50r2KLK0A4ZfCEx5cnhf9_D18jJrvxLzIIPdkxlisbja0yc1SPDLipwoYHYUZM48PZtnu3MZ63n7h5x0BFyjbRx4U%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2F0UmzzjKxibVULIDYr3dOz0YslFzMhTV7K0Xhq8hRGPGpTW1v17toW8XtVjmka0m2zqo3d8MqQOqA2zcM5FDGauWyKfXfmkKpkf02iLyvBCwlqevmNd7GYibZOIOPyA1pARzE6i77f8R66qBRtr5dFI%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb – I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

We need leaders in this country who aren’t too politically correct to protect us, and that’s why [**in April I announced my candidacy for United States Senate.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2F4NzXwww3Z5YNtiJPptTm56bBShJ3A7GA-sx9wRW4r-BI7f0yreDdSzbywCD44PNYwjV-blDIrJ7W9Gh_E6Xj1OWVljXbND4wJ9ZCPliJ7kD3iTDd-uYz8A-QFzYFytOfRKMLeaTMNffANQ3cfQLx2c%3D)

**_[Washington needs a new Sheriff in town.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2F0ObHGhH0kiyYSOcXwdCuO3qA4ZIoH3ptv5ne9c2hmMgYsKgsCI3UkvEZCTHchXuqttI-bR07DJik2-upO5fI1GTeXfQ-oP5arDHqxUzqvuRPH3p8pLgNtDLatmxkoAsoXdpqo-VbvYeL99OimmTALg%3D)_**
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2F_LYpfPXYrbQaRdjbXYOMd5WNvwN_dxapiqLbbvQRNuHhFk2vdm14d67obClF0J9196GUIpIj9U404pJKdiuY04zYTX_QGNzFpXzXFgGlw4MHxJKCAecY5O-5jVKvLiZZ31gjQhMO43K0rAbj4bcPFQ%3D)
[**WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO NOW ▶**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2Fx0C__t2WqaHYs5gkvdZeHX6K91tOFaZkphFqus50RjDBX-wUHSuwhKUk6T8W3e0z7wJ84DllqkSqUsUCtz0It6IRQeBb1zg4RKg8X8hRfBPBwlVxRUOUCHqeawAmUeL8iE5UMD8OZjluwKmge8dvqU%3D)

The people of Pinal County, Arizona, elected me to be their top Law Enforcement official because they know that [**I’m tougher than a $2 steak.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2FwLg6q1478JkPiliUFyLXRLcbv5Y_x-9NoIUfhGG6pkvTiHqDCToQRUgoyaaNAIQO9-uN7yrFmNuLlrqWlyQUJ4Asfa_r2IhBvXuVVjNPfUxsi0bwt1H53_CUVY_H49x91lTl1owDOT5Br7EXmYyaD4%3D)

**I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.** I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

I will defend our Second Amendment and the right to life. I’ll work to cut wasteful spending, fight inflation, and put more money back in your pocket. [**These are the fights we must win, Fellow Conservative.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2FwjwkWSzmzZV905o-WZoMnCxpA7iUUQZ01la8yPOgWe4bYFf48cClvErSqGQAbpjD-dhtShYMyCtVZVgaYV2kbKQPcCnNtfaTqIWB5GM3L6GYc7pNMbRcTAV7xB_FEmWaru4AyKuAa5VUi4a2DMpizA%3D)

I’m Mark Lamb, and I’m ready to lay down the law – [**_are you with me?_**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2F2fcptCAL2uJ8VocsIHOCVvZlxK4eQjXg82zF5OKiVoCEju-tXgkP3OFY4kCUEsyAq3c7qqapAhzRzC7UQ--NvT6PTj8B3VFikR3aB74cIFIuTVHxsf2IlrHSA9AL2nqaDJZLWUNZeHcvLvvVBnTa-U%3D)

Thank you,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c404d19aafd42f5b3a790b646988ac2&_e=AD8w2ft2YP1jRsvAJ6PM5_Xn4fNnn3-VqpyMk-8OPOWIJfEVpcjV0kJLxwvL24tdge5IrI3EJjKCQ4XqVhxlktlGim-sNxJNkckrbAoXZJtQb9z6GPJWFwNVw49hiVdq87ABs_7kkeu3TsTUwT0uy-bwHCO749qHy0UrCCAhLsasasf7JLBhd6JmlgsVdy_MTm3WeZ7dFO73x_BdY6Q32pVEioAMlbLaYGJEl8Jw-SlsKDKqyXdbU6iYo0qb0PMBME7sTbCZAXlB12fq1gX2F1o63EHRoiiCwD1g-kyc9jknFSAKM4OGUpUfp8gml2OPcfiUFsHX5w6rFdEJ49ZgfkEUGJmt38zHHJYcnMrcZIZSHrxm-yhL8zmpCyEliRpeJYrbRKyy1ToSxpyxCqJqfAEL7MzvU47v8gpCp-PumoA%3D)

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. | |
July 25, 2023
**California Republican Party Endorses Navy Veteran and Business Owner Michael Maher for Congress**
Fresno, CA - Last week, the California Republican Party endorsed Fresno area Navy veteran and business owner Michael Maher for Congress. Maher had previously received endorsements from the Tulare County and Fresno County Republican Parties. The state GOP endorsed him at the same meeting when they endorsed Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Congressman Jay Obernolte, Congressman Mike Garcia, Congresswoman Young Kim, Congressman Ken Calvert, and Congresswoman Michelle Steel.

"I'm honored to receive this endorsement after earning overwhelming local support. It's clear that there is real momentum building as we join together to build a better future and create more opportunities for Central Valley residents and all Americans. With my experience as a law enforcement officer, a Naval officer, and an independent business owner, I will be a fresh advocate and deliver for all Central Valley families."

Earlier this month, Michael Maher announced raising nearly $250,000 during the 2nd quarter, a tremendous demonstration of support for his campaign. Maher also earned the endorsement of notable local leaders like former Congresswoman Connie Conway, State Senator Shannon Grove, Fresno County Supervisor Buddy Mendes, and Tulare County Sheriff Mike Boudreaux, among others.
---
| Give Michael Maher a 'high five' for earning these important endorsements by [chipping in $5](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=a6d5a619e5&e=1722d05e10)—or whatever you can do—today!

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Why Greg Casar is on thirst strike today.
body:
#
Peter,
Workers are getting sick and even dying in this historic heat wave— and there is NO federal law that protects workers from the heat.
Instead of helping everyday people, extremists like Texas Gov. Greg Abbott are passing laws to eliminate workers’ limited rights to things like water breaks.
To fight back, we’re supporting Congressman Greg Casar with his thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capitol. That means Congressman Casar isn’t drinking water or taking breaks from standing on the Capitol steps *all day* in solidarity with workers.

We at Justice Democrats know that together, we can make real change in the toughest of circumstances.
We can push back against corporate special interests that take away workers’ rights, while the Biden Administration can take action to guarantee heat safety protections for all workers.
[**Can you split a $3 donation between Congressman Casar and Justice Democrats right now to help us keep up the fight for these basic rights?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136137?refcode=em20230725-30066&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=30066%2E1203867%2Ed_4Dea)
**[Donate $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136137?refcode=em20230725-30066&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=30066%2E1203867%2Ed_4Dea)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230725-30066-footer&t=21&refcode2=30066_1203867_d_4Dea&akid=30066%2E1203867%2Ed_4Dea)**

clean_body: The stakes just went up.| | | Breaking news, team — Sherrod Brown has a new GOP opponent in his race for re-election. He needs your grassroots support now more than ever, and the Michael Bennet team told us we could count on you. = = This news couldn’t have come at a worse time, friend: After The Cook Political Report called our race in Ohio a toss up, Mitch McConnell started coming after Sherrod as his top target for defeat. Now, a brand-new GOP opponent just jumped in the race to defeat Sherrod – and polls already show us in a dead heat. With Senate control on the line, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to pull ahead and win.
